feats.name: Aberration Kinship
feats.description: Your mind resonates with the inscrutable thought processes that inhuman aberrations use to communicate.

feats.name: Acrobatic Performer
feats.description: You're an incredible acrobat, evoking wonder and enrapturing audiences with your prowess.

feats.name: Acupuncturist
feats.description: You’ve studied the routes by which qi flows through the body.

feats.name: Acute Vision
feats.description: When you are raging, your visual senses improve, granting you darkvision.

feats.name: Adapted Cantrip
feats.description: Through study of multiple magical traditions, you’ve altered a spell to suit your spellcasting style.

feats.name: Adaptive Vision
feats.description: After years of using black powder weaponry in dimly lit spaces, you've become accustomed to dazzling flashes of light and sudden shifts in illumination.

feats.name: Additional Lore
feats.description: Become trained in another Lore subcategory

feats.name: Adhyabhau
feats.description: You descend from the rare psychic vampires known as vetalaranas.

feats.name: Adopted Ancestry
feats.description: Gain access to ancestry feats from another ancestry

feats.name: Adrenaline Rush
feats.description: In the heat of battle, you are capable of amazing feats of strength.

feats.name: Adroit Manipulation
feats.description: You’ve fiddled with knots, locks, and blacksmith’s puzzles since you were a child to give your hands something to do.

feats.name: Advanced Weaponry
feats.description: Your eidolon's attack evolves.

feats.name: Aegis of the Dissolution
feats.description: You are a friend of shadows and know how to avoid the troubles they bring.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Aegis of the Dissolution

feats.name: Aeonbound
feats.description: Your lineage is influenced or directly tied to the supernatural inhabitants of the Perfect City of Axis, a realm of pure and absolute order.

feats.name: Aerial Boomerang
feats.description: A blade of shearing wind races away from you in a 60-foot line.

feats.name: Ageless Spirit
feats.description: You remember more about your previous incarnations than most leshys.

feats.name: Agile Shield Grip
feats.description: You change your grip on the shield, allowing you to combine rapid attacks with your shield boss or shield spikes and your main weapon's Strikes in a series of swift motions.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Agile Shield Grip U

feats.name: Air Cushion
feats.description: Air currents flow upward to slow the target's fall to 60 feet per round.

feats.name: Alabaster Eyes
feats.description: In place of the normal vishkanyan golden eyes, you were born with especially perceptive snow-white eyes.

feats.name: Alchemical Assessment
feats.description: You can identify alchemical items quickly.

feats.name: Alchemical Crafting
feats.description: Craft alchemical items

feats.name: Alchemical Familiar
feats.description: You have used alchemy to create life, a simple creature formed from alchemical materials, reagents, and a bit of your own blood.

feats.name: Alchemical Scholar
feats.description: You gain the Alchemical Crafting feat.

feats.name: Alghollthu Bound
feats.description: Although you may not even be aware, the alghollthus your ancestors once served maintain a stranglehold on the deepest, tethered parts of your mind.

feats.name: All This Will Happen Again
feats.description: Even in the face of overwhelming tribulation, you find solace in the notion that this feeling is fleeting; all things are merely part of a never-ending cycle.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard All This Will Happen Again

feats.name: All of the Animal
feats.description: You know how to make the best and most efficient use of a hunted animal's carcass.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited All of the Animal U

feats.name: Ambersoul
feats.description: Your elemental heritage is reflected in the oils and fragrances of plants, in tree resin that fossilizes into amber, or in the gentle smell of a flower.

feats.name: Ammunition Thaumaturgy
feats.description: You're so used to handling your implement, weapon, and esoterica in the heat of combat that adding a few bullets or arrows to the mix is no extra burden.

feats.name: Anadi Lore
feats.description: You've learned how to provide for your community, be it through hard-earned sustenance or useful crafts.

feats.name: Ancestral Blood Magic
feats.description: The magic of your bloodline mixes with that of your ancestry.

feats.name: Ancestral Insight
feats.description: You have extensive knowledge of your ancestors' ancient origins.

feats.name: Ancestral Linguistics
feats.description: Over your extensive lifespan, you've studied many languages.

feats.name: Ancestral Longevity
feats.description: You have accumulated a vast array of lived knowledge over the years.

feats.name: Ancestral Mind
feats.description: By unraveling memories and connections passed down from your progenitors and buried within your unconscious mind, you learn to convert your inherent magic into psychic power.

feats.name: Ancient Memories
feats.description: In the long years since Ghorus's day, you've done pretty much everything at one time or another.

feats.name: Android Lore
feats.description: You have a keen interest in the origins of your people.

feats.name: Angelkin
feats.description: You descend from an angel, a winged messenger from Nirvana or one of the other celestial realms.

feats.name: Animal Accomplice
feats.description: You build a rapport with an animal, which becomes magically bonded to you.

feats.name: Animal Companion
feats.description: You gain the service of a young animal companion (page 206) that travels with you on your adventures and obeys any simple commands you give it to the best of its abilities.

feats.name: Animal Elocutionist
feats.description: You hear animal sounds as conversations instead of unintelligent noise, and you can respond in turn.

feats.name: Animal Empathy (Druid)
feats.description: You have a connection to the creatures of the natural world that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level.

feats.name: Animal Senses
feats.description: You gain one of the following senses available to your inherent animal: darkvision, low-light vision, or scent (imprecise) 30 feet.

feats.name: Animal Soul Siblings
feats.description: Your eyes have been opened to the spiritual essence suffusing the world.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Animal Soul Siblings R

feats.name: Apparition Sense
feats.description: You can see and interact with things others can’t.

feats.name: Aquatic Eyes
feats.description: As your connection to water grows, you can see more easily in places with less light, such as the depths of the ocean.

feats.name: Aqueous Dragonblood
feats.description: Your blood surges with the might of dragons who master the waters, and you can move freely in their domain.

feats.name: Arcane Communication
feats.description: You can deliver silent messages.

feats.name: Arcane Dragonblood
feats.description: You descend from a dragon that wields mastery of their magical abilities, such as a fortune dragon or mirage dragon.

feats.name: Arcane Eye
feats.description: Your eye has been magically enhanced to pierce darkness.

feats.name: Arcane Fists
feats.description: Your physical training encompasses unarmed combat forms.

feats.name: Arcane Sense
feats.description: Cast detect magic at will as an arcane innate spell

feats.name: Arcane Tattoos
feats.description: You have tattoos on your body corresponding to one of the ancient Thassilonian schools of magic.

feats.name: Armor Assist
feats.description: You are practiced in helping yourself and others don heavy gear.

feats.name: Armor Proficiency
feats.description: Become trained in a type of armor

feats.name: Armor Regiment Training
feats.description: You've trained for grueling marches in full battle kit.

feats.name: Armor in Earth
feats.description: Stone encases you like armor.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Armor in Earth H

feats.name: Artisanal Crafter
feats.description: Like many minotaurs, you take pride in creating items made from stone or metal.

feats.name: As in Life, So in Death
feats.description: Specific memories of your old life are hard to hold onto, but you know things without remembering why.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard As in Life, So in Death

feats.name: Ash-piercing Gaze
feats.description: Neither cinders nor winds shall prevent you from seeing those who need help.

feats.name: Ask the Bones
feats.description: You keep the bone of an ancestor or a friend to call upon for advice.

feats.name: Assurance
feats.description: Receive a fixed result on a skill check

feats.name: Athamaru Lore
feats.description: You've immersed yourself in community learning, particularly around navigating the waters and tending to animals.

feats.name: Athamaru Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You wield weapons designed to work underwater with ease.

feats.name: Automaton Armament
feats.description: You've been provided a body part designed for combat.

feats.name: Automaton Lore
feats.description: You have come to better understand the process that made your body and the magic that powers it.

feats.name: Avenge in Glory
feats.description: You honor your ally’s life, gaining temporary Hit Points equal to your level for 1 minute.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Avenge in Glory U

feats.name: Avowed Insight
feats.description: You become trained in the Lore skill corresponding to one creature type mentioned by your vow (for example, Fey Lore if your heritage is deny the firstborn pursuit).

feats.name: Awakened Animal Lore
feats.description: You have taken the time to learn about the process of awakening and the experiences of your fellow awakened animals.

feats.name: Awakened Jewel
feats.description: You once held the head gem of a deceased ancestor or loved one, and it awakened a mysterious power in your own.

feats.name: Awakened Magic
feats.description: When you awakened, primal magic was released within you.

feats.name: Axiomatic Lore
feats.description: You possess a strong understanding of process among mortals and lawful outsiders alike.

feats.name: Azarketi Lore
feats.description: You have learned the history and origins of your people and how to connect to both your land and sea heritage.

feats.name: Azarketi Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You are familiar with weapons that excel underwater.

feats.name: Bamboo and Silt Repose
feats.description: At home among mire and copse, you flit from river to tree with a dragonfly’s shimmering grace.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Bamboo and Silt Repose

feats.name: Bardic Lore
feats.description: Your studies make you informed on every subject.

feats.name: Bargain Hunter
feats.description: Earn Income by searching for deals

feats.name: Battle Medicine
feats.description: Heal yourself or an ally in battle

feats.name: Battleblooded
feats.description: You descend from those whose lives were touched by legendary einherjars, who were crafted from the souls of mighty warriors slain in battle and chosen by valkyries to serve as foot soldiers to many gods.

feats.name: Beast Trainer
feats.description: You have an impressive innate ability to tame and command ferocious beasts.

feats.name: Beastbrood
feats.description: One of your ancestors was a rakshasa, the corrupt and aristocratic reincarnated souls that call Golarion home.

feats.name: Benefactor's Resistance
feats.description: Your scales have taken on the characteristics of your draconic benefactor and insulate you from certain damage types.

feats.name: Bestial Manifestation
feats.description: Part of your body has an animalistic influence from a planar creature.

feats.name: Blast Lock
feats.description: Sometimes taking the shortest distance between two points involves removing an obstacle or two.

feats.name: Blessed Blood (Sorcerer)
feats.description: Your deity’s blessings manifest in your blood-borne power

feats.name: Blood Rising
feats.description: The magic in your blood surges in response to your foe's spell.

feats.name: Blowgun Poisoner
feats.description: You can capably deliver toxins with a blowgun.

feats.name: Bodyguard
feats.description: You swear a vow to protect one of your allies at all costs, regardless of the risk this might pose to you.

feats.name: Bon Mot
feats.description: You launch an insightful quip at a foe, distracting them.

feats.name: Bone Magic
feats.description: Your connection to your iruxi ancestors manifests as a simple primal spell that you cast using a fragment of an ancestor's bones.

feats.name: Bouncy Goblin
feats.description: You have a particular elasticity that makes it easy for you to bounce and squish.

feats.name: Breath Control
feats.description: Hold your breath longer and gain benefits against inhaled threats

feats.name: Breath of the Dragon
feats.description: Tapping into the physiology of your draconic ancestor, you can exhale a torrent of energy in a 15-foot cone or a 30-foot line, dealing 1d4 damage.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Breath of the Dragon

feats.name: Brightsoul
feats.description: The fire inside you asserts itself as beaming, radiant light.

feats.name: Brilliant Flash
feats.description: Your light cleanses souls of fear.

feats.name: Brine May
feats.description: Your mother was a sea hag, granting you one sea-green or blue eye.

feats.name: Brinesoul
feats.description: Your elemental ancestor's legacy asserts itself as brackish water, like the seawater of the ocean.

feats.name: Built-In Tools
feats.description: You've built tools into your innovation so you can access and use them easily.

feats.name: Burn It!
feats.description: Fire fascinates you.

feats.name: Burning Jet
feats.description: A condensed burst of flame shoots behind you, propelling you forward with its sheer force.

feats.name: Cackle
feats.description: Your patron’s power fills you with confidence, letting you sustain a magical working even as a quick burst of laughter leaves your lips.

feats.name: Callow May
feats.description: You are among the most common of changelings—those born to sweet hags—and a vibrant green eye signifies that parentage.

feats.name: Canny Acumen
feats.description: Become an expert in a saving throw or Perception

feats.name: Canopy Sight
feats.description: You can see equally well even in dense jungles where only a small amount of light shines through.

feats.name: Cantorian Reinforcement
feats.description: The life energy that helped create the first hobgoblins is particularly potent in you, protecting you from ongoing maladies.

feats.name: Caretaker's Intuition
feats.description: Your forebears had a deep understanding of the natural world around them, and you’ve learned some of their knowledge and techniques.

feats.name: Caretaker's Restoration
feats.description: The stewarding abilities of your forebears allows you to repair objects important to you.

feats.name: Cat Fall
feats.description: Treat falls as shorter than they are

feats.name: Cat Nap
feats.description: You can regain your energy quickly with a brief nap.

feats.name: Cat's Luck
feats.description: You instinctively twist away from danger.

feats.name: Catch the Details
feats.description: You are quick at recognizing broad details about people and things around you.

feats.name: Catfolk Dance
feats.description: You have a habit of always being in the way when other creatures attempt to move.

feats.name: Catfolk Lore
feats.description: Growing up among catfolk has taught you the traditional values of freedom, stewardship, and quick reactions to trouble.

feats.name: Catfolk Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the catfolk trait.

feats.name: Cattle Speech
feats.description: You can understand the lowing of cattle and similar animals as its own language.

feats.name: Cauldron
feats.description: You can brew magic in your cauldron, creating useful magical concoctions.

feats.name: Caustic Nectar
feats.description: You have specialized glands inside your throat, which produce acidic nectar that you can spit long distances.

feats.name: Cel Rau
feats.description: You are a cel rau, child of a strigoi, one of the first vampires to walk Golarion.

feats.name: Centaur Lore
feats.description: You've learned how to nurture your environment and to care for your people.

feats.name: Centaur Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You've trained in the weapons favored by your people, becoming a skilled archer and jouster.

feats.name: Ceremony of Protection
feats.description: You manipulate your exoskeleton to overlap itself.

feats.name: Ceremony of the Evened Hand
feats.description: You have cultivated your exoskeleton's form for close combat, using knots, whorls, and reinforced branches.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ceremony of the Evened Hand

feats.name: Chance Death
feats.description: Your previous life ended due to sheer poor luck, struck by lightning or choking on a fish bone.

feats.name: Changeling Lore
feats.description: All too aware of your true nature, you’ve studied hags and their powers.

feats.name: Channeler's Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance that allows power to flow through you.

feats.name: Charlatan
feats.description: You’ve learned to mimic the abilities of spellcasters by studying their flourishes and words

feats.name: Charmed Sleep
feats.description: When you sleep, you turn into an inanimate object a little smaller than a human’s thumb—easily overlooked and carried.

feats.name: Charming Liar
feats.description: Improve a target’s attitude with your lies

feats.name: Cheek Pouches
feats.description: Your cheeks are stretchy, and you can store up to four items of light Bulk or less in these cheek pouches.

feats.name: Childlike Plant
feats.description: You’re adept at hiding your plantlike features to pass as a human.

feats.name: Cindersoul
feats.description: The fire of your elemental ancestor manifests like dying embers of a blaze, and your inner charcoal helps staunch bleeding, purify simple poisons, and absorb acid.

feats.name: Circle of Spirits
feats.description: With a thought, word, or gesture, you reach your mind out to another spirit.

feats.name: City Scavenger
feats.description: You know that the greatest treasures often look like refuse.

feats.name: Civil Service
feats.description: Citizens bolster vacant leadership roles

feats.name: Clan Lore
feats.description: Your identity as a member of your clan is as central to your sense of self as your dwarven ancestry.

feats.name: Clan Pistol
feats.description: Raised in the ancient halls of Dongun Hold or the surrounding region, you display your lineage with a clan pistol, rather than a clan dagger.

feats.name: Clan's Edge
feats.description: By moving your clan dagger with rapid precision, you can protect yourself more effectively.

feats.name: Cleansing Subroutine
feats.description: Your nanites help purge your body of harmful chemicals and toxins.

feats.name: Climbing Tail
feats.description: Your tail makes it much easier for you to climb.

feats.name: Clone-Risen
feats.description: You were formed from a clone ritual or alchemical experiment.

feats.name: Cold Minded
feats.description: The subtle strands of beguiling magic leave little impression on your mind.

feats.name: Collapse
feats.description: You collapse into a pile of bones, mitigating the worst of the damage you would have taken, and the triggering attack deals only the amount it would deal on a hit (typically full damage instead of double damage).

feats.name: Combat Assessment
feats.description: You make a telegraphed attack to learn about your foe.

feats.name: Combat Climber
feats.description: Fight more effectively as you Climb

feats.name: Commander's Companion
feats.description: You gain the service of a young animal companion. You can affix your banner to your companion.

feats.name: Community Knowledge
feats.description: You commune with the psychic echoes of your ancestors and community, channeling their experiences into yourself.

feats.name: Community-Minded
feats.description: You are familiar with all the members of your community and their typical movements, and you have learned how to apply these patterns outside those circles.

feats.name: Concealing Legerdemain
feats.description: Rather than hide an object somewhere the inspectors won't search, you're skilled at keeping the object on the move so it's never where they look.

feats.name: Conrasu Lore
feats.description: You have learned about your history and your people from shapers.

feats.name: Conrasu Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You have taken it upon yourself to learn the ways of combat to aid with your tasks, perhaps in a role as a corrector.

feats.name: Consult the Stars
feats.description: You find wisdom in the movements of the heavens.

feats.name: Contract Negotiator
feats.description: Your experience with bargaining and deciding terms as part of Highhelm's guilds helps you make deals in other situations.

feats.name: Cooperative Leadership
feats.description: Leaders gain increased bonuses to aid each other

feats.name: Cooperative Nature
feats.description: The short human life span lends perspective and has taught you from a young age to set aside differences and work with others to achieve greatness.

feats.name: Coral Symbiotes
feats.description: You've tended to your coral jewelry so well that you have formed a symbiotic relationship with it.

feats.name: Corgi Mount
feats.description: The smallest of fey have ridden corgis as mounts since time immemorial, leading to a pattern on corgis' backs called a “faerie saddle.

feats.name: Counter Thought
feats.description: When a foe Casts a Spell that has the mental trait and you can see its manifestations, you can use your own mental magic to disrupt it.

feats.name: Counterspell
feats.description: When a foe Casts a Spell and you can see its manifestations, you can use your magic to disrupt it.

feats.name: Courteous Comeback
feats.description: You grew up in the proud Padishah Empire, where even insults have a certain poetic wit.

feats.name: Courtly Graces
feats.description: Get along in noble society

feats.name: Cover Fire
feats.description: You lay down suppressive fire to protect allies by forcing foes to take cover from your wild attacks.

feats.name: Covet Hoard
feats.description: You have a dragon’s desire for treasure.

feats.name: Crafter's Appraisal
feats.description: Your knowledge of items' construction allows you to discern their magical effects as well.

feats.name: Crane Stance
feats.description: Your arms flutter like a crane's wings.

feats.name: Crawling Form
feats.description: You can transform into a small animal or celestial creature to scurry and spy.

feats.name: Creative Prodigy
feats.description: You have a powerful creative drive that is clear to any who interact with you.

feats.name: Cringe
feats.description: With pitiful posturing, you cause your foe to pull back a deadly attack.

feats.name: Critter Shape
feats.description: Once per hour, you can use Change Shape to enter a critter shape.

feats.name: Croak Talker
feats.description: You can communicate with the simplest of frogs and other similar creatures using longwinded croaks.

feats.name: Crocodile's Twin
feats.description: Your egg contained your twin, a crocodile.

feats.name: Crossbow Ace
feats.description: Your deep understanding of the crossbow allows you to reload efficiently while moving yourself out of the line of return fire.

feats.name: Crossbow Crack Shot
feats.description: You have a deep understanding of the crossbow.

feats.name: Crown of Bone
feats.description: When you came of age, you were blessed by the Mother Earth with a thickened skull, which was celebrated as an auspicious sign among your community.

feats.name: Crunch
feats.description: Your jaws can crush bone and bite through armor.

feats.name: Crush Dissent
feats.description: Quell Dissent more efficiently

feats.name: Crystal Healing
feats.description: You know how to stimulate a body's natural healing abilities through the application of resonant crystals.

feats.name: Crystal Luminescence
feats.description: Your horn glows with bioluminescent color, casting bright light in a 20-foot emanation (and dim light for the next 20 feet).

feats.name: Cynical
feats.description: You've been approached with suspicion and distrust throughout your life and return these sentiments back to the strangers you encounter.

feats.name: Dad Joke
feats.description: Using the power of punnery, you deliver a lovingly tailored joke at a creature within 60 feet.

feats.name: Dance of the Mousedeer
feats.description: You move your body in a pattern that evokes the small and clever Sister Mousedeer, misdirecting enemies and filling their vision with shadows to hide behind.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Dance of the Mousedeer

feats.name: Deadly Simplicity
feats.description: When you are wielding your deity’s favored weapon, increase the damage die size of that weapon by one step.

feats.name: Deceptive Tactics
feats.description: Your training has taught you that the art of war is the art of deception.

feats.name: Deceptive Worship
feats.description: Members of your cult frequently pass themselves off as worshippers of other religions.

feats.name: Deepvision
feats.description: Your vision is suited for night or the underground.

feats.name: Defensive Advance
feats.description: With the protection of your shield, you dive into battle! You Raise your Shield and Stride.

feats.name: Deflecting Wave
feats.description: A cascade of water blunts or disperses the incoming attack.

feats.name: Deity's Domain
feats.description: You embody an aspect of your deity.

feats.name: Deliberate Death
feats.description: Once, you died because someone—murderer, monster, or soldier— chose to strike you down.

feats.name: Demonbane Warrior
feats.description: You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to damage with weapons and unarmed attacks against demons.

feats.name: Desperate Prayer
feats.description: You call out to your deity in a plea for their aid.

feats.name: Devil's Advocate
feats.description: You know more about the habits of devils than is entirely safe.

feats.name: Diehard
feats.description: Die at dying 5, rather than dying 4

feats.name: Different Worlds
feats.description: Create a second identity for yourself with a different name, history, and background.

feats.name: Dig Quickly
feats.description: Your hands work as effectively as shovels when you need to dig a quick hole.

feats.name: Dirty Trick
feats.description: You hook a foe's bootlaces together, pull their hat over their eyes, loosen their belt, or otherwise confound their mobility through an underhanded tactic.

feats.name: Disarming Flair
feats.description: You knock weapons from the hands of your foes with style.

feats.name: Distracting Shadows
feats.description: You have learned to remain hidden by using larger folk as a distraction to avoid drawing attention to yourself.

feats.name: Diverse Lore
feats.description: Your wandering studies mean you've heard rumors or theories about almost every topic.

feats.name: Divine Castigation
feats.description: Your deity’s grace doesn’t extend to your sworn enemies.

feats.name: Divine Disharmony
feats.description: From your collection of religious trinkets, you pull out opposing divine objects.

feats.name: Divine Dragonblood
feats.description: You can trace your lineage to a dragon with almost deific powers, such as a diabolic dragon or empyreal dragon.

feats.name: Dokkaebi Fire
feats.description: You can create illusory wisps of ghostly blue flame.

feats.name: Domain Initiate
feats.description: Your deity bestows a special spell related to their powers.

feats.name: Dongun Education
feats.description: You're knowledgeable in trades that are important to your people's survival and commercial interests.

feats.name: Double Slice
feats.description: You lash out at your foe with both weapons.

feats.name: Draconic Arrogance
feats.description: Few can sway you from your goals while the fury of combat fills you.

feats.name: Draconic Aspect
feats.description: You have an obvious draconic feature, such as sharp claws, a snout full of sharp teeth, or strong reptilian tail, that you can use offensively.

feats.name: Draconic Resistance
feats.description: Draconic magic safeguards you against harm.

feats.name: Draconic Sight
feats.description: You have a fraction of the senses of your draconic forebear.

feats.name: Draconic Sycophant
feats.description: You possess features that dragons find particularly cute or charming, making it easier to endear yourself to them, or at least cause them to momentarily forgive your insolence.

feats.name: Dragon Lore
feats.description: You've set your mind on learning more about your ancestor and their kin, and perhaps you were even raised by a dragon parent.

feats.name: Dragon Spit
feats.description: Many Tian-Dan claim to have dragon blood in their veins, and in your case, this is true—you can spit energy, and you might have an especially visible sign of your draconic heritage.

feats.name: Dragon Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of a dragon and make powerful leg strikes like a lashing dragon's tail.

feats.name: Dragon's Presence
feats.description: As kin to dragonkind, you project unflappable confidence (that collapses catastrophically against the deadliest foes).

feats.name: Dragonet Breath
feats.description: You have developed your magical breath.

feats.name: Dragonet Resistances
feats.description: You might be a little dragon, but you are still a dragon, which means it’s difficult to constrain you.

feats.name: Dragonscaled Lore
feats.description: The study of dragons is not merely academic to you but part of your family tree.

feats.name: Dream May
feats.description: You are the child of a cuckoo hag, making one of your eyes violet or even black.

feats.name: Dual Studies
feats.description: You and your eidolon have some skills you practice on your own.

feats.name: Dual-Weapon Reload (Gunslinger)
feats.description: You carry your ammunition in a way that allows you to reload while holding two weapons.

feats.name: Dualborn
feats.description: Your suli heritage can be traced back to two geniekin ancestors of opposing elements, or to an elemental ancestor that embodied two combined elements.

feats.name: Dubious Knowledge
feats.description: Learn true and erroneous knowledge on failed check

feats.name: Duskwalker Lore
feats.description: You either found another duskwalker who taught you the secrets of your kind, or you managed to research your unusual heritage.

feats.name: Duskwalker Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You have familiarity with the bo staff, longbow, composite longbow, scythe, and staff

feats.name: Dustsoul
feats.description: Your earth elemental ancestor's influence manifests in you as dust and dirt, like the soil of a field or the hot desert sands.

feats.name: Dwarven Doughtiness
feats.description: You are naturally calm and collected in the face of imminent danger.

feats.name: Dwarven Lore
feats.description: You eagerly absorbed the old stories and traditions of your ancestors, your gods, and your people.

feats.name: Dwarven Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Your kin have instilled in you an affinity for hard-hitting weapons, and you prefer these to more elegant arms.

feats.name: Earned Glory
feats.description: Elves often struggle with underestimating aiuvarins, and you are experienced at telling stories of your accomplishments to gain their respect.

feats.name: Eidetic Ear
feats.description: You have an amazing memory for sound.

feats.name: Elegant Buckler
feats.description: You've learned a flexible way to position your buckler to provide more protection.

feats.name: Elemental Assault
feats.description: You shroud your arms and held weapons in elemental magic.

feats.name: Elemental Embellish
feats.description: You can summon a harmless but impressive elemental display.

feats.name: Elemental Eyes
feats.description: You can see in the darkness as easily as an elemental.

feats.name: Elemental Familiar (Kineticist)
feats.description: A small creature made of elemental matter springs forth from your kinetic gate.

feats.name: Elemental Lore
feats.description: You've devoted yourself to researching the secrets of the Inner Sphere.

feats.name: Elemental Trade
feats.description: You have a strong connection with stone and metal.

feats.name: Elemental Wrath
feats.description: You are so attuned to the land that you can call forth a bolt of energy from your surroundings.

feats.name: Elf Atavism
feats.description: Your elven blood runs particularly strong, granting you features far more elven than those of a typical aiuvarin.

feats.name: Eliminate Red Herrings
feats.description: You have a keen sense for avoiding spurious lines of inquiry.

feats.name: Elucidating Vision
feats.description: Your eyes have seen many things in your past lives, and your sight seems to have grown more powerful over your lifetimes.

feats.name: Elven Aloofness
feats.description: As much as you might care for them, you've come to terms with the ephemeral nature of non-elves, and it makes their threats feel less troublesome.

feats.name: Elven Lore
feats.description: You've studied traditional elven arts, learning about arcane magic and the world around you.

feats.name: Elven Verve
feats.description: While all elves are immune to the paralyzing touch of ghouls, you can shake off flesh-numbing magic of all kinds.

feats.name: Elven Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor bows and other elegant weapons.

feats.name: Elver Pet
feats.description: Athamarus have bonded with eels more closely than any other fish.

feats.name: Ember's Eyes
feats.description: Your eyes blaze with inner flame.

feats.name: Emberkin
feats.description: A peri's roaring spirit burns in your soul.

feats.name: Embodied Legionary Subjectivity
feats.description: Nex's Fleshforges shaped you not to achieve individual greatness at arms, but rather to become a part of a legion, a modular piece integral to the combined arms stratagems of Nexian battlemages.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Embodied Legionary Subjectivity U

feats.name: Emit Defensive Odor
feats.description: While athamarus' natural pheromones are typically used for communication, you have developed yours into a defense mechanism to ward off foes.

feats.name: Emotional Partitions
feats.description: You have created strong mental partitions in your mind to filter out negative emotional influences.

feats.name: Emotionless
feats.description: Your malfunctioning emotional processors make it difficult for you to feel strong emotions.

feats.name: Empathetic Plea
feats.description: The way you cringe or use those puppydog eyes you've been practicing elicits an empathetic response in the attacker.

feats.name: Energized Spark
feats.description: The energy of your spirit manifests as crackling lightning, the chill of winter, or the power of an element.

feats.name: Energy Beam
feats.description: You can channel your core's power through the magical gem that serves as your eye.

feats.name: Energy Heart
feats.description: Your eidolon's heart beats with energy.

feats.name: Esteemed Visitor
feats.description: Your polite manners and natural ability to comfort others make it easy for you to break down cultural barriers and earn strangers’ trust.

feats.name: Eternal Torch
feats.description: You open a connection to your kinetic gate, large enough for a torch flame to flow.

feats.name: Evanescent Wings
feats.description: You've manifested wings that can flutter for brief spurts.

feats.name: Everstand Stance
feats.description: You brace your shield with both hands, enhancing its potential for both offense and defense.

feats.name: Everyday Form
feats.description: There’s nothing better than being a tanuki, but sometimes you need a less conspicuous form when going into the big city or other crowded places.

feats.name: Exacting Strike
feats.description: You make a controlled follow-up attack, fully accounting for your momentum.

feats.name: Expanded Senses
feats.description: Your eidolon evolves more acute senses.

feats.name: Experienced Professional
feats.description: Prevent critical failures when Earning Income

feats.name: Experienced Smuggler
feats.description: Conceal items from observers more effectively

feats.name: Experienced Tracker
feats.description: Track at your full Speed at a –5 penalty

feats.name: Explosive Leap
feats.description: You aim an explosion from your innovation downward to launch yourself into the air.

feats.name: Explosive Savant
feats.description: A lifetime wielding firearms and explosive ordinance amid the chaos of battle has granted you great skill with volatile weapons.

feats.name: Express Rider
feats.description: You can encourage your mount to cover ground quickly.

feats.name: Extend Boost
feats.description: You can increase the duration of your eidolon's boosts.

feats.name: Extended Kinesis
feats.description: You've refined the control you can exert over your elements.

feats.name: Extra Squishy
feats.description: Your rubbery physique makes it easier for you to wedge yourself into tight spaces and more difficult for your enemies to dislodge you.

feats.name: Extravagant Parry
feats.description: You use one-handed weapons to parry with style.

feats.name: Eye for Masonry
feats.description: Your familiarity with architecture allows you to easily spot subtle stonework.

feats.name: Eye for Numbers
feats.description: You've learned to quickly estimate the number of items in a group with relative accuracy at only a glance.

feats.name: Eye for Treasure
feats.description: You know good artisanship when you see it and can wax poetic about crafting techniques and forms.

feats.name: Eyes of Night
feats.description: You can see in the darkness as easily as a true vampire.

feats.name: Faithful Steed
feats.description: You gain the service of a young animal companion as a mount.

feats.name: False Faith
feats.description: Droskar knows you may need to disguise yourself in societies that oppose your faith.

feats.name: Familiar
feats.description: You make a pact with a creature that serves you and assists your spellcasting.

feats.name: Fang Sharpener
feats.description: You have filed your teeth into jagged points and have an unusually powerful jaw, making your mouth a dangerous weapon.

feats.name: Fangs
feats.description: Your incisors have grown into true fangs: long, sharp, and well-suited to drawing blood.

feats.name: Far Lobber
feats.description: You've learned how to throw a longer distance.

feats.name: Fascinated by Society
feats.description: Just as some humanoids find themselves driven to study nature, you are obsessed with the artificial constructs of society and can't get enough.

feats.name: Fascinating Performance
feats.description: Perform to fascinate observers

feats.name: Fast Recovery
feats.description: Regain more HP from rest, recover faster from disease

feats.name: Faultspawn
feats.description: You bear a grudge, inherited from a blasphemous asura forebear in your bloodline, against a particular deity and their works.

feats.name: Feather Step
feats.description: Step into difficult terrain

feats.name: Ferrousoul
feats.description: The elemental metal in your soul resonates strongly with iron, bronze, and other sturdy, practical metals suitable for weaponry.

feats.name: Fetchling Lore
feats.description: You've learned obscure lessons about your fellow fetchlings.

feats.name: Fey Cantrips
feats.description: You've learned the cantrips sprites have used since time immemorial.

feats.name: Fey Fellowship
feats.description: Your enhanced fey connection (either through your blood or via prolonged contact with their kind) affords you a warmer reception from creatures of the First World as well as tools to foil their tricks or withstand their magic.

feats.name: Fire Lung
feats.description: A lifetime of proximity to flames has inured your lungs and eyes to smoke.

feats.name: Fire Savvy
feats.description: You've grown up around a forge and are well-suited to dealing with smoke and flame.

feats.name: First World Magic
feats.description: Your connection to the First World grants you a primal innate spell, much like those of the fey.

feats.name: Fisheye
feats.description: You can gain the magic of the seas by eating your favorite seafood.

feats.name: Flash Forge
feats.description: An artificial metal object forms in the hands of you or a willing ally within 30 feet.

feats.name: Flashy Dodge
feats.description: You deftly dodge out of the way, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Fledgling Flight
feats.description: You can fly through the air in short bursts at half your land Speed.

feats.name: Fleet
feats.description: Increase your Speed by 5 feet

feats.name: Flexible Form
feats.description: Your body is as supple as a sapling, capable of bending without breaking.

feats.name: Flexible Studies
feats.description: You've collected a cross-section of information on various disciplines you can refer to when preparing for various tasks.

feats.name: Flood Stance
feats.description: The lessons of the flood teach a stance that distributes and circulates a single breath through the body and allows your punches to contain the focused power of a torrent of water.

feats.name: Flying Blade
feats.description: You apply your flashy techniques to thrown weapons as easily as melee attacks.

feats.name: Flying Flame
feats.description: A Tiny shape of flame appears, taking a form of your choice— such as a bird, an arrow, or a simple sphere.

feats.name: Focused Fascination
feats.description: When you use Fascinating Performance in a combat encounter, you need only a success, rather than a critical success, to fascinate your target.

feats.name: Folk Healer
feats.description: Your community recognizes you as a shaman or other animist, a status you obtained through lineage, apprenticeship, or a supernatural event.

feats.name: Folksy Patter
feats.description: You are adept at disguising coded messages as folksy idioms.

feats.name: Forager
feats.description: Forage for supplies to provide for multiple creatures

feats.name: Forensic Acumen
feats.description: You understand principles of forensic medicine, making you better at examining a body to determine the cause of death or injury.

feats.name: Foretell Harm
feats.description: Your magic echoes ominously as you glimpse injury in the target's future.

feats.name: Forge-Day's Rest
feats.description: Your unusual rest cycle allows you to recover faster.

feats.name: Forlorn
feats.description: Watching your friends age and die fills you with moroseness that protects you against harmful emotions.

feats.name: Fortified Fiefs
feats.description: Gain bonuses to Fortify, and Construct or Rebuild certain buildings easier

feats.name: Four Winds
feats.description: Mimicking the anemoi—monarchs of the four winds—you propel four creatures.

feats.name: Foxfire
feats.description: A crack of your tail sparks wisps of blue energy.

feats.name: Free Heart
feats.description: You follow all your passions, unlimited in creativity and zeal.

feats.name: Fresh Produce
feats.description: You grow a nourishing nut, vegetable, seed, or fruit.

feats.name: Friendly Nudge
feats.description: You don't always have time to wait for your allies to make room, so it's best to politely move them yourself.

feats.name: Fumesoul
feats.description: The air inside you asserts itself as a toxic miasma, inuring you to most poisons.

feats.name: GGGHhhjjjJJK
feats.description: You have JBNNNMBMM<<<M thatEHERBEBNMDF<……///.? And can FHERWHFEWRGNMN<Ggmfmngr,m as an Interact action.

feats.name: Gemsoul
feats.description: The earth inside you asserts itself as crystallized gemstones or metals, like a cluster of quartz or veins of iron and gold.

feats.name: General Training
feats.description: Your adaptability manifests in your mastery of a range of useful abilities.

feats.name: Genie Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You've trained with weapons used by your genie ancestors.

feats.name: Geologic Attunement
feats.description: You tune to the earth and stone around you, extending your senses through it in rippling waves.

feats.name: Ghoran Lore
feats.description: The very first memories ghorans have are those of their creation, and even after thousands of years, those memories have never faded for you.

feats.name: Ghoran Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Over the course of your long, long existence, you've had a chance to practice with traditional ghoran weapons.

feats.name: Ghost Hunter
feats.description: Your connection to the Boneyard ensures that your blows strike true against spectral beings.

feats.name: Gildedsoul
feats.description: Your elemental lineage manifests in the polished gleam of precious metals.

feats.name: Glean Contents
feats.description: You are adept at quickly scanning loose papers and carefully discerning the contents of sealed letters without damaging the seal.

feats.name: Glean Lore
feats.description: You tap into the collected lore of the divine, accessing a variety of potentially useful information.

feats.name: Glider Form
feats.description: Your eidolon evolves wings, a buoyant body, or some other means to control descent.

feats.name: Gloomseer
feats.description: Gloom holds few terrors for you, and the pall of darkness over Nidal has made you comfortable in dim light.

feats.name: Gnome Obsession
feats.description: You might have a flighty nature, but when a topic captures your attention, you dive into it headfirst.

feats.name: Gnome Polyglot
feats.description: Your extensive travels, curiosity, and love of learning help you to learn languages quickly.

feats.name: Gnome Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor unusual weapons tied to your people, such as blades with curved and peculiar shapes.

feats.name: Goading Feint
feats.description: Your tricks make foes overextend their attacks.

feats.name: Goblin Lore
feats.description: You've picked up skills and tales from your goblin community.

feats.name: Goblin Scuttle
feats.description: You take advantage of your ally's movement to adjust your position.

feats.name: Goblin Song
feats.description: You sing annoying goblin songs, distracting your foes with silly and repetitive lyrics.

feats.name: Goblin Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Others might look upon them with disdain, but you know that the weapons of your people are as effective as they are sharp.

feats.name: Goloma Courage
feats.description: The most important thing you've learned living with fear is how to overcome it.

feats.name: Goloma Lore
feats.description: You lived an insulated life focused on avoiding danger.

feats.name: Gorilla Stance
feats.description: You lower yourself to the ground and take an imposing, knuckle-walking stance.

feats.name: Grasping Reach
feats.description: You can extend a tangle of vines or tendrils to support your arms and extend your reach.

feats.name: Gravesight
feats.description: You can see in the darkness as easily as a psychopomp.

feats.name: Grim Insight
feats.description: Others’ attempts to scare you often grant you insights about your would-be bullies that you can then exploit.

feats.name: Grimspawn
feats.description: Your lineage traces back to a daemon, one of the manifestations of horrific forms of death that devour souls within their foul home of Abaddon.

feats.name: Grippli Lore
feats.description: You are well versed in grippli culture and tactics.

feats.name: Group Coercion
feats.description: Coerce multiple targets simultaneously

feats.name: Group Impression
feats.description: Make an Impression on multiple targets more easily

feats.name: Grove-Harbored
feats.description: You are accustomed to exploring thick woodlands and defending yourself against the attacks of magical plants.

feats.name: Hag Claws
feats.description: When you came of age, your fingernails grew long and sharp.

feats.name: Hag's Sight
feats.description: You’ve nurtured the supernatural abilities gifted by your hag mother, particularly your sight.

feats.name: Hail of Splinters
feats.description: A fusillade of jagged splinters flies from you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Hail of Splinters H

feats.name: Halfling Lore
feats.description: You've dutifully learned how to keep your balance and how to stick to the shadows where it's safe, important skills passed down through generations of halfling tradition.

feats.name: Halfling Luck
feats.description: Your happy-go-lucky nature makes it seem like misfortune avoids you, and to an extent, that might even be true.

feats.name: Halfling Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor traditional halfling weapons, so you've learned how to use them more effectively.

feats.name: Halo
feats.description: You have a halo of light and goodness that sheds light with the effects of a divine light cantrip.

feats.name: Handy with Your Paws
feats.description: You can easily craft objects.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Handy with Your Paws

feats.name: Haphazard Repair
feats.description: You quickly fix your innovation, at the cost of its stability.

feats.name: Hard Tail
feats.description: Your tail is much stronger than most, and you can lash out with it with the strength of a whip.

feats.name: Hard to Fool
feats.description: You're accustomed to seeing through shifting darkness and bewildering magic.

feats.name: Hardwood Armor
feats.description: Wood and bark grow over your body like armor.

feats.name: Harming Hands
feats.description: The mordant power of your void energy grows.

feats.name: Harmless Doll
feats.description: You look like nothing more than an ordinary toy, doll, or statuette, and you can fool others with your innocuous appearance.

feats.name: Harmlessly Cute
feats.description: Your size and demeanor make it easy for you to convince others that you mean no harm.

feats.name: Haughty Obstinacy
feats.description: Your powerful ego makes it harder for others to order you around.

feats.name: Haunt Ingenuity
feats.description: Your cunning knowledge grants you the ability to notice the emotional echo of a soul that passed on, leaving a haunt in its wake.

feats.name: Healing Hands
feats.description: Your vitality is even more vibrant and restorative.

feats.name: Hefty Hauler
feats.description: Increase your Bulk limits by 2

feats.name: Hellspawn
feats.description: Your lineage descends from devils, conniving schemers of Hell.

feats.name: Helpful Poppet
feats.description: You're particularly skilled at helping others with a task.

feats.name: Hidden Thorn
feats.description: Some flowers can hide their thorns, and yours happen to be hidden along your arms.

feats.name: Hit the Dirt!
feats.description: You fling yourself out of harm's way.

feats.name: Hoarder's Craw
feats.description: Your draconic features include a pouch inside your body that you use to store food prior to digestion.

feats.name: Hobgoblin Lore
feats.description: You've studied traditional hobgoblin exercises and fieldcraft, all of which have a militaristic bent.

feats.name: Hobgoblin Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the hobgoblin trait.

feats.name: Hobnobber
feats.description: Gather Information rapidly

feats.name: Hold Mark
feats.description: You bear scars or tattoos enhanced by the mark of your community’s prowess.

feats.name: Howling Aspect
feats.description: Pulling your hair loose into flames and gnashing your teeth into ragged fangs, you howl a vow of ire, and your form surges to meet the demands of your deadly promise.

feats.name: Hungry Eyes
feats.description: Your eyes can see through darkness with an oni’s visual acuity.

feats.name: Hunted Shot
feats.description: You take two quick shots against the one you hunt.

feats.name: Hunter's Defense
feats.description: Your canny understanding of natural and primal creatures helps you predict and dodge their attacks.

feats.name: Hydraulic Deflection
feats.description: Drawing moisture from the atmosphere, you create a disc of hovering water that deflects attacks.

feats.name: Hyena Familiar
feats.description: Hyenas serve kholo as pets and trackers.

feats.name: Hymn of Healing
feats.description: You learn the hymn of healing composition spell, which imbues your music with rich melodies that help your allies recover from harm.

feats.name: Idyllkin
feats.description: Your wild, unique features betray your agathion birthright.

feats.name: Illusion Sense
feats.description: Your ancestors spent their days cloaked and cradled in illusions, and as a result, sensing illusion magic is second nature to you.

feats.name: Impressive Performance
feats.description: Make an Impression with Performance

feats.name: Improvisational Defender
feats.description: You are always prepared for fights that frequently disrupt seemingly peaceful times.

feats.name: Improvise Tool
feats.description: You can jury-rig solutions when you don't have the proper tools on hand.

feats.name: Incredible Initiative
feats.description: +2 to initiative rolls

feats.name: Inherit the Dreaming Heirloom
feats.description: Whether you always carried it or perhaps only recently inherited, you have a pusaka— an heirloom containing a spirit who you communicate with in your dreams.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Inherit the Dreaming Heirloom

feats.name: Initiate Warden
feats.description: You’ve trained with one of the ranger sects known as wardens, who practice a specialized type of primal magic.

feats.name: Innate Understanding
feats.description: Vague connections to the knowledge and prowess of your past help guide you in tasks that this life might not understand.

feats.name: Inner Fire
feats.description: You can call the fire inside you into the palm of your hand.

feats.name: Innocuous
feats.description: Halflings have been unobtrusive assistants of larger folk for untold ages, and your people count on this assumption of innocence.

feats.name: Inoculation
feats.description: You have practice combating plague, and your patients are less likely to succumb to the same disease again for a time.

feats.name: Insider Trading
feats.description: +1 to Work Camp, Establish Trade Agreement, and Trade Commodities activities

feats.name: Internal Compartment
feats.description: You can hide a small object of up to light Bulk inside a hollow cavity on one of your forearms.

feats.name: Intimidating Glare
feats.description: Demoralize a creature without speaking

feats.name: Intuitive Cooperation
feats.description: You are accustomed to working alongside others, relying on each other to get by.

feats.name: Intuitive Crafting
feats.description: Your affinity with process and order makes you a natural artisan.

feats.name: Inventive Offensive
feats.description: You can jury-rig your weapons to perform in unexpected ways.

feats.name: Iron Belly
feats.description: A good laugh comes from the belly, and by laughing every day, yours has grown quite strong.

feats.name: Iron Fists
feats.description: Your fists have been forged by battle, your naturally tough skin and dense bone further hardened by conflict.

feats.name: Iron Repercussions
feats.description: Disobeying your Iron Command has lasting consequences.

feats.name: Irrepressible (Ganzi)
feats.description: Your slight otherworldly nature allows you to easily brush off emotional manipulation.

feats.name: Iruxi Armaments
feats.description: Your weapons are those you were born with.

feats.name: It Takes a Village
feats.description: Your community bond creates better dynamics when working together.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard It Takes a Village

feats.name: Jotun's Eyes
feats.description: Your vision has adapted to the darkness between planes.

feats.name: Jotunborn Grappler
feats.description: Wrestling is a common pastime for jotunborn, and you’ve done your fair share.

feats.name: Jotunborn Lore
feats.description: You were taught the history of your people’s planar travels as well as the skills necessary to thrive in sub-planar environments.

feats.name: Jotunborn Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the jotunborn trait.

feats.name: Jungle Strider
feats.description: You are adept at dodging roots, foliage, and other jungle obstacles.

feats.name: Junk Tinker
feats.description: You can make useful tools out of even twisted or rusted scraps.

feats.name: Keen Nose
feats.description: Accustomed to the foul air of underground tunnels, your sense of smell is sharpened, and noxious scents are less offensive.

feats.name: Keep Up Appearances
feats.description: Taldan pride means you never show weakness.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Keep Up Appearances U

feats.name: Kholo Lore
feats.description: You paid close attention to the senior hunters in your clan to learn their tricks.

feats.name: Kholo Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the kholo trait.

feats.name: Kingdom Assurance
feats.description: Receive a fixed result on a skill check

feats.name: Kitsune Lore
feats.description: You excel at navigating social situations and keeping secrets.

feats.name: Kitsune Spell Familiarity
feats.description: You've picked up a few magical tricks.

feats.name: Know Oneself
feats.description: You center yourself and call to mind the Vudrani monastic ideals of mindfulness and self-knowledge.

feats.name: Know Your Own
feats.description: You've spent countless hours studying the history of elves on your world and beyond and are a studied expert in your people's ways.

feats.name: Known Weaknesses
feats.description: Whenever you Devise a Stratagem, you can also attempt a check to Recall Knowledge as part of that action before rolling the d20.

feats.name: Kobold Breath
feats.description: You channel the power of your draconic benefactor to expel a torrent of energy from your mouth that manifests as a 30-foot line or a 15-foot cone, dealing 1d4 damage.

feats.name: Kobold Lore
feats.description: You attentively learned key kobold survival strategies from your elders.

feats.name: Kobold Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the kobold trait.

feats.name: Koi Secrets
feats.description: Due to their beautiful colors, ornamental koi are often found in parks and gardens where townsfolk roam.

feats.name: Land Legs
feats.description: You are comfortable on land for a short time.

feats.name: Larger than Life (Guardian)
feats.description: When you're clad in the heaviest of armors, you have an outsized presence.

feats.name: Lavasoul
feats.description: Your elemental lineage manifests as magma and molten rock, and you can focus the magma into your hand to attack your foes.

feats.name: Lawbringer
feats.description: You trace your lineage to archons, guardians of the seventiered mountain of Heaven and nurturers of law and virtue within mortals.

feats.name: Learn by Watching
feats.description: Before your awakening, you watched humanoids performing some skill near you frequently.

feats.name: Leech-Clip
feats.description: You are trained to capture deserters, or “leeches.” Make a melee Strike with weapon from the flail group.

feats.name: Lengthy Diversion
feats.description: Remain hidden after you Create a Diversion

feats.name: Leshy Familiar
feats.description: You call a minor spirit of nature into a plant body, creating a leshy companion to aid you in your spellcasting.

feats.name: Leshy Lore
feats.description: You deeply understand your people’s cultural traditions and innate strengths.

feats.name: Leshy Superstition
feats.description: You notice spirits that inhabit objects, learning which bring good fortune and which are unlucky.

feats.name: Lesser Enhance Venom
feats.description: Your venom grows deadlier and more plentiful.

feats.name: Let's Try That Again
feats.description: You feel a sense of deja vu when you’ve made a mistake, almost as if you weren’t so careless in a past life and could certainly do better if given another chance.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Let's Try That Again R

feats.name: Lie to Me
feats.description: Use Deception to detect lies

feats.name: Life-Giving Magic
feats.description: The upwelling of innate magic refreshes your body.

feats.name: Lightning Tongue
feats.description: Your tongue darts out faster than the eye can see to retrieve loose objects.

feats.name: Like a Roach
feats.description: Living with the bare necessities isn’t terribly hard for someone who has defied death, and like a cockroach, you always know how to survive.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Like a Roach R

feats.name: Lingering Composition
feats.description: By adding a flourish, you make your compositions last longer.

feats.name: Living Weapon
feats.description: You've learned to use part of your form as a weapon.

feats.name: Lizardfolk Lore
feats.description: You listened carefully to the tales passed down among your community.

feats.name: Long-distance Taunt
feats.description: You can draw the wrath of your foes even at a great distance.

feats.name: Made for Combat
feats.description: You can use your body as a deadly weapon.

feats.name: Magnetic Pinions
feats.description: Small pieces of metal fly from you, propelled with magnetism at great velocity.

feats.name: Magus's Analysis
feats.description: You make an assessment informed by your knowledge of how a creature fights.

feats.name: Maiden's Mending
feats.description: You can tap into some of the magic that flows through your blood to give you new life.

feats.name: Mariner's Fire
feats.description: You conjure uncanny orbs of spiritual flame that float above or below the water's surface.

feats.name: Marsh Runner
feats.description: When you use the Step action, you can ignore difficult terrain caused by flooding, swamps, or quicksand.

feats.name: Martial Performance
feats.description: Your muse has taught you how to handle a wider variety of weapons than most bards, empowering you to effortlessly blend your performance into combat tools.

feats.name: Medical Researcher
feats.description: Kassi has taught you not only how to apply medicines with your medical skills but how to craft them as well.

feats.name: Meld into Eidolon
feats.description: Your physical form can combine with that of your eidolon, granting benefits but limiting your capabilities.

feats.name: Mental Buffer
feats.description: Your mind deflects some amount of harm from attacks that induce pain or manipulate your mind directly.

feats.name: Mental Sustenance
feats.description: You can sustain yourself with the power of your mind.

feats.name: Merfolk Lore
feats.description: You paid close attention to your lessons in school.

feats.name: Merfolk Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You were taught the most effective weapons of the sea.

feats.name: Metal Carapace
feats.description: Sheets of bent and rusted metal cover you in an armored shell.

feats.name: Meticulous Restorer
feats.description: Waste not, want not; your steady eye allows you to restore craftwork quickly while conserving valuable material.

feats.name: Mighty Dragonet
feats.description: You’ve grown especially large and now tower over your fellow dragonets.

feats.name: Minotaur Lore
feats.description: You were raised in a minotaur enclave or have spent a great deal of time studying your culture and ancestry.

feats.name: Minotaur Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Your elders taught you to wield weapons that can split skulls and smash through shields.

feats.name: Minuscule Mentee
feats.description: You’ve found a fellow poppet on the cusp of awakening and decided to help.

feats.name: Miresoul
feats.description: You have a connection to the muddier denizens of the Plane of Earth from its border with the Plane of Water, and your elemental lineage manifests as clay or mud, reflecting that bond.

feats.name: Mirror-Risen
feats.description: You were created from magic involving mirrors and still retain some ability to seek refuge in reflected illusions.

feats.name: Mistsoul
feats.description: You have a connection to vaporous forms of water, such as fog and mist.

feats.name: Moldersoul
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood asserts itself in the form of decay, like forgotten logs left to rot and the char that remains after a forest fire, cycles of devastation clearing away what was to make room for the next generation of life.

feats.name: Molten Wit
feats.description: Your elemental soul has sparked not just your body but also your mind.

feats.name: Moment of Clarity
feats.description: You push back your rage for a moment in order to think clearly.

feats.name: Monastic Archer Stance
feats.description: You enter a specialized stance for a unique martial art centered around the use of a bow.

feats.name: Monastic Weaponry
feats.description: You have trained with the weaponry of your monastery or school.

feats.name: Monster Hunter
feats.description: You quickly assess your prey and apply what you know.

feats.name: Monstrous Peacemaker
feats.description: Your dual human and orc nature has given you a unique perspective, allowing you to bridge the gap between humans and the many intelligent creatures in the world that humans consider monsters.

feats.name: Moon May
feats.description: Your mother was a moon hag, a handmaiden of Groetus, and you have a single scarlet eye and a sliver of her supernal foresight.

feats.name: Morph-Risen
feats.description: You were once a shapeshifter or spellcaster using polymorph magic, but something went wrong, and you became trapped in the form of the creature you were imitating.

feats.name: Morphic Strike
feats.description: You can lash out with a portion of your previous self.

feats.name: Mountain Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of an implacable mountain—a technique created by dwarven monks—allowing you to strike with the weight of an avalanche and block blows with your garments.

feats.name: Mountain Strategy
feats.description: Dwarves have a long history fighting common foes, and you've mastered the ancient tactics to better face these enemies.

feats.name: Muddle Through
feats.description: Ruin accumulates more slowly

feats.name: Multilingual
feats.description: Learn two new languages

feats.name: Munitions Crafter
feats.description: Bullets and bombs can be scarce in some parts, so you've learned to make your own.

feats.name: Musetouched
feats.description: Your blood sings with the liberating power of the azatas.

feats.name: My Claws are Daggers
feats.description: Your claws are as sharp as your teeth.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard My Claws are Daggers

feats.name: Myth Hunter
feats.description: Your ancestors confronted and bested mythic beasts of Iblydan antiquity.

feats.name: Nagaji Lore
feats.description: You're the vassal or apprentice of a learned naga, and you've studied the secrets of naga magic and concocting intricate poisons.

feats.name: Nagaji Spell Familiarity
feats.description: Either through study, exposure, or familial devotion, you have the magic of nagas bubbling in your blood.

feats.name: Nalinivati's Light
feats.description: Your slit eyes expand to absorb light and can see in the darkest of places.

feats.name: Nanite Surge
feats.description: You stimulate your nanites, forcing your body to temporarily increase its efficiency.

feats.name: Native Waters
feats.description: You were born with or obtained a special connection to either fresh water or salt water.

feats.name: Natural Ambition
feats.description: You were raised to be ambitious and always reach for the stars, leading you to progress quickly in your chosen field.

feats.name: Natural Medicine
feats.description: Use Nature to Treat Wounds

feats.name: Natural Mutagen
feats.description: You can distill your natural shapeshifting ability into an elixir that grants a lesser ability to morph.

feats.name: Natural Performer
feats.description: Entertainment comes naturally to you.

feats.name: Natural Senses
feats.description: You have retained your sharp animal senses even after awakening.

feats.name: Natural Skill
feats.description: Your ingenuity allows you to learn a wide variety of skills.

feats.name: Nephilim Eyes
feats.description: Your eyes can see through darkness with visual acuity akin to that possessed by most extraplanar beings.

feats.name: Nephilim Lore
feats.description: You know the secrets of the Multiverse.

feats.name: Nightvision Adaptation
feats.description: The nanites in your ocular processors have adapted to darkness, enhancing your ability to see in the dark.

feats.name: Nimble Dodge
feats.description: You deftly dodge out of the way, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Nimble Elf
feats.description: Your muscles are tightly honed.

feats.name: Nimble Hooves
feats.description: You possess hooves, ankle wings, or some other feature that hastens your movement.

feats.name: Nimble Reprisal
feats.description: You can use Retributive Strike at greater distance.

feats.name: No Cause for Alarm
feats.description: Reduce creatures’ frightened condition values
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard No Cause for Alarm

feats.name: No! No! I Created You!
feats.description: You appeal to your construct companion's bond with its creator to have it break free of a controlling effect.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard No! No! I Created You!

feats.name: Nocturnal Charm
feats.description: The supernatural charm of your vampiric progenitor hangs about you, and you've learned to use it on mortals.

feats.name: Nocturnal Grippli
feats.description: You tend to do most of your hunting and work at night and have adapted to the requirements of nocturnal life.

feats.name: Nocturnal Tripkee
feats.description: You tend to do most of your hunting and work at night and have adapted to the requirements of nocturnal life.

feats.name: Nosoi's Mask
feats.description: Many psychopomps wear masks when dealing with the living, and many cultures believe that seeing an unmasked psychopomp's face invites death.

feats.name: Nudge the Scales
feats.description: You lay a finger on the scales of life and death to heal a creature, regardless of whether it's living or undead.

feats.name: Occult Dragonblood
feats.description: Your blood contains a tiny fragment of unusual or inexplicable power from a mysterious dragon, such as a conspirator dragon or omen dragon.

feats.name: Ocean Wariness
feats.description: Stories about those who have mistreated your people in the past (particularly stories about alghollthu mind control) left you untrusting of those outside your community.

feats.name: Ocean's Balm
feats.description: A blessing of the living sea salves wounds and douses flames.

feats.name: Ocean's Bite
feats.description: Your jaws open wider than a humanoid mouth should, showing off multiple rows of serrated shark teeth or a viperfish-like nest of needles.

feats.name: Oddity Identification
feats.description: Recognize magic involving minds, fortune, or secrets

feats.name: Officer's Medical Training
feats.description: You received formal training in battlefield triage and wound treatment.

feats.name: Old Soul
feats.description: Your immortal lineage has granted you a lifespan much longer than most mortals, and you've learned a lot along the way.

feats.name: One For All
feats.description: With precisely the right words of encouragement, you bolster an ally's efforts.

feats.name: One-Toed Hop
feats.description: Assuming a peculiar stance, you make a short hop on each toe.

feats.name: Ongoing Selfishness
feats.description: Your powerful personality and incredible ego demand that you protect yourself above all else.

feats.name: Oni Form
feats.description: Your horns flash briefly as you grow in size and ferocity.

feats.name: Oni Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Oni prefer large, cruel weapons for smashing their foes to pieces, and so do you.

feats.name: Open Mind
feats.description: You have inherent psychic abilities that allow you to tap into the power of your mind.

feats.name: Oracular Warning
feats.description: You have a premonition about impending danger that you use to warn your allies.

feats.name: Orc Ferocity
feats.description: Fierceness in battle runs through your blood, and you refuse to fall from your injuries no matter how terrible they may be.

feats.name: Orc Lore
feats.description: The hold elders taught you your people’s histories, told tales of great athletic feats, and shared with you the hardships your ancestors endured so that you can pass this wisdom down to future generations.

feats.name: Orc Sight
feats.description: Your orc blood grants you the keen vision of your forebears.

feats.name: Orc Superstition
feats.description: You defend yourself against magic by relying on techniques derived from orc cultural superstitions.

feats.name: Orc Warmask
feats.description: You paint your face to create a warmask.

feats.name: Orc Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: In combat, you favor the brutal weapons that are traditional for your orc ancestors.

feats.name: Otherworldly Magic
feats.description: Your elven magic manifests as a simple arcane spell, even if you aren't formally trained in magic.

feats.name: Overextending Feint
feats.description: You goad a foe into overextending.

feats.name: Overlooked Mastermind
feats.description: Many consider half-orcs little more than dumb brutes.

feats.name: Pack Hunter
feats.description: You were taught how to hunt as part of a pack.

feats.name: Pack Rat
feats.description: You've learned how to cram vast quantities into small spaces.

feats.name: Pantheon Magic
feats.description: The touch of divine meddling still runs through you, whether you want it or not.

feats.name: Parthenogenic Hatchling
feats.description: You were hatched from an unfertilized egg during hard times for your people, and are a biological copy of your mother.

feats.name: Pelagic Aptitude
feats.description: You've learned special tricks to survive underwater.

feats.name: Perfect Dive
feats.description: You dive into the water with exceptional skill and connection to the waves, urging the water itself to cushion your fall.

feats.name: Pet
feats.description: You have a loyal pet

feats.name: Phantom Visage
feats.description: You cloak yourself in illusions to mask your nature.

feats.name: Pheromonal Message
feats.description: Your communicative pheromones are particularly well developed from years of living with other athamarus.

feats.name: Pickpocket
feats.description: Steal or Palm an Object more effectively

feats.name: Pierce the Darkness
feats.description: Your eyes have adapted to see in all circumstances, even without the assistance of light.

feats.name: Pilgrim's Token
feats.description: You carry a small token of protection from a site holy to your faith.

feats.name: Pitborn
feats.description: Your blood bears the mark of a demon.

feats.name: Plane-Stepping Dash
feats.description: You move with magical swiftness, treading between planar boundaries to shorten your journey.

feats.name: Plant Banner
feats.description: You plant your banner to inspire your allies to hold the line.

feats.name: Plant Empathy
feats.description: You have a connection to flora that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level.

feats.name: Plant Evidence
feats.description: You can put a single item you’re holding of light or negligible Bulk onto a person without them noticing by succeeding at a Thievery check against their Perception DC.

feats.name: Play Dead
feats.description: You lie prone and pretend to be an ordinary skeleton.

feats.name: Plumekith
feats.description: Your blood soars with the power of the magnificent garuda, proud and stoic avian warriors.

feats.name: Plummeting Roll
feats.description: Through nimble movements, a graceful landing, and a bit of luck, you can manage to fall from spectacular heights without a scratch.

feats.name: Point Blank Stance
feats.description: You take aim to pick off nearby enemies quickly.

feats.name: Political Acumen
feats.description: You have spent years following the political maneuvering and secret alliances of elves in Iadara.

feats.name: Polymorphic Escape
feats.description: You polymorph into a tiny vermin, a cloud of leaves, or another shape that allows you to escape.

feats.name: Practical Magic
feats.description: +1 to Magic checks, use Magic instead of Engineering

feats.name: Practiced Brawn
feats.description: You're accustomed to long days filled with hard physical labor.

feats.name: Prairie Rider
feats.description: You grew up riding your clan's shaggy ponies and riding dogs.

feats.name: Premonition of Avoidance
feats.description: Your deity grants you a moment’s foresight.

feats.name: Prepare Elemental Medicine
feats.description: You diagnose your patient, then prepare and administer a dose of elemental medicine to a creature.
feats.raw_header: PFS Restricted Prepare Elemental Medicine U

feats.name: Primal Dragonblood
feats.description: A dragon with a deep connection to the natural world, such as an adamantine dragon or a horned dragon, resides somewhere on your family tree.

feats.name: Progenitor Lore
feats.description: You didn't just inherit your physical form from your progenitor; you also retained some of their knowledge.

feats.name: Proteankin
feats.description: Your blood bubbles with the roiling quintessence of the Maelstrom, the infinite sea of primal chaos that long ago spawned the other Outer Planes.

feats.name: Prototype Companion
feats.description: You have created a construct companion, and while it might not be an innovation, it serves as a trustworthy minion.

feats.name: Proximity Alert
feats.description: You're unnaturally in tune with your surroundings and react instinctively to danger.

feats.name: Psychic Rapport
feats.description: Your telepathic sensitivity intensifies when you're affected by mental magic, making it easier for you to link to other creatures.

feats.name: Pull Together
feats.description: Your citizens help mitigate failures

feats.name: Puncturing Horn
feats.description: While many kashrishi never use their horns for more than cracking open hard-shelled fruits or amplifying their psychic powers, you've practiced using yours offensively.

feats.name: Punishing Shove
feats.description: When you push a foe away, you put the entire force of your armored form into it.

feats.name: Pyrophilic Recovery
feats.description: You rely on fire and extreme heat to sprout and regrow.

feats.name: Qi Spells
feats.description: You have cultivated your qi to produce magical effects.

feats.name: Quadruped
feats.description: You were crafted in a form with four legs rather than two.

feats.name: Quah Bond
feats.description: You grew up among the Shoanti tribes, with the spirits watching over you, and they offer you guidance.

feats.name: Quick Bomber
feats.description: You keep your bombs and bomb-related reagents in easy-to-reach pouches from which you draw without thinking.

feats.name: Quick Coercion
feats.description: Coerce a creature quickly

feats.name: Quick Identification
feats.description: Identify Magic in 1 minute or less

feats.name: Quick Jump
feats.description: High Jump or Long Jump as a single action

feats.name: Quick Repair
feats.description: Repair items quickly

feats.name: Quick Shape
feats.description: Your instincts kick in and you take on an aggressive stance.

feats.name: Quick Squeeze
feats.description: Move swiftly as you Squeeze

feats.name: Quicksoul
