feats.description: The elemental metal in your bloodline literally courses through your veins.

feats.name: Radiant Circuitry
feats.description: Your biological circuitry emits light like a torch, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet).

feats.name: Raging Intimidation
feats.description: Your fury fills your foes with fear.

feats.name: Raging Thrower
feats.description: Thrown weapons become especially deadly in your fury.

feats.name: Rain of Embers Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of an enraged phoenix, holding your fingers as rigid as deadly talons while moving with quick, flickering gestures that dance with biting flames.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rain of Embers Stance R

feats.name: Raise a Tome
feats.description: You raise up the book you're holding and flip it open to defend yourself and expedite your studies.

feats.name: Rat Familiar
feats.description: You have a pet rat that has become magically bonded to you.

feats.name: Ratfolk Lore
feats.description: Years of experience among ratfolk communities have made you nimble, and you've learned to run and hide when enemies threaten.

feats.name: Ratspeak
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with rodents, including beavers, mice, porcupines, rats, and squirrels, but not with other mammals, such as dogs or bats.

feats.name: Ravening's Desperation
feats.description: Your study of the Beast of Gluttondark has taught you how to make do in the most trying of circumstances rather than succumb to weakness.

feats.name: Razzle-Dazzle
feats.description: You've spent considerable time practicing the manipulation of light, weaponizing your blade's reflection or bolstering the luminosity of magical displays to unconventional heights.

feats.name: Reach Spell
feats.description: You can extend your spells’ range.

feats.name: Reactive Shield
feats.description: You can snap your shield into place just as you would take a blow, avoiding the hit at the last second.

feats.name: Read Lips
feats.description: Read the lips of people you can see

feats.name: Read Psychometric Resonance
feats.description: With a touch, you can read the psychic impressions left on objects by their previous owners.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Read Psychometric Resonance U

feats.name: Reassuring Presence
feats.description: You serve as an anchor to your close companions, calming them in times of stress.

feats.name: Recognize Spell
feats.description: Identify a spell as a reaction as it’s being cast

feats.name: Refined Motion in Darkness
feats.description: The ability to move elegantly and undetected through darkness aided your people as they fled the Netherworld.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Refined Motion in Darkness

feats.name: Reflective Defense
feats.description: Your body's natural luster has been polished to a gleaming shine.

feats.name: Reflective Ripple Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance of fluid grace as small amounts of water flow with your movements and attacks.

feats.name: Reinforced Chassis
feats.description: Your body is designed to be particularly resilient.

feats.name: Relinquish Control
feats.description: Your apparition takes over and shields you from outside influence.

feats.name: Remnants of the Past
feats.description: Memories of your first life are strong and continually return to you, even after several incarnations.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Remnants of the Past

feats.name: Remorseless Lash
feats.description: You're skilled at beating an enemy when their morale is already breaking.

feats.name: Reptile Rider
feats.description: To you, crocodilians, giant lizards, and dinosaurs are loyal steeds, not monsters.

feats.name: Reptile Speaker
feats.description: You hear the sounds of reptiles as language.

feats.name: Retractable Claws
feats.description: You gain a claw unarmed attack that deals 1d4 slashing damage.

feats.name: Reveal True Name
feats.description: You attempt to get a creature to do as you wish by threatening them with your knowledge of their true name.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Reveal True Name R

feats.name: Ride
feats.description: Automatically succeed at commanding your mount to move

feats.name: Riftmarked
feats.description: Long ago, qlippoth marked someone in your lineage, most likely through their ancient runestones that dot Golarion's surface.

feats.name: Rimesoul
feats.description: The water inside you is cold and frozen, like sheets of ice and frigid glaciers.

feats.name: Risky Surgery
feats.description: Your surgery can bring a patient back from the brink of death, but might push them over the edge.

feats.name: Rivethun Disciple
feats.description: By studying with the dwarven shamans of Highhelm, you have become aware of the friction between your body and spirit.

feats.name: Rock Runner
feats.description: Your innate connection to stone makes you adept at moving across uneven surfaces.

feats.name: Root Magic
feats.description: Your talismans ward against foul magic.

feats.name: Root to Life
feats.description: Marigold, spider lily, pennyroyal—many primal traditions connect flowers and plants with the boundary between life and death, and you can leverage this association to keep an ally on this side of the line.

feats.name: Rough Rider
feats.description: You are especially good at riding traditional goblin mounts.

feats.name: Round Ears
feats.description: Your elven lineage is subtle enough that you look barely different from other humans, and you’ve learned to use that to your advantage.

feats.name: Ru-Shi
feats.description: You were born to a jiang-shi, one of the so-called hopping vampires found most often in Tian-Xia.

feats.name: Rushing Goat Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of an unruly goat, lowering your body and preparing to butt heads with your foes.

feats.name: Saber Teeth
feats.description: You have long fangs, natural or augmented.

feats.name: Sage of Scattered Leaves
feats.description: The epics of your people’s tragic yet proud history blaze like burning leaves in the forests of ancestral memory.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Sage of Scattered Leaves

feats.name: Samsaran Lore
feats.description: You have untold ages of knowledge beneath your belt, focused on the pursuit of enlightenment.

feats.name: Samsaran Weapon Memory
feats.description: The training of your past lives and even of those of samsarans who came before is deep-seated and guides your movements in combat.

feats.name: Sanctified Soul
feats.description: You’ve drawn a line in the sand in the cosmic struggle between good and evil and chosen a side.

feats.name: Saoc Astrology
feats.description: The ancient Saoc Brethren were the masters of astrology, and while your knowledge may be but a pale shadow of their wisdom, it still comes in handy.

feats.name: Sarangay Lore
feats.description: You listened carefully to the tales passed down among your community.

feats.name: Scales of Steel
feats.description: Your scales are hard as armor, ensuring you always have some protection in the dangerous world.

feats.name: Scaly Hide
feats.description: You were born with a layer of scales across your entire body that resemble those of your draconic progenitor.

feats.name: Scamper
feats.description: You Stride up to your Speed, with a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against reactions triggered by this movement.

feats.name: Scamper Underfoot
feats.description: You are used to ducking under foes and can scurry around the battlefield with ease.

feats.name: Scavenger's Search
feats.description: You're always on the lookout for supplies and valuables.

feats.name: Scholar's Inheritance
feats.description: Your parents devoted themselves to alchemical experiments involving elemental energy.

feats.name: Schooled in Secrets
feats.description: Gather Information about and Impersonate members of secret societies

feats.name: Scorched on the Crackling Mountain
feats.description: By ritualistically marking your fur with fire, like an infamous tanuki of legend, you protect yourself against future flames.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Scorched on the Crackling Mountain

feats.name: Scorching Column
feats.description: With an upward gesture, you shape a vertical column of extreme heat.

feats.name: Scroll Thaumaturgy
feats.description: Your multidisciplinary study of magic means you know how to activate the magic in scrolls with ease.

feats.name: Scuttle Up
feats.description: Your environment requires you to climb cave walls or tree trunks with great regularity.

feats.name: Sea Legs
feats.description: You are comfortable on the water for short bursts.

feats.name: Seasoned
feats.description: +1 to Craft food and drink, including elixirs and potions

feats.name: Seasong
feats.description: Sound carries far beneath the waves, and your people have strong, enchanting voices.

feats.name: Secret Speech
feats.description: Learn the secret language of a society.

feats.name: Seedpod
feats.description: Your body produces a nearly endless supply of hard seedpods.

feats.name: Sensitive Nose
feats.description: Your large black nose isn't just for show.

feats.name: Sequestered Spell
feats.description: You consumed so much of a type of magic as a larva that you can now cast it purely on instinct.

feats.name: Serpent's Tongue
feats.description: You subconsciously flick your tongue through the air to taste the world around you.

feats.name: Seven Changes Performance
feats.description: While kitsune are known for their magical illusion powers, you’re skilled at stage magic, especially costuming and quick changes.

feats.name: Shackleborn
feats.description: Your lineage shows the signs of velstrac tampering, including some curious quirk bequeathed by those shadowy surgeons of flesh and souls.

feats.name: Shadow Blending
feats.description: You draw shadows close to create a shroud.

feats.name: Shadow of the Wilds
feats.description: It’s difficult to notice your passage through wild areas.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Shadow of the Wilds

feats.name: Shapechanger's Intuition
feats.description: A lifetime of experience helps you see through disguises.

feats.name: Shard Strike
feats.description: Jagged metal shards form in the air and lash out from you.

feats.name: Share Thoughts
feats.description: You have an uncanny knack of communicating with other elves without speaking, though this habit that is often uncomfortable to observers.

feats.name: Shield Block
feats.description: Ward off a blow with your shield

feats.name: Shield Warfare
feats.description: You know how to use shields offensively far better than most.

feats.name: Shiny Button Eyes
feats.description: You've polished your eyes to reflect the smallest details in dimmest light.

feats.name: Shisk Lore
feats.description: You hoard knowledge like a dragon hoards gold.

feats.name: Shoony Lore
feats.description: Growing up in shoony society, you learned the value of honesty, friendship, and hard work, even during trying times.

feats.name: Shore Step
feats.description: The shallows and tide pools have always called to you and let you pass unhindered.

feats.name: Shoulder Check
feats.description: You hit a foe with your armor to throw them off balance.

feats.name: Shrouded Magic
feats.description: Choose one cantrip from the occult spell list.

feats.name: Shrouded Mien
feats.description: You're used to dealing with dangerous situations and sinister creatures.

feats.name: Sign Language
feats.description: Learn sign languages

feats.name: Silent Stone
feats.description: You've lived in the shadow of the Shattered Range, and the patience of those ancient mountains expresses itself in your stillness.

feats.name: Sinister Appearance
feats.description: You possess horns, a tail, or red eyes, or could otherwise be mistaken for a tiefling.

feats.name: Skill Training
feats.description: Become trained in a skill

feats.name: Skill Training (Kingdom)
feats.description: Become trained in a Kingdom skill

feats.name: Skilled Herbalist
feats.description: You've been taught how to craft healing remedies with a variety of herbs and plants.

feats.name: Skittertalk
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with spiders and other arachnids.

feats.name: Skull Creeper
feats.description: You wear skulls to demoralize foes.

feats.name: Slag May
feats.description: Your mother was an iron hag known for physical prowess, and you have one violet or steel-gray eye.

feats.name: Slink
feats.description: You can move through gloom with the speed of darkness.

feats.name: Slither
feats.description: You are an expert at moving through extremely tight spaces.

feats.name: Small Speak
feats.description: You understand the languages of most small insects and can speak to them.

feats.name: Smashing Tail
feats.description: You have a tail that serves as a potent weapon.

feats.name: Smokesoul
feats.description: You have a connection to smoke and haze.

feats.name: Snagging Strike
feats.description: You combine an attack with quick grappling moves to throw an enemy off balance as long as it stays in your reach.

feats.name: Snare Crafting
feats.description: You can use the Craft activity to create snares.

feats.name: Snare Setter
feats.description: You are adept at the time-honored kobold art of making traps.

feats.name: Sneaky
feats.description: Stealth is an important tool in your arsenal.

feats.name: Snow May
feats.description: You're the child of a winter hag, with one blue-white eye and an affinity for rime and snow.

feats.name: Sociable
feats.description: You’re extremely extroverted, and you often spend your time carousing or otherwise socializing.

feats.name: Social Camouflage
feats.description: You have the uncanny ability to quickly blend into the lifestyle of whatever settlement in which you find yourself.

feats.name: Soothing Vials
feats.description: The healing chemicals in your versatile vials also help calm a patient's mind.

feats.name: Speak with Bats
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with bats.

feats.name: Specialty Crafting
feats.description: Gain bonuses to Craft certain items

feats.name: Speedrun Strats
feats.description: Whenever you take a move action to Stride, you can attempt an Acrobatics check to roll forward.

feats.name: Spellbook Prodigy
feats.description: You are particularly adept at learning spells to add to your spellbook.

feats.name: Spelunker
feats.description: Living underground, you have learned to find your way without landmarks or even solid ground.

feats.name: Spine Stabber
feats.description: The quills on your arms are particularly sharp and sturdy.

feats.name: Spirit Coffin
feats.description: A hump forms on your back that allows you to attack and trap spirits.

feats.name: Spirit Familiar (Animist)
feats.description: When you attune to your apparitions during your daily preparations, you can choose to dedicate a small amount of your life force to allow one of them to physically manifest as a familiar, which gains the spirit trait.

feats.name: Splinter Faith
feats.description: Your faith in your deity is represented in an extremely unusual way that some might call heretical.

feats.name: Springsoul
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood manifests as fresh blossoms, spring fruits, and the seeds of new life, and you harness this power to spread vitality and abundance.

feats.name: Sprite's Spark
feats.description: You can fling a portion of your magic at foes.

feats.name: Squawk!
feats.description: You let out an awkward squawk, ruffle your feathers, or fake some other birdlike tic to cover up a social misstep or faux pas.

feats.name: Star Orb
feats.description: Your magic has crystallized into a spherical stone.

feats.name: Startling Appearance (Fleshwarp)
feats.description: Your appearance is enough to frighten without words.

feats.name: Steady Balance
feats.description: Maintain your balance in adverse conditions

feats.name: Steady on Stone
feats.description: Your connection to the earth makes natural uneven surfaces less of a hindrance for you.

feats.name: Steadying Stone
feats.description: The earth has taught you how to remain unyielding and firm.

feats.name: Steelhoof
feats.description: You've girded your hooves in steel or other reinforcements aimed to inflict maximum damage.

feats.name: Stepping Stones
feats.description: Disks of rock fly to points that you designate to make a new path.

feats.name: Stifle Flames
feats.description: Your forestry experience helped you develop techniques for fighting wildfires.

feats.name: Stitch Flesh
feats.description: You can use Treat Wounds to restore Hit Points to undead creatures, not just living ones.

feats.name: Stoked Flame Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance of fast, fiery movements.

feats.name: Stone Face
feats.description: You've mastered the art of composure, even in the face of fear.

feats.name: Stonemason's Eye
feats.description: You understand the intricacies of stonework.

feats.name: Storm Born
feats.description: You are at home out in the elements, reveling in the power of nature unleashed.

feats.name: Storm's Lash
feats.description: Wind and lightning have always been friends to you.

feats.name: Stormsoul
feats.description: Your elemental ancestor's influence manifests in you as tumultuous, thundering storms, with dark clouds and bolts of lightning.

feats.name: Story Crooner
feats.description: You're a talented story weaver and use your voice effectively.

feats.name: Straveika
feats.description: You descend from one of the truly ancient vampires, a nosferatu cursed to eternal life but not eternal youth.

feats.name: Streetwise
feats.description: Use Society to Gather Information and Recall Knowledge

feats.name: Striking Retribution
feats.description: You have an appropriately intense hatred for alghollthus.

feats.name: Strix Defender
feats.description: Your ancestral feud with humans gives you experience dealing with vicious foes, and your vengeance knows no bounds.

feats.name: Strix Lore
feats.description: You're well connected to your tribe and perhaps even strix communities beyond your own, where you've learned about the land and techniques of graceful movement.

feats.name: Student of the Canon
feats.description: More accurately recognize the tenets of your faith or philosophy
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Student of the Canon

feats.name: Studious Magic
feats.description: You've taken an interest in anadi arcane traditions.

feats.name: Stumbling Stance
feats.description: You enter a seemingly unfocused stance that mimics the movements of the inebriated—bobbing, weaving, leaving false openings, and distracting your enemies from your true movements.

feats.name: Sublime Mobility
feats.description: Your heritage has granted you either impressive athletic skill or a physical feature that aids in traversal.

feats.name: Subtle Theft
feats.description: Your thefts are harder to notice

feats.name: Sudden Charge
feats.description: With a quick sprint, you dash up to your foe and swing.

feats.name: Sudden Mindfulness
feats.description: Your mind retains full awareness despite the best attempts of others, and your focus throws others off-balance.

feats.name: Sudden Terror
feats.description: You leverage your body’s amorphous nature to spook others.

feats.name: Suli-Jann
feats.description: Your elemental ancestor was a janni, genies that walk the mortal world and embody all four elements together.

feats.name: Summiting Dragonblood
feats.description: Thanks to your draconic blood, there are no mountains or hills you can’t surmount.

feats.name: Sunlit Vitality
feats.description: You gain nourishment through photosynthesis, like trees and other green plants.

feats.name: Sure Feet
feats.description: Whether keeping your balance or climbing, your feet easily find purchase.

feats.name: Surface Culture
feats.description: Your interactions with other cultures on the surface have not only taught you about many other ancestries, but have also helped you realize the value of your own.

feats.name: Surface Skimmer
feats.description: By sinking gently beneath the waves, you obscure your presence and utilize the water as a barrier between you and land combatants.

feats.name: Surki Lore
feats.description: Either through the tales of elders in your settlement or through the messages thumped by those who oversaw your generation dig, you hold the knowledge of many surkis before you.

feats.name: Surki Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Surki weapons favor utility and practicality over grace and brutality.

feats.name: Survey Wildlife
feats.description: Identify nearby creatures through signs and clues

feats.name: Svetocher
feats.description: You were born to a moroi, the most common vampires, and you share their supernatural fortitude and power of persuasion.

feats.name: Swift
feats.description: You move with the wind always at your back.

feats.name: Swimmer's Guidance
feats.description: You're always ready to help those floundering in the water.

feats.name: Sword and Pistol
feats.description: You're comfortable wielding a firearm or crossbow in one hand and a melee weapon in the other, combining melee attacks with shots from the firearm.

feats.name: Syncretism
feats.description: You have come to see the overlap between two deities’ teachings

feats.name: Take Flight
feats.description: Though it's not fully effective, much of your ability to fly has stayed with you.

feats.name: Take Wing
feats.description: You have strengthened your wings and can now fly for short distances.

feats.name: Takedown Expert
feats.description: You've mastered combat practices that let you get up close and bring down perpetrators alive.

feats.name: Tame Animal
feats.description: Animals born and raised far from humanoid settlements rarely get along with two-legged beings, whom they assume to be dangerous predators.

feats.name: Tamper
feats.description: You tamper with a foe's weapon or armor, using a free hand.

feats.name: Tangle of Limbs
feats.description: Dokkaebi have a strong tradition of wrestling.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Tangle of Limbs U

feats.name: Tangle-tongue's Wit
feats.description: Your talent for language is a blessing from the yaksha makers of old.

feats.name: Tanuki Lore
feats.description: Tanuki love to play two things: tricks and music.

feats.name: Tap Into Blood
feats.description: The power in your blood allows you to perform minor feats of magic.

feats.name: Teakettle Form
feats.description: Your shapeshifting is advanced enough to take the form of not just creatures, but objects as well.

feats.name: Tengu Lore
feats.description: You learned skills for surviving in the place where your people were dispersed.

feats.name: Tengu Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the tengu trait plus the katana, khakkara, temple sword, and wakizashi.

feats.name: Terra Dragonblood
feats.description: Each step upon the earth makes your blood resonate.

feats.name: Terrain Expertise
feats.description: +1 to Survival checks in certain terrain

feats.name: Terrain Stalker
feats.description: Sneak in certain terrain without attempting a check

feats.name: Terrifying Croak
feats.description: You release a haunting croak that reminds those around you of their fears.

feats.name: That's Odd
feats.description: When you enter a new location, such as a room or corridor, you immediately notice one thing out of the ordinary.

feats.name: Theoretical Acumen
feats.description: You study a creature’s form and behavior to hypothesize likely means of overcoming its strengths.

feats.name: Throat Pocket
feats.description: You’ve trained to use unique nagaji eating habits to your advantage.

feats.name: Tidal Hands
feats.description: With an emphatic gesture, you create waves that rush out from you in the shape of your hands.

feats.name: Tide-Hardened
feats.description: You're at home in the unpredictable tides.

feats.name: Tiger Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of a tiger and can make tiger claw attacks.

feats.name: Timber Sentinel
feats.description: A slim, symmetrical tree travels from the Plane of Wood.

feats.name: Tinkering Fingers
feats.description: You're trained in Crafting.

feats.name: Titan Slinger
feats.description: You have learned how to use your sling to fell enormous creatures.

feats.name: Titan Wrestler
feats.description: Disarm, Grapple, Shove, or Trip larger creatures

feats.name: Tooth and Claw
feats.description: You've become adept with your born weapons.

feats.name: Tough Skin
feats.description: Your skin is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, and has a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a Speed penalty of –5 feet, a Strength value of 16, and the comfort trait.

feats.name: Toughness
feats.description: Increase your maximum HP and reduce the DCs of recovery checks

feats.name: Traditional Ways
feats.description: You are a fervent follower of the long-standing elven traditions established when your people returned to Kyonin.

feats.name: Train Animal
feats.description: Teach an animal a trick

feats.name: Trance of Celerity
feats.description: Your feet move faster, almost out of your conscious control.

feats.name: Trap Finder
feats.description: You have an intuitive sense that alerts you to the presence of traps.

feats.name: Traveler's Counsel
feats.description: On your travels, you’ve resolved countless disputes and counseled those in need.

feats.name: Tremor
feats.description: You unleash a small, localized tremor in a 10-foot burst within 30 feet.

feats.name: Trick Magic Item
feats.description: Activate a magic item you normally can’t activate

feats.name: Tripkee Lore
feats.description: You are well versed in tripkee culture and tactics.

feats.name: Tripkee Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the tripkee trait.

feats.name: Tumble Behind (Rogue)
feats.description: You tumble under and behind your foe, your rapid movement letting you catch them off guard.

feats.name: Tupilaq Carver
feats.description: You know the truth behind old stories that tell of sending a fetish of bone and sinew to seek vengeance.

feats.name: Tusks
feats.description: You have particularly long, jagged tusks perfect for tearing meat from bone.

feats.name: Twilight Dweller
feats.description: You’re accustomed to shaded forests and caves.

feats.name: Twin Feint
feats.description: You use an attack with one weapon to distract your foe from a second attack coming at a different angle.

feats.name: Twin Stars
feats.description: Your divine spark embodies a primordial duality, and your ikon splits itself accordingly into two corresponding halves.

feats.name: Twin Takedown
feats.description: You swiftly attack your hunted prey with each of your weapons, potentially combining their damage into a single devastating attack.

feats.name: Twisting Petal Stance
feats.description: Your body moves like a petal twisting on the wind, confounding your opponents while using their energy against them.

feats.name: Twitchy
feats.description: You are naturally suspicious and wary of danger, especially when you suspect someone might be leading you into an ambush.

feats.name: Unassuming Dedication
feats.description: Your family instilled the values of care and patience into you from a young age.

feats.name: Unbowed, Unbroken
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood manifests as resilience—towering trees, rough bark, deep roots, and patient determination.

feats.name: Unburdened Iron
feats.description: You've learned techniques first devised by your ancestors during their ancient wars, allowing you to comfortably wear massive suits of armor.

feats.name: Uncanny Agility
feats.description: You have near-supernatural poise that lets you move swiftly across the most unsteady surfaces.

feats.name: Unconventional Weaponry
feats.description: You’ve familiarized yourself with a particular weapon, potentially from another ancestry or culture.

feats.name: Undaunted
feats.description: Your spirit has endured many challenges over its long existence.

feats.name: Undead Empathy
feats.description: Your relationship with undeath gives you a stronger bond with other undead.

feats.name: Undead Spotter
feats.description: Your studies of the undead have taught you tellale signs of a disguised undead creature.

feats.name: Underwater Marauder
feats.description: Fight more effectively underwater

feats.name: Underworld Investigator
feats.description: Your work as an investigator makes you familiar with the criminal element.

feats.name: Unexpected Shift
feats.description: Your supernatural connection sometimes causes you to phase from reality when under threat, disappearing for split seconds before reappearing—often surprising you as much as your enemies.

feats.name: Unfetter Eidolon
feats.description: You can allow your eidolon to travel far from your side.

feats.name: Unfettered Halfling
feats.description: You were either pressed into indentured servitude or shackled in a prison, but you've since escaped and have trained to ensure you'll never be caught again.

feats.name: Unimpeded Step
feats.description: With a burst of divine liberation, your ally's movement from your Liberating Step is unaffected by difficult terrain, greater difficult terrain, narrow surfaces, and uneven ground.

feats.name: Untamed Form
feats.description: You are one with the wild, always changing and adapting to meet any challenge.

feats.name: Unwavering Guide
feats.description: Sharp-eyed and sure-footed, your presence is a boon to those you guide.

feats.name: Unwavering Mien
feats.description: Your mystic control and meditations allow you to resist external influences upon your consciousness.

feats.name: Vampire Lore
feats.description: You were raised by your vampiric parent, or you've invested substantial time and energy researching the secrets of your undead progenitors.

feats.name: Vanara Lore
feats.description: You attained the cultural training of a ba-sadhak, a seeker of treasures and rare delights.

feats.name: Vanara Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor weapons steeped in vanaran tradition.

feats.name: Variable Core
feats.description: You adjust your innovation's core, changing the way it explodes.

feats.name: Veil May
feats.description: Born of a blood hag, a fiery blood drinker hidden behind a false skin, you have one blood-red eye and the ability to slough off your appearance in an instant.

feats.name: Verdant Weapon
feats.description: You cultivate a seed that can sprout into a wooden staff, vine whip, or another weapon.

feats.name: Versatile Blasts
feats.description: Accessing a wider realm of elemental manifestations, you can make blasts with rare forms of your elements.

feats.name: Versatile Performance
feats.description: You can rely on the grandeur of your performances rather than ordinary social skills.

feats.name: Very Sneaky
feats.description: Taller folk rarely pay attention to the shadows at their feet, and you take full advantage of this.

feats.name: Vestigial Magicsense
feats.description: While most surkis' ability to taste magic fades once they metamorphose into their adult form—replaced by keener darkvision—you've retained some of this sense.

feats.name: Vestigial Wings
feats.description: You possess small, weak wings that aid in balance.

feats.name: Vibrant Display
feats.description: Whereas most gnomes’ coloration is static or changes slowly, you can cause your hair, eye, and skin color to scintillate in brief and disorienting bursts.

feats.name: Vicious Critique
feats.description: You have an eye for detail and a mouth for pointing out flaws, which makes it all the easier to convince the merchants and crafters of King's Heart to help you.

feats.name: Vicious Incisors
feats.description: Your jaws unarmed attack deals 1d6 piercing damage instead of 1d4, and gains the backstabber trait.

feats.name: Vicious Swing
feats.description: You unleash a particularly powerful attack that clobbers your foe but leaves you a bit unsteady.

feats.name: Vicious Vengeance
feats.description: While your vengeance is painful for both you and your foe, none can doubt that your enemies suffer more.

feats.name: Vigorous Health
feats.description: You can withstand blood loss startlingly well.

feats.name: Viking Shieldbearer
feats.description: You trained with shields and weapons as soon as you were old enough to hold them, eager to win honor and glory for yourself.

feats.name: Virga May
feats.description: Born of a storm hag, you have one crystal-blue or rain-gray eye.

feats.name: Virtuosic Performer
feats.description: +1 with a certain type of performance

feats.name: Vishkanya Lore
feats.description: You deeply understand vishkanyan strengths and cultural traditions.

feats.name: Vishkanya Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor weapons historically used in subtle work and in ceremony.

feats.name: Voice of the Night
feats.description: You hear and understand the words of creatures you share the darkness with.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Voice of the Night

feats.name: Vow of Mortal Defiance
feats.description: Having seen the wreckage left by the gods and their servitors as they play in their great war of good and evil, you’ve come to the only reasonable conclusion: they all must be cut from their silken thrones.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Vow of Mortal Defiance

feats.name: Warped Reflection
feats.description: Due to your origins, your form is more flexible than most.

feats.name: Warren Friend
feats.description: You're adept at making contact with other ysoki.

feats.name: Warren Navigator
feats.description: You gain the trained proficiency rank in Survival.

feats.name: Wash Out
feats.description: Toxins seep out of your artificial body quickly.

feats.name: Watchful Gaze
feats.description: You use your many eyes to look in all directions at once, making you extremely observant for a short period of time.

feats.name: Watchful Halfling
feats.description: You pay close attention to the people around you, allowing you to more easily notice when they act out of character.

feats.name: Water Nagaji
feats.description: Much like a water naga, you've formed a connection to a sacred or pristine body of water, either as a home or a place to protect.

feats.name: Wave Speaker
feats.description: Being part fish yourself, you can speak the language of the sea.

feats.name: Waxed Feathers
feats.description: Your feathers are coated in a waxy substance that repels water.

feats.name: Wayang Lore
feats.description: You can use your knowledge to enhance your performances or aid you in hiding.

feats.name: Wayang Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You learned to fight with weapons that help you keep your distance or make the most of striking from shadows.

feats.name: Weapon Infusion
feats.description: With a signature flair, you shape blasts of elemental power into the form of a weapon, such as a sword made of whirling wind or a bow that shoots flames.

feats.name: Weapon Proficiency
feats.description: Become trained in a weapon type

feats.name: Web Walker
feats.description: You have plenty of practice navigating webs.

feats.name: Web Weaver
feats.description: You can produce a soft silk to weave into useful items.

feats.name: Weight of Experience
feats.description: The experience you’ve accumulated over multiple lifetimes envelops you like a weighted blanket, providing comfort and bestowing confidence under pressure.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Weight of Experience R

feats.name: Weight of Guilt
feats.description: Guilt clouds the minds of those who ignore your Glimpse of Redemption.

feats.name: Well-Met Traveler
feats.description: You naturally adopt a pleasant and affable demeanor when meeting others.

feats.name: Well-Versed
feats.description: You’re resilient to performative influences that aren’t your own.

feats.name: Whisper on the Wind
feats.description: You speak in a whisper, a soft wind carrying your words far away.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Whisper on the Wind H

feats.name: Whispers of Weakness
feats.description: Voices whisper to you how to best lay a creature low.

feats.name: Whitecape
feats.description: You're shorter and wider than many vanaras of your heritage, and the hair on your shoulders and your head is particularly thick and luxurious, like a majestic cape.

feats.name: Widen Spell
feats.description: You manipulate the energy of your spell, causing it to spread out and affect a wider area.

feats.name: Wildborn Magic
feats.description: You have learned to access the old magic of wild places.

feats.name: Wilderness Born
feats.description: You’re at home in the wilderness and easily disappear into it.

feats.name: Willing Death
feats.description: Once, you died because you valued someone else's life above your own; just as then, you protect an ally by suffering in their stead.

feats.name: Wind Pillow
feats.description: The winds have whispered to you all your life, and the essence of air itself helps you at times, making you somewhat buoyant when you're suspended in space.

feats.name: Wind Tempered
feats.description: You are at home in tempestuous weather and accustomed to even the harshest winds.

feats.name: Winter Cat Senses
feats.description: Your eyes are keen and accustomed to winter conditions.

feats.name: Winter's Clutch
feats.description: Gleaming flakes of chilling snow fall in a 10-foot burst within 60 feet.

feats.name: Wisdom From Another Life
feats.description: You absorbed a wide variety of facts before you died, and your soul still remembers slivers of this precious knowledge.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Wisdom From Another Life R

feats.name: Witch Warden
feats.description: You and your family have fought long and hard against witches, particularly the winter witches of Irrisen, and you’ve learned to be wary of their curses and the otherworldly powers their patrons grant.

feats.name: Witch's Armaments
feats.description: Your patron’s power changes your body to ensure you are never defenseless.

feats.name: Wolf Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of a wolf, low to the ground with your hands held like fangs.

feats.name: Wombat Style
feats.description: You enter the stance of the implacable wombat, your reinforced backside ready to jostle and batter those who offend you.

feats.name: Woodcraft
feats.description: You have a innate familiarity with forested areas.

feats.name: Woodworker
feats.description: Denizens of the Plane of Wood take immense pride in the magnificent works of art they can craft from wood, and practicing your own woodcraft helps you feel a connection with your planar heritage.

feats.name: Wortwitch
feats.description: You have a particular affinity for leafy plants.

feats.name: Yaoguai Historian
feats.description: You know extensively about your own kind.

feats.name: You're Next
feats.description: After downing a foe, you menace another.

feats.name: You're So Cute!
feats.description: You know how to put on the charm, doing playful tricks to win favor.

feats.name: Zoophonic Communication
feats.description: Your studies have expanded your ability to parley and negotiate into the animal realm.

feats.name: Acrobat Dedication
feats.description: You become an expert in Acrobatics.

feats.name: Acute Scent
feats.description: When your anger is heightened, your sense of smell improves.

feats.name: Adaptive Stratagem
feats.description: Your constant training and strong bond with your allies allow you to change tactics on the fly.

feats.name: After You
feats.description: You allow your foes to make the first move in a show of incredible confidence.

feats.name: Agent of All Holds
feats.description: Orcs across Belkzen recognize you as an honored lorekeeper.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Agent of All Holds U

feats.name: Aggressive Block
feats.description: You push back as you block, knocking your foe away or off balance.

feats.name: Alacritous Action
feats.description: Your eidolon moves more quickly.

feats.name: Alchemist Dedication
feats.description: You put your alchemical interest into practice.

feats.name: Aldori Duelist Dedication
feats.description: Your Aldori duelist training teaches you martial techniques and increases your dedication to the Aldori dueling sword.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Aldori Duelist Dedication U

feats.name: Alkenstar Agent Dedication
feats.description: You put on the persona of a rough and tumble outlaw, but your real goals are to report threats to Alkenstar back to the grand duchess.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Alkenstar Agent Dedication U

feats.name: Alter Ego Dedication
feats.description: You make yourself into a living mirror, becoming a double of someone unremarkable, and you slip into exactly the role that can get you past security or into a sensitive facility.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Alter Ego Dedication U

feats.name: Amphibious Form
feats.description: Your eidolon adapts to life on land and underwater.

feats.name: Animal Empathy (Ranger)
feats.description: You have a connection to the creatures of the natural world that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level.

feats.name: Animal Trainer Dedication
feats.description: You gain a young animal companion.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Animal Trainer Dedication U

feats.name: Animist Dedication
feats.description: You have formed a bond with an apparition and can cast divine spells.

feats.name: Anoint Ally
feats.description: You forge a mystical connection with an ally using a drop of your blood, allowing them to benefit from your magic.

feats.name: Antagonize
feats.description: Your taunts and threats earn your foes' ire.

feats.name: Archaeologist Dedication
feats.description: You are a student of peoples and their histories, and are in constant pursuit of knowledge and artifacts from the past.

feats.name: Archer Dedication
feats.description: You have familiarity with all weapons in the bow and crossbow weapon groups.

feats.name: Armored Stealth
feats.description: You have learned techniques to adjust and modify your armor and movements to reduce the noise you make.

feats.name: Artillerist Dedication
feats.description: Artillery is a team sport, where every member of the crew has to rely on the other members.

feats.name: Assassin Dedication
feats.description: You've trained to assassinate your foes, and you do so with tenacity and precision.

feats.name: Assisting Shot
feats.description: Using your last shot to gauge your accuracy, you can fire off a quick shot to interfere with a foe in combat.

feats.name: Assured Identification
feats.description: You rarely misidentify an item.

feats.name: Athletic Strategist
feats.description: You know how to calculatedly manipulate joints and body weight.

feats.name: Aura Sight
feats.description: You've learned how to read the natural auras of other living creatures.

feats.name: Automatic Knowledge
feats.description: Recall Knowledge as a free action once per round

feats.name: Automatic Writing
feats.description: When confronted with the unknown, you can receive knowledge beyond your own experience via written messages delivered by your hand.

feats.name: Avenger Dedication
feats.description: Your training regimen has given you particular advantages when it comes to enforcing the interests of your faith.

feats.name: Backup Disguise
feats.description: You have a specific disguise that you keep at the ready, worn underneath your outer garment.

feats.name: Barbarian Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Athletics; if you were already trained in Athletics, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

feats.name: Bard Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a bard and gain the Cast a Spell activity.

feats.name: Bashing Charge
feats.description: You smash, bust, and charge through solid obstacles without hesitation.

feats.name: Basic Lesson
feats.description: Your patron grants you a special lesson, revealing a hidden facet of its nature.

feats.name: Bastion Dedication
feats.description: You are particularly skilled at using a shield to protect yourself in combat.

feats.name: Battle Harbinger Dedication
feats.description: You have trained extensively in combat, battlefield tactics, and stamina, focusing on being an exceptional warrior for your faith in exchange for less time studying the traditional spells and scriptures.

feats.name: Battle Planner
feats.description: You are constantly drawing up plans and battle scenarios, assembling strategies and gathered intelligence for later use.

feats.name: Beastmaster Dedication
feats.description: You gain the service of a young animal companion that travels with you and obeys your commands.

feats.name: Bestial Snarling
feats.description: You can convey the subtle menace of a low growl or predatory rumble.

feats.name: Blackjacket Dedication
feats.description: You have entered the ranks of the Mercenary League and now wear the black uniform that’s the source of the organization’s popular epithet.

feats.name: Blade Brake
feats.description: You plow your weapon into a floor, wall, or another sturdy surface, anchoring yourself in place.

feats.name: Blasting Beams
feats.description: A directed beam of heat or an arc of lightning is one of the simplest ways to project energy.

feats.name: Bleed Out
feats.description: You channel the residual energy from the last spell you cast into a ranged bloodletting.

feats.name: Blessed One Dedication
feats.description: You are touched by a deity and gifted with the ability to alleviate the suffering of others.

feats.name: Bloodrager Dedication
feats.description: Drinking powerful blood has awakened magical potential within you.

feats.name: Bonded Animal
feats.description: An animal becomes permanently easier to command

feats.name: Bone Spikes
feats.description: Sharp shards of bone tear forth from your elbows, wrists, or other parts of your body.

feats.name: Borrowed Ability
feats.description: Your touch opens a conduit into the mind of your target, the emptiness within you pulling skills and memories through

feats.name: Bounty Hunter Dedication
feats.description: When focused on finding your quarry, you’re relentless.

feats.name: Brandishing Draw
feats.description: You draw and attack with the same motion.

feats.name: Bright Lion Dedication
feats.description: You are one of the Bright Lions, part revolutionary warrior, part undercover spy.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Bright Lion Dedication U

feats.name: Brutal Beating
feats.description: Your critical hits shakes your foes’ confidence.

feats.name: Brutish Shove
feats.description: Using the momentum of your last attack to throw your weight into another, you make your opponent stumble back.

feats.name: Bullet Dancer Dedication
feats.description: You've learned how to synchronize traditional martial arts and guns.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Bullet Dancer Dedication U

feats.name: Call Implement
feats.description: You can tug on the bonds of ownership between yourself and your implement, causing it to find its way back to you.

feats.name: Call of the Wild
feats.description: You call upon the creatures of nature to come to your aid.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Call of the Wild

feats.name: Campfire Chronicler Dedication
feats.description: You’ve gained Isthralei’s attention and can now offer stories up to him
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Campfire Chronicler Dedication U

feats.name: Cantrip Casting
feats.description: You increase your ability to cast simple spells.

feats.name: Cantrip Expansion
feats.description: Study broadens your range of simple spells.

feats.name: Captain Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in your choice of Diplomacy or Intimidation; if you are already trained in both of these skills, you become trained in a skill of your choice.

feats.name: Cathartic Mage Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to harness a particular emotion and mix it into your magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Cathartic Mage Dedication U

feats.name: Cavalier Dedication
feats.description: You gain a young animal companion that serves as your mount.

feats.name: Celebrity Dedication
feats.description: The more people you have looking at you, the more content you are, and you take every opportunity to show up others when their performances are less than perfect.

feats.name: Certain Strategem
feats.description: You know exactly where to strike a foe to target their weak spots.

feats.name: Champion Dedication
feats.description: Choose a deity.

feats.name: Charmed Life
feats.description: When danger calls, you have a strange knack for coming out on top.

feats.name: Chromotherapy
feats.description: You firmly believe in the technique of strengthening one's life force, spiritual energies, and bodily fluids through the application of colored light.

feats.name: Chronoskimmer Dedication
feats.description: You became partially unstuck from time and have learned how to manipulate your place in the flow of time.

feats.name: Clawdancer Dedication
feats.description: You've practiced the art of fighting with your natural claws, hooking them into prey and thrashing at targets surrounding you.

feats.name: Cleric Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a cleric.

feats.name: Clever Gambit
feats.description: Your battle tactics are aided by assessing your foe’s capabilities and range.

feats.name: Clockwork Reanimator Dedication
feats.description: You can animate corpses through cunning engineering.

feats.name: Clotting Elixirs
feats.description: Your restorative concoctions have a clotting effect on the drinker's blood.

feats.name: Collapse Armor
feats.description: You've modified your armor innovation to collapse into a more compact form so you can don or remove it in an instant.

feats.name: Collapse Construct
feats.description: You've modified your construct companion and built it out of light materials, enabling you to collapse it into a carrying case or other compact and innocuous form.

feats.name: Combat Grab
feats.description: Using your prior attack to shift your opponent’s guard, you take another swing and grab them.

feats.name: Commander Dedication
feats.description: You gain the tactics class feature like a commander and gain your own folio; this folio contains two common mobility or offensive tactics of your choosing.

feats.name: Communal Crafting
feats.description: Other PCs can help you Craft

feats.name: Communal Healing
feats.description: You’re an exceptional conduit for vitality and, as you channel it through you, you can divert some to heal yourself or another creature.

feats.name: Conceal Spell
feats.description: Through sheer mental effort, you can simplify the incantations and gestures needed to spellcast, leaving them barely noticeable.

feats.name: Conceited Mindset
feats.description: Because you know your mind is superior, you scoff at anyone who would alter your mental state—but this hubris gets the better of you when you're wrong.

feats.name: Confabulator
feats.description: Reduce the bonuses against your repeated lies

feats.name: Consume Energy
feats.description: Your connection to energy is so much stronger than the offending display in front of you, allowing you to claim it for yourself.

feats.name: Continual Recovery
feats.description: Treat Wounds on a patient more often

feats.name: Convergent Tides
feats.description: Your footwork is like the convergence of tides, granting your body supernatural power and fluidity.

feats.name: Cooperative Crafting
feats.description: You've learned to make the most of working with others on your crafting projects, a must when working with the various guilds of Highhelm.

feats.name: Corpse Tender Dedication
feats.description: You have a connection to mindless undead that allows you to communicate your intentions to them on a rudimentary level.

feats.name: Covering Stance
feats.description: Your very presence on the field of battle protects nearby allies from harm.

feats.name: Crossbow Infiltrator Dedication
feats.description: You have mastered stealthy weapons that allow you to strike carefully from a distance far enough to avoid reprisal, yet close enough to confirm your kills.

feats.name: Crushing Grab
feats.description: Like a powerful constrictor, you crush targets in your unyielding grasp.

feats.name: Cultivator Dedication
feats.description: Through an esoteric, often exacting, regimen of meditation, diet, and exercise, you’ve learned to transform your body’s inner workings into a crucible of planar and spiritual energies.

feats.name: Curse Maelstrom Dedication
feats.description: A horrible curse has left a lingering stain on your soul, and its effects continue to plague you even if the curse's other effects have ended.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Curse Maelstrom Dedication R

feats.name: Dancing Leaf
feats.description: You are as light as a leaf on the breeze.

feats.name: Dandy Dedication
feats.description: You are a consummate student of dignity, etiquette, and fashion.

feats.name: Defensive Armaments
feats.description: You use bulky firearms or crossbows to shield your body from your foes' attacks.

feats.name: Defensive Swap
feats.description: You and your allies work together selflessly to protect each other from harm.

feats.name: Demolition Charge
feats.description: You can rig your bombs to inanimate objects in order to cause destruction to the surrounding area.

feats.name: Demolitionist Dedication
feats.description: You know how to set explosives to cause the maximum possible damage to buildings and other structures.

feats.name: Devoted Guardian
feats.description: You adopt a wide stance, ready to defend both yourself and your chosen ward.

feats.name: Directed Audience
feats.description: You can shape the area of your composition spells.

feats.name: Discreet Inquiry
feats.description: You are subtle in your efforts to learn the things you need to know.

feats.name: Distracting Feint
feats.description: Your Feints are far more distracting than normal.

feats.name: Distracting Performance
feats.description: Your performances are especially distracting, allowing your allies to Sneak away with ease.

feats.name: Divine Aegis
feats.description: A barrier offers protection against other magic but leaves you exposed to divine energy.

feats.name: Divine Grace
feats.description: You call upon your deity's grace

feats.name: Divine Health
feats.description: Your faith makes you resistant to disease, protecting you as you offer succor to the ill.

feats.name: Domain Acumen
feats.description: Every oracle's mystery touches on a divine domain of the deities that fuel it; you can access that power.

feats.name: Draconic Acolyte Dedication
feats.description: As an acolyte of dragonkind, you have an item known as a draconic gift that you can use to summon a portion of the magical essence of the dragon you received it from.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Draconic Acolyte Dedication U

feats.name: Dragging Strike
feats.description: You aim your weapon to snag a foe's armor, clothing, or flesh to pull them closer.

feats.name: Dragon Disciple Dedication
feats.description: You choose to study or worship one type of dragon, and your focus grants you a measure of its power.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Dragon Disciple Dedication U

feats.name: Draining Touch
feats.description: You reach out your arm, grasping hungrily for a source of energy.

feats.name: Drake Rider Dedication
feats.description: You gain the service of a young riding drake, riding dragonet, or another animal companion with the dragon trait you have access to.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Drake Rider Dedication U

feats.name: Druid Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a druid.

feats.name: Dual-Weapon Warrior Dedication
feats.description: You're exceptional in your use of two weapons.

feats.name: Dueling Acumen
feats.description: You're always ready for a new duel, and you've been trained to start and end fights quickly.

feats.name: Dueling Parry (Fighter)
feats.description: You can parry attacks against you with your one-handed weapon.

feats.name: Duelist Dedication
feats.description: You are always ready to draw your weapon and begin a duel, no matter the circumstances.

feats.name: Eagle Knight Dedication
feats.description: Eagle Knights are the marshals and envoys of Andoran and are committed to keeping the peace.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Eagle Knight Dedication U

feats.name: Edgewatch Detective Dedication
feats.description: You're a specially trained detective for the Edgewatch guard precinct in Absalom.

feats.name: Eerie Flicker
feats.description: Your body flickers momentarily into the Ethereal Plane.

feats.name: Eldritch Researcher Dedication
feats.description: An eager student of occult lore, you enjoy reading rare or forgotten tomes with ancient rituals and hidden secrets.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Eldritch Researcher Dedication U

feats.name: Elemental Evolution
feats.description: The elemental power within you is more mutable and versatile than most.

feats.name: Elemental Fist
feats.description: You can color your qi in bright elemental energy.

feats.name: Elementalist Dedication
feats.description: Each day when you make your daily preparations, you can attune yourself to one element of your choice from your elemental philosophy.

feats.name: Embed Aeon Stone
feats.description: You discover the secrets to embedding aeon stones into your flesh.

feats.name: Emblazon Armament
feats.description: Carefully etching a sacred image into a physical object, you steel yourself for battle.

feats.name: Embodiment Of The Balance
feats.description: Your place in the balance between the forces of life and entropy expands the spells you can pull from the spirit realms.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Embodiment Of The Balance

feats.name: Emotional Push
feats.description: You prepare to take advantage of your enemy’s sudden change in emotions.

feats.name: Encouraging Words
feats.description: You give an ally a quick pep talk, helping them recover.

feats.name: Energy Ablation
feats.description: As you direct destructive energy at a foe, you can divert some of its power into a protective barrier that shields you from harm.

feats.name: Energy Fortification
feats.description: You learn Minkaian traditions about the void and know how to manipulate the five elements to fortify vitality and void energies in the body.

feats.name: Enhanced Familiar
feats.description: You infuse your familiar with additional primal energy, increasing its abilities.

feats.name: Enjoy the Show
feats.description: You address an ally or any onlookers to your combat, flaunting to your foes how little attention they require.

feats.name: Entreat with Forebears
feats.description: Something about your presence causes creatures of your bloodline to, consciously or not, recognize you as one of their own, and you become inured to their tricks.

feats.name: Esoteric Polymath
feats.description: You keep a book of occult spells, similar to a wizard’s spellbook, and can use its spells to supplement your spell repertoire.

feats.name: Esoteric Warden
feats.description: When you apply antithetical material against a creature successfully, you also ward yourself against its next attacks.

feats.name: Exemplar Dedication
feats.description: A spark of inherent divine power has lit itself within you.

feats.name: Exhort the Faithful
feats.description: Your knowledge of the tenets of your faith gives you insight into the best ways to get others of your faith to help you or to follow your directions.

feats.name: Expansive Spellstrike
feats.description: You can blast the energy of a spell out around the target of your attack.

feats.name: Exploit Blunder
feats.description: By watching your foes closely, you can make the most out of their mistakes.

feats.name: Express Driver
feats.description: You can optimize your vehicle's performance, coaxing extra speed and choosing paths to avoid slowdowns.

feats.name: Eye of the Arclords
feats.description: The Arclords of Nex have achieved a unique mastery of magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Eye of the Arclords U

feats.name: Eyes of the City
feats.description: You can track down targets with the help of locals.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Eyes of the City

feats.name: Fake Out
feats.description: With a skilled flourish of your weapon, you force an enemy to acknowledge you as a threat.

feats.name: Familiar Master Dedication
feats.description: You have forged a mystical bond with a creature.

feats.name: Familiar Oddities
feats.description: Perhaps due to the curse within you, curses occasionally perceive you as an extension of themselves and readily reveal themselves to you

feats.name: Familiar's Language
feats.description: You’ve learned to speak with your familiar and other creatures like it.

feats.name: Fan Dancer Dedication
feats.description: You sweep across the battlefield, manifesting both the gentle spring breeze and the crisp autumn gusts.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Fan Dancer Dedication U

feats.name: Fane's Fourberie
feats.description: Stella Fane has perfected a technique for using playing cards as weapons that's one part sleight of hand and one part magic.

feats.name: Favored Terrain
feats.description: You have studied a specific terrain to overcome its challenges.

feats.name: Field Propagandist Dedication
feats.description: Having devoted your life to crafting propaganda, you know that winning the hearts and minds of soldiers can be a deciding factor in securing the successful outcome of a war.

feats.name: Fighter Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in martial weapons.

feats.name: Finishing Follow-through
feats.description: Finishing a foe maintains your swagger.

feats.name: Firework Technician Dedication
feats.description: You’ve learned the secrets of making fire and sound bloom using black powder, metals, and paper.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Firework Technician Dedication U

feats.name: First Frost
feats.description: The gelid shard within your heart may sap your ability to feel and experience emotion, but it also lets you create and manipulate cold.

feats.name: Fleeing Diversion
feats.description: You are quick to capitalize on your distractions.

feats.name: Flexible Spellcaster Dedication
feats.description: You now have four cantrips per day instead of three.

feats.name: Folklorist Dedication
feats.description: You are a master archivist and entertainer, capable of pulling wisdom from the tales you tell and weaving your allies and enemies into a powerful narrative.

feats.name: Force Fang
feats.description: You can turn your attack into an unerring blur of force.

feats.name: Fresh Ingredients
feats.description: It is amazing the difference fresh herbs can make.

feats.name: Furious Finish
feats.description: Desperate to finish the fight, you pour all your rage into one final blow.

feats.name: Game Hunter Dedication
feats.description: You are skilled at tracking big game animals and similar creatures.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Game Hunter Dedication U

feats.name: Geomancer Dedication
feats.description: You feel a deep connection to the world no matter where you are, a phenomenon known as “terrain attunement.” When you expend a spell slot to cast a spell with a trait that corresponds to the type of terrain you are currently in (as listed below), you gain the terrain attunement effect for that type of terrain.

feats.name: Ghost Dedication
feats.description: You have risen as a shell of your former self, a spirit of mist and anguish.

feats.name: Ghost Eater Dedication
feats.description: You have trained as a ghost eater, a hunter specialized in the destruction of spirits.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Ghost Eater Dedication U

feats.name: Ghost Hunter Dedication
feats.description: You have focused your training on hunting and defeating ghosts, spirits, and all manner of haunts.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Ghost Hunter Dedication U

feats.name: Ghostly Grasp (Deviant)
feats.description: An invisible arm extends from you to grab and manipulate objects.

feats.name: Ghoul Dedication
feats.description: You have succumbed to ghoul fever, dying and returning as a ghoul, an undead cursed with a never-ending hunger for dead flesh that slowly overrides your reason and willpower until you would do anything for the meal you crave.

feats.name: Glad-Hand
feats.description: Make an Impression on a target you’ve just met

feats.name: Gladiator Dedication
feats.description: You know how to turn combat into a form of entertainment.

feats.name: Godless Healing
feats.description: You recover an additional 5 Hit Points from a successful attempt to Treat your Wounds or use Battle Medicine on you.

feats.name: Grasping Spirits Spell
feats.description: Gaining substance from your magic, your apparitions increase the range of your spells, which then pull your enemy closer.

feats.name: Guardian Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Athletics; if you were already trained in Athletics, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

feats.name: Guerrilla Dedication
feats.description: You're skilled in subtle tactics and using the environment against your enemies.

feats.name: Guiding Shot
feats.description: Your ranged attack helps guide your allies into striking your enemy's weak point.

feats.name: Gunslinger Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in simple and martial crossbows and simple and martial firearms.

feats.name: Half-Truths
feats.description: You are able to weave your words in such a way that you never use actual lies, but still mislead people to certain conclusions.

feats.name: Hallowed Necromancer Dedication
feats.description: You've studied techniques allowing you to blend so-called hallowed necromancy into your own spellcasting to bolster the living and destroy the undead.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Hallowed Necromancer Dedication U

feats.name: Hampering Stance
feats.description: You make it difficult for enemies to move past you.

feats.name: Harrower Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Occultism; if you are already trained in this skill, you become trained in a different skill of your choice instead.

feats.name: Hellbreaker Dedication
feats.description: By joining the League, you’ve taken on the responsibilities of a Hellbreaker.

feats.name: Hellknight Armiger Dedication
feats.description: You have taken the first step to being a full Hellknight.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Hellknight Armiger Dedication U

feats.name: Hellknight Dedication
feats.description: You've started walking the path toward becoming a true Hellknight, though you're currently considered only an armiger.

feats.name: Herbalist Dedication
feats.description: You can create natural remedies.

feats.name: Horizon Walker Dedication
feats.description: You've mastered travel within a specific type of terrain.

feats.name: Hunter's Aim
feats.description: When you focus on aiming, your attack becomes particularly accurate.

feats.name: Hurl at the Horizon
feats.description: Your weapon flies from your hand as if propelled under its own power.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Hurl at the Horizon

feats.name: Improvise Admixture
feats.description: You scrounge together enough ingredients from what's left in your alchemist's toolkit to produce a few more versatile vials on the fly.

feats.name: Intimidating Prowess
feats.description: Gain a bonus to physically Demoralize a target

feats.name: Intimidating Strike
feats.description: Your blow not only wounds creatures but also shatters their confidence.

feats.name: Inventor
feats.description: Use Crafting to create item formulas

feats.name: Inventor Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Crafting and inventor class DC.

feats.name: Investigator Dedication
feats.description: You gain the on the case class feature, which grants you both the Pursue a Lead activity and Clue In reaction.

feats.name: Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
feats.description: When you take this dedication, choose one willing, non-minion ally to be your student in the ways of the Iridian Choir.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Iridian Choirmaster Dedication U

feats.name: Juggle
feats.description: You can Juggle items and still use your hands between tosses.

feats.name: Juggler Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Performance and gain the Juggle skill feat

feats.name: Kinetic Activation
feats.description: Rather than incantations and gestures, you can use your kinetic gate to directly unlock the potential of elementally empowered magic items.

feats.name: Kineticist Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in kineticist class DC and impulse attack rolls.

feats.name: Kitharodian Actor Dedication
feats.description: You’ve studied classic Taldan theater and learned to embody various roles to a sublime degree.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Kitharodian Actor Dedication R

feats.name: Lasting Coercion
feats.description: Coerce a target into helping you longer

feats.name: Lastwall Sentry Dedication
feats.description: Swear yourself as a sentry for the Knights of Lastwall.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lastwall Sentry Dedication U

feats.name: Lead Climber
feats.description: When climbing, you can prepare routes for others to follow, and you can pull your allies up to avoid disaster.

feats.name: Leap the Falls
feats.description: Reinforcing your legs with divine energy, you can leap the battlefield as powerfully as a salmon clearing a waterfall.

feats.name: Lepidstadt Surgeon Dedication
feats.description: Before everything else, before the blood and the monsters and the Stasian technology and the horror, you are a doctor.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lepidstadt Surgeon Dedication U

feats.name: Leverage Connections
feats.description: You know the right people who can get things done for you in certain circles.

feats.name: Lightning Swap
feats.description: You have practiced quickly switching between combat styles and the equipment needed for them.

feats.name: Linguist Dedication
feats.description: You have studied languages and their development.

feats.name: Lion Blade Dedication
feats.description: Your Lion Blade spy training helps you conceal yourself and your identity.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lion Blade Dedication U

feats.name: Living Monolith Dedication
feats.description: Begin to process to become a living monolith.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Living Monolith Dedication U

feats.name: Living Vessel Dedication
feats.description: Whether willingly or not, you've become a vessel for a being of unimaginable power.
feats.raw_header: PFS Restricted Living Vessel Dedication R

feats.name: Loremaster Dedication
feats.description: You've compiled a vast repository of information that touches on nearly every subject.

feats.name: Loremaster's Etude
feats.description: You magically unlock memories, making them easier to recall.

feats.name: Lunge
feats.description: You attack an enemy at the edge of your reach.

feats.name: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication
feats.description: You devote much of your study to halcyon magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Magaambyan Attendant Dedication U

feats.name: Magic Warrior Dedication
feats.description: You have taken up a nameless mask and sworn the oath of the magic warriors.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Magic Warrior Dedication U

feats.name: Magical Crafting
feats.description: Craft magic items

feats.name: Magical Shorthand
feats.description: Learn spells quickly and at a reduced cost

feats.name: Magical Understudy
feats.description: Your eidolon evolves to cast spells.

feats.name: Magus Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a magus, gaining a spellbook with four common arcane cantrips of your choice.

feats.name: Malleable Movement
feats.description: You shift the shape of your weapon to help you Leap farther and faster.

feats.name: Marshal Dedication
feats.description: You’ve combined your social skills and combat training to become a talented combat leader.

feats.name: Martial Artist Dedication
feats.description: You have trained to use your fists as deadly weapons and can deliver devastatingly powerful blows with them.

feats.name: Mauler Dedication
feats.description: You specialize in melee weapons that require two hands.

feats.name: Meddling Futures
feats.description: You open yourself to the guidance of whatever spirits or powers deign to help you.

feats.name: Medic Dedication
feats.description: You become an expert in Medicine.

feats.name: Mental Balm
feats.description: Your spells release soothing mental waves.

feats.name: Mind Smith Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to imagine a shape in your mind, to envision it so strongly it takes form in the material world.

feats.name: Minor Magic
feats.description: You’ve dabbled in a variety of tricks, gaining minor magical abilities from a particular tradition.

feats.name: Mobility
feats.description: You move without leaving an opening.

feats.name: Monk Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in unarmed attacks and gain the powerful fist class feature.

feats.name: Monster Warden
feats.description: You understand how to defend yourself and others against your prey.

feats.name: Mortal Healing
feats.description: You grant greater healing when the gods don't interfere.

feats.name: Multifarious Muse
feats.description: Your muse doesn’t fall into a single label.

feats.name: Mummy Dedication
feats.description: Whether through natural processes or foul rituals, your body was mummified, and you've risen as an undead mummy.

feats.name: Munitions Master Dedication
feats.description: You have drilled enough with your light mortar to operate it with unrivaled efficiency.
feats.raw_header: PFS Restricted Munitions Master Dedication U

feats.name: Nantambu Chime-Ringer Dedication
feats.description: You've studied the basics of harmony and resonance in magic, exemplified by the ringing of chimes.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Nantambu Chime-Ringer Dedication U

feats.name: Nidalese Horselord Dedication
feats.description: Thanks to the deep bond you share with your Nidalese horse, the two of you gain remarkable abilities.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Nidalese Horselord Dedication U

feats.name: Nimble Crawl
feats.description: Crawl at a faster rate

feats.name: No Escape
feats.description: You keep pace with a retreating foe.

feats.name: Nonlethal Spell
feats.description: You can alter offensive spells to be less deadly.

feats.name: Oath of The Avenger
feats.description: You’ve sworn an oath to punish wicked acts you witness.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Oath of The Avenger

feats.name: Oath of The Defender
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can swear an oath to defend against a certain kind of enemy during your deeds that day.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Oath of The Defender

feats.name: Oath of The Slayer
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can swear an oath to defeat, topple, or destroy a certain kind of enemy during your deeds that day.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Oath of The Slayer

feats.name: Oatia Skysage Dedication
feats.description: Your study of the stars unlocks supernatural insights and magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Oatia Skysage Dedication U

feats.name: Oil Fire
feats.description: Your armor includes flame-resistant gauntlets with oil-filled finger joints.

feats.name: Oozemorph Dedication
feats.description: You are plagued by sporadic anatomical rearrangements, which grant you insights into other creatures with unusual anatomies.

feats.name: Oracle Dedication
feats.description: Choose a mystery.

feats.name: Order Explorer
feats.description: You have learned the secrets of another druidic order, passing whatever rites of initiation that order requires and gaining access to its secrets.

feats.name: Ostilli Host Dedication
feats.description: You've bonded with an attached symbiote known as an ostilli.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ostilli Host Dedication U

feats.name: Overclock Senses
feats.description: Your senses speed up to the point that time seems to stand still, allowing you to catch details and incoming attacks.

feats.name: Overwatch Dedication
feats.description: You have an innate knack for tactical observation, and you've innovated to apply that knack in a variety of ways that allow you to assist your allies.

feats.name: Pactbinder Dedication
feats.description: The first step toward forming a successful pact is an understanding of the magic behind it, along with skill at negotiation.

feats.name: Pactbound Dedication
feats.description: You befriended one of the last saumen kar and were infused with a fraction of their power, granting you the potential to become a guardian of their ancient pact.

feats.name: Palatine Detective Dedication
feats.description: You have delved into the study of the occult and divine, becoming exceptionally skilled at identifying when such forces are at work.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Palatine Detective Dedication U

feats.name: Panic the Dead
feats.description: Vitality strikes terror in the undead.

feats.name: Pathfinder Agent Dedication
feats.description: You're a field agent of the globe-trotting Pathfinder Society.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pathfinder Agent Dedication U

feats.name: Pei Zing Adept
feats.description: You’re practiced at timing preparations to the point where you can treat multiple patients at once.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pei Zing Adept U

feats.name: Performer's Treatment
feats.description: With your experience as a performer, you can keep a set of medical tools handy at all times.

feats.name: Pernicious Poison
feats.description: You can add a toxic additive to an alchemical poison to make it splash poison on its target.

feats.name: Person of Interest
feats.description: Sometimes, you need to follow the leads as they come in the middle of an investigation.

feats.name: Phalanx Formation (Guardian)
feats.description: You know how to clear a line of fire for your allies.

feats.name: Pirate Dedication
feats.description: As a pirate, you sail the seas in search of enemy ships to plunder and great adventures to embark on.

feats.name: Pistol Phenom Dedication
feats.description: You catch an opponent off-guard by spinning your weapon.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pistol Phenom Dedication U

feats.name: Pistol Twirl
feats.description: Your quick gestures and flair for performance distract your opponent, leaving it vulnerable to your follow-up attacks.

feats.name: Poison Resistance
feats.description: Your affinity for the natural world grants you protection against some of its dangers.

feats.name: Poisoner Dedication
feats.description: You make a point of always having a few toxins near at hand—you never know when some arsenic or the like might prove useful.

feats.name: Powder Punch Stance
feats.description: You infuse your handwraps with black powder.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Powder Punch Stance U

feats.name: Powerful Leap
feats.description: Jump farther and higher

feats.name: Predict Weather
feats.description: By observing often subtle indicators in the environment, you may try to predict the day's weather.

feats.name: Propelling Sorcery
feats.description: The force of your magic can be used to propel yourself or another.
