feats.name: Prophet of Kalistrade Dedication
feats.description: After induction into the ranks of the Kalistocrats, you learned the skills necessary to succeed in business and rise above others by following a set of detailed strictures.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Prophet of Kalistrade Dedication U

feats.name: Psi Burst
feats.description: With a passing thought, you direct violent psychic energies at a nearby creature.

feats.name: Psychic Dedication
feats.description: You feel something awaken within your mind

feats.name: Quick Disguise
feats.description: Set up a disguise in less time

feats.name: Quick Draw
feats.description: You draw your weapon and attack with the same motion.

feats.name: Quiet Allies
feats.description: Roll a single Stealth check when sneaking with allies

feats.name: Raise Haft
feats.description: You know how to use the haft of larger weapons to block your enemies' attacks.

feats.name: Ranged Combatant
feats.description: Spines, flame jets, and holy blasts are just some of the ways your eidolon might strike from a distance.

feats.name: Ranger Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Survival; if you were already trained in Survival, you instead become trained in another skill of your choice.

feats.name: Rapid Assessment
feats.description: You quickly evaluate your enemies.

feats.name: Rapid Mantel
feats.description: Pull yourself onto ledges quickly

feats.name: Rapid Response
feats.description: You work quickly in emergencies.

feats.name: Razmiran Priest Dedication
feats.description: You have earned entry to the priesthood of Razmir, either at the Exalted Lodge or another temple where Razmir’s holy masks are forged.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Razmiran Priest Dedication U

feats.name: Reanimator Dedication
feats.description: You have dedicated your studies to the art of raising and commanding undead.

feats.name: Rebounding Toss
feats.description: You bounce your weapon off one foe to strike another.

feats.name: Red Mantis Assassin Dedication
feats.description: You have learned how to stalk your foes and slay them with a sawtooth saber.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Red Mantis Assassin Dedication U

feats.name: Red-Gold Mortality
feats.description: By channeling your divinity into a creature along with a strike, you can disrupt their ability to recover.

feats.name: Reinforce Eidolon
feats.description: You buffer your eidolon.

feats.name: Release Spores
feats.description: You create a miasma of spores.

feats.name: Relentless Stalker
feats.description: Stay adjacent to your prey when they attempt to move away.

feats.name: Reliable Squire
feats.description: You know the path to victory isn't traveled alone, and you lend aid to your companions whenever you can.

feats.name: Resilient Mind
feats.description: You're firm in your convictions and have girded your mind against outside influence.

feats.name: Retreating Finisher
feats.description: You make a calculated attack without letting down your guard.

feats.name: Reverse Engineer
feats.description: You are incredibly skilled at reverse engineering items to learn their formulas, or disassembling them just to disable them.

feats.name: Revivifying Mutagen
feats.description: You metabolize a mutagen to heal yourself.

feats.name: Risky Reload
feats.description: You've practiced a technique for rapidly reloading your firearm, but attempting to use this technique is a dangerous gamble with your firearm's functionality.

feats.name: Rivethun Emissary Dedication
feats.description: You’re a practicing Rivethun emissary, skilled at interacting and bonding with the spirits of living creatures.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rivethun Emissary Dedication U

feats.name: Rivethun Invoker Dedication
feats.description: You’re a practicing Rivethun invoker, able to enter a trance that connects you physically and mentally to surrounding spirits.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rivethun Invoker Dedication U

feats.name: Rivethun Involutionist Dedication
feats.description: You’re a practicing Rivethun involutionist, with a deep well of inner power.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rivethun Involutionist Dedication U

feats.name: Robust Recovery
feats.description: Greater benefits from Treat Disease and Treat Poison

feats.name: Rogue Dedication
feats.description: You gain a skill feat and the rogue’s surprise attack class feature.

feats.name: Rolling Landing
feats.description: You land with quick rolls that help you keep your momentum.

feats.name: Rose Warden Dedication
feats.description: As a follower of the Everbloom, you stand up against tyranny and oppression, understanding that revolution against an unjust ruler must sometimes be enacted in secret.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rose Warden Dedication U

feats.name: Rotten Slurry
feats.description: You expel a glob of rotten, foul-smelling slurry from your torso, hand, or mouth at a foe.

feats.name: Runelord Dedication
feats.description: Your connection to your sin suffuses all magic you use.

feats.name: Runescarred Dedication
feats.description: Overwhelming magic has branded your body with powerful runes.

feats.name: Sanctify Water
feats.description: You imbue water with your deity's blessing.

feats.name: Sanguimancer Dedication
feats.description: You can draw and manipulate energy from blood. You store life energy in the form of special temporary Hit Points and spend it to manifest powerful effects.

feats.name: Sap Life
feats.description: You draw the life force out of your enemies.

feats.name: Scatter Swarm
feats.description: Your patron reaches through your familiar to magically disperse a group of smaller threats.

feats.name: Scout Dedication
feats.description: You are a highly skilled scout, capable of guiding your allies, detecting imminent threats, and avoiding the attention of dangerous enemies.

feats.name: Scroll Trickster Dedication
feats.description: You've studied scrolls in depth.

feats.name: Scrounger Dedication
feats.description: While others need specialized tools and a dedicated space, you have found a way to build just about anything, anywhere.

feats.name: Searing Restoration
feats.description: They told you there was no way that explosions could heal people, but they were fools… Fools who didn't understand your brilliance! You create a minor explosion from your innovation, altering the combustion to cauterize wounds using vaporized medicinal herbs.

feats.name: Second Wind
feats.description: You can enter a second rage, but afterward you need to catch your breath.

feats.name: Seneschal Witch Dedication
feats.description: As you work to understand the connection with your missing patron, it’s increasingly easy to form bonds with those around you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Seneschal Witch Dedication R

feats.name: Sentinel Dedication
feats.description: You have trained carefully to maximize the protective qualities of your armor.

feats.name: Set-up Strike
feats.description: Your attack makes it difficult for your enemy to defend themselves against your allies' attacks.

feats.name: Shadow Mark
feats.description: You have learned special tricks that help you follow individuals without them noticing you.

feats.name: Shadowcaster Dedication
feats.description: You've sacrificed a piece of your spirit, allowing the powers of shadow into your being and changing the nature of your magic.

feats.name: Shake It Off
feats.description: You concentrate on your rage, overcoming fear and fighting back sickness.

feats.name: Shared Stratagem
feats.description: The plans you make include your allies as well as yourself.

feats.name: Shield your Eyes
feats.description: You reflexively place your shield between your eyes and visual dangers.

feats.name: Shielding Taunt
feats.description: By banging loudly on your shield, you get the attention of even the most stubborn of foes.

feats.name: Shieldmarshal Dedication
feats.description: Your elite shieldmarshal training makes you equally at home in the squalor of Smokeside and the splendor of Skyside.

feats.name: Shooting Stars Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance that lets you throw shuriken with lightning speed.

feats.name: Sister of the Golden Erinys Dedication
feats.description: The fighting style of the Sisterhood of the Golden Erinys is rooted in their understanding of devils.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Sister of the Golden Erinys Dedication U

feats.name: Sleek Reposition
feats.description: While your opponent is still recovering from your prior attack, you snag its armor, clothing, or flesh to move it as you please.

feats.name: Slippery Prey
feats.description: You're able to escape bonds more easily than others.

feats.name: Smoke Bomb
feats.description: You can add a tarry additive to an alchemical bomb to make it emit smoke.

feats.name: Snare Hopping
feats.description: You can magically move your snares around.

feats.name: Snarecrafter Dedication
feats.description: You have studied the art of crafting snares and laying traps, and few have shown more talent in these arts than you.

feats.name: Sniping Duo Dedication
feats.description: You can choose one willing, non-minion ally to act as your spotter.

feats.name: Solid Lead
feats.description: Sometimes your case splinters into smaller mysteries, but you never lose sight of the big picture.

feats.name: Song of Strength
feats.description: Your performances inspire strength in your allies to aid them at physical tasks.

feats.name: Sonic Dash
feats.description: You bounce up and down once, then sprint forward.

feats.name: Sorcerer Dedication
feats.description: Choose a bloodline.

feats.name: Soul Warden Dedication
feats.description: You can take 10 minutes to emblazon Pharasma's holy sigil—a spiraling comet that represents the winding path a soul takes through its existence—upon a shield, tabard, banner, or other prominent object that your wear or wield.

feats.name: Soulforger Dedication
feats.description: You can manifest the power of your spirit in combat to realize your motivations.

feats.name: Sow Rumor
feats.description: You spread rumors, which may or may not be true, about a specific subject.

feats.name: Spectral Dagger
feats.description: By touching the splinter of finality in your neck, you conjure a spectral dagger into your hand that resembles the splinter wrapped in a crude hilt.

feats.name: Spell Parry
feats.description: You infuse magical power into your body or armaments to parry both physical and magical assaults.

feats.name: Spell Trickster Dedication
feats.description: Your experience with magic and its traditions lets you specialize in the casting of certain spells, customizing familiar spells to create novel effects.

feats.name: Spellshot Dedication
feats.description: You've steeped yourself in magic and gunplay to the extent that you can conjure bullets from thin air.

feats.name: Spirit Sheath
feats.description: You've magically constructed an extradimensional sheath for your weapon that you access through your clothing, typically through a pocket, sleeve, or seam.

feats.name: Spirit Speaker
feats.description: You know that when an animal dies, its spirit lingers briefly before moving on.

feats.name: Spirit Warrior Dedication
feats.description: You’re a warrior who trains your spirit and body to work in perfect harmony, enhancing your attacks with your spiritual energy while fighting with a ferocious martial technique that combines blade and fist.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Spirit Warrior Dedication U

feats.name: Spiritual Expansion Spell
feats.description: Your apparitions manifest to scatter the energy of your spell.

feats.name: Sprout Fruit
feats.description: The plants covering your body sprout a single, ripe fruit.

feats.name: Staff Acrobat Dedication
feats.description: Gain bonuses when using your staff as an implement to aid Acrobatics and Athletics actions.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Staff Acrobat Dedication U

feats.name: Stalwart Defender Dedication
feats.description: You have completed your initial training in the ways of a stalwart defender.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Stalwart Defender Dedication U

feats.name: Starlit Sentinel Dedication
feats.description: You’ve been chosen by one of the constellations of the Tian Xia zodiac.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Starlit Sentinel Dedication R

feats.name: Starstone Aspirant Dedication
feats.description: Divine glory awaits! You embrace your longing to make a true and lasting difference in the Universe by embarking on the path to apotheosis.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Starstone Aspirant Dedication U

feats.name: Steed Form
feats.description: Your eidolon changes to make it particularly effective as your mount.

feats.name: Sterling Dynamo Dedication
feats.description: You obtain a sterling dynamo prosthetic, which allows you to replace or augment a limb, or even add a simple new non-prehensile limb, such as a tail.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Sterling Dynamo Dedication U

feats.name: Stone Brawler Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to call the primal power of elemental stone to your aid.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Stone Brawler Dedication U

feats.name: Stonebound Dedication
feats.description: You bind yourself to the very essence of stone.

feats.name: Strong Arm
feats.description: When you Strike with a thrown weapon, the weapon’s range increment increases by 10 feet.

feats.name: Student of Perfection Dedication
feats.description: You have joined one of the Houses of Perfection.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Student of Perfection Dedication U

feats.name: Student of Water
feats.description: Following your studies of water, your qi stirs the water of the natural world.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Student of Water U

feats.name: Stunning Blows
feats.description: The focused power of your flurry threatens to overwhelm your opponent.

feats.name: Summoner Dedication
feats.description: You've formed a bond with an eidolon, an entity that manifests in a physical body only through its link to your life force.

feats.name: Swarmkeeper Dedication
feats.description: Your body has become a symbiotic hive for a swarm of crawling insects.

feats.name: Swashbuckler Dedication
feats.description: Choose a swashbuckler’s style.

feats.name: Tactical Expansion
feats.description: Your folio is filled with tactics and techniques you’ve devised based on study and experience.

feats.name: Talisman Dabbler Dedication
feats.description: You are trained in the use of <%CONSUMABLES%19%> talismans <%END> and similar magical paraphernalia.

feats.name: Talisman Esoterica
feats.description: You know how to assemble the supernatural objects in your esoterica into a number of temporary talismans.

feats.name: Tattoo Artist
feats.description: You can craft tattoos, including magical tattoos.

feats.name: Tattooed Historian Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Diplomacy or Performance; if you are already trained in both skills, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Tattooed Historian Dedication U

feats.name: Taunting Strike
feats.description: The force of your blow causes your enemy to focus their attention on you.

feats.name: Terrifying Resistance
feats.description: The spells of those you have Demoralized are less effective on you.

feats.name: Thaumaturge Dedication
feats.description: You've uncovered basic thaumaturgy.

feats.name: Thlipit Contestant Dedication
feats.description: Grueling practice has strengthened your tongue or tail to the point where it's become a formidable weapon.

feats.name: Titan Swing
feats.description: Your limbs tense as you deliver a mighty swing.

feats.name: Trick Driver Dedication
feats.description: You are equally at home piloting any vehicle, adapting yourself instantly to varied controls, movements, and handling.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Trick Driver Dedication U

feats.name: Triumphant Boast
feats.description: You relate a loud and impressive tale of your triumph over a formidable foe.

feats.name: Tumble Behind (Swashbuckler)
feats.description: Your tumbling puts your foes on the back foot.

feats.name: Tumbling Teamwork
feats.description: Your tumbling distracts a foe enough to create an advantage for one of your allies.

feats.name: Turn Away Misfortune
feats.description: You perform a superstition, such as casting salt over your shoulder to ward off bad luck.

feats.name: Turpin Rowe Lumberjack Dedication
feats.description: Your logging training has made you intimately familiar with all aspects of forestry.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Turpin Rowe Lumberjack Dedication U

feats.name: Tweak Appearances
feats.description: You can alter a creature's clothing to improve their social impact.

feats.name: Twilight Speaker Dedication
feats.description: You have carefully studied the histories, customs, and etiquette of many of the younger peoples of Golarion.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Twilight Speaker Dedication U

feats.name: Ulfen Guard Dedication
feats.description: Central to your Ulfen Guard training is the ability to protect an ally.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ulfen Guard Dedication U

feats.name: Unbalancing Blow
feats.description: Interweaving attacks, you unbalance your foes.

feats.name: Unbalancing Finisher
feats.description: You attack with a flashy assault that leaves your target off balance.

feats.name: Undead Master Dedication
feats.description: You gain the services of an undead companion that travels with you and obeys your commands.
feats.raw_header: PFS Restricted Undead Master Dedication U

feats.name: Undead Slayer Dedication
feats.description: Your training has prepared you to recognize most undead on sight.

feats.name: Underground Network
feats.description: You're connected to groups that know what's going on in the streets, and you can get information out of them quickly.

feats.name: Underhanded Assault
feats.description: You capitalize on the distraction provided by an ally.

feats.name: Undersea Privateer Dedication
feats.description: Your training has taught you the basics of underwater combat.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Undersea Privateer Dedication U

feats.name: Unexpected Sharpshooter Dedication
feats.description: Who needs skill when you've got dumb luck?
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Unexpected Sharpshooter Dedication U

feats.name: United Assault
feats.description: Through countless battles, you've learned you're stronger when working alongside your allies.

feats.name: Unmistakable Lore
feats.description: Recall Knowledge about your Lore more effectively

feats.name: Unusual Treatment
feats.description: Treat Wounds tends to additional conditions

feats.name: Uplifting Overture
feats.description: You learn the uplifting overture composition cantrip, which aids your allies’ skills with the inspiring nature of your performance.

feats.name: Ursine Avenger Form
feats.description: You draw the Ursine Avenger Hood over your head and its fur over your arms, assuming an ursine form that has traits of your original form as well as that of a bear.

feats.name: Vampire Dedication
feats.description: You're a newly risen vampire.

feats.name: Vasodilation
feats.description: Using the power of your own blood, you encourage increased blood flow to nourish damaged tissue.

feats.name: Vehicle Mechanic Dedication
feats.description: You are adept at designing and maintaining mechanical vehicles, and you lavish your attention and ingenuity on one vehicle in particular.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Vehicle Mechanic Dedication U

feats.name: Verduran Shadow Dedication
feats.description: Your awareness of primal energies allows you to explore forests with preternatural ease.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Verduran Shadow Dedication U

feats.name: Versatile Font
feats.description: As you explore your deity’s aspects, you move beyond restrictions on healing or harming.

feats.name: Vigilante Dedication
feats.description: You have two identities, each with its own name and abilities.

feats.name: Viking Dedication
feats.description: Vikings spend long periods of time at sea, only to leap from their boats at a moment's notice, charge through the surf, and take their enemies by storm.

feats.name: Vindicator Dedication
feats.description: Your church ensures that you are cared for.

feats.name: Vine Lash
feats.description: A long vine sprouts from your arm, which you can temporarily wield like a whip.

feats.name: Voice of the Elements
feats.description: You can speak with the secret tones of elements you channel, finding words in the crackle of flame, the grinding of stone.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Voice of the Elements

feats.name: Wandering Chef Dedication
feats.description: Whether trained in a noble kitchen or a humble home, you know how to cook delicious dishes and source ingredients from the wilderness or urban settings.

feats.name: War Mage Dedication
feats.description: Your studies into the battlefield applications of magic have made your spells particularly effective at disrupting enemy formations or manipulating enemy troops into positions where they are more vulnerable to wide-scale magical attacks.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard War Mage Dedication U

feats.name: Ward Medic
feats.description: Treat several patients at once

feats.name: Warning Shot
feats.description: Who needs words when the roar of a gun is so much more succinct?

feats.name: Warp Space
feats.description: You use your magic to bend space, causing your spell to strike from a strange vector.

feats.name: Warpriest’s Armor
feats.description: Your training has helped you adapt to ever-heavier armor.

feats.name: Warrior Of Legend Dedication
feats.description: You have been given a powerful blessing of battle that is also your cursed doom.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Warrior Of Legend Dedication U

feats.name: Wary Disarmament
feats.description: +2 to AC or saves against devices or traps while disarming

feats.name: Waterfowl Stance
feats.description: In your hands, swords dance like rainfall over the waves; who can tell where the storm ends and the sea begins?

feats.name: Weapon Improviser Dedication
feats.description: You don't take the normal –2 penalty to attack rolls with improvised weapons.

feats.name: Wellspring Mage Dedication
feats.description: There's no longer a limit on how many temporary spell slots you can gain per day from wellspring magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Wellspring Mage Dedication R

feats.name: Werecreature Dedication
feats.description: You're a werecreature, able to shift between your humanoid shape, an animal shape, and a monstrous hybrid of the two.

feats.name: What's That up Your Sleeve?
feats.description: Whether as a dealer or player, you've learned to spot cheaters.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard What's That up Your Sleeve? U

feats.name: Wild Mimic Dedication
feats.description: Fighting in the wilds has honed your understanding of the unique abilities many creatures have.

feats.name: Wilderness Spotter
feats.description: Use Survival for your Initiative when in a specific terrain.

feats.name: Winged Warrior Dedication
feats.description: Through rigorous training, you have strengthened your wings, granting you enough thrust to gain additional altitude.

feats.name: Witch Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a witch.

feats.name: Wizard Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a wizard, gaining a spellbook with four common arcane cantrips of your choice.

feats.name: Worm Caller Dedication
feats.description: You pledge yourself to understanding and emulating one of the most powerful creatures of the Darklands: the mighty cave worm.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Worm Caller Dedication R

feats.name: Wrestler Dedication
feats.description: Your training in the wrestling arts has made you particularly adept at moving, striking, and grappling while unencumbered.

feats.name: Wukong Extension
feats.description: Invoking the name of Sun Wukong’s extending cudgel, Ruyi Bang, you activate hidden levers and cranks in your innovation, making it swiftly extend outward like a battering ram.

feats.name: Wylderheart Dedication
feats.description: You’re primed to face off against threats from the Outer Rifts.

feats.name: Zephyr Guard Dedication
feats.description: As a Zephyr Guard, you’re always vigilant against crime and threats to the city’s safety.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Zephyr Guard Dedication U

feats.name: Zombie Dedication
feats.description: Despite your death and subsequent reanimation as a rotting corpse, you retain most of your mind and identity.

feats.name: Additional Circus Trick
feats.description: You gain an additional signature trick.

feats.name: Ancestral Paragon
feats.description: Gain a 1st-level ancestry feat

feats.name: Aurochs-Headed
feats.description: Your words and body language can subconsciously unsettle orcs, giving you an advantage when convincing them to see things your way.

feats.name: Endure Anarchy
feats.description: Recover from Unrest more quickly and lessen its effects

feats.name: Folk Dowsing
feats.description: You can find what you're looking for using a dowsing rod or pendulum.

feats.name: Graft Technician
feats.description: You can create and implant grafts.

feats.name: Hireling Manager
feats.description: Hirelings gain +2 to skill checks.

feats.name: Improvised Repair
feats.description: You can hastily patch damaged equipment together, but the temporary fix lacks the full care required for lasting repairs.

feats.name: Inspiring Entertainment
feats.description: Use Culture on checks to determine Unrest

feats.name: Ivy District Influencer
feats.description: After mingling alongside the tastemakers of the Ivy District, you understand how rumors spread through larger settlements.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ivy District Influencer U

feats.name: Keen Follower
feats.description: Your keen observation of your allies has made you better at following their lead.

feats.name: Know the Beat
feats.description: You have been trained to investigate crimes.

feats.name: Liquidate Resources
feats.description: Draw upon reserve funds to avoid Ruin

feats.name: Pick Up the Pace
feats.description: You lead by example and can help others push themselves beyond their normal limits.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pick Up the Pace

feats.name: Prescient Planner
feats.description: Procure a piece of adventuring gear

feats.name: Quick Recovery (Kingdom)
feats.description: +4 to checks to end ongoing harmful events

feats.name: Robust Health
feats.description: Your physiology responds well to first aid.

feats.name: Skitter
feats.description: Crawl up to half your Speed.

feats.name: Steel Your Resolve
feats.description: Regain Stamina Points equal to half your maximum.

feats.name: Thorough Search
feats.description: You take your time searching to ensure you find everything.

feats.name: Untrained Improvisation
feats.description: Become more adept at using untrained skills

feats.name: We're on the List
feats.description: Emulating Shensen whenever she arrives at a show, you share your knowledge of the region and drop a few important local names to make a good impression and help your allies do the same.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard We're on the List U

feats.name: Accelerating Touch
feats.description: Your healing energies are infused with bounding energy.

feats.name: Acclimated Mount
feats.description: By the grace of your god, your mount can overcome the natural challenges and hazards present in a specific terrain.

feats.name: Acclimatization
feats.description: Your time spent in the hostile parts of the world has inured you to extreme climates.

feats.name: Additional Companion
feats.description: Another animal joins you in your travels.

feats.name: Additional Follower
feats.description: Another follower joins you in your travels.

feats.name: Advanced Alchemy
feats.description: You gain the advanced alchemy benefits

feats.name: Advanced Construct Companion
feats.description: You've upgraded your construct companion's power and decision-making ability.

feats.name: Advanced Reanimated Companion
feats.description: Your corpselike construct companion becomes much more powerful and can act with limited autonomy to follow your greater directives.

feats.name: Advanced Warden
feats.description: You unlock more powerful primal spells.

feats.name: Aeon Resonance
feats.description: You gain the resonant power of one embedded aeon stone as if it were placed in a wayfinder.

feats.name: Agile Hand
feats.description: When you cast mage hand, you can modify it to control a set of thieves' tools.

feats.name: Air Shroud
feats.description: Turbulent air suffuses your kinetic aura.

feats.name: Alchemical Discoveries
feats.description: You've devoted extra time in the lab to improve your knowledge of alchemy.

feats.name: Alchemical Shot
feats.description: You've practiced a technique for mixing alchemical bombs with your loaded shot.

feats.name: Aldori Parry
feats.description: You can parry attacks against you with your Aldori dueling sword.

feats.name: Always Ready
feats.description: Extensive training against undead has taught you to cover your weak points, even when you think that you're alone.

feats.name: Ambush Bladderwort
feats.description: You plant the seed of a giant bladderwort in an unoccupied square of ground or water within 30 feet.

feats.name: Ambush Tactics
feats.description: You've made a study of the best practices for laying ambushes in terrains you've spent time learning about, be it the best way to ambush foes or the best methods of reacting to surprise attacks in those terrains.

feats.name: Anchor Stance
feats.description: You tense your muscles to make yourself neutrally buoyant and more difficult to move.

feats.name: Angel of Vindication
feats.description: To aid with your mission of destroying undead, you've specialized in techniques to destroy them, much as other assassins learn to kill the living.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Angel of Vindication U

feats.name: Animal Actor
feats.description: You participated in a performance of The Leaping Lion, a play focusing on Cyricas, the animal-loving adventurer who traveled with his ape friend Mardu and remains a favorite hero among Taldan youth.

feats.name: Animal Fleetness
feats.description: You're adept at using your animal shape's natural means of locomotion.

feats.name: Ankle Biter
feats.description: You fight just as well on the ground as you do standing up.

feats.name: Anthropomorphic Shape
feats.description: Humanoids’ supposed place apart from animals is folly—taking on their forms just requires some extra practice.

feats.name: Aphet Flash
feats.description: Your swarm can emit a bright flash, much like aphet beetles, a genus of flash beetles once used by Osirian miners as sources of light.

feats.name: Apparition's Enhancement
feats.description: Spiritual power encases your weapon or unarmed attack.

feats.name: Arcane Evolution
feats.description: Your arcane legacy allows you to perceive how magic affects everything.

feats.name: Arcane School Spell
feats.description: You gain your school’s initial school spell.

feats.name: Ardent Armiger
feats.description: You have been trained to resist the manipulations of fiends.

feats.name: Ardent Armiger
feats.description: You've trained to resist the manipulations of fiends, and your Hellknight discipline makes you difficult to influence.

feats.name: Area Armor
feats.description: The armor you wear protects you and shelters your allies against explosions and other large-scale assaults.

feats.name: Armiger's Protection
feats.description: You've learned to wear the iconic Hellknight armor.

feats.name: Armored Courage
feats.description: You take comfort in the safety of your armor.

feats.name: Astral Tether
feats.description: You spin out a thread of psychic energy that connects you to an ally, using it as a conduit for your abilities.

feats.name: Attunement Shift
feats.description: The magic of your spell floods into you, overriding your connection to the land around you.

feats.name: Aura Enhancement
feats.description: You’ve enhanced your training with your battle magic, allowing you access to a more potent divine font.

feats.name: Aura of Courage
feats.description: You stand strong in the face of danger and inspire your allies to do the same.

feats.name: Aura of Despair
feats.description: Your presence as an avatar of evil makes your foes more susceptible to terror and makes it almost impossible for them to shake off fear when you are near.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Aura of Despair U

feats.name: Awakened Power
feats.description: Your power spontaneously evolves or reconfigures itself.

feats.name: Axe Climber
feats.description: You can climb wooden surfaces using axes.

feats.name: Banner Twirl
feats.description: You spin your banner in an elaborate pattern that your enemies find inscrutable.

feats.name: Banner's Inspiration
feats.description: You wave your banner, inspiring allies to throw off the shackles of fear.

feats.name: Barbarian Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each barbarian archetype class feat you have.

feats.name: Barreling Charge
feats.description: You rush forward, moving enemies aside to reach your foe.

feats.name: Barrier Shield
feats.description: When you cast shield, you can modify the spell to create a solid barrier you can use for cover, but not for blocking.

feats.name: Base Kinesis
feats.description: You gain the Base Kinesis impulse.

feats.name: Basic Animist Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster.

feats.name: Basic Arcana
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level wizard feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Bard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Blood Potency
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level sorcerer feat.

feats.name: Basic Bloodline Spell
feats.description: You gain your bloodline’s initial bloodline spell.

feats.name: Basic Breakthrough
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level inventor feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Captivator Spellcasting
feats.description: Your innate ability to fascinate others develops into full-fledged spellcasting.

feats.name: Basic Cathartic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Cleric Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level investigator feat of your choice.

feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level champion feat.

feats.name: Basic Druid Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level commander feat.

feats.name: Basic Flair
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level swashbuckler feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Fury
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level barbarian feat.

feats.name: Basic Glory
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level exemplar feat.

feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level ranger feat.

feats.name: Basic Kata
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level monk feat.

feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level fighter feat.

feats.name: Basic Martial Magic
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level magus feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Muse's Whispers
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level bard feat.

feats.name: Basic Mysteries
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level oracle feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Oracle Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Prophet Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Psychic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Red Mantis Magic
feats.description: You have learned limited divine magic from your Red Mantis training.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Basic Red Mantis Magic

feats.name: Basic Rivethun Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Shooting
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level gunslinger feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Skysage Divination
feats.description: The stars move, granting you a sliver of their magic.

feats.name: Basic Sorcerer Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Spellcasting
feats.description: You increase your ability to cast spells.

feats.name: Basic Synergy
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level summoner feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Thaumaturgy
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level thaumaturge feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Thoughtform

feats.name: Basic Trickery
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level rogue feat.

feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level druid feat.

feats.name: Basic Witch Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Witchcraft
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level witch feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Wizard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Battering Wings
feats.description: Though not powerful enough for flight, your wings can deliver a thrashing to anyone who gets close.

feats.name: Battle Assessment
feats.description: With careful observation during battle, you identify an enemy’s strengths and weaknesses.

feats.name: Beast Speaker
feats.description: You can speak with animals.

feats.name: Beastkin Resilience
feats.description: You've regained beastkin protections after becoming a full werecreature.

feats.name: Belay That!
feats.description: You can recognize when a strategy isn’t working and advise your ally to change course.

feats.name: Bespell Strikes
feats.description: You siphon spell energy into one weapon you’re wielding, or into one of your unarmed attacks, such as a fist.

feats.name: Big Game Trapper
feats.description: You can set snares specifically for big prey, leaving smaller creatures unscathed.

feats.name: Black Powder Boost
feats.description: You fire your weapon as you jump, using the kickback to go farther.

feats.name: Blazing Wave
feats.description: Flames flow out of you in a cascade, engulfing everyone in a 30-foot cone.

feats.name: Bless Shield
feats.description: Your uttered prayers become an aegis, drawing the blessing of your deity across the surface of your shield.

feats.name: Blessed Medicine
feats.description: Your experience battling undead has uniquely prepared you to fight the diseases they inflict on the survivors, and you know that leaving these maladies untreated for long will eventually lead to more undead.

feats.name: Blessed Sacrifice
feats.description: You gain the protector’s sacrifice domain spell

feats.name: Blessed Thorn Strike
feats.description: When you see a foe hurt one of your allies, your righteous retribution causes your weapon to sprout holy thorns.

feats.name: Blessing of the Sun Gods
feats.description: The Old Sun Gods share their power with you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Blessing of the Sun Gods

feats.name: Blood Calls Blood
feats.description: The magical potency of your blood will not be denied.

feats.name: Blood Shield
feats.description: You raise a barrier of your own blood to protect you.

feats.name: Bloodletting Claws
feats.description: Your eidolon inflicts bleeding wounds on a telling blow. PFS Limited Born to the Trees H

feats.name: U
feats.description: You adapt a creature to live among the trees, improving its ability to climb, balance, and leap.

feats.name: Brastlewark Snare Engineering
feats.description: You've trained with the Brastlewark gnomes or studied their teachings, and learned the art of crafting their more magical snares.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Brastlewark Snare Engineering U

feats.name: Breached Defenses
feats.description: You can find the one weak point in a creature's scales, wards, or armor to get past its resistances.

feats.name: Brilliant Crafter
feats.description: Your skill at crafting is unparalleled.

feats.name: Broadside Buckos
feats.description: Shimali Manux trains every Salt Breaker to fight in the cramped quarters below deck, and you've learned how to use these techniques with your crew.

feats.name: Brutal Crush
feats.description: You've learned how to cloud your foes' minds with the brutal impact of your repeated attacks.

feats.name: Bullet Dancer Burn
feats.description: The fiery blaze of your weapons combined with your unorthodox technique leaves your opponents with little opportunity to capitalize on any gaps in your defenses, or properly defend themselves against your onslaught.

feats.name: Bullying Staff
feats.description: You can Shove and Trip larger creatures.

feats.name: Butterfly Blade Dedication
feats.description: You've trained in one of Goka's oldest traditions of espionage, intimidation, and combat mastery.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Butterfly Blade Dedication U

feats.name: Calcifying Sand
feats.description: Your flesh gives way as you're struck, becoming coarse sand that can magically turn your enemy to stone.

feats.name: Calculated Splash
feats.description: You have calculated all the angles to maximize a bomb’s splash.

feats.name: Call Wizardly Tools
feats.description: You’re mystically connected to your wizardly tools, ensuring you can always find them when you’ve misplaced them.

feats.name: Canopy Predator
feats.description: You are as at home in the treetops as you are beneath their branches.

feats.name: Captivator Dedication
feats.description: Your ability to captivate others borders on the preternatural.

feats.name: Careful Explorer
feats.description: You gain a sixth sense for traps, noticing them even when you're not trying to.

feats.name: Cathartic Focus Spell
feats.description: You learn the focus spell listed under your emotion's entry.

feats.name: Cavalier's Banner
feats.description: You fly the banner of your pledge from your mount, raising your allies’ spirits.

feats.name: Cavalier's Charge
feats.description: You Command an Animal to order your mount to Stride twice.

feats.name: Champion Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each champion archetype class feat you have.

feats.name: Change of Face
feats.description: You know that for the best disguise to work, one requires not only the right skills but also the right look—luckily you can copy both using special magical techniques.

feats.name: Channel Smite
feats.description: You siphon the energies of life and death through a melee attack and into your foe.

feats.name: Channeled Protection
feats.description: Your apparition uses excess energy to protect you.

feats.name: Chemical Purification
feats.description: You developed a method to chemically purify and consecrate your bombs on the fly.

feats.name: Claw Snag
feats.description: You hook into the target, pulling yourself forward and rending flesh.

feats.name: Claws of the Dragon
feats.description: Your fingernails grow into razor-sharp claws, and scales speckle your fingers, hands, and wrists.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Claws of the Dragon

feats.name: Clinging Climber
feats.description: You climb like a spider.

feats.name: Cobra Stance
feats.description: You enter a tightly coiled stance, with your hands poised as venomous fangs.

feats.name: Combat Reading
feats.description: You use a performer’s cold reading techniques, aura reading, and other tricks to discover your foe’s strengths and weaknesses.

feats.name: Command Corpse
feats.description: You gain the Command Undead feat, but you can use it only to transform the effects of harm spells you cast on mindless undead.

feats.name: Command Elemental
feats.description: You grasp the animating force within an elemental creature and bend it to your will.

feats.name: Command Undead
feats.description: You grasp the animating force within an undead creature and bend it to your will.

feats.name: Commitment to Equality
feats.description: You help an ally shake off any impediment that would give an enemy an unfair advantage.

feats.name: Companion's Cry
feats.description: You can urge your companion to do its utmost.

feats.name: Consolidated Overlay Panopticon
feats.description: You volunteered for a controversial experimental procedure to install clockwork prosthetic eyes.

feats.name: Contortionist
feats.description: You can squeeze out of tight situations by twisting and bending your body into unnatural positions, gaining an advantage against foes that try to pin you down.

feats.name: Corpse Tender's Font
feats.description: You easily tend to the wounds of the dead.

feats.name: Coughing Dragon Display
feats.description: This display emits a cascade of loud bangs or glittering trails.

feats.name: Courageous Advance
feats.description: With a rousing call, you exhort an ally to advance.

feats.name: Creature Comforts
feats.description: You've found comfort in the forms of other creatures, insulating yourself from feelings of fear.

feats.name: Crescent Cross Training
feats.description: You have familiarity with the crescent cross, an ingenious weapon that combines an arm-mounted, multi-chamber crossbow with a crescent-shaped blade.

feats.name: Cruelty
feats.description: The harm you deal with your corrupting touch saps the strength from your enemy's body.

feats.name: Cryptic Spell
feats.description: You hide your magic in the croak of a frog, in the sway of the trees, in the howl of the wind, and the flicker of the will-o'- wisp.

feats.name: Crystal Keeper Dedication
feats.description: You can use Arcana, Occultism, Religion, or Society to Decipher Writing by meditating before a crystal, regardless of the type of writing.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Crystal Keeper Dedication R

feats.name: Crystal Ward Spells
feats.description: Your study of crystals and the energies held within a gem’s facets grants you special arcane crystal ward spells.

feats.name: Cushion Landing
feats.description: As you fall, your mount dashes to your rescue.

feats.name: Cycle Spell
feats.description: Your devotion to the cycle of souls grants you an additional divine spell.

feats.name: Dashing Pounce
feats.description: With a burst of speed, you leap into the air, slashing with your hands.

feats.name: Dastardly Dash
feats.description: You dash past an opponent, confounding them with underhanded tactics.

feats.name: Dead Reckoning
feats.description: You've trained yourself to maintain a strong sense of direction at all times, even when you can't use a compass or see the sky above.

feats.name: Decry Thief
feats.description: When you attempt to Demoralize, you can make it harder for the target to flee, in place of the action’s normal effects.

feats.name: Defend Summoner
feats.description: Your eidolon blocks attacks against you.

feats.name: Defender's Grit
feats.description: You can’t protect anyone if you’re dead.

feats.name: Deflect Projectile
feats.description: You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Deft Cooperation
feats.description: You gain a bonus to your own checks when Aiding an ally.

feats.name: Demon-Hunting Companion
feats.description: You gain a young animal companion that has been specially trained to help you fight demons.

feats.name: Detective's Readiness
feats.description: When you're on a case, you stay watchful and resolute to avoid tricks your suspect might pull.

feats.name: Devastating Spellstrike
feats.description: Your Spellstrike sweeps are so wide and devastating, they splash onto nearby foes.

feats.name: Devil you Know
feats.description: Your knowledge of your enemies gives you an advantage against them, granting you a swift reaction to their devilry.

feats.name: Devil's Eye
feats.description: Your experience in the finer points of bargaining with a devil has awakened a sinister power that now inhabits your left eye.

feats.name: Devout Magic
feats.description: You gain a devotion spell of your choice listed in the devotion spells class feature

feats.name: Devrin's Cunning Stance
feats.description: You've learned Devrin Arlos's guileful ways, and his sly teachings help you remind your allies to keep their wits about them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Devrin's Cunning Stance U

feats.name: Devrin's Dazzling Diversion
feats.description: Devrin Arlos has a habit of using whatever is at hand to temporarily blind others in combat.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Devrin's Dazzling Diversion U

feats.name: Diabolic Certitude
feats.description: Your Hellknight training drilled details of Hell’s denizens deep into your mind.

feats.name: Diabolic Certitude
feats.description: Your Hellknight training drilled details of Hell's denizens deep into your mind.

feats.name: Directed Channel
feats.description: You can shape the energy you channel in a single direction.

feats.name: Disarming Block
feats.description: With deft and practiced movement, you block at an angle to potentially dislodge the weapon.

feats.name: Disengaging Twist
feats.description: Your ability to twist your opponents’ bodies into painful locks and holds makes you particularly adept at escaping such predicaments.

feats.name: Disrupt Prey
feats.description: Make a melee Strike against your prey.

feats.name: Distant Waterbird's Poise
feats.description: You flow around your foe, using the magic of your attack to carry you away.

feats.name: Distracting Flattery
feats.description: You know how to maintain a good impression and manage your image, even while keeping uncouth company.

feats.name: Distracting Spellstrike
feats.description: You weave distracting magic with one hand to enhance your Spellstrike.

feats.name: Disturbing Defense
feats.description: Your internal organs and blood vessels have shifted and changed, and even you don't know precisely where in your body they are.

feats.name: Divert Streamflow
feats.description: With a brief gesture, you adapt swiftly to an attack like a flowing stream.

feats.name: Divine Evolution
feats.description: The divine might provided by your bloodline flows through you.

feats.name: Divine Infusion
feats.description: You pour energy into the subject of your healing to empower its attacks.

feats.name: Diving Armor
feats.description: You've modified your armor with fins, rotors, and other devices to make it easy for you to move through the water, plus mechanical gills that can help you extract breathable air from water.

feats.name: Doctor's Visitation
feats.description: You move to provide immediate care to those who need it.

feats.name: Double Shot
feats.description: You shoot twice in blindingly fast succession.

feats.name: Dousing Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental water, soaking the target.

feats.name: Draconic Fury
feats.description: You briefly summon spectral claws that lash out in a flurry.

feats.name: Draconic Resilience
feats.description: Energy reminiscent of dragon scales shimmers over you, making it more difficult for attacks to penetrate your defenses.

feats.name: Draconic Scent
feats.description: Your sense of smell is uncanny, much like a dragon's.

feats.name: Dragon Arcana
feats.description: You've discovered how to add the magic of dragons to your tradition.

feats.name: Dread Blade
feats.description: Your strikes with your conjured dagger impart the chill of the grave.

feats.name: Dread Marshal Stance
feats.description: Putting on a grim face for the battle ahead, you encourage your allies to strike fear into their foes with vicious attacks.

feats.name: Dread Striker
feats.description: You capitalize on your enemies’ fear to slip past their defenses.

feats.name: Dual Energy Heart
feats.description: A second energy dwells in your eidolon.

feats.name: Dual Thrower
feats.description: You know how to throw two weapons as easily as strike with them.

feats.name: Dual-Form Weapon
feats.description: You've built your innovation with replaceable interlocking pieces that you can use to transform it into another type of weapon entirely.

feats.name: Dual-Handed Assault
feats.description: You snap your free hand over to grip your weapon just long enough to add momentum and deliver a more powerful blow to your opponent.

feats.name: Dual-Weapon Reload
feats.description: You carry your ammunition in a way that allows you to reload while holding two weapons.

feats.name: Duelist's Challenge
feats.description: Select one enemy you can see and proclaim a challenge against it.

feats.name: Duelist's Edge
feats.description: You hone your reaction time through duels and learn to draw your weapon seamlessly as you begin a fight.

feats.name: Duo Dragon Kick
feats.description: You’ve practiced an impressive spin technique with your construct, automatically attacking in tandem as you launch each other through the air.

feats.name: Echo of the Fallen
feats.description: With the utmost gratitude for your help in releasing them from their unearthly coil, a tiny sliver of a ghostly entity has remained attached to you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Echo of the Fallen R

feats.name: Eclipsed Vitality
feats.description: You shroud yourself in ashes that hide the vital essence sought by life-sensing undead.

feats.name: Efficient Alchemy
feats.description: Thanks to the time you've spent studying and experimenting, you know how to scale your formulas into larger batches that don't require any additional attention.

feats.name: Efficient Explorer
feats.description: You are more efficient at exploring uncharted territories.

feats.name: Elaborate Flourish
feats.description: You embellish your spellcasting with entrancing flourishes and grand pronouncements, making it harder to identify or counter.

feats.name: Elbow Breaker
feats.description: You bend your opponent’s body or limbs into agonizing positions that make it difficult for them to maintain their grip.

feats.name: Elemental Existence
feats.description: Your body becomes infused with elemental earth.

feats.name: Elemental Familiar
feats.description: Your familiar becomes an elemental spirit capable of taking on aspects of the elements.

feats.name: Elemental Summons
feats.description: You can call the elements to you.

feats.name: Emergency Targe
feats.description: You immediately Raise a Shield or cast shield.

feats.name: Emissary Familiar
feats.description: You forge a mystical bond with a spirit or create a spirit from a fragment of your own soul.

feats.name: Empathetic Envoy
feats.description: You believe that treating others with respect is the fastest way into their hearts, and in turn others are more likely to believe in your good intentions and write off bad first impressions as flukes.

feats.name: Enduring Alchemy
feats.description: You've learned how to make your personal energy last just a little bit longer when quickly brewing ad hoc concoctions.

feats.name: Energy Interceptor
feats.description: Though other guardians understand how to anticipate the flow of martial combat, you predict blasts of magical lightning, blazing trap runes, and more.

feats.name: Engine Bay
feats.description: You are practiced at working in vast garages of vehicles and can work on many machines at a time.

feats.name: Entity's Strike
feats.description: The more you try to force your body to stay yours, the more it warps to channel the energy flowing through you.

feats.name: Environmental Explorer
feats.description: You've traversed enough untamed wilderness to gain an intuitive understanding of the dangers that exist in such places.

feats.name: Esoteric Spellcasting
feats.description: Your study of a variety of esoteric texts and supernatural matters has broadened your mind and improved your spellcasting.

feats.name: Even the Odds
feats.description: You shine brightest in desperate moments.

feats.name: Everstand Strike
feats.description: Your follow-up blow leaves you an opening to set your shield.

feats.name: Executioner Weapon Training
feats.description: Your Gray Gardener training has made you deeply skilled with the weapons that execute with a swift chop to the neck.

feats.name: Exemplar Resilency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each exemplar archetype class feat you have.

feats.name: Exorcist Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to attract, quell, and purify spirits, housing them in a special receptacle called a spirit dwelling until they're ready to move on.

feats.name: Expanded Domain Initiate
feats.description: You have long venerated one of your deity’s lesser-known aspects.

feats.name: Experienced Follower
feats.description: Your followers' skills have developed over the course of your adventures.

feats.name: Experienced Harrower
feats.description: When you perform the harrowing ritual, the DC for the Primary Check is never more than the standard DC by level, and the cost for the ritual is halved.

feats.name: Expert Backstabber
feats.description: You excel at quickly dispatching your foes.

feats.name: Eye for Weakness
feats.description: When you successfully Recall Knowledge about a creature you can see, you automatically learn if it has a weakness to holy or unholy in addition to any other results.

feats.name: Eye of Ozem
feats.description: Learn how to better spot danger at a distance.

feats.name: Fabricate Truth
feats.description: You invent a false truth by fast talking, switching arguments, shifting the standard of evidence, and generally confounding others.

feats.name: Face Your Fears
feats.description: A lifetime of facing Nidal's terrors has taught you to fight through fear.

feats.name: Fake It Till You Make it
feats.description: When you take on a role, you become more capable with all sorts of tasks involving that role.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Fake It Till You Make it

feats.name: Familiar Conduit
feats.description: Under your tutelage, your familiar has grown attuned to the hidden currents of the world and can serve as a conduit for your magic.

feats.name: Familiar Foe
feats.description: You regularly face off against undead and can identify many with a glance.

feats.name: Familiar Mascot
feats.description: When selecting master abilities, you can choose an ally to benefit from any specific master ability.

feats.name: Familiar Sage Dedication
feats.description: You’ve forged an empowered mystical bond with your familiar.

feats.name: Fancy Moves
feats.description: You show off your fighting style to discourage your foes.

feats.name: Fane's Escape
feats.description: A good getaway requires a good distraction.

feats.name: Far Shot
feats.description: Your experience in the field has taught you how to focus your aim at a distance, increasing your accuracy.

feats.name: Farabellus Flip
feats.description: Surprisingly agile even in a breastplate and carrying a full rucksack, Marcos Farabellus developed this evasive maneuver during one of his many adventures.

feats.name: Fast Swimmer
feats.description: You move more quickly underwater.

feats.name: Favored Prey
feats.description: You have studied a specific type of wild creature and can hunt it more easily.

feats.name: Feast
feats.description: You feast upon an adjacent restrained or unconscious creature, or a deceased creature that died in the past hour.

feats.name: Feral Senses
feats.description: The eyes and noses of animals are naturally sharper than most humanoids.

feats.name: Fermenting Liquors
feats.description: You always have a special batch of preserved liquor ready for each day.

feats.name: Ferocity Mimicry
feats.description: You have trained yourself to continue fighting even when your body is screaming for you to stop.

feats.name: Fighter Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each fighter archetype class feat you have.

feats.name: Final Rest
feats.description: As stubborn in death as you are in life, you vow you'll never aid your hated enemies.

feats.name: Finishing Precision
feats.description: You’ve learned how to land daring blows when you have panache.

feats.name: Fire Resistance
feats.description: Your connection to heat and flame means that fire is reluctant to bring its full force to bear against you.

feats.name: Firebrand Braggart Dedication
feats.description: Your Firebrand training has taught you that achieving something is more satisfying if you boast about it first.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Firebrand Braggart Dedication U

feats.name: First Revelation
feats.description: You gain your mystery’s initial revelation spell.

feats.name: Flamboyant Athlete
feats.description: Your panache allows you to perform incredible feats: climbing, swimming, and leaping far beyond your normal capacity.

feats.name: Fleet Tempo
feats.description: To rush after a criminal or reach someone in need, you ring a sprightly tone.

feats.name: Flurry of Maneuvers
feats.description: Your flurry is a combination of maneuvers.

feats.name: Fly Swat
feats.description: You've learned the secret of swatting away annoying pests and occasionally getting an easy meal out of it.

feats.name: Flying Kick
feats.description: You launch yourself at a foe.

feats.name: Flying Tackle
feats.description: You barrel forward, gathering enough momentum to take down a threatening foe.

feats.name: Focused Fire
feats.description: You limit the blast of your shot for accuracy.

feats.name: Focused Juggler
feats.description: You continue Juggling until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Folktales Lore
feats.description: You can pull bits of wisdom from any tale.

feats.name: Follow the Threads of Fate
feats.description: A norn’s thread—spun from fate itself—runs through or wraps around your ikon.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Follow the Threads of Fate U

feats.name: For the Fallen!
feats.description: So many other hopefuls have attempted the Test of the Starstone before you and failed.

feats.name: Forceful Push
feats.description: When you cast mage hand, you can modify it to shove a creature.

feats.name: Forest Passage
feats.description: You can always find a path, almost as if foliage parted before you.

feats.name: Form Control
feats.description: With additional care and effort, you can take on an alternate shape for a longer period of time.

feats.name: Frightful Moan
feats.description: You lament your fate, realeasing a ghastly moan that frightens the living.

feats.name: Gadget Specialist
feats.description: Rather than just using your gadgets for various boosts and tweaks, you also craft a few specific temporary consumable gadgets each day.

feats.name: Gear Gnash
feats.description: Snares you create have complicated inner workings that are quite difficult to disable.

feats.name: Ghost Blade
feats.description: You alter your weapon's phase so it can more easily strike incorporeal creatures.

feats.name: Ghost Wrangler
feats.description: Spirits around you coalesce upon your fists, enabling you to seize and harm other ghosts and spirits.

feats.name: Ghostly Resistance
feats.description: Your ghostly form becomes innately weaker but also gains resistance to many forms of damage.

feats.name: Giant Hunter
feats.description: You have studied giants and hunt them with efficiency.

feats.name: Golden Erinys Stance
feats.description: Whether you're a keen student of vengeance or you picked up techniques after being a common target for the sisters' punishment, you've learned to dig painfully into your opponent's flesh.

feats.name: Golden Legionnaire Dedication
feats.description: You're a wall of metal standing against the tide of Andoran's enemies.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Golden Legionnaire Dedication U

feats.name: Gossip Lore
feats.description: Your time gossiping in fashionable salons keeps you informed on every topic.

feats.name: Grave's Voice
feats.description: You can influence spirits and haunts

feats.name: Gravelands Herbalist
feats.description: Your time with the Knights of Lastwall has taught you the secrets of creating and improving upon Lastwall soup.

feats.name: Greenwatch Initiate
feats.description: You've received the basic training developed for all Greenwatch recruits.

feats.name: Guard's Fury
feats.description: Some Ulfen Guards tap into a well of fury to protect their charges.

feats.name: Guarded Movement
feats.description: Your guard is up, even while moving.

feats.name: Guardian Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each guardian archetype class feat you have.

feats.name: Guardian's Deflection
feats.description: You use your weapon to deflect the attack against your ally, granting a +2 circumstance bonus to their AC against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Guerrilla Weaponry
feats.description: You are especially skilled in transforming simple weapons that can be easily assembled from readily available materials into deadly weapons.

feats.name: Gunpowder Gauntlet
feats.description: Your flair keeps foes' attention, as your motions with your gun draw your foes into a deadly game.

feats.name: Gusting Spell
feats.description: You manipulate the currents of your spell's energy, allowing you to gracefully glide with your wings.

feats.name: Haft Striker Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance that allows you to leverage the haft of your weapon to brutal effect as an effective and frighteningly efficient weapon in its own right.

feats.name: Hallowed Initiate
feats.description: You've expanded your focus spellcasting to techniques used by clerics and wizards.

feats.name: Harmonize Self
feats.description: You can restore your health by tapping into your qi.

feats.name: Harrow Casting
feats.description: You draw a card from your harrow deck just before you cast a spell to infuse your magic with its destined potential.

feats.name: Harsh Judgment
feats.description: You loudly declare the creature's life forfeit by your judgment

feats.name: Head Stomp
feats.description: Make an unarmed melee Strike against a prone target.

feats.name: Headless Haunt
feats.description: You were condemned to death and executed with one of Galt’s infamous final blades, where your soul was trapped for years or even decades.

feats.name: Heal Animal
feats.description: You can heal your animal companion's wounds.

feats.name: Healing Bomb
feats.description: You can add a foamy catalyst to an elixir of life to turn it into a topical projectile.

feats.name: Heaven's Step Offense
feats.description: Your lessons from the stage find life in the storied mercy and fearlessness of Grand Prince Gennaris III.

feats.name: Heaven-Earth Encompassing Sleeves
feats.description: Your magic extends to your garments.

feats.name: Hellbreaker's Resolve
feats.description: You gird yourself in both mind and body for danger, steeling your resolve.

feats.name: Heroic Defiance
feats.description: Even as shadows of your doom haunt the corners of your vision, your implacable spirit surges and cries out that your time has not yet come.

feats.name: Hidden Magic
feats.description: You've learned to hide the magical auras of your gear.

feats.name: Hideous Ululation
feats.description: Your throat has multiple separate chambers that can give your voice an eerie echo.

feats.name: Hijack Undead
feats.description: Your clockwork devices can commandeer the bodies of undead, bending them to your will.

feats.name: Holy Bloom
feats.description: Though you might not be a priest of Milani, her divine spirit flows through you.

feats.name: Homing Beacon
feats.description: As your spell strikes a target, you plant a beacon in the target's mind that announces its presence to those nearby.

feats.name: Hunter's Sanctum
feats.description: You establish a safe house where you can prepare for your hunt.

feats.name: Hurling Charge
feats.description: You make a ranged Strike with your thrown weapon, Stride, and then Interact to draw another weapon.

feats.name: Hybrid Study Spell
feats.description: Gain the conflux spell from a hybrid study of your choice.

feats.name: Ice Crafter
feats.description: The ancient ice-crafting techniques of the saumen kar awaken within you.

feats.name: Igneogenesis
feats.description: You can create a permanent stone object, either sculpting stone pulled directly from your kinetic gate or manipulating earth and stone around you.

feats.name: Immortal Lightness
feats.description: You breathe, allowing your golden core to release qi into the meridians governing your lower body, and break into a burst of speed that could shame arrows in flight.

feats.name: Impaling Finisher
feats.description: You stab two foes with a single thrust or bash them together with one punch.

feats.name: Impressive Mount
feats.description: You’ve trained your mount to become a powerful force on the battlefield.

feats.name: Improved Familiar (Witch)
feats.description: You find it easy to attract a powerful and unusual familiar to your side.

feats.name: Improvised Pummel
feats.description: When you make a Strike with an improvised weapon you're wielding, you gain a +1 item bonus to the attack roll, and you can have the Strike deal two weapon damage dice instead of the improvised weapon's normal number.

feats.name: In Lightning, Life
feats.description: “In lightning, there is life.” This lesson is whispered throughout Lepidstadt, and you can put it to practical use.

feats.name: In Plain Sight
feats.description: People often only see what they want to see, a weakness you know how to take full advantage of.

feats.name: In Tune
feats.description: You attune your great skill in performing to another, granting them a small measure of your skill as though anyone could do it.

feats.name: Initial Eidolon Ability
feats.description: Your link to your eidolon becomes stronger, granting it a new ability.

feats.name: Inked Panoply
feats.description: Your tattoos can briefly animate and extend from your skin, granting you a spectral shieldbearer who protects you from harm.

feats.name: Inspiring Marshal Stance
feats.description: You become a brilliant example of dedication and poise in battle, encouraging your allies to follow suit.

feats.name: Inspiring Recitation
feats.description: You quietly speak or recall coded phrases and metaphors whose meanings inspire you to complete your mission.

feats.name: Inspiring Resilience
feats.description: You show defiance in times of hardship and inspire your companions to persevere.

feats.name: Instant Backup
feats.description: Even as your firearm misfires, you quickly draw a backup weapon.

feats.name: Instructive Strike
feats.description: You attack your foe and analyze how it reacts.

feats.name: Interpose
feats.description: You put yourself between an ally and danger.

feats.name: Inured to Alchemy
feats.description: You've developed control over how your body processes alchemical poisons and drugs.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Inured to Alchemy U

feats.name: Investigate Haunting
feats.description: You are skilled at noticing the telltale signs of ghosts and hauntings.

feats.name: Investigator's Stratagem
feats.description: You play out battles in your head, allowing you to strike when the time is right.

feats.name: Invigorating Elixir
feats.description: You can mix an aromatic salve into an elixir with the healing trait to soothe physical maladies.

feats.name: Invoke Offense
feats.description: You manifest a physical attack of the spirits all around you, such as the claw of an animal spirit or the whipping vine of a nature spirit.

feats.name: Irezoko Tattoo
feats.description: Your face bears an intricate magical tattoo known as the irezoko, a badge of your understanding of your chosen field of magic and a recognition of your advancement within Absalom's College of Mysteries.

feats.name: Ivy Playhouse Strike
feats.description: You've spent so many hours at the Ivy Playhouse or sparring with the Street Performers and Actors' Guild that you've picked up some stage combat techniques.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ivy Playhouse Strike U

feats.name: Jalmeri Heavenseeker Dedication
feats.description: Your skill and dedication have set you on a path to master the techniques of Jalmeray's greatest martial artists: victors of the Challenge of Sky and Heaven.

feats.name: Jalmeri Heavenseeker Dedication
feats.description: Your skill and dedication have set you on a path to master the techniques of Jalmeray's greatest martial artists.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Jalmeri Heavenseeker Dedication U

feats.name: Just the Tool
feats.description: You temporarily change your weapon's shape to assist you in the field.

feats.name: Ka Stone Ritual
feats.description: You enchant your ka stone and can use it to wield magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ka Stone Ritual R

feats.name: Kaiju Defense Oath
feats.description: You’ve sworn an oath to defend the helpless from dangerous titanic beasts, including kaiju that roam the surface of Golarion.

feats.name: Knock Sense
feats.description: You attack carefully to knock some sense into a creature whose actions aren't their own.

feats.name: Knowledge of Shapes
feats.description: Inspiration lets you surpass your preconceptions of your spells' limits.

feats.name: Kreighton's Cognitive Crossover
feats.description: Kreighton teaches his students that an agile mind can glean clues leading to the truth, even from the most unlikely of sources.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Kreighton's Cognitive Crossover U

feats.name: Lassoing Lash
feats.description: You quickly wrap your lash around an opponent and pull them toward you.

feats.name: Lava Leap
feats.description: You wreath yourself in molten stone and hurtle toward your enemy.

feats.name: Leader of All
feats.description: You accept anyone who would follow you on your adventures.

feats.name: Leading Dance
feats.description: You sweep your foe into your dance.

feats.name: Leshy Familiar Secrets
feats.description: The leaf order’s secrets allow your familiar to take advantage of its leshy form.

feats.name: Lesson of the Broken Wing
feats.description: You make yourself appear to be a tempting target to draw an enemy in, distracting them from your student's attacks.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lesson of the Broken Wing

feats.name: Lesson of the Circling Gale
feats.description: You and your student have trained with footwork drills to mirror each other's movements.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lesson of the Circling Gale

feats.name: Lie Detector
feats.description: You're adept at noticing the tells of a liar—sweat, flushing, a quavering voice, a quickening pulse.

feats.name: Lifelink Surge
feats.description: You learn the lifelink surge link spell.

feats.name: Light of Revelation
feats.description: You’ve learned to call upon light to reveal what is hidden.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Light of Revelation U

feats.name: Lightning Dash
feats.description: For an instant, you transform yourself into a being of pure lightning and fly forward, shocking anyone in your way.

feats.name: Lingering Chill
feats.description: The chill of ice entered your veins and never left, adjusting the internal temperature of your body.

feats.name: Linked Focus
feats.description: You have linked your bonded item to the well of energy that powers your school spells.

feats.name: Lion's Might
feats.description: You've trained with the weapons of the Bright Lions.

feats.name: Listener's Boon
feats.description: Isthralei has given you a gift to assist you on your journey.

feats.name: Living Bonfire
feats.description: Roots and branches of living wood writhe in elemental fire at your command, forming a bonfire fearsome enough to scare off predators in the night.

feats.name: Log Roll
feats.description: You shuffle your feet to dislodge the surface beneath you or otherwise cause your opponent to become unsteady.

feats.name: Loose Cannon
feats.description: Your unpredictable gunfire often catches enemies off guard or hits unprotected areas.

feats.name: Lost in the Crowd
feats.description: You’ve learned how to move as one with crowds and hide among them, vanishing into a busy street in the flicker of an eye.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lost in the Crowd

feats.name: Lucky Escape
feats.description: Force your foe to reroll the triggering attack

feats.name: Mage's Field Dressing
feats.description: As your spell takes hold on your ally, you use some of its magic to quickly dress their wounds.

feats.name: Magic Warrior Aspect
feats.description: You can alter your form to gain an aspect of the animal your mask represents.

feats.name: Magic Warrior Transformation
feats.description: You can transform fully into the animal your mask represents.

feats.name: Magical Edification
feats.description: You've learned those tidbits of magic that are most conducive to furthering your acquisition and transmission of knowledge.

feats.name: Magical Scholastics
feats.description: While study is key to your success, a bit of magic can be a helpful aid in discovering the secrets of the past.

feats.name: Magical Trickster
feats.description: You can sneak spells past your foes’ defenses as easily as any blade.

feats.name: Magnetic Field
feats.description: A magnetic field surrounds you.

feats.name: Mammoth Lord Dedication
feats.description: You've undertaken the ultimate challenge of the Mammoth Lords and tamed a megafauna.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Mammoth Lord Dedication U

feats.name: Manipulative Charm
feats.description: Against humanoids, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to Lie, and to Diplomacy checks to Gather Information and Make an Impression. Once per day, you can cast charm as a divine innate spell using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

feats.name: Mask Familiar
feats.description: Your mask takes on a personality of its own, allowing it to serve as your familiar.

feats.name: Masquerade of Seasons Stance
feats.description: You have mastered the opening steps to the Masquerade of Seasons, a dance that channels the power of spring, summer, winter, and autumn.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Masquerade of Seasons Stance R

feats.name: Mature Animal Companion (Druid)
feats.description: Your animal companion has grown up over the course of your adventures, becoming a mature animal companion and gaining additional capabilities (page 211).

feats.name: Mature Beastmaster Companion
feats.description: All of your animal companions grow up, becoming mature animal companions and gaining additional capabilities. Your animal companion has greater independence.

feats.name: Mature Dragon Companion
feats.description: Your dragon companion matures and the bond you share is strengthened.

feats.name: Megaton Strike
feats.description: You activate gears, explosives, and other hidden mechanisms in your innovation to make a powerful attack.

feats.name: Melodious Spell
feats.description: You subtly weave your spellcasting into a performance.

feats.name: Mental Forge
feats.description: Your experiences in combat shape your mind's capability to strengthen and shape your weapon to match the way you move in combat.

feats.name: Mercenary Motivation
feats.description: A large part of being in the Mercenary League entails doing mercenary work.

feats.name: Mercy
feats.description: Your touch soothes the body or mind.

feats.name: Minion Guise
feats.description: When you are in your social identity, you can also grant a social identity to an animal companion, familiar, pet, or other minion you gained from a class feature or feat.

feats.name: Minor Deific Power
