feats.description: Your mental, physical, and spiritual training have granted you access to divine magic that doesn't rely on any other deity or patron.

feats.name: Modular Dynamo
feats.description: Your dynamo has modular configurations, allowing you to swap between various different possibilities with ease in order to adapt to various situations in combat.

feats.name: Monk Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each monk archetype class feat you have.

feats.name: Morning Side Dishes
feats.description: You know a proper breakfast should have a variety of sides.

feats.name: Mortification
feats.description: Your reckonings have prepared your body for physical punishment.

feats.name: Mortification
feats.description: Your reckonings have prepared your body for physical punishment.

feats.name: Mountain Skin
feats.description: You become trained in medium and heavy armor.

feats.name: Mounting Leap
feats.description: You jump atop your mount from afar, landing comfortably astride it.

feats.name: Mug
feats.description: You make a quick attack and rob your foe in the process.

feats.name: Multilingual Cipher
feats.description: You use multiple languages to create and break codes.

feats.name: Named Artillery
feats.description: It is a tradition among artillerists to name the siege weapon most important to them and closest to their heart—much as a sailor on a ship, the weapon is their livelihood.

feats.name: Natural Conduit
feats.description: You can use an animal as a conduit for your magic.

feats.name: Natural Swimmer
feats.description: Water flows around you, letting you cut through the waves as if born to it.

feats.name: Necromantic Resistance
feats.description: Gain resistance to necromancy effects and damage.

feats.name: Necromantic Resistance
feats.description: As part of your training, you've inured yourself against necromancy through grueling, repeated exposure.

feats.name: Never Tire
feats.description: As long as you have an audience, you can continue to perform even when you are on the brink of collapse.

feats.name: Nocturnal Kindred
feats.description: You have an innate connection with other creatures of the night and understand some of them.

feats.name: Nonlethal Takedown
feats.description: You prefer to use nonlethal means against living opponents, but the weapons you carry are lethal enough to destroy undead.

feats.name: Norgorber's Secret
feats.description: Being the god of secrets, Norgorber has erased all traces of his life before his ascension so that his every mortal act and even his identity remain unknown and unknowable.

feats.name: Not so Fast!
feats.description: You lash out when foes try to get past you, possibly stopping them in their tracks.

feats.name: Numbing Spice Exhalation
feats.description: You can mix alchemically preserved peppers into an alchemical food consumable to spice it up with alchemical fire.

feats.name: Observant Explorer
feats.description: You've gained an intuitive sense about creatures.

feats.name: Observational Analysis
feats.description: You are able to rapidly discern relevant details about your opponents in the heat of combat.

feats.name: Occult Evolution
feats.description: You draw power from the obscure secrets of the universe.

feats.name: One with the Land
feats.description: Your connection to your bound terrain strengthens, making you unhindered by local weather.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard One with the Land

feats.name: Ongoing Investigation
feats.description: You're always investigating what's around you, even as you perform other activities.

feats.name: Only the Worthy
feats.description: You can designate your ikons as movable by only your own hand, leaving them fixed in place as surely as if they were lodged in stone.

feats.name: Order Magic
feats.description: You have delved deeper into the teaching of a new order, gaining access to a coveted order spell.

feats.name: Order Spell
feats.description: You gain the initial order spell from your order.

feats.name: Orthographic Mastery
feats.description: You understand the principles that underlie all written words, allowing you to read nearly any text.

feats.name: Ostentatious Reload
feats.description: Every good Firebrand knows that style can be as important as substance—so long as you don't screw up the delivery.

feats.name: Oversized Throw
feats.description: With a great heave, you seize a piece of your surroundings, such as a boulder, log, table, wagon, or chunk of earth, and hurl it at your foes.

feats.name: Pact of Fey Glamour
feats.description: You've sworn a pact with fey powers, granting you the otherworldly appearance of your dreams in exchange for oaths of hospitality.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of Fey Glamour U

feats.name: Pact of Huldra's Renewal
feats.description: You’ve sworn a pact with Zemnaïdé, a huldra professor at Cobyslarni, to help renew his former homeland of the Sarkoris Scar.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of Huldra's Renewal R

feats.name: Paired Link
feats.description: You break a trinket, such as a lodestone or jade pendant, in two, creating a sympathetic link between the halves that bridges distance.

feats.name: Paired Shots
feats.description: Your shots hit simultaneously.

feats.name: Parting Shot
feats.description: You jump back and make a quick shot that catches your opponent by surprise.

feats.name: Patch Job
feats.description: You can patch up damage to an object with a quick fix.

feats.name: Patron's Glamour
feats.description: Gathering up threads of your old connection, you can temporarily disguise yourself as your missing patron.

feats.name: Peafowl Stance
feats.description: You enter a tall and proud stance while remaining mobile, with all the grace and composure of a peafowl.

feats.name: Perfect Strike
feats.description: You call upon insight from your training to recover accuracy.

feats.name: Perfect Weaponry
feats.description: You gain the Monastic Weaponry monk class feat.

feats.name: Petal Step
feats.description: You have a mastery over your own movement and can distribute your weight to dance lightly over the ground like petals drifting on the water.

feats.name: Phonetic Training
feats.description: You can pronounce and repeat words with near-perfect accuracy even if you don’t understand their meaning, and you can write them down in a phonetic script that allows you or another creature with Phonetic Training to read it later.

feats.name: Pirate Combat Training
feats.description: You're particularly skilled at wielding the weapons used traditionally by pirates.

feats.name: Plate in Treasure
feats.description: Precious metal flows from your fingers to plate an object.

feats.name: Play to the Crowd
feats.description: You show off for the crowd.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Play to the Crowd

feats.name: Poison Weapon
feats.description: You apply a contact poison or injury poison to the required weapon; if you have a free hand, you can Interact to draw a poison as part of this action.

feats.name: Poisoner's Twist
feats.description: Poisons attack specific parts of the body—one venom might target the lungs, another the circulatory system, while another deteriorates the nerves.

feats.name: Portents of the Haruspex
feats.description: Although the divinations of a haruspex traditionally require organs and lengthy interpretation, you've learned how to glimpse the future in a more simple fashion by reading creatures' wounds.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Portents of the Haruspex

feats.name: Posse
feats.description: By spending 1 minute giving guidance to help hunt down your prey, you instruct up to five willing creatures to assist you.

feats.name: Poultice Preparation
feats.description: When you create an elixir as an herbal item, you can prepare it as a poultice instead.

feats.name: Power Slide
feats.description: You throw the vehicle into a barely controlled skid, turning sharply to evade pursuit or bring your weapons to bear.

feats.name: Powerful Shove
feats.description: You can push larger foes around with your attack.

feats.name: Prayer-Touched Weapon
feats.description: You coat a weapon you're wielding in prayers and the divine power given to you by your deity.

feats.name: Predictable!
feats.description: By observing an opponent, you can get a sense of their next move and prepare to counter or resist it.

feats.name: Predispose Settlement
feats.description: You spend 7 days of downtime seeding propaganda through a settlement with a population of 2,500 or fewer.

feats.name: Primal Evolution
feats.description: You can call upon the creatures of the wild for aid.

feats.name: Proud Nail
feats.description: When a foe ignores your taunts, you make them pay.

feats.name: Psi Strikes
feats.description: You siphon residual psychic energies from your spell into one weapon you're wielding or one of your unarmed attacks.

feats.name: Psychic Duelist Dedication
feats.description: Through experience and in-depth visualizations of mental battles, you've grown adept at psychic duels.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Psychic Duelist Dedication R

feats.name: Psychopomp Familiar
feats.description: Your familiar becomes a masked psychopomp—an extraplanar guardian of the cycle of souls.

feats.name: Push Back the Dead!
feats.description: You call to your ally and strengthen their resolve and abilities to defend against the horrific tricks undead bring to bear.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Push Back the Dead! U

feats.name: Pyre Ant Sting
feats.description: Your swarm's stings burn with agonizing pain, much like that caused by the bright red pyre ants that make their tunnels within the parched sands of deserts like Qadira.

feats.name: Quick Fix
feats.description: You can attach a <%CONSUMABLES%19%> talisman <%END> using only a bit of glue and some string.

feats.name: Quick Juggler
feats.description: When you start to Juggle or add another item to those you are Juggling, you add two items instead of one.

feats.name: Quick Mount
feats.description: You and your mount can spring into action at a moment’s notice.

feats.name: Quick Reversal
feats.description: You turn your foes’ flanking against them with a quick reverse.

feats.name: Quick Shot
feats.description: You draw your bow and attack with the same action.

feats.name: Quick Study
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can study a particular subject to gain the trained proficiency rank in one Lore skill of your choice.

feats.name: Raging Athlete
feats.description: Physical obstacles can't hold back your fury.

feats.name: Raging Stories
feats.description: When you Offer a Story about wild chances and fighting against all odds, you can wrap yourself in spectral flame in place of the normal benefits.

feats.name: Rain of Rust
feats.description: You conjure a red raincloud in a 10-foot burst within 60 feet, which pours rust-colored rain directly below it.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rain of Rust H

feats.name: Raise Symbol
feats.description: You present your religious symbol emphatically.

feats.name: Rallying Anthem
feats.description: You learn the rallying anthem composition cantrip, which protects you and allies.

feats.name: Ranger Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each ranger archetype class feat you have.

feats.name: Ravel of Thorns
feats.description: Thorny vines grow in geometric patterns on surfaces in your kinetic aura.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ravel of Thorns H

feats.name: Ravenous Charge
feats.description: Hungry for the flesh of the living, you hurl yourself into the fray, teeth gnashing.

feats.name: Reach Beyond
feats.description: You've learned to move your spiritual energy past yourself to attack spirits where others can't.

feats.name: Reactive Dismissal
feats.description: You abruptly dismiss your eidolon to reduce the damage it takes, though this makes summoning it again more difficult.

feats.name: Reactive Pursuit
feats.description: You keep pace with a retreating foe.

feats.name: Reactive Striker
feats.description: You gain the Reactive Strike reaction.

feats.name: Rebel's Map
feats.description: Rebellions require an intricate knowledge of one's surroundings—because you might need to escape at any moment.

feats.name: Reflexive Catch
feats.description: Grab an item thrown at you.

feats.name: Regurgitate Mutagen
feats.description: You redirect a mutagen within your body to spit a stream of stomach acid at a foe.

feats.name: Remember Your Training
feats.description: You were schooled on a wide variety of creatures you might encounter.

feats.name: Rend Mimicry
feats.description: Taking advantage of the brutal efficiency of hacking away at a target with two slashing attacks, you've mastered the art of punishing a foe caught between your slices.

feats.name: Repeating Hand Crossbow Training
feats.description: The specific needs of your organization or mission warrant your use of the latest in ingenious crossbow technology.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Repeating Hand Crossbow Training

feats.name: Repel Darkness
feats.description: Your stoicism and courage seem to drive off darkness and shadow.

feats.name: Replenishing Consumption
feats.description: When you devour corpses and satiate your hunger, you also recover from some of your wounds, your necrotized blue flesh knitting back together almost immediately as soon as you begin shoveling the chunks of dead flesh down your throat.

feats.name: Rescuer's Press
feats.description: Any shield you wield gains the shove trait.

feats.name: Restorative Strike
feats.description: You balance both sides of the scales, restoring yourself while striking a foe.

feats.name: Restore Omen
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes meditating with your harrow deck, then draw a card.

feats.name: Return to the Sea
feats.description: You adapt a creature to living and moving in water.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Return to the Sea H

feats.name: Reverse Engineering
feats.description: Your nigh-constant tinkering and fiddling with objects means you are able to reverse engineer items into formulas more effectively than most.

feats.name: Rip and Tear
feats.description: You've learned to debilitate your enemies in the same way a hunter tears at their prey.

feats.name: Rise, My Creature!
feats.description: You have created life! You have usurped the power of the gods themselves!

feats.name: Rising Blood Magic
feats.description: The power within your blood grows.

feats.name: Rites of Convocation
feats.description: Your patron grants you the power to summon other creatures to aid you.

feats.name: Ritual Researcher
feats.description: Careful research into the art of rituals has made you better at performing them.

feats.name: Ritualist Dedication
feats.description: You have begun to master the difficult art of casting rituals.

feats.name: Rope Runner
feats.description: You run and climb across ropes and rigging almost as easily as on the ground.

feats.name: Running Reload
feats.description: You can reload your weapon on the move.

feats.name: Sabotage
feats.description: You subtly damage others’ equipment.

feats.name: Sacral Lord
feats.description: By right of ritual or sheer stubbornness, you have claimed rulership of the land.

feats.name: Sacred Ground
feats.description: You pray continuously for 1 minute to call a subtle shadow of your deity’s realm over a 30-foot burst centered on you.

feats.name: Sacred Ki
feats.description: The power of your faith suffuses your ki

feats.name: Sacred Spells
feats.description: Add chill touch, death ward, disrupt undead, disrupting weapons, holy cascade, magic stone, and sunburst to your spell list.

feats.name: Sacred Wilds Oath
feats.description: You’ve sworn an oath to protect the holy places within nature and the spirits that dwell within, from ancient trees to primordial wild guardians.

feats.name: Safe Elements
feats.description: Elements are wild and dangerous, but you've found ways to reduce their risk.

feats.name: Safe House
feats.description: You establish a safe house—a secure space in which to hide your secrets from the outside world.

feats.name: Safety Measures
feats.description: You're often careful to be sure you're not hoisted on your own petard, or anyone else's, for that matter.

feats.name: Scales of the Dragon
feats.description: Scales grow across your body, protecting you against physical and magical threats.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Scales of the Dragon

feats.name: Scalpel's Point
feats.description: Your stratagems benefit from your precise knowledge of anatomy.

feats.name: Scars of Steel
feats.description: When you are struck with the mightiest of blows, you can flex your muscles to turn aside some of the damage.

feats.name: Scion of Domora Dedication
feats.description: You gain a spirit guide ally.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Scion of Domora Dedication R

feats.name: Scoundrel's Surprise
feats.description: You drop your disguise at the right moment and surprise your target.

feats.name: Scout's Charge
feats.description: You meander around unpredictably, and then ambush your opponents without warning.

feats.name: Scout's Warning
feats.description: You visually or audibly warn your allies of danger, granting them each a +1 circumstance bonus to their initiative rolls.

feats.name: Security
feats.description: Those you shield can benefit from your lasting protection.

feats.name: Seeker of Truths
feats.description: Your devotion to discovering and hoarding abstruse truths borders on the fanatical, and you can bring this devotion to bear.

feats.name: Semblance of Life
feats.description: You draw the moisture you've drained from others into your own flesh, temporarily taking on the appearance of life.

feats.name: Seneschal Spell
feats.description: You can channel even complex spells through your connection to your charge.

feats.name: Sense Alignment
feats.description: You read the body language of an intelligent creature within 30 feet and pick up on subtle cues to detect its general propensity for good or evil and law or chaos.

feats.name: Senses of the Bear
feats.description: While in ursine form, you gain low-light vision and scent (imprecise) 30 feet.

feats.name: Settlement Scholastics
feats.description: Your studies open up new horizons.

feats.name: Shadow Spells
feats.description: Hidden darkness whispers to you, teaching you secrets of shadow beyond other spellcasters of your tradition.

feats.name: Shared Attunement
feats.description: When you would gain a benefit from your terrain attunement, you can grant it to one ally within 30 feet instead of yourself.

feats.name: Shattering Spellstrike
feats.description: You intentionally channel a rampaging cascade of magic through your weapon, breaking it to deal more damage.

feats.name: Sheltering Cave
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes communing with spirits of earth and stone, requesting shelter.

feats.name: Shield Spell Reinforcement
feats.description: You can empower your defensive magic by channeling it through a physical shield.

feats.name: Shielded Attrition
feats.description: You provoke attacks from foes that might otherwise stop your allies from moving.

feats.name: Shielded Recovery
feats.description: You can bandage wounds with the same hand you use to hold your shield.

feats.name: Shielded Stride
feats.description: When your shield is up, your enemies’ blows can’t touch you.

feats.name: Shining Arms
feats.description: When you cast light, you can modify its target to be 1 melee weapon.

feats.name: Shorthanded
feats.description: You can operate a siege weapon with fewer than the minimum number of crew, at an increasing penalty.

feats.name: Shrink Down
feats.description: Your eidolon can shrink to fit into small spaces.

feats.name: Siege Ritualist
feats.description: Sometimes, magical warfare requires the application of more complex arcana.

feats.name: Skilled Partner
feats.description: Your eidolon gains a 1st-level skill feat and a 2nd-level or lower skill feat.

feats.name: Slam Down
feats.description: You make an attack to knock a foe off balance, then follow up immediately with a sweep to topple them.

feats.name: Slayer's Strike
feats.description: You've dedicated yourself to studying ancient techniques and memorized minor prayers against undead to swiftly dispatch them.

feats.name: Sleepwalker Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to manipulate states of consciousness, beginning with your own.

feats.name: Smile at Failure
feats.description: You know staying cool is key to prevailing in social situations, as anger leads to mistakes.

feats.name: Snap Out of It!
feats.description: You give a quick shout, hoping to shake the fog clouding your ally’s thoughts.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Snap Out of It!

feats.name: Snare Expert
feats.description: Your knowledge of traps aids you in defending your hideout.

feats.name: Snare Specialist
feats.description: You specialize in creating quick traps to obstruct your enemies on the battlefield.

feats.name: Sneak Attacker
feats.description: You gain the sneak attack class feature, except it deals 1d4 damage, increasing to 1d6 at 6th level.

feats.name: Snowcaster
feats.description: Your magical power grows as the shard's icy influence spreads ever deeper into your being.

feats.name: Snowdrift Spell
feats.description: The howling wind and precipitation of your magic turn to thick snow.

feats.name: Sociable Vow
feats.description: You can leverage your vow in more social interactions.

feats.name: Social Purview
feats.description: You have built a reputation for yourself in your social identity.

feats.name: Solo Dancer
feats.description: You often dance alone with a grace exceeding that of most other performers, carrying yourself with a poise and confidence that draws the attention of those around you.

feats.name: Soothing Pulse
feats.description: Your ostilli can use its stored magic to help staunch your wounds, granting you the Administer Ambient Magic action. Administer Ambient Magic [two-actions] (healing) Frequency once per hour; Effect Your ostilli pulses a calm lavender color as it converts stored magic into a curative balm.

feats.name: Soul Flare
feats.description: You strive to change the outcome with sheer zeal.

feats.name: Special Sentinel Technique
feats.description: You can channel the power of your constellation into a unique technique.

feats.name: Spell Protection Array
feats.description: You inscribe a circle of arcane runes that dampen enemies’ magic.

feats.name: Spell Runes
feats.description: The magical runes on your body grant you several magical abilities.

feats.name: Spell-Woven Shot
feats.description: You combine your own magic with that of your magical crossbow or firearm.

feats.name: Spellstriker
feats.description: You gain the magus's Spellstrike activity.

feats.name: Spirit Companion
feats.description: You gain the service of a young animal companion, which has been blessed by the spirits of this world.

feats.name: Spirit Spells
feats.description: Your ability to confront incorporeal menaces develops into full-fledged spellcasting.

feats.name: Spirit of the Beast
feats.description: You imbue your companion with the aspect of another animal.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Spirit of the Beast

feats.name: Spiritual Awakening
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level animist feat.

feats.name: Spiritual Explorer
feats.description: You're familiar with the danger that lingering spirits can pose to an unwary adventurer.

feats.name: Spiritual Guides
feats.description: Though no one sees them and only you can hear them, the spirits around you constantly chatter, save when you are raging.

feats.name: Split Shot
feats.description: You fragment a ranged spell.

feats.name: Spot Translate
feats.description: You bridge a language gap, repeating the message in a different language that you know.

feats.name: Spyglass Modification
feats.description: Your enhanced visual gear includes a regulating scope and reflectors, combined in an ingenuous setup that allows you to see around corners within the area of your overwatch field.

feats.name: Stage Fighting
feats.description: You pull punches to give a better show.

feats.name: Stalwart Song
feats.description: As a stalwart defender, you rely on your martial training and your tried-and-true armor to face any danger without flinching.

feats.name: Stand Still
feats.description: You strike out when your foe tries to flee.

feats.name: Stargazer's Eyes
feats.description: Long hours in darkened observatories have sharpened your senses.

feats.name: Starlit Eyes
feats.description: Starlight shines in your sight, enhancing your perception and range.

feats.name: Steady Spellcasting (Magus)
feats.description: Confident in your technique, you don't easily lose your concentration when you Cast a Spell.

feats.name: Steel Falcon Dedication
feats.description: You serve as an envoy of the ideals of Andoran, whether it's in a foreign court or on the field of battle.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Steel Falcon Dedication U

feats.name: Steel Skin
feats.description: You wear your armor like a second skin, taking comfort in the protection it offers.

feats.name: Steel Yourself!
feats.description: You encourage an ally to toughen up, giving them a fighting chance.

feats.name: Steel on Steel
feats.description: The ring of divinely empowered steel assails your enemies.

feats.name: Stone Guardian
feats.description: You learn to call a powerful guardian of earth and stone to your side.

feats.name: Stoney Skin
feats.description: Your skin takes on the hardness of stone.

feats.name: Strange Script
feats.description: You have such familiarity with obscure texts that you can compel them to reveal their secrets.

feats.name: Strategic Assessment
feats.description: You learn your foes' strengths and weaknesses by watching them move.

feats.name: Strategic Repose
feats.description: You've trained extensively in fighting the undead.

feats.name: Strategist Stance
feats.description: You find the most strategic options for you and your allies.

feats.name: Striker's Scroll
feats.description: You can attach a scroll to your weapon or handwraps of mighty blows to blend its spell into an attack, carefully folding it around a part of the weapon or sealing it to the weapon's surface.

feats.name: Student of the Staff
feats.description: You've studied the staff extensively to learn the hidden capabilities of your chosen weapon.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Student of the Staff

feats.name: Such a Disgrace!
feats.description: You expect the same level of urbane sophistication from your allies as you possess, so whenever one of them succumbs to egregious behavior from a mental effect, you're immediately mortified.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Such a Disgrace! U

feats.name: Summon Ensemble
feats.description: When you cast summon instrument, you can modify it to summon multiple instruments.

feats.name: Sun Blade
feats.description: You can unleash burning sunlight from your sword or spear.

feats.name: Supernatural Senses
feats.description: Your scent is preternaturally sharp, and you can always rely on your sense of smell to help guide you when your vision is compromised.

feats.name: Suplex
feats.description: Flexing your entire body, you heave your opponent over your head and slam them into the ground.

feats.name: Sure Foot
feats.description: You know the secrets of moving in your favored terrain.

feats.name: Surprise Attack
feats.description: You act before foes can react.

feats.name: Surprise Snare
feats.description: You install one prepared snare for deployment in a space that's occupied by an enemy.

feats.name: Swaggering Initiative
feats.description: You swagger readily into any fight.

feats.name: Swift Leap
feats.description: Your undead physiology allows you to leap quickly toward or away from your opponent.

feats.name: Swipe
feats.description: You make a wide, arcing swing.

feats.name: Sympathetic Strike
feats.description: You collect your patron’s magic into one of your witch armaments, causing them to shine with runes, light, or another signifier of your patron.

feats.name: Syu Tak-Nwa's Skillful Tresses
feats.description: You can expertly control your living hair and use it to perform various tasks.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Syu Tak-Nwa's Skillful Tresses U

feats.name: Tactical Excellence
feats.description: You add two new tactics to your folio and increase your maximum number of tactics prepared by 1.

feats.name: Tactile Magic Feedback
feats.description: Your ostilli can sense nearby spellcasters.

feats.name: Take the Wheel
feats.description: Diving into a moving vehicle and seizing the controls is nothing new for you.

feats.name: Talon Sweep
feats.description: Your long clawed legs let you catch enemies to either side.

feats.name: Tandem Movement
feats.description: You and your eidolon move together.

feats.name: Tandem Onslaught
feats.description: You have trained your body and mind to work in tandem, and you can combine your combat and spellcasting prowess to better support yourself in battle.

feats.name: Tenacious Toxins
feats.description: Your victims tend to expire long before your poisons, since the latter have been specifically formulated to last longer.

feats.name: Terrain Scout
feats.description: You have mastered movement in many different environments.

feats.name: Text Decoder
feats.description: Thanks to your constant involvement with cryptic texts, you have attained an almost-supernatural ability to decipher complex codes and understand ancient writings.

feats.name: That's Not Natural!
feats.description: Your mastery at surviving in the wild has given you a sort of sixth-sense when it comes to noticing creatures that aren't part of the natural order.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited That's Not Natural! R

feats.name: Thaumaturgic Ritualist
feats.description: Your studies into the supernatural have resulted in an especially strong knowledge of rituals

feats.name: The Dead Tell Tales
feats.description: New campfire chroniclers are inundated with the stories of the ghosts below Pulura’s Fall and the lessons learned there.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard The Dead Tell Tales

feats.name: The Harder They Fall (Rogue)
feats.description: You make your foes fall painfully when you trip them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard The Harder They Fall (Rogue)

feats.name: Thermal Nimbus
feats.description: You direct waves of warmth into or out of your kinetic gate to drastically shift the temperature around you.

feats.name: Thorough Reports
feats.description: Recalling Knowledge adds creatures to your list, granting you bonuses to Recall in future encounters.

feats.name: Thoughtform Summoning
feats.description: You can create a prototypical creature from the depths of your imagination instead of calling one from elsewhere.

feats.name: Thousand Visions
feats.description: You open your senses to numerous visions of the immediate future.

feats.name: Through the Gate
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level kineticist feat of your choice.

feats.name: Through the Needle's Eye
feats.description: Your weapon strikes with the perfection your will demands.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Through the Needle's Eye

feats.name: Tools of the Trade
feats.description: You’re well-versed in weapons that allow you to bring bounties back in one piece, or at least alive.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Tools of the Trade

feats.name: Topple the Titans
feats.description: Even the greatest titans of the world are easier to kill when they’re lying on the ground.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Topple the Titans U

feats.name: Tracing Sigil
feats.description: When you cast sigil, you can modify the spell to allow you to track the target.

feats.name: Trained Swimmer
feats.description: Thanks to tireless practice, water has become a natural environment for you.

feats.name: Trapsmith Dedication
feats.description: You use glimmering gears and gnashing mechanisms to manufacture snares using specialized parts.

feats.name: Treat Condition
feats.description: You treat an adjacent creature in an attempt to reduce the clumsy, enfeebled, or sickened condition.

feats.name: Triangulate
feats.description: Your spotter's quick signals help you make even difficult shots seem simple.

feats.name: Tributary Circulation
feats.description: Never distant from water’s succoring presence, your refined breathing techniques focus your awareness and control of water inward.

feats.name: Tricksterbane Oath
feats.description: You’ve sworn an oath to ferret out and destroy malevolent shapechangers who pose as mortals with evil intent.

feats.name: Triple Time
feats.description: You learn the triple time composition cantrip, which speeds up you and your allies for a round.

feats.name: Tumbling Lumber
feats.description: A slew of logs eject from the Plane of Wood and slam into your enemies.

feats.name: Tunnel Wall
feats.description: Using your shield, you guard against the movement of foes as surely as if you were a wall of stone.

feats.name: Turn Back the Clock
feats.description: After failing a test of skill, you hop back in your personal timeline so you can try again.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Turn Back the Clock

feats.name: Tut-Tut
feats.description: The Sapphire Butterfly is not one for violence when simply intimidating a foe will do.

feats.name: Twilight Talon Dedication
feats.description: Few would even suspect that you're a member of the Eagle Knights, and you use the tricks of the spymaster's trade to keep it that way.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Twilight Talon Dedication U

feats.name: Twin Distraction
feats.description: Your movements with two weapons are so swift and disorienting that they befuddle your opponent.

feats.name: Twin Parry
feats.description: You use your two weapons to parry attacks.

feats.name: Twirl Through
feats.description: You sweep across the battlefield in a fluttering of movement honed from years of coordinating perfectly spaced movements alongside fellow dancers.

feats.name: Twirling Throw
feats.description: Your thrown weapons seem to defy physics as they soar through the air and spin back to you after a strike.

feats.name: Underbrush Trailblazer
feats.description: You gain the Terrain Stalker feat, selecting the underbrush terrain; if you already have Terrain Stalker for underbrush, you can select a different type of difficult terrain.

feats.name: Undying Conviction
feats.description: Your presence has a bolstering effect on your undead minions.

feats.name: Unnerving Expansion
feats.description: You gather your curse around you and impel it to pour outward, expanding your maelstrom.

feats.name: Unsteadying Strike
feats.description: Your attack makes your opponent more susceptible to follow-up maneuvers from your allies.

feats.name: Venture-Gossip Dedication
feats.description: Look, the motto of the Pathfinder Society is “explore, report, cooperate” and you’re just reporting what you hear!

feats.name: Versatile Mutation
feats.description: Your ostilli's darts can deal different types of damage.

feats.name: Versatile Signature
feats.description: You’re always tweaking your available repertoire.

feats.name: Vibration Sense
feats.description: Your eidolon gains tremorsense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet.

feats.name: Viking Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: From childhood, you have been exposed to traditional viking combat techniques, and you soon learned to handle axe, sword, and shield in battle.

feats.name: Violent Unleash
feats.description: The force of your mind unleashing itself releases a violent shock wave that batters your enemies.

feats.name: Voice of Authority
feats.description: You easily command the attention of others, and when the time comes to turn threats into action, your authoritative voice causes foes to falter.

feats.name: Walk the Wilds
feats.description: You know the ways of birds and beasts and have gained the right to wear their forms.

feats.name: Warding Light
feats.description: You gain a tattoo that serves as a special ward to defend you against Walkena's forces.

feats.name: Watch and Learn
feats.description: Pathfinder agents serve as members of diverse teams with complementary skill sets.

feats.name: Wayfinder Resonance Tinkerer
feats.description: Access a new cantrip by using your Wayfinder.

feats.name: Weaver's Web
feats.description: Your swarm can spin dense webs much like those left by stone-gray weaver spiders under eaves and in derelict city buildings, especially along the coasts of Varisia.

feats.name: Wellspring Control
feats.description: When you generate a wellspring surge, roll twice on the Wellspring Surges Table and take the result of your choice.

feats.name: Whirling Grindstone
feats.description: A whirling grindstone made of flint appears in an unoccupied square within 30 feet.

feats.name: Wild Lights
feats.description: When you cast dancing lights, you can modify it to create a single floating light in the shape of a Tiny creature.

feats.name: Wing Bounce
feats.description: You rush forward, flapping your wings for a bit of lift, and can use that momentum to knock down a foe.

feats.name: Winged Leap
feats.description: While drakes and dragons are able flyers, they’re uncomfortable carrying a rider in the air without special training.

feats.name: Winter Sleet
feats.description: Bone-chilling, swirling sleet surrounds you, cruel as deepest winter.

feats.name: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
feats.description: With a bit of hide, some antlers, and some cast-off fur, you can create a disguise that will fool even an experienced hunter.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Wolf in Sheep's Clothing

feats.name: Worm Sense
feats.description: You emulate the senses of the cave worm.

feats.name: Wormskin
feats.description: Your flesh grows thick and bloated, protecting you against harm.

feats.name: Wounded Rage
feats.description: You roar in pain, awakening the rage within you.

feats.name: Wrapped in Smoke
feats.description: You ignite a small portion of powder in a rapid, inefficient burn, creating a hazy cloud.

feats.name: Wyldsinger
feats.description: Passion and song are your weapons of choice.

feats.name: You're an Embarrassment!
feats.description: Some Firebrands can't stand it when their allies are ruining their moment, and you're no different.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard You're an Embarrassment! U

feats.name: Zoophonic Composition
feats.description: When the inspiration strikes, you can weave messages for animals into your compositions.

feats.name: Absorb Strength
feats.description: You consume a piece of your enemy, absorbing their strength.

feats.name: Accommodating Mount
feats.description: You've trained to serve as a mount, if only for your most trusted allies.

feats.name: Adaptive Adept
feats.description: You’ve continued adapting your magic to blend your class’s tradition with your adapted tradition.

feats.name: Advanced Targeting System
feats.description: Your ocular processors are augmented with advanced targeting systems, which allow you to more easily pinpoint your enemy and read their movements.

feats.name: Affliction Resistance
feats.description: Your diet has strengthened you against diseases and poisons.

feats.name: Ageless Patience
feats.description: You work at a pace born from longevity that enhances your thoroughness.

feats.name: Agonizing Rebuke
feats.description: When you terrorize your enemies, you also cause them painful mental distress.

feats.name: Alarming Disappearance
feats.description: Your ability to move unseen is startling for one your size, causing panic among your enemies.

feats.name: All This Has Happened Before
feats.description: You instantly recall a memory from one of your countless past lives that heightens your awareness of your surroundings and quickens your response.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard All This Has Happened Before

feats.name: Ally's Shelter
feats.description: You follow your allies' example.

feats.name: Ambush Awareness
feats.description: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks attempted as initiative rolls.

feats.name: Among Humanity
feats.description: Your talents in shapechanging allow you to pass unseen.

feats.name: Amorphous Aspect
feats.description: Your body is supremely flexible.

feats.name: Ancestral Suspicion
feats.description: Long-lived elves have seen civilizations rise and fall, often at the hands of outside forces. As a result, they have developed a wariness of others who might seek to influence or control them.

feats.name: Anchoring Roots
feats.description: Small roots sprout from your feet, steadying you as you move.

feats.name: And Will Do So Once More
feats.description: You’ve learned how to let go of most worries and move past them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard And Will Do So Once More

feats.name: Animal Speaker
feats.description: You can speak to all animals, not just a particular subset.

feats.name: Animalistic Resistance
feats.description: Your animalistic connections help you resist natural afflictions.

feats.name: Ankle Bite
feats.description: Whenever someone grabs onto you, you instinctively bite down hard.

feats.name: Apprentice Sea Witch
feats.description: You're familiar with the basic spells that most educated merfolk know.

feats.name: Aquatic Conversationalist
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals with the amphibious or aquatic traits.

feats.name: Arcane Safeguards
feats.description: The magic powering you makes it difficult for outside magic to affect you.

feats.name: Ascended Dragonet Heritage
feats.description: You’ve awoken the power of your draconic heritage.

feats.name: Athletic Might
feats.description: Surviving in hostile terrain has given you a great talent for mobility.

feats.name: Awakened Yaoguai Heritage
feats.description: You’ve delved into the power of your legacy.

feats.name: Azarketi Weapon Aptitude
feats.description: You become familiar with using your weapons both in and out of water.

feats.name: Beast of Burden
feats.description: Your broad frame can allow you to carry weights that immobilize smaller creatures.

feats.name: Benefactor's Strike
feats.description: Your benefactor’s blood flows through your veins, and you channel their power into your body.

feats.name: Bestial Brutality
feats.description: Your animalistic unarmed attack grows more dangerous.

feats.name: Blast Resistance
feats.description: You're used to the clamor of steel, the crack of a firearm, and the thunderous blast of explosions.

feats.name: Blessed Blood (Nephilim)
feats.description: Your spilled blood is sanctified, with effects similar to those of holy water.

feats.name: Blood Like Water
feats.description: The watery fluid in your veins doesn’t flow in the same way as traditional blood.

feats.name: Blood and Spirit
feats.description: Your connection to the divine has sanctified your blood, but the power only manifests when you are shedding it.

feats.name: Bloodsoaked Dash
feats.description: Injuries don’t bother you anymore—in fact, the pain invigorates you.

feats.name: Bloody Blows
feats.description: Your lethal unarmed attacks leave bloody gouges or cause severe internal bleeding.

feats.name: Bold Defiance
feats.description: You harden your form as you dance between shapes.

feats.name: Boulder Roll
feats.description: Your dwarven build allows you to push foes around, just like a mighty boulder tumbles through a subterranean cavern.

feats.name: Briny Beverage
feats.description: You can survive off the sea as well as gain insight from its waters.

feats.name: Bristle
feats.description: You curl into a posture that splays out your bone spines.

feats.name: Call the First Tools
feats.description: You can call upon the ancient powers bestowed on you by the gods to create any tools you might need at a moment’s notice.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Call the First Tools

feats.name: Call to Battle
feats.description: You channel the undying spirit of the einherjar to join to fight.

feats.name: Called
feats.description: You’ve heard the Call, and by resisting it, you’ve developed a bulwark against effects that target your mind.

feats.name: Catchy Tune
feats.description: You create a tune so catchy, your foes can't help but dance along.

feats.name: Ceremony of Knowledge
feats.description: You tap into aeon knowledge.

feats.name: Ceremony of Sunlight
feats.description: You have learned how to master the power contained within sunlight, just like the trees that form your body.

feats.name: Chemical Trail
feats.description: You can leave a faint chemical trail as you move and can use the chemical trails of other surkis to navigate.

feats.name: Chosen of Lamashtu
feats.description: You bear the favor and blessings of Lamashtu, the Mother of Monsters.

feats.name: Clan Protector
feats.description: Your clan dagger can protect your allies as easily as yourself.

feats.name: Clever Improviser
feats.description: You’ve learned how to handle situations when you’re out of your depth.

feats.name: Clever Shadow
feats.description: You can perform simple Interact actions with your shadow, such as opening an unlocked door.

feats.name: Climate Adaptation
feats.description: Like evergreen trees, which stay healthy and vibrant from winter through summer, you too can adapt to a variety of extreme climates.

feats.name: Climbing Claws
feats.description: You can extend your claws to aid you in climbing.

feats.name: Cloud Gazer
feats.description: Your connection to air allows you to see through obscuring mists.

feats.name: Colugo's Traversal
feats.description: Forbidding valleys and sheer cliffs can’t curb your vows to reunite the lost.

feats.name: Conductor's Redirection
feats.description: You conduct electrical damage through your body.

feats.name: Conrasu Weapon Understanding
feats.description: You have come to know conrasu weapons as you know yourself.

feats.name: Coral Growth
feats.description: The difference between yourself and your coral symbiotes is nearly impossible to tell apart as your bodies are so intertwined.

feats.name: Cornered Fury
feats.description: If a foe of a larger size than you critically hits and damages you, that foe is off-guard to you for 1 round.

feats.name: Cultural Adaptability
feats.description: During your adventures, you've honed your ability to adapt to the culture of the predominant ancestry around you.

feats.name: Cunning Hair
feats.description: Your hair moves under your control.

feats.name: Cunning Tinker
feats.description: Time spent tending to your own form has unlocked your ability to fix other things.

feats.name: Cutting Flattery
feats.description: Repeated entries in Firebrand bragging and flyting contests have taught you how to twist pretty words into concealed insults.

feats.name: Darkseer
feats.description: Zon-Kuthon smiles upon you—even if you curse his name—granting you pitch-black eyes that allow you to see in shadows and darkness.

feats.name: Darting Monkey
feats.description: You have a heightened awareness in combat, and your darting strikes prevent your foes from distracting you or breaking your focus.

feats.name: Deadly Aspect
feats.description: You have honed the unarmed attack your draconic heritage has granted you to a lethal degree.

feats.name: Debilitating Venom
feats.description: Your venom is particularly potent, affecting targets in different ways.

feats.name: Defensive Needles
feats.description: Your body is covered in sharp needles or spines which you can use to defend yourself.

feats.name: Defiance Unto Death
feats.description: You loathe the alghollthus and their mind magic, and you’ve been trained to be willing to die rather than give into mental manipulation.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Defiance Unto Death U

feats.name: Deflecting Jewel
feats.description: You walk the line between two sides of something, such as belonging to two clans, having a mixed allegiance or faith, or being caught between two possible fates.

feats.name: Defy Death
feats.description: You’re exceptionally difficult to kill.

feats.name: Defy the Darkness
feats.description: Using ancient dwarven methods developed to fight enemies wielding magical darkness, you've honed your darkvision and sworn not to use such magic yourself.

feats.name: Demonblood Frenzy
feats.description: Just the taste of fiendish blood is enough to send blood rushing through your veins in a supernatural fury.

feats.name: Devil in Plain Sight
feats.description: You've learned to draw your fiendish nature into a small ball of corruption and hide it in your soul.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Devil in Plain Sight

feats.name: Devilish Wiles
feats.description: Traditionally, fiends are exceptionally good at persuading people to do things, even when their targets know it's a bad idea.

feats.name: Dissolution's Clarity
feats.description: The Dissolution teaches that darkness can bring clarity and focus, serenity and strength—and so you draw on nearby shadows to replenish your magic.

feats.name: Distant Archer
feats.description: You've trained to harry your foes from great distances, using your swiftness to maintain distance and keen eyesight to stay on target.

feats.name: Distant Cackle
feats.description: It takes a very brave person to enter the laughter-haunted forest where you dwell.

feats.name: Dogfang Bite
feats.description: You can swing your beak to slash your foes when piercing attacks won't do.

feats.name: Draconic Scent
feats.description: Your sense of smell has heightened to be as keen as that of a dragon.

feats.name: Drag Down
feats.description: While swimming in water at least 10 feet deep, you grab an adjacent creature (on nearby land or in the water) and pull it below the surface.

feats.name: Dragon's Flight
feats.description: You have grown a small pair of draconic wings or have honed your use of the wings you've had since birth.

feats.name: Duck!
feats.description: Your long experience with your erratic patrons and their peers has given you a lot of practice in hitting the deck when you hear the rumbling of a powerful entity.

feats.name: Dwarven Reinforcement
feats.description: You can use your knowledge of engineering and metalwork to temporarily strengthen thick objects and structures.

feats.name: Earthbond
feats.description: Your bond to the terra firma under your feet increases as your connection to your draconic aspect grows.

feats.name: Easily Dismissed
feats.description: You are practiced at blending into the background of the streets and halls of larger folk to ensure that you are overlooked.

feats.name: Eat Fortune
feats.description: As someone tries to twist fate, you consume the interference.

feats.name: Eclectic Obsession
feats.description: Your desire for stimulation has led you from one pursuit to another and granted you a smattering of expertise with myriad crafts and professions.

feats.name: Elemental Bulwark
feats.description: You call upon the corresponding elements of your suli heritage to resist the effect.

feats.name: Elemental Spark
feats.description: You’ve learned to alter the magic of your sprite’s spark, imparting them with elemental energies.

feats.name: Elven Instincts
feats.description: Your senses let you react rapidly.

feats.name: Elven Persistence
feats.description: Elves don’t give up easily on their pursuits.

feats.name: Embodied Dreadnought Subjectivity
feats.description: Your colossal might marks you as a behemoth, the pride of Nex's Fleshforges, and the heaviest ordnance is a child's toy in your monumental grasp.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Embodied Dreadnought Subjectivity U

feats.name: Empathic Calm
feats.description: Once per day, you can cast either calm emotions or sanctuary as an innate occult spell, heightened to half your level rounded up.

feats.name: Empathy Incarnate
feats.description: Reincarnation has given you a compassionate perspective and enabled you to relate to almost everyone you speak with, putting them at ease and quickly generating trust.

feats.name: Energize Wings
feats.description: You stoke your magic to energize your wings, temporarily transforming them into glowing, majestic forms.

feats.name: Energized Font
feats.description: You can focus your mind more quickly thanks to the magic that flows within you.

feats.name: Enthralling Allure
feats.description: The powers of domination employed by your progenitors have manifested in you as well.

feats.name: Envenom Fangs
feats.description: You envenom your fangs.

feats.name: Expert Drill Sergeant
feats.description: While exploring, when you are leading and allies are Following the Expert, instead of granting a +2 circumstance bonus in the applicable skill, you grant a +3 circumstance bonus if you're an expert and a +4 circumstance bonus if you're a master.

feats.name: Extinguish Light
feats.description: You wrap shadow around a single unattended light source within 120 feet that's no larger than a torch.

feats.name: Extraplanar Haze
feats.description: Your body emits tiny particles of extraplanar matter, such as crystalline motes or smoky vapor, that surround you in a haze.

feats.name: Extraplanar Supplication
feats.description: You call upon divine power to place a benediction upon your allies or a malediction upon your foes.

feats.name: False Priest Form
feats.description: Nobody respects tanuki, but most everyone respects an esteemed priest, so what better form to take if you want to get by a little easier? When you Change Shape, you can assume the shape of a priest or other religious official from a religion of your choosing.

feats.name: Fantastic Leaps
feats.description: Your leaps seem to defy gravity as you soar through the air in a single bound.

feats.name: Favorable Winds
feats.description: You wrap a shell of favorable wind around a weapon you wield.

feats.name: Feathered Cloak
feats.description: To blend in with the grounded and wingless, you fold your wings just so on your back, creating the illusion of a feathered cloak.

feats.name: Feed on Pain
feats.description: The psychic feedback of another creature's pain fills you with false life.

feats.name: Fey Disguise
feats.description: You can disguise yourself with magical illusions.

feats.name: Fey Influence
feats.description: Your exposure to fey influence has given you some primal magic

feats.name: Fierce Grasp
feats.description: Once you get your hands on someone, it's hard for them to get away.

feats.name: Fighting Horn
feats.description: You can modify the size and shape of your horn over time using your mental powers.

feats.name: Finned Ridges
feats.description: The ridges and flaps of your skin steer you through the water.

feats.name: Firesight
feats.description: You can see through the haze of flame.

feats.name: Fishblooded
feats.description: There's nothing beneath the waves that can slow you down.

feats.name: Flexible Tail
feats.description: You can perform simple Interact actions with your tail, such as opening an unlocked door.

feats.name: Fluid Contortionist
feats.description: You can ignore difficult terrain caused by moving through tight spaces that aren't tight enough to force you to Squeeze.

feats.name: Focused Cat Nap
feats.description: When you Cat Nap, you can also Refocus as you dream of a relevant activity.

feats.name: Forest Stealth
feats.description: You are skilled at quickly hiding behind bits of underbrush or foliage.

feats.name: Formation Training
feats.description: You know how to fight in formation with your brethren.

feats.name: Fortify Shield
feats.description: You reinforce your shield with a rocky outgrowth of metal and stone.

feats.name: Friend of the Family
feats.description: You come from a long line of imperial kobolds—if you meet a stranger who has some political standing in Tian Xia, they might know someone from your family line.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Friend of the Family

feats.name: Friendform
feats.description: The shared bond between you and your allies allows you to act on their behalf.

feats.name: Gaping Flesh
feats.description: Your wound yawns open, appalling your attacker.

feats.name: Garuda's Squall
feats.description: Garudas' marksmanship and magic are second nature to you.

feats.name: Gecko's Grip
feats.description: You cling to walls with a preternatural grip.

feats.name: Genie Weapon Flourish
feats.description: Whenever you critically hit using a falchion, ranseur, scimitar, trident, or a geniekin weapon, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

feats.name: Ghoran Weapon Practice
feats.description: With plenty of practice, the memories of previous fights from previous lives come flooding back.

feats.name: Glorious Gamtu
feats.description: You can access the mystical power that dokkaebi refer to as a hat.

feats.name: Gnaw
feats.description: With enough time and determination, you can chew through nearly anything.

feats.name: Graceful Guidance
feats.description: You can demonstrate how to quickly twist out of the way of dangerous effects.

feats.name: Greater Animal Senses
feats.description: Your senses advance to match those of your animal aspect.

feats.name: Grippli Glide
feats.description: You can use your webbed feet to guide your fall.

feats.name: Grovel
feats.description: You convince your foe you're less of a threat.

feats.name: Growing Eel Friend
feats.description: Your eel pet grows larger and stronger.

feats.name: Guided by the Stars
feats.description: The stars grant you insights that guide your actions.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Guided by the Stars

feats.name: Halfling Ingenuity
feats.description: While your willingness to dig into a task you know little about might get you into trouble, your incredible luck often saves you from danger.

feats.name: Hasty Celebration
feats.description: After even the briefest success, you get caught up in the moment and begin to party, cheering your allies on.

feats.name: Healer's Halo
feats.description: Your halo can enhance positive energy.

feats.name: Healing Flesh
feats.description: Some legends claim that the flesh of a merfolk, if consumed, can grant health, longevity, and even immortality.

feats.name: Heatwave
feats.description: You harness the oncoming flames and twist them into a screen of heat and smoke, granting you concealment until the beginning of your next turn.

feats.name: Histrionic Injury
feats.description: You respond with a startled look, dramatic pratfall, or theatrical arm-flailing that stymies your attacker.

feats.name: Hopping Stride
feats.description: You've internalized the hopping gait of your vampiric forebear.

feats.name: Hunter's Fangs
feats.description: Your fangs are exceptionally painful.

feats.name: Hybrid Form
feats.description: When you Change Shape, you retain elements of your kitsune form, allowing you to speak in a fox form, use kitsune unarmed attacks in a tailless form, or gain a tail in your tailless form to use abilities that require one.

feats.name: Hybrid Shape
feats.description: Mastery of your shapeshifting lets you combine the best features of your humanoid and spider forms.

feats.name: Hypnotic Lure
feats.description: Your unblinking gaze is so intense it can befuddle the mind of others, drawing your victims toward you even against their better judgment.

feats.name: I've Had Many Jobs
feats.description: Finding and excelling at odd jobs is child’s play to one who has worked many occupations during many lives.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited I've Had Many Jobs R

feats.name: Immobile Form
feats.description: You take on the shape you had before you awoke to hide in plain sight.

feats.name: Inhale, Exhale!
feats.description: You take an especially deep breath as a prelude to unleashing your dragonet breath on your foes.

feats.name: Inoculation Subroutine
feats.description: Your nanites reject diseases with ease.

feats.name: Inspire Imitation
feats.description: Your actions inspire your allies to great achievements.

feats.name: Insulated Poppet
feats.description: You’ve used insulating wraps or special glazes to reduce your weakness to current and temperature.

feats.name: Integrated Armament
feats.description: Your mechanical body houses a weapon or shield that you can quickly draw and stow, leaving you prepared for combat at all times.

feats.name: Intuitive Illusions
feats.description: Illusion magic comes to you so naturally that you can effortlessly sustain your magical ruses.

feats.name: Inured to the Heat
feats.description: You have a love for extreme heat.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Inured to the Heat

feats.name: Iruxi Glide
feats.description: You glide slowly toward the ground, 5 feet down and up to 25 feet forward through the air.

feats.name: Iruxi Unarmed Cunning
feats.description: You make the most of your iruxi unarmed attacks.

feats.name: Jealous Grip
feats.description: You are protective of your hoard, and woe betide anyone who tries to take what’s yours.

feats.name: Jotun's Battle Stance
feats.description: You emulate the battle stance of your forebears, allowing you to use mighty weapons to attack distant foes.

feats.name: Jotun's Grasp
feats.description: You’ve mastered a technique that allows you to close the gap on foes and wrestle them into submission.

feats.name: Jungle Runner
feats.description: You run through the jungle as easily as you would through an open field.

feats.name: Juvenile Flight
feats.description: You unfold your wings for travel and can keep them unfolded for 10 minutes.

feats.name: Kin Hunter
feats.description: You’re adept at combating other supernatural creatures.

feats.name: Kitsune Spell Mysteries
feats.description: You know more kitsune magic.

feats.name: Kneecap
feats.description: You deliver a punishing blow to an enemy's knee, shin, or other vulnerable anatomy within your reach.

feats.name: Kobold Momentum
feats.description: You possess the confidence of a dragon, and your success emboldens you to draw on power reserves you didn’t know you had.

feats.name: Lab Rat
feats.description: You've spent more than your share of time in an alchemy lab.

feats.name: Labyrinthine Echoes
feats.description: You can make your voice reverberate off any surface.

feats.name: Late Awakener
feats.description: Whether due to a more gradual process or your animal and sapient sides being especially in conflict, your awakening was a little slower than most, but your eyes are now fully open and your abilities have returned.

feats.name: Leaf Transformation
feats.description: You know how to run an enterprise that others would never be able to get off the ground—some say it’s your savvy acumen or jovial manner, but you know it’s because you can cut costs by transforming leaves into money.

feats.name: Left-hand Blood
feats.description: It's said that the flesh of the right side of a hyena can heal diseases, but that the flesh of the left side is deadly and poisonous.

feats.name: Leshy Glide
feats.description: Using your own leaves, you can control your descent.

feats.name: Lifesense
feats.description: You have a limited ability to sense life force, like your psychopomp forebears.

feats.name: Light Paws
feats.description: You can balance on your toes to step carefully over obstructions.

feats.name: Lightless Litheness
feats.description: Your body is almost as flexible as your shadow.

feats.name: Long Tongue
feats.description: You've learned to stretch your exceptionally long tongue beyond its original limits.

feats.name: Long-Nosed Form
feats.description: You transform into a specific, curious-looking human form.

feats.name: Loud Singer
feats.description: Staying on pitch, proper breath control, and remembering the words are all less important than the real measure of a good singer: volume!

feats.name: Loyal Empath
feats.description: You have incredible empathy for your friends and family, and you have an innate timing for helping others in distress.

feats.name: Lucky Break
feats.description: You are luckier even than most catfolk.

feats.name: Magical Resistance
feats.description: Your animating magic provides some defense.

feats.name: Magpie Snatch
feats.description: You move quickly, snatching a shiny item that catches your eye.

feats.name: Marine Ally
feats.description: You've befriended a sea creature, which becomes magically bonded to you.

feats.name: Martial Experience
feats.description: You've crossed blades with a wide variety of foes wielding a wide variety of weapons, and you've learned the basics of fighting with nearly any of them.

feats.name: Mask of Power
feats.description: Your warmask sharpens your connection to the source of your mask's power.

feats.name: Mask of Rejection
feats.description: Your warmask projects a white-hot fury that attempts to vaporize the offending magic.

feats.name: Metabolic Control
feats.description: You're able to better control your body's metabolism to preserve energy.

feats.name: Mist Child
feats.description: You blend in with unnatural subtlety.

feats.name: Mistaken Identity
feats.description: You feel a strong connection with your progenitor and can convince yourself an effect targeting your mind was meant for theirs instead.

feats.name: Murderous Thorns
feats.description: Your thorns are many, vicious, and sharp.

feats.name: Mutate Weapon
feats.description: deal more damage with your Living Weapon.

feats.name: Myriad Forms
feats.description: With a bit of self-discovery, you find a new form.

feats.name: Nagaji Spell Mysteries
feats.description: You've learned more naga magic.

feats.name: Nanite Shroud
feats.description: Your nanites fly out of your body, swarming around you in a cloud.

feats.name: Natural Ambassador
feats.description: You remember what it was like to speak easily with other animals, using old, familiar ways of communication to learn what they want and ask for favors in return.

feats.name: Natural Illusionist
feats.description: By drawing upon the First World’s magic, you can siphon a portion of that malleable world to create a convincing illusion.

feats.name: Natural Orienteering
feats.description: There are few twisting paths that can disorient you.

feats.name: Necromantic Physiology
feats.description: Your unusual physiology has developed in a way that makes it difficult for parasites and other infestations to prey upon you.

feats.name: Nephilim Resistance
feats.description: You resist energy like your extraplanar predecessors.

feats.name: No Hands, No Problems
feats.description: After a lifetime of using temporary, ghostly limbs to manipulate objects, you hardly need real hands.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard No Hands, No Problems

feats.name: Noble Bloom
feats.description: Certain plants and flowers hold a reputation throughout Tian Xia for being strong and upstanding, able to weather adversity.

feats.name: Noble Resolve
feats.description: Once, genies ruled vast kingdoms, and a remnant of that confidence and power is reflected in your strong will.

feats.name: Nothing but Fluff
feats.description: Your fluffy interior lacks specific organs and struts, with few weak spots to injure.

feats.name: Nourishing Symbiosis
feats.description: As you recuperate from your wounds, life energy flows from you to the land and back to you again.

feats.name: Noxious Odor
feats.description: You have developed your skill with your defensive pheromones and have concentrated them into a noxious form.

feats.name: Offensive Analysis
feats.description: You can enhance your senses and mental state to consider every aspect of an attack.

feats.name: Oni's Mask
feats.description: You aren’t as malleable as your oni ancestors but still can disguise yourself.

feats.name: Ornate Tattoo
feats.description: You expand your tattoos to encompass greater magic.

feats.name: Pack Stalker
feats.description: Ambushes are an honored kholo tradition.

feats.name: Past Life
feats.description: Flashes of your life become clearer and more frequent, allowing you to apply skills you developed while alive.

feats.name: Phantom Resemblance
feats.description: Your can now draw from experience to wear any face you remember.

feats.name: Plague Sniffer
feats.description: You can sniff out the pungent tang of disease.

feats.name: Planar Resilience
feats.description: Your body has adapted to the variety of harsh climes that you encounter in your travels.

feats.name: Ponpoko
feats.description: No true tanuki would ever be caught without a musical instrument to play under the full moon.

feats.name: Pounding Leap
feats.description: You use the momentum of your massive fists to launch yourself through the air.

feats.name: Powerful Guts
feats.description: Your stomach is particularly durable.

feats.name: Practiced Paddler
feats.description: You’re skilled at navigating bogs and marshes, even for a paddler shoony.

feats.name: Precious Alloys
feats.description: Your unarmed attacks gain the properties of special materials.

feats.name: Pride Hunter
feats.description: You avoid the attention of creatures focused on your allies.

feats.name: Prodigious Climber
feats.description: Your natural climbing ability and technique has made you a potent climber.

feats.name: Project Persona
feats.description: Where others etch their armor to serve as a conduit for their imaginations, your vivid mind and bold personality allow you to project a more fitting persona over your lackluster armor.

feats.name: Protective Claws
feats.description: The chitin on your claws is so hard you can defend against attacks with them.

feats.name: Protective Sheath
feats.description: When you lash out with your clan dagger, you keep its sheath close at hand.

feats.name: Protective Subroutine
feats.description: Your nanites can augment your defenses.

feats.name: Proud Mentor
feats.description: You enjoy mentoring others and take pride in your students' accomplishments.

feats.name: Puzzle Solver
feats.description: You have a natural affinity for problem-solving and the unknown.

feats.name: Quick Root
feats.description: You react instinctively, sprouting roots from your legs and plunging them deep into the ground to keep your footing.

feats.name: Quick Stow
feats.description: You Interact to store one item you're holding in your cheek pouches (provided it fits).

feats.name: Rabid Sprint
feats.description: You run on all fours as fast as you can.

feats.name: Ragdya's Revelry
feats.description: You dart away from your foe's attack with a casual laugh, using the opening to cause mischief.

feats.name: Rat Magic
feats.description: There always seems to be a little rat around to carry messages for you.

feats.name: Ratfolk Roll
feats.description: You roll up into a ball and move up to four times your Speed in a straight line down an incline.

feats.name: Read the Roots
feats.description: The root systems of trees are a far-reaching network of information, and you know how to access them and extract their secrets.

feats.name: Recognize Ambush
feats.description: Your combat training has honed you to be ready for an attack at all times.

feats.name: Reflective Pocket
feats.description: You've formed a connection with a small hand mirror, allowing you to use it as an extradimensional storage space.

feats.name: Reincarnated Ridiculer
feats.description: You’ve practiced the art of taunting an enemy, ensuring they know death will only make you stronger.

feats.name: Rekindled Light
feats.description: You temporarily drain your star orb familiar’s energy to save an ally.

feats.name: Renewing Quills
feats.description: Your spines grow back much faster than other shisks.

feats.name: Replicate
feats.description: You've learned to reshape your malleable form.

feats.name: Resilient Physiology
feats.description: Your ordered physiology rejects unwelcome elements, allowing you to reject the negative effects of poisons and diseases or shrug off other lasting negative effects.

feats.name: Restoring Blood
feats.description: Your body can process an alternative to your venom that heals wounds.

feats.name: Reveal Hidden Self
feats.description: While hidden, you manifest a version of your animalistic nature.

feats.name: Right-hand Blood
feats.description: It's said that the flesh of the right side of a hyena can heal diseases, but that the flesh of the left side is deadly and poisonous.

feats.name: Riptide Mount
feats.description: After working with aquatic beasts of burden for years, you have learned how to easily mount and dismount them.

feats.name: Ritual Reversion
feats.description: You can temporarily revert to a less conspicuous form without diminishing your senses.

feats.name: Runtsage
feats.description: Unlike most of your kind, who dismiss goblins as embarrassments or expendable annoyances, you have studied the methodology behind their irresponsible and incomprehensible actions.

feats.name: Scar-Thick Skin
feats.description: Glorious, storied scars cover and protect much of your body, girding you in fleshly armor that resists any wound weaker than those you have already survived.

feats.name: Scion of Many Planes
feats.description: The long and complicated history of your bloodline manifests in your ability to draw power from more planar sources than most other nephilim.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Scion of Many Planes

feats.name: Scurry!
feats.description: Your instincts to move to safety are strong.

feats.name: Sealed Poppet
feats.description: You've reinforced your interior parts with sealant or other flame-retardant materials, protecting you from fire.

feats.name: Secondary Adaptation
feats.description: You've continued to adapt to the rigors of your environment by continuing your metamorphosis, even as an adult.

feats.name: Sense Allies
feats.description: Like many humans raised in a close-knit community, you have always been strongly attuned to the presence of others.

feats.name: Shadowplay
feats.description: As your blow lands, you detach from your shadow to get the drop on your enemy.

feats.name: Shadowy Disguise
feats.description: You wrap yourself in shadow to change your appearance.

feats.name: Shame the Sin
feats.description: Your conviction against the sins that all demons grow from is so strong that you can force a demon to suffer from its sins when you strike a sound blow against them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Shame the Sin U

feats.name: Shared Luck (Halfling)
feats.description: You are evidence that it’s lucky to travel with a halfling.

feats.name: Shed Tail
feats.description: You can shed a portion of your tail to escape.

feats.name: Sheltering Slab
feats.description: The stone around you is your ally, and you have learned to use it to shore up your weaknesses.

feats.name: Shifting Faces
feats.description: You wear many faces, even those that don't belong to you.

feats.name: Shoki's Argument
feats.description: You feel a connection to shokis, the rambling collectors of wayward souls, and might have found old texts written by one.

feats.name: Signature Weapon
feats.description: Your energy saturates one of your weapons; it might be one inherited or one tied to your history.

feats.name: Skilled Climber
feats.description: You can navigate vertical surfaces with ease.

feats.name: Skilled Swimmer
feats.description: You move through the water with ease, mastering your movements with years of practice.

feats.name: Skillful Climber
feats.description: You can scamper up or down surfaces as nimbly as a monkey.

feats.name: Skillful Tail
feats.description: You’ve always had a tail, but with practice, you’ve learned to use it for more than signaling your mood.

feats.name: Skin Split
feats.description: You claw open the top layer of your scales and peel off the premature shed in order to remove harmful substances from your skin.

feats.name: Sleep of the Reborn
feats.description: Philosophers compare the cycle of life, death, and rebirth to sleeping, dreaming, and waking.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Sleep of the Reborn R

feats.name: Slip with the Breeze
feats.description: You create gusts of wind when you jump, allowing you to carry yourself across greater distances.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Slip with the Breeze

feats.name: Smoke Through Bamboo
feats.description: You’ve spent significant time slipping silently between bamboo thickets, and your light-footedness allows you to navigate even the thickest forests and brush with ease.

feats.name: Snare Genius
feats.description: If the snare normally takes 1 minute to Craft, you can Craft it with 3 Interact actions instead.

feats.name: Soaring Flight
feats.description: You Fly.

feats.name: Spark Fist
feats.description: You dust explosive black powder on your fist or glove before attacking, which combusts as you hit an opponent.

feats.name: Spark of Independence
feats.description: You touch a creature with the minion trait and share the heightened sense of autonomy you've discovered.

feats.name: Speak with Flowers
feats.description: At your very heartwood, you're a flower animated by elder magic, and with a little effort, you can speak to your kindred.

feats.name: Speak with Kindred
feats.description: You have a connection with creatures that share your physiology.

feats.name: Speak with the Sleeping
feats.description: You can speak to all inanimate objects and the slumbering spirits within them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Speak with the Sleeping U

feats.name: Speaker in Training
feats.description: You've begun your training as a Speaker.

feats.name: Spell Survivor
feats.description: Once you’ve resisted an opponent’s magic, anything else they throw your way becomes less effective.

feats.name: Spirit Soother
feats.description: You are attuned to the minute sounds and sensations of restless spirits.

feats.name: Springing Leaper
feats.description: Your powerful legs allow you to make sudden and dramatic leaps.

feats.name: Statue Form
feats.description: An inconspicuous statue in front of a shop is the perfect form to wait for things to blow over.

feats.name: Steam Spell
feats.description: You transform your fire spells into steam, making them more effective underwater.

feats.name: Stem the Tide
feats.description: You can cast protector tree as a 1st-rank primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Step Lively
feats.description: You are an expert at avoiding the lumbering footsteps of larger creatures.

feats.name: Storming Gaze
feats.description: You can open or energize a notable third eye on your forehead to strike with storming power.

feats.name: Stretching Reach
feats.description: You can leverage your size and muscle to extend your reach and attack more distant foes.

feats.name: Strix Vengeance
feats.description: You dedicate yourself to destroying those who harm your kin.

feats.name: Strong Tail
feats.description: From sheer necessity, you've gotten surprisingly good at moving around on land.

feats.name: Strong of Wing
feats.description: You can fly with a greater distance.

feats.name: Supernatural Charm
feats.description: The elven magic in your blood manifests as a force you can use to become more appealing or alluring.

feats.name: Swamp Stealth
feats.description: In swamplands, you are particularly skilled at quickly hiding behind bits of underbrush or foliage, or moving quietly through murky water.

feats.name: Swift Swimmer
feats.description: You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Swimming Poppet
feats.description: Your fins, flippers, or other accessories assist with steering you through water.

feats.name: Tail Snatch
feats.description: You can whip your tail around to lash items from the unwary's grip.

feats.name: Tail Spin
