feats.description: You excel at using your tail as a weapon to upend your foes.

feats.name: Taste Blood
feats.description: You retain not only your vampiric parent's taste for blood but their ability to gain vitality from it.

feats.name: Tenacious Jaws
feats.description: Your teeth are curved or hooked to hold on to your enemies.

feats.name: Tenacious Net
feats.description: Escaping your nets is no simple task.

feats.name: Tengu Feather Fan
feats.description: You've learned to bind some of your feathers together into a fan to focus your ancestral magic.

feats.name: The Moon Weaver's Art
feats.description: You’ve learned to create minor illusions by collecting strands of moonlight and weaving them together to create small images or cloaking veils.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard The Moon Weaver's Art

feats.name: Thousand-Year Grudge
feats.description: You can call upon your former lives and project all of your accumulated frustration, failure, and despair through your eyes at a target, overwhelming their senses.

feats.name: Thrown Voice
feats.description: You've learned how to throw your voice through the winds, tricking others as to your location.

feats.name: Tikling Bird Twirl
feats.description: You trained your footwork by dancing to music between snapping bamboo poles, and your increased mobility helps you succeed when hunting dangerous beasts or fighting multiple opponents.

feats.name: Tip the Scales
feats.description: You’re a cunning adversary in close quarters and are well-versed in hit-and-run tactics that exploit the advantages of your small stature.

feats.name: Tomb-Watcher's Glare
feats.description: When you critically hit an undead creature, or an undead creature critically fails a saving throw against one of your abilities, you drive your divine wrath home in your enemy’s heart.

feats.name: Tongue Disarm
feats.description: You lash out with your tongue to disarm your foe.

feats.name: Torch Goblin
feats.description: You’ve spent enough time on fire that you know how to use it to your advantage.

feats.name: Tough Tumbler
feats.description: You’ve taken your share of licks while scurrying around the battlefield and know how to defend yourself against opportunistic attackers.

feats.name: Towering Presence
feats.description: You tap into your planar heritage and momentarily grow larger through force of will.

feats.name: Traditional Resistances
feats.description: Due to your blood, you have some resistance to certain types of magic.

feats.name: Tranquil Sanctuary
feats.description: Whenever possible, you follow the serene path and encourage others to do the same.

feats.name: Transposable Compliance
feats.description: Your protean vitality is fecund and many-succoring: your veins run with life-giving ichor that adapts to the blood and physiology of any body, and your skin molts on command, creating wound-stanching sheaths of tissue for yourself and others.

feats.name: Treacherous Earth
feats.description: You have the power to shatter the earth into a shape of your devising.

feats.name: Tree Climber (Goblin)
feats.description: Your time in forest or jungle canopies has taught you how to scramble across branches with sure feet.

feats.name: Tree's Ward
feats.description: You've lived among trees for so long they recognize your presence and seek to protect you from harm.

feats.name: Treespeech
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood allows you to communicate with trees in the Universe in Muan, the language of wood elementals.

feats.name: Tripkee Glide
feats.description: You can use your webbed feet to guide your fall.

feats.name: Tunnel Roll
feats.description: You can more easily navigate underground tunnels by rolling up into a ball.

feats.name: Unassuming Heroes
feats.description: You have a talent for making friends through simple kindness, often among stray animals or other creatures that people tend to overlook, and your inherent magic can make these acts take on additional power.

feats.name: Uncanny Awareness
feats.description: You have a keen sense of movement around you.

feats.name: Undead Companion
feats.description: Your companion is also touched by undeath, a mix of a traditional companion and a skeleton, zombie, or stranger form of unlife.

feats.name: Undead Slayer
feats.description: Your knowledge of your own not-quite-living anatomy, combined with your experience in combat, helps you take down undead foes with ease.

feats.name: Unlock Secret
feats.description: You delve deeper into your psychic potential.

feats.name: Urban Jungle
feats.description: Cities are just a new form of wilderness.

feats.name: Vanara Weapon Trickery
feats.description: You've learned how to trick your foes using vanara weapons.

feats.name: Vandal
feats.description: You have a knack for breaking and dismantling things.

feats.name: Venom Gulp
feats.description: You can store prepared venom in your throat and spit it at your foes in addition to your own toxic spray.

feats.name: Venom Spit
feats.description: You've learned the art of lobbing toxic spittle at vulnerable spots on your foes, especially the eyes.

feats.name: Victorious Vigor
feats.description: Your victories in battle fill you with pride and imbue you with the energy to fight a bit longer despite your wounds.

feats.name: Vishkanya Weapon Arts
feats.description: You are graceful and efficient in the use of vishkanyan weapons.

feats.name: Voice of the Elements
feats.description: You inherit a primal dragon’s bond to base elements.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Voice of the Elements

feats.name: Vomit Stomach
feats.description: In dire circumstances you can vomit out your stomach to expel toxins.

feats.name: Vulpine Scamper
feats.description: You’re especially nimble while in your full fox shape.

feats.name: Ward Against Corruption
feats.description: Your soul is warded against the power of undeath and plague, as well as that of the evil former psychopomps known as sahkils.

feats.name: Warding Jewel
feats.description: A life of hunting and battle has caused your head gem to attune to the waxing moon, which has manifested in the power to protect you from harm.

feats.name: Warp Likeness
feats.description: You channel some of your own nature through your blow, temporarily warping your target's form to resemble your own.

feats.name: Water Conjuration
feats.description: You carry the ocean with you wherever you go.

feats.name: Wavetouched Paragon
feats.description: You have been blessed by the sea, granting you the ability to swim like a fish.

feats.name: Well of Potential
feats.description: Your mind is a deep well of psychic potential.

feats.name: Well-Groomed
feats.description: You are fastidious about keeping clean.

feats.name: Well-armed
feats.description: Your detachable limbs offer flexibility.

feats.name: Wild Stride
feats.description: You can move quickly when using your preferred modes of travel.

feats.name: Wildborn Adept
feats.description: The whispers of the jungle grant you more diverse access to simple primal magic.

feats.name: Winglets
feats.description: Through the lingering influence of your warren's patron, you've sprouted a small set of wings.

feats.name: Withstand the Storm
feats.description: Your skin hardens like bark and gains the sheen of glazed clay, lessening the wild’s ruinous sting against your body.

feats.name: Zip! Zoom!
feats.description: You can fly longer distances before you need to land.

feats.name: Abscission Shards
feats.description: You twist your claw, breaking off a piece in your target.

feats.name: Adaptive Mask Familiar
feats.description: Your mask familiar adapts quickly to material form, allowing it to gain more familiar and master abilities.

feats.name: Additional Recollection
feats.description: You scan the battlefield quickly, remembering critical details about multiple opponents you face.

feats.name: Additional Servings
feats.description: Your number of versatile vials per day increases to 5.

feats.name: Advanced Arcana
feats.description: You gain one wizard feat.

feats.name: Advanced Blood Potency
feats.description: You gain one sorcerer feat.

feats.name: Advanced Bloodline
feats.description: You draw more power from your bloodline.

feats.name: Advanced Bow Training
feats.description: Through constant practice and the crucible of experience, you increase your skill with advanced bows.

feats.name: Advanced Breakthrough
feats.description: You gain one inventor feat.

feats.name: Advanced Concoction
feats.description: You gain one alchemist feat.

feats.name: Advanced Deduction
feats.description: You gain one investigator feat.

feats.name: Advanced Defender
feats.description: You gain one guardian feat.

feats.name: Advanced Devotion
feats.description: You gain one champion feat.

feats.name: Advanced Dogma
feats.description: You gain one cleric feat.

feats.name: Advanced Element Control
feats.description: You gain one kineticist feat.

feats.name: Advanced Elemental Spell
feats.description: Your connection to one of the great elemental aspects of nature deepens, allowing you further control over its powers.

feats.name: Advanced Field Training
feats.description: You gain a commander feat.

feats.name: Advanced Flair
feats.description: You gain one swashbuckler feat.

feats.name: Advanced Fury
feats.description: You gain one barbarian feat.

feats.name: Advanced Glory
feats.description: You gain an exemplar feat.

feats.name: Advanced Herbalism
feats.description: Your herbalist talents continue to grow with use and you have become potent at making even more remedies from less.

feats.name: Advanced Hunter's Trick
feats.description: You gain one ranger feat.

feats.name: Advanced Kata
feats.description: You gain one monk feat.

feats.name: Advanced Maneuver
feats.description: You gain a fighter feat.

feats.name: Advanced Martial Magic
feats.description: You gain one magus feat.

feats.name: Advanced Monastic Weaponry
feats.description: Your rigorous training regimen allows you to wield complex weaponry with ease.

feats.name: Advanced Muse's Whispers
feats.description: You gain one bard feat.

feats.name: Advanced Mysteries
feats.description: You gain one oracle feat.

feats.name: Advanced Poisoncraft
feats.description: You can create up to 6 poisons per day with advanced alchemy.

feats.name: Advanced Qi Spells
feats.description: Your talent at controlling your qi has reached new heights.

feats.name: Advanced Revelation
feats.description: Divine power reveals greater mysteries to you.

feats.name: Advanced Shooter
feats.description: You've dedicated your training to the most complex and weird weapons of your favorite group.

feats.name: Advanced Shooting
feats.description: You gain one gunslinger feat.

feats.name: Advanced Synergy
feats.description: You gain one summoner feat.

feats.name: Advanced Thaumaturgy
feats.description: You gain one thaumaturge feat.

feats.name: Advanced Thoughtform
feats.description: You gain one psychic feat.

feats.name: Advanced Trickery
feats.description: You gain one rogue feat.

feats.name: Advanced Weapon Training
feats.description: You’ve studied the art of wielding an advanced weapon.

feats.name: Advanced Wilding
feats.description: You gain one druid feat.

feats.name: Advanced Witchcraft
feats.description: You gain one witch feat.

feats.name: Advantageous Assault
feats.description: After compromising your enemy’s movement, you deliver a more deadly blow.

feats.name: Agile Maneuvers
feats.description: Your easily maneuver against your foes.

feats.name: Aldori Riposte
feats.description: You riposte with your Aldori dueling sword when your enemy leaves an opening.

feats.name: Align Qi
feats.description: The power of your qi soothes your wounds and energizes you for battle.

feats.name: Analyze Idiolect
feats.description: You break down a specific individual’s idiolect, memorizing their speech mannerisms and habits.

feats.name: Analyze Weakness
feats.description: Your knowledge of a creature’s physiology helps you attack with pinpoint accuracy.

feats.name: Animal Skin
feats.description: Your proficiency in unarmored defense increases to expert.

feats.name: Animal Strength
feats.description: You tap into the primal strength of your animal feature.

feats.name: Animate Net
feats.description: When you cast animate rope, you can modify it to animate a net.

feats.name: Animist's Power
feats.description: You gain one animist feat.

feats.name: Anticipate Ambush
feats.description: You keep watch for any hidden creatures or dangerous sites, moving at half your travel Speed.

feats.name: Antler Rush
feats.description: Stride twice.

feats.name: Apparition Stabilization
feats.description: Your attuned apparition ensures that even if you would be distracted or disrupted, your magic does not go to waste.

feats.name: Arcana of Iron
feats.description: You eschew wands and staves for more advanced weaponry.

feats.name: Arcane Sensitivity
feats.description: You can sense the presence of the supernatural, even if you don't have any magical ability yourself.

feats.name: Archaeologist's Warning
feats.description: You visually or audibly warn your companions of danger, granting them a +1 circumstance bonus to their initiative rolls.

feats.name: Armor Specialist
feats.description: You have trained hard to optimize your armor's unique protective qualities to maximize the materials used in its creation.

feats.name: Artery Map
feats.description: While you’ve learned all the places a scalpel can cause extensive bleeding to avoid disasters in surgery, such knowledge can serve other purposes.

feats.name: Artokus's Fire
feats.description: Artokus developed a mixture of volatile materials that burns hotter and longer than typical alchemist's fire.

feats.name: Ash Strider
feats.description: You discorporate into a cloud of whirling ash and Stride.

feats.name: Assured Knowledge
feats.description: You can procure information with confidence.

feats.name: Axe Thrower
feats.description: You have mastered the weight and balance of a variety of axes and can lob them with ease.

feats.name: Barricade Snare
feats.description: Using clever gnomish engineering, you can quickly erect small barriers in which your snares are hidden.

feats.name: Basic Magus Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic bounded spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Scroll Cache
feats.description: You have a vast and overflowing collection of scroll scraps, riddled with errors and misspellings and leaking energy like a sieve.

feats.name: Basic Summoner Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic bounded spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Battle-Tested Companion
feats.description: Your companion is a tried and tested ally of unshakable reliability.

feats.name: Battlefield Agility
feats.description: Your enemies might think they have you surrounded, but you know just how to extricate yourself.

feats.name: Bear Hug
feats.description: You hug your opponent.

feats.name: Bear Hug
feats.description: You snatch at your opponent with your claws, pulling them close in a ferocious bear hug.

feats.name: Beast Gunner Dedication
feats.description: You've bonded to your beast gun and unlocked the first hints of its hidden potential.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Beast Gunner Dedication U

feats.name: Beastmaster's Trance
feats.description: You can enter a trance that allows you to briefly inhabit the body of one of your animal companions and share its senses.

feats.name: Bellflower Dedication
feats.description: You dedicate yourself to freeing slaves and escorting them to freedom.

feats.name: Benevolent Spirit Deck
feats.description: You manifest a ghostly deck of harrow cards that seek to protect you or an ally.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Benevolent Spirit Deck U

feats.name: Bestial Protection
feats.description: Your companion's mere presence is enough to rattle creatures that fall under its shadow.

feats.name: Betraying Shank
feats.description: While your usual diplomacy is well intentioned, you know that sometimes those same skills will need to be turned to deception.

feats.name: Binding Serpents Celestial Arrow
feats.description: As you prepare to shoot your weapon, you invoke divine serpents that bind your enemies.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Binding Serpents Celestial Arrow

feats.name: Blazing Spirit
feats.description: Your apparition grants fiery defenses.

feats.name: Blazing Talon Surge
feats.description: You rush forward and latch onto your enemy with talons of hungering fire.

feats.name: Blessed Sentinel
feats.description: You infuse a weapon with the blessing of Ketephys and attack.

feats.name: Blood Frenzy
feats.description: Your eidolon flies into a frenzy.

feats.name: Boaster's Challenge
feats.description: You call out a foe, causing them to become flustered and easier to defeat.

feats.name: Bolera's Interrogation
feats.description: You can force a creature to tell the truth

feats.name: Brains!
feats.description: You consume the brains of your foe, causing synapses long rotten to fire and enabling you to shake off your mental torpor.

feats.name: Brutal Bully
feats.description: You push your foes around and leave bruises.

feats.name: Burning Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental fire, causing it to set the target on fire.

feats.name: Butterfly's Kiss
feats.description: You can make nonlethal Strikes with a butterfly sword without taking a penalty.

feats.name: Butterfly's Sting
feats.description: You gain the sneak attack class feature.

feats.name: Cadence Call
feats.description: You call out a quick cadence, guiding your allies into a more efficient rhythm.

feats.name: Cadre
feats.description: Between your daring adventures, people seek you out.

feats.name: Cannon Corner Shot
feats.description: By loading special ammunition in a particular way, you can make your siege weapons do all manner of tricks that other siege engineers can barely even imagine.

feats.name: Captivating Intensity
feats.description: Your ability to captivate others has grown, and you can use your captivator abilities more often.

feats.name: Cascade Bearer's Flexibility
feats.description: You call upon your Cascade Bearer training to help you adjust a spell for the current situation.

feats.name: Cascade Countermeasure
feats.description: When in Arcane Cascade, you can make yourself resistant to magic.

feats.name: Cast Down
feats.description: The sheer force of your faith can bring a foe crashing down.

feats.name: Cast Out
feats.description: You attempt to cast a malevolent entity out of the creature or object it's possessing.

feats.name: Cauterize
feats.description: You use the smoking barrel of your firearm to sear shut a bleeding wound.

feats.name: Cayden's Freedom
feats.description: Even if you've never downed a tankard of ale nor indulged in a night of rowdy revelry, you appreciate the dedication to freedom from Cayden Cailean and his worshippers.

feats.name: Ceremonial Knife
feats.description: You have prepared a special knife to direct energies when spellcasting.

feats.name: Champion's Reaction
feats.description: You can gain and use the champion’s reaction associated with your cause

feats.name: Claim the Field
feats.description: You hurl your banner forward with precision, claiming the battlefield for yourself and your allies.

feats.name: Clean Take
feats.description: Thanks to many long hours of rehearsals, your acting skill is infinitely adaptable.

feats.name: Clear as Air
feats.description: Compact layers of air diffract and bend light around your body, making you appear as clear as the sky on a perfect day.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Clear as Air H

feats.name: Clear the Way
feats.description: You put your body behind your massive weapon and swing, shoving enemies to clear a wide path.

feats.name: Cleave
feats.description: You swing clear through one foe and into another.

feats.name: Clinch Strike
feats.description: Your opponents can’t slip your grasp without punishment.

feats.name: Cloaking Pulse
feats.description: Your ostilli can emit illusion magic to mask your position, granting you the Drape Ambient Magic action. Drape Ambient Magic [one-action] (illusion) Frequency once per round; Effect Your ostilli turns clear as it converts its stored magic into a bubble of refracting light around you.

feats.name: Clockwork Celerity
feats.description: You can use unstable clockwork devices in your innovation to push your invention to act more quickly.

feats.name: Combination Finisher
feats.description: You combine a series of attacks with a powerful finishing blow.

feats.name: Combine Elixirs
feats.description: You can add the full ingredients of a second elixir to an elixir you make to create a hybrid concoction.

feats.name: Commitment to Justice
feats.description: When your allies are harmed, you deliver retribution.

feats.name: Commitment to Liberty
feats.description: You can’t abide when a foe has one of your allies in its grip.

feats.name: Commitment to Protection
feats.description: You attempt to guide an ally into a more defensive pose against a particular danger.

feats.name: Confounding Image
feats.description: When you cast mirror image, you can modify it to create a duplicate of yourself.

feats.name: Connect the Dots
feats.description: Ephemeral connections between people, places, and concepts are invisible to most, but seeing them is your stock and trade.

feats.name: Construct Shell
feats.description: You've adjusted your construct innovation so that when you ride it, special plates, hollows, or similar form partial barriers around you to add additional protection.

feats.name: Consume Power
feats.description: You absorb energy and hold it in your kinetic gate.

feats.name: Convincing Illusion
feats.description: You use your deceptive skills to make your illusions seem even more real.

feats.name: Corrupted Shield
feats.description: Your shield ally is more than just a spirit of protection— it's a conduit for deadly divine magic.

feats.name: Counter Element
feats.description: Your absolute dedication to a single element lets you attempt to gain control over it, even when the element is in service to another entity.

feats.name: Counter Perform
feats.description: You gain the counter performance composition spell.

feats.name: Cozy Campfire
feats.description: You spend 1 hour building a campfire in a single unoccupied square and whispering the stories of those you’ve met on your journeys.

feats.name: Craft Facsimile
feats.description: You're renowned for your ability to recover important items and sometimes that requires creating a stand-in.

feats.name: Crane Flutter
feats.description: You interpose your arm between yourself and your opponent.

feats.name: Crawling Fire
feats.description: You mimic the motions of a beast of your devising, and it becomes real, with a flaming pelt and searing claws.

feats.name: Crimson Shroud
feats.description: You swathe yourself in a veil of red mist for 1 minute.

feats.name: Crossbow Terror
feats.description: Your skill with a crossbow strikes terror into your opponents when you threaten them with the next bolt.

feats.name: Crowd Mastery
feats.description: You use the crowd to your advantage, diverting your foes’ attention to potential hidden dangers in the crowd.

feats.name: Crown of the Saumen Kar
feats.description: Your body begins to evolve and adapt, taking the first steps towards blending your very self with the ancient curse of the saumen kar.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Crown of the Saumen Kar

feats.name: Crushing Step
feats.description: The weight of your armored feet casts aside natural impediments.

feats.name: Culvert's Collapse
feats.description: Under your foes’ onslaught, the water within your violent blood stirs.

feats.name: Current Spell
feats.description: As you use your magic to manipulate air or water, you spin off some of its currents to form a barrier around you.

feats.name: Current Spell
feats.description: As you use your magic to manipulate air or water, you divert some of its currents to form a barrier around you.

feats.name: Cutting Heaven, Crushing Earth
feats.description: Your skill in combining fist and blade has grown into a seamless art where each attack makes an opponent more vulnerable to the next.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Cutting Heaven, Crushing Earth

feats.name: Daring Act
feats.description: You attempt a death-defying maneuver to distract your enemies.

feats.name: Dash of Herbs
feats.description: A small cloud of medicinal herbs heal a creature.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Dash of Herbs H

feats.name: Dashing Pickup
feats.description: You Command an Animal to order your mount to Stride (or to Burrow, Climb, Fly, or Swim if it has the corresponding movement type).

feats.name: Daywalker
feats.description: Through a profane pledge or a bloodline quirk, you can tolerate the sun's light.

feats.name: Dazing Blow
feats.description: You pummel a held foe, hoping to stagger them.

feats.name: Dazzling Bullet
feats.description: Your tricks discombobulate your opponent, leaving spots in their vision from the bright flash of your gunshot reflected straight into their eyes.

feats.name: Death Roll
feats.description: You corkscrew your body, twisting your victim.

feats.name: Death Warden
feats.description: With your intimate familiarity with the duality of positive and negative energy, you're able to stand as a bulwark against death and undeath alike.

feats.name: Deathly Secrets
feats.description: No means of creating or ruling the undead is beyond your grasp, even those of magical traditions not your own.

feats.name: Debilitating Bomb
feats.description: You can add a crystalline additive to an alchemical bomb to have it undermine your enemy.

feats.name: Defend Mount
feats.description: You interpose yourself between an attacker and your mount, defending your mount from harm.

feats.name: Defensive Coordination
feats.description: Like the storied heroes who persist in the face of overwhelming odds, you and your allies will hold the line.

feats.name: Defensive Growth
feats.description: You grow a shield of woven flowers and branches, then Raise that Shield to defend yourself from the triggering attack.

feats.name: Deflecting Pulse
feats.description: Your ostilli can use its stored magic to protect you from other magic, granting you the Turn Aside Ambient Magic action. Turn Aside Ambient Magic [one-action] (concentrate) Your ostilli glows a faint yellow as it establishes a barrier.

feats.name: Defy Fey
feats.description: You are keen to the wiles of the fey and can usually shake off their magic.

feats.name: Denounce Tyranny
feats.description: You call out a creature's despicable or cowardly actions, disrupting its alliances or even making its allies ashamed to be seen with it.

feats.name: Desert Wind
feats.description: A vortex of sand and dust surrounds you.

feats.name: Detonating Spell
feats.description: Your spell becomes volatile and explosive.

feats.name: Devout Blessing
feats.description: You gain the blessing of the devoted class feature

feats.name: Directional Bombs
feats.description: You can lob bombs with great force and a precise trajectory to angle the splash in a cone that sprays in a single direction, potentially allowing you to avoid allies and splash deeper into enemy lines.

feats.name: Dirge of Doom
feats.description: You learn the dirge of doom composition cantrip (page 370), which frightens your enemies and keeps them from fully recovering from their fear.

feats.name: Disarming Intercept
feats.description: When you catch a weapon in your armor, you can move your body to wrench it from your foe's grasp.

feats.name: Disarming Smile
feats.description: With a wide and sincere smile, you give your attacker pause.

feats.name: Disarming Stance
feats.description: You adopt a fencing stance that improves your control over your weapon.

feats.name: Discerning Gaze
feats.description: You have a sense for when people are lying.

feats.name: Discerning Strike
feats.description: Identifying a creature is the first step in finding its weaknesses.

feats.name: Disciple of Shade
feats.description: You've delved deeper into the mysteries of shadow and become blessed with magical power that increases your skills in the arts of deception and persuasion.

feats.name: Disk Rider
feats.description: When you cast floating disk, you can modify it to ride atop.

feats.name: Disrupting Strikes
feats.description: You call forth positive energy from within to help you destroy undead.

feats.name: Distracting Bites
feats.description: You know how to take advantage of those your swarm has attacked.

feats.name: Diverting Vortex
feats.description: You use vestiges of magic to create a protective vortex.

feats.name: Divine Emissary
feats.description: Your familiar is a divine emissary, sent to you by your deity or patron and infused with celestial powers.

feats.name: Divine Rebuttal
feats.description: You strive against magical threats physically and spiritually.

feats.name: Divine Weapon
feats.description: You siphon residual spell energy into a weapon you’re wielding.

feats.name: Dodge Away
feats.description: You use your acrobatic prowess to evade an attack, using momentum to keep yourself moving if you choose.

feats.name: Domain Spirit
feats.description: You forge an intense spiritual bond of mutual trust and appreciation with a single spirit that you have already bonded with using Bond with Spirit.

feats.name: Draconic Familiar
feats.description: Your devotion to dragons has attracted a loyal servant.

feats.name: Dragon Roar
feats.description: You bellow, instilling fear in your enemies.

feats.name: Dragon's Rage Breath
feats.description: You breathe deeply and exhale powerful energy in a 30-foot cone, dealing 1d6 damage per level to each creature in the area with a basic Reflex save against your class DC.

feats.name: Drenching Mist
feats.description: When you cast obscuring mist, you can modify it to extinguish flames.

feats.name: Drifter's Juke
feats.description: You move in and out of range to complement your attacks.

feats.name: Driving Rain
feats.description: Heavy drops of rain batter down, hitting like sling stones and impeding vision.

feats.name: Duel Spell Advantage
feats.description: When you start a psychic duel, you gain a third natural psychic spell.

feats.name: Echolocation
feats.description: When you take the Seek action, you can use hearing as a precise sense with a range of 40 feet until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Educate Allies
feats.description: You tweak the properties of your composition spell to convey a bit of your defensive knowledge.

feats.name: Efficient Preparation
feats.description: You’ve developed techniques for drilling your allies on multiple tactics in a succinct and efficient manner.

feats.name: Eidolon's Opportunity
feats.description: Your eidolon makes a melee Strike against the triggering creature.

feats.name: Eidolon's Wrath
feats.description: Your eidolon gains the eidolon's wrath focus spell, which it casts, instead of you.

feats.name: Eldritch Archer Dedication
feats.description: You channel powerful magic with your archery, allowing you to deliver potent spells through the tip of an arrow rather than the more mundane flick of the wrist or whatever other gestures are usually used.

feats.name: Electrogenesis
feats.description: Some animals and beasts have electric organs in their body that they can use to jolt their prey.

feats.name: Elemental Artillery
feats.description: Spinning wood and metal together, you create a rugged wooden ballista.

feats.name: Elemental Explosion
feats.description: You unleash the energy roiling within you.

feats.name: Elysium's Cadence
feats.description: You've been ensnared by an azata's infectious enthusiasm for life, love, and freedom.

feats.name: Emerald Boughs Accustomation
feats.description: You are comfortable and socially capable in almost any cultural context.

feats.name: Endemic Herbs
feats.description: The herbal items you create use medicinal plants endemic to your location.

feats.name: Energetic Resonance
feats.description: Your blood resonates with magical energy, mitigating the effects of harmful spells.

feats.name: Energy Ward
feats.description: You convert energy from the last spell you cast into a protective ward.

feats.name: Enervating Wail
feats.description: You release a terrible wail that tears at the spirits of all nearby.

feats.name: Ensnaring Disarm
feats.description: You smack your foe's item out of their hand so that your student can grab it.

feats.name: Essence Overflow
feats.description: Your Channel Draconic Essence ends, and all creatures (except you) in a 10-foot emanation from your spectral dragon take 6d6 damage with a

feats.name: Exigent Aura
feats.description: The power of your deity and your own convictions leave an impression on creatures even when they normally would be unable to comprehend your words or the feelings spurred on by your god.

feats.name: Expand Aura
feats.description: You focus your divine power to extend your influence and protection.

feats.name: Expanded Elemental Magic
feats.description: You reach new understandings of the elements, taking an expansive view.

feats.name: Expeditious Advance
feats.description: You advance and retreat quickly.

feats.name: Expert Fireworks Crafter
feats.description: You’re particularly adept at crafting fireworks, allowing you to create more fireworks than you otherwise could.

feats.name: Exploit Opening
feats.description: You take advantage of your spotter’s devastating attack to unleash your own follow-up attack.

feats.name: Explosion
feats.description: Your innovation can explode on command.

feats.name: Explosive Arrival
feats.description: Your summoned creature appears in a detonation of arcane runes.

feats.name: Exsanguinate
feats.description: After one of your attacks, you direct your foe’s blood to spray upon you, infusing you with life energy.

feats.name: Familiar's Resolve
feats.description: When you weave magic, your familiar traces symbols that throw off fear and doubt.

feats.name: Far Throw
feats.description: When you Strike with a thrown weapon, you take only a –1 penalty for each additional range increment between you and the target, rather than a –2 penalty.

feats.name: Fear No Pain!
feats.description: You have learned to endure pain without complaint and are capable of steeling your allies with similar resolve.

feats.name: Fearful Symmetry
feats.description: You attack with a feline grace as captivatingly beautiful as it is deadly.

feats.name: Fearsome Familiar
feats.description: Your elemental familiar trades places with an elemental from its elemental plane.

feats.name: Feeding Frenzy
feats.description: Your serrated teeth rip and tear at your prey.

feats.name: Feeling Your Oats
feats.description: You are incredible, impeccable, an icon of style and grace—and everyone knows it.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Feeling Your Oats U

feats.name: Feverish Enzymes
feats.description: Your claws and fangs exude an infectious enzyme, related to the necrotic effects of ghoul fever, that causes a creature's wounds to heal slowly.

feats.name: Fey Tracker
feats.description: You are exceptionally skilled at noticing the subtle techniques fey use to avoid notice.

feats.name: Field Artillery
feats.description: While castles are generally obliging enough to stay in one place, out in the field positioning is of paramount importance—a gun in the wrong place is worse than useless.

feats.name: Fiendish Brand
feats.description: Make a Strike with a weapon or unarmed attack that deals piercing or slashing damage.

feats.name: Five-breath Vanguard Dedication
feats.description: You flow like the elemental cycle, adapting your stance and techniques constantly in response to whatever circumstances you face.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Five-breath Vanguard Dedication U

feats.name: Flair Rider Stance
feats.description: You spend little time in your saddle as you flip unpredictably around your dragon mount, dodging attacks.

feats.name: Fleeting Shadow
feats.description: You're able to quickly disappear and then move about without drawing the attention of your enemies.

feats.name: Flexible Ritualist
feats.description: You can perform two aspects of a ritual yourself.

feats.name: Fling Head
feats.description: You Interact to remove your head, if it isn’t already detached, and fling it at an enemy within 30 feet, where it emits a bone-chilling wail before dematerializing and returning to your body.

feats.name: Flinging Updraft
feats.description: A speeding wind heeds your call, picking someone up and depositing them nearby.

feats.name: Float Free
feats.description: You move 5 feet or up to half your swim Speed vertically through the water.

feats.name: Flow of War
feats.description: Divine battle instincts take over your body, letting you move and lash out with instinctive speed.

feats.name: Flowing Palm Deflection
feats.description: The simple and precise movements of your hands allow you to deflect blows with the same efficacy as a raised shield.

feats.name: Fluttering Misdirection
feats.description: You’ve trained in drawing the eyes of your audience to specific aspects of your performance through the careful manipulation of your fans and body.

feats.name: Follow-up Strike
feats.description: You have trained rigorously to use all parts of your body as a weapon, and when you miss with an attack, you can usually continue the attack with a different body part and still deal damage.

feats.name: Food Preservation
feats.description: Your techniques extend the storage life for certain ingredients and food through pickling, alcohol, or fermentation.

feats.name: Forced Entry
feats.description: You are trained to preserve the archaeological value of your location when entering.

feats.name: Fortified Elixirs
feats.description: Your treatments for diseases and poisons can be very efficacious, though they tend not to last as long.

feats.name: Fortune's Favor
feats.description: You understand when an investment in you has the chance to pay off.

feats.name: Frighten Undead
feats.description: Your very presence chills creatures of the night down to their core and you can use the spiritual power and faithful life force of religious verses to frighten even mindless undead.

feats.name: Frightful Condemnation
feats.description: Your willingness to follow through on your pitiless judgment is frightful to the person you have condemned.

feats.name: Fulminating Shot
feats.description: You channel potent magic into your next shot, empowering it with a blast of crackling energy.

feats.name: Fulu Familiar
feats.description: You can imprint your familiar’s spiritual essence into a fulu, a small paper charm that can be affixed to objects, creatures, or structures.

feats.name: Fungal Exhalation
feats.description: You can conjure toxic spores to infect enemies.

feats.name: Furious Focus
feats.description: You’ve learned to maintain your balance even when swinging furiously.

feats.name: Gang Up
feats.description: You and your allies harry an opponent in concert.

feats.name: Gear Up
feats.description: Whether it's wooden stakes, holy water, or more unusual tools, you always have just the right thing to handle an undead's unusual weaknesses and vulnerabilities.

feats.name: Ghost Strike
feats.description: You can infuse a weapon you are carrying with magical energies that allow it to strike true against incorporeal undead.

feats.name: Ghostly Grasp (Ghost)
feats.description: Your control over your ghostly form grows.

feats.name: Giant's Stature
feats.description: You grow to incredible size.

feats.name: Gifted Power
feats.description: Your mystery grants you additional magic.

feats.name: Gorilla Pound
feats.description: You pound your chest before slamming into your foes.

feats.name: Grave Mummification
feats.description: Exposure to the elements, magic, alchemy, and other phenomena intensified the changes from your mummification.

feats.name: Grave Sense
feats.description: Learn how to sense undead in the area.

feats.name: Grave Strength
feats.description: The flesh you've consumed over the course of your existence as a ghoul has made you stronger, gifting you with strange insights from the minds of the sapient creatures you've devoured and bringing you closer to a state of undead perfection.

feats.name: Gravel Guts
feats.description: Stone never becomes queasy, so why should you? You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against the sickened condition.

feats.name: Gray Corsair Training
feats.description: You strike for Andoran on the waters of the Inner Sea and beyond.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Gray Corsair Training U

feats.name: Greater Lesson
feats.description: Your patron grants you greater knowledge.

feats.name: Grown of Oak
feats.description: You can make your skin take on the woody endurance of an ancient tree and have your familiar follow suit.

feats.name: Grudge Strike
feats.description: You channel the spiritual power of spiteful grudges.

feats.name: Guarded Advance (Guardian)
feats.description: You slowly advance on the battlefield, taking utmost caution.

feats.name: Guarded Mind
feats.description: When your enemies try to turn your mind against you, thoughts of your anathema bolster you.

feats.name: Guardian's Deflection (Fighter)
feats.description: You use your weapon to deflect the attack against your ally, granting a +2 circumstance bonus to their Armor Class against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Guardian's Intercept
feats.description: You can use the Intercept Attack reaction once per 10 minutes.

feats.name: Guide the Timeline
feats.description: You know the result you want and subtly nudge the timeline to your intended destination.

feats.name: Guided Skill
feats.description: You ask your spirit guide for aid.

feats.name: Halcyon Speaker Dedication
feats.description: You devote much of your study to halcyon magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Halcyon Speaker Dedication U

feats.name: Harbinger's Protection
feats.description: You often work on missions alone, making sure to cover up your weaknesses more effectively than other members of your faith.

feats.name: Harmonize
feats.description: You can perform multiple compositions simultaneously,

feats.name: Harrow Ritualist
feats.description: You immediately learn two of the following rituals: astral projection, call spirit, commune, commune with nature, legend lore, or planar binding.

feats.name: Heaven's Thunder
feats.description: With a loud shout, you unleash your ki in a crackling shroud of thunder and lightning that engulfs your body.

feats.name: Heaven's Thunder
feats.description: With a loud shout, you unleash your ki in a crackling shroud of thunder and lightning that engulfs your body.

feats.name: Hedge Prison
feats.description: You cultivate plants to entrap your foes.

feats.name: Hellknight Dedication
feats.description: You have forged your body to comply with the commands of your mind—orders steeped in the Measure and the Chain.

feats.name: Hellknight Preferment
feats.description: You've forged your body to be able to stand toe-to-toe with a devil, and your mind has been shaped by the strictures of the Measure and the Chain.

feats.name: Hellknight Signifer Dedication
feats.description: You have bolstered your force of will with the power of the Measure and the Chain.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Hellknight Signifer Dedication U

feats.name: Hellknight Signifer Preferment
feats.description: You've bolstered your force of will with the power of the Measure and the Chain.

feats.name: Hellknight-Errant
feats.description: Either through unfortunate circumstances or your own choice, you remain a Hellknight armiger instead of entering the true ranks of your order, though you still believe in the tenets of law and order.

feats.name: Hero-God's Bond
feats.description: At times, the myth of a hero-god includes a favored partner or a bonded ally, such as the hero-gods of promises and shield-bearers, Upion and Warrick.

feats.name: Hey! Over Here!
feats.description: Hey! Don’t listen to that! That’s bad sounds! Listen to me!

feats.name: High Alert
feats.description: You're constantly on guard, keeping watch over your allies against fiendish forces—no one can get the jump on your group while you're around.

feats.name: High-Speed Regeneration
feats.description: Your wounds knit together with barely a thought.

feats.name: Hindquarter Kick
feats.description: You hold your prey's defensive limbs in place with your claws while delivering a swift kick to their unprotected sides.

feats.name: Hit and Run
feats.description: Leaping from a hiding place, you quickly attack your foe before retreating.

feats.name: Holistic Care
feats.description: You provide emotional and spiritual care.

feats.name: Illuminating Stories
feats.description: Stories serve as beacons in the night, illuminating valuable knowledge even if the tale itself misses the mark.

feats.name: Implement Initiate
feats.description: Mastery of an implement is the sign of a studied thaumaturge.

feats.name: Improved Familiar
feats.description: You find it easy to attract a powerful and unusual familiar to your side.

feats.name: Inertial Barrier
feats.description: Your spell leaves behind barriers that reduce shock and motion.

feats.name: Inexorable
feats.description: You imbue yourself with the resilience of the cave worm.

feats.name: Infiltrate Dream
feats.description: Entering a dream is as natural to you as stepping through a doorway.

feats.name: Infiltrator's Reload
feats.description: You specialize in reloading while preparing for the next step in your infiltration.

feats.name: Infused with Belkzen's Might
feats.description: Your tattoos immortalize the conquests of orc war leaders, such as Belkzen besieging the dwarven Sky Citadel of Koldukar.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Infused with Belkzen's Might U

feats.name: Inner Fire (SoM)
feats.description: While you're in Stoked Flame Stance, you have cold and fire resistance, and any creature touches you takes fire damage.

feats.name: Inner Strength
feats.description: Your strength is part of your rage.

feats.name: Inscribed with Elders' Deeds
feats.description: Your tattoos commemorate unique exploits that (according to legends) only an orc could accomplish.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Inscribed with Elders' Deeds U

feats.name: Insect Shape
feats.description: Your understanding of life expands, allowing you to mimic a wider range of creatures.

feats.name: Instinct Ability
feats.description: Your rage stokes the spark of your barbarian instinct into a roaring flame.

feats.name: Instinctive Support
feats.description: When you support your animal companion, your companion supports you in turn.

feats.name: Intensified Element Stance
feats.description: You expend the elemental medicine in your body to empower your attacks, though you can’t consume any more elemental medicine until the next day.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Intensified Element Stance U

feats.name: Interrogate
feats.description: You ask questions you know will be answered.

feats.name: Intimidating Spell
feats.description: The devastation wrought by your large-scale spells is particularly terrifying.

feats.name: Invented Vulnerability
feats.description: You list off the potential fears and weaknesses of an enemy you can see or hear, speaking with such certainty that they become real.

feats.name: Invigorating Mercy
feats.description: Your divine touch rejuvenates the weak and tired.

feats.name: Invincible Army
feats.description: You enumerate the many virtues and victories of your chosen allies, creating a story of their invincibility so convincing that it is as good as the truth.

feats.name: Iomedae's Valor
feats.description: Though you might not be walking the virtuous path of honor and justice most often associated with Iomedae, you have studied her mortal bravery and can emulate it when you're on the brink of defeat.

feats.name: Irradiate
feats.description: You exude an aura of radiation, making everyone around you ill.

feats.name: Irresistible Magic
feats.description: You’ve studied ways of overcoming the innate defenses against magic that dragons, otherworldly beings, and certain other powerful creatures have.

feats.name: It's Alive!
feats.description: You've mastered the use of electrical energy to power your clockwork creations.

feats.name: Jagged Berms
feats.description: You conjure up to six cube-shaped mounds of packed earth.

feats.name: Jelly Body
feats.description: Some of the ooze that surrounded you made its way permanently into parts of your body, turning you soft to the touch and semitransparent enough to show bones.

feats.name: Keen Recollection
feats.description: You can recall all sorts of information.

feats.name: Keep Pace
feats.description: Once you are upon your prey, they can’t escape.

feats.name: Keep Pace
feats.description: When your hunted prey tries to bolt, you follow.

feats.name: Ki Cutting Sight
feats.description: Everything is connnected—all is part of the whole. Find where to add your ki and you can break the whole.

feats.name: Kinetic Dampening
feats.description: You feed off energy in your immediate surroundings, allowing you to dampen the force imparted by incoming blows.

feats.name: Knight Reclaimant Dedication
feats.description: You have sworn the Crimson Oath and become a full member of the Crimson Reclaimers.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Knight Reclaimant Dedication U

feats.name: Knight Vigilant
feats.description: You are dedicated to the cause of the Shining Sentinels.

feats.name: Legion's Aim
feats.description: Long hours of experimentation with the Platinum Wing have familiarized you with experimental weaponry.

feats.name: Lesson of Bonded Eyes
feats.description: You and your student share an understanding of your surroundings.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lesson of Bonded Eyes

feats.name: Let my Creature Live!
feats.description: You continue to tinker with your creation’s muscles and rudimentary mind, granting it a limited form of autonomy.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Let my Creature Live!

feats.name: Leverage Anguish
feats.description: You leverage your emotional turmoil to mend your physical form.

feats.name: Liberate Soul
feats.description: The light flows from your sigil of Pharasma to shatter the bonds imprisoning a soul.

feats.name: Liberty's Promise
feats.description: Your devotion to Andoran's ideals is as much spiritual as philosophical.

feats.name: Light Step
feats.description: You aren’t bothered by tricky footing.

feats.name: Lightning Rod
feats.description: You smash a metal rod into your foe and call lightning to it.

feats.name: Litany Against Wrath
feats.description: You excoriate a foe for its wrath against goodly creatures.

feats.name: Living Rune
feats.description: You’ve bridged a connection between the runes on your body and the magic of runestones, allowing you to place an armor rune on your living flesh.

feats.name: Lock Down
feats.description: You attack an enemy to ensure they can't move beyond your reach.

feats.name: Lotus Above the Mud
feats.description: Your qi, dancing ever diligently toward cultivation, eludes the grasp of the world’s muck and mire.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lotus Above the Mud

feats.name: Loyal Warhorse
feats.description: The loyalty you and your mount share is unbreakable.

feats.name: Macabre Virtuoso
feats.description: Any necromancer can create zombie and skeleton, but you know the secrets behind the creation of far more advanced undead monstrosities.

feats.name: Mage Hunter
feats.description: You use your hatred of magic to lash out at a known spellcaster.

feats.name: Magic Hands
feats.description: The blessing of your deity heightens your healing ability, integrating magical healing with the mundane.

feats.name: Magical Scrounger
feats.description: You can craft a temporary wondrous item using the magic scrounged from all around.

feats.name: Make Do
feats.description: You sometimes need to act in a pinch, even if you haven't had the time to repair your gear.

feats.name: Mammoth Charge
feats.description: You Command an Animal to order your megafauna companion to Stride twice.

feats.name: Master Summoner
feats.description: During daily preparations, you can designate one of your spell slots to become two summoning slots of the same spell level, from which you can cast only summoning or incarnate spells.

feats.name: Masterful Warden
feats.description: Your mastery of warden magic increases.

feats.name: Mastermind's Eye
feats.description: When you identify a creature with Recall Knowledge, that creature is flat-footed to you.

feats.name: Mature Animal Companion (Ranger)
feats.description: Your animal companion becomes a mature animal companion and gains additional capabilities (page 211).

feats.name: Mature Megafauna Companion
feats.description: You've raised your megafauna companion to be a more powerful force on the battlefield than most of its kind.

feats.name: Mature Trained Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion grows up, becoming a mature animal companion.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Mature Trained Companion U

feats.name: Medium's Awareness
feats.description: Your apparitions watch over you.

feats.name: Megafauna Veterinarian
feats.description: By heeding the wise advice of elders in your following— and aided by your own experience—you've learned how to provide medical care to the megafauna of the Mammoth Lord followings.

feats.name: Megavolt
feats.description: You bleed off some electric power from your innovation in the shape of a damaging bolt.

feats.name: Mesmerizing Gaze
feats.description: When you meet someone’s gaze, they’re unable to look away from you.

feats.name: Mind Shards
feats.description: With a swing and a thought, you detonate your mind weapon into a burst of psychic shards that shred the mind.

feats.name: Misty Transformation
feats.description: Wild mists cover your form.

feats.name: Mobile Swarm
feats.description: The clicking of fast-moving legs accompanies your swarm in all kinds of environments.

feats.name: Molten Wire
feats.description: Spinning molten iron through a vortex of fire, you trap your foe in searing wires.

feats.name: Momentous Charge
feats.description: You rush into your enemies with great and reckless force.

feats.name: Motionless Cutter
feats.description: Your weapon is so sharp even an insect alighting upon its still blade would be severed.

feats.name: Mountain Stronghold
feats.description: You focus on your connection to the earth and call upon the mountain to block attacks against you.

feats.name: Mounted Shield
feats.description: You’ve trained with your shield to defend both yourself and your mount.

feats.name: Multifaceted Will
feats.description: Without the firm hand of a patron, your power begins to reflect deeper complexities, sometimes latching onto entirely unexpected sources of magical potency.

feats.name: Mummy's Despair
feats.description: You force your mental anguish outward, projecting it upon those around you.

feats.name: Munitions Machinist
feats.description: You're particularly adept at crafting ammunition and bombs.

feats.name: Nameless Anonymity
feats.description: Your mask protects you further from divination.

feats.name: Narrative Conduit
feats.description: You act as a conduit for your companions just as your stories are a conduit between teller and listener.

feats.name: Nature Prowler
feats.description: When you begin your turn hidden or unnoticed by your hunted prey, that creature is off-guard to you until the end of your turn.

feats.name: Nature's Precision
feats.description: Your companions pick at an enemy's weak points.

feats.name: Necrologist Dedication
feats.description: Your studies of the lists of the dead allow you to call forth a horde of undead with a brief incantation.

feats.name: Night's Glow
feats.description: The stars and moon lend you their light.

feats.name: Nightwave Springing Reload
feats.description: Training with the crew of the Nightwave has taught you their technique for reloading while leaping to board another ship.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Nightwave Springing Reload U

feats.name: Nimble Shield Hand
feats.description: You are so used to wielding a shield that you can do so even while using the hand that’s holding it for other tasks that require the dexterity of a hand.

feats.name: No Hard Feelings
feats.description: Despite the devastation your weapons tend to inflict upon their targets or the destruction you might unleash upon an area, your foes still manage to walk away at the end of a fight—at least sometimes.

feats.name: Nocturnal Senses
feats.description: Your senses gain even greater clarity.

feats.name: Numb
feats.description: As your body continues to rot and putrefy, your senses deaden and your undead powers grow.

feats.name: Obscured Terrain
feats.description: When you cast obscuring mist, you can modify the spell to blanket the area, making it difficult to see the ground.

feats.name: One More Activation
feats.description: You've forged a deeper bond to your invested items, allowing you to activate them more than usual.

feats.name: One-inch Punch
feats.description: You put all your force into a single mighty, carefully controlled blow.

feats.name: Oppurtune Trickster
feats.description: You aren’t above using underhanded tactics to gain an advantage, easily routing your opponents when they attack.

feats.name: Ostentatious Arrival
feats.description: If the next action you take is to Manifest your Eidolon as a three-action activity, or to Cast a three-action summoning Spell, the creature appears in an explosion.

feats.name: Pack Attack
feats.description: You have mastered techniques for hunting alongside your pack.

feats.name: Pact of Draconic Fury
feats.description: You've sworn a pact with a dragon, giving you the ability to tap into the dragon's immeasurable power in exchange for adding to their hoard.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of Draconic Fury U

feats.name: Pain Tolerance
feats.description: You gain resistance to mental damage equal to half your level and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects that would make you clumsy, drained, or enfeebled.

feats.name: Palatine Enchantment
feats.description: You have found yourself facing supernatural beings often and have learned how to combat them.

feats.name: Parallel Breakthrough
feats.description: You expand your mind beyond your area of psychic specialty.

feats.name: Perfect Ki Adept
feats.description: You gain the appropriate ki spell for your School of Perfection.

feats.name: Perfect Truths
feats.description: Your knowledge of Razmir’s faith and doctrines has grown.

feats.name: Performative Weapons Training
feats.description: You're skilled with flashy weapons and can use them to great effect.

feats.name: Perpetual Scout
feats.description: You spot anything out of place in the areas you know best.

feats.name: Phalanx Breaker
feats.description: You know that to take out an enemy formation, you must punch a hole through its center.

feats.name: Phase Out
feats.description: Your eidolon phases out of reality slightly, gaining resistance to all damage (except force and negative) equal to half your level.

feats.name: Pirouette
feats.description: You twirl gracefully, spinning on one foot to evade your opponent's attack.

feats.name: Pistolero's Challenge
feats.description: With a stern call, carefully chosen barb, or some other challenging declaration, you demand your foe's attention in a duel.

feats.name: Piston Punch
feats.description: You lash out with a powerful punch, extending your dynamo to a greater length in order to attack two creatures in a row.

feats.name: Plague Rat
feats.description: Your bites carry a cursed infection.

feats.name: Poison Coat
feats.description: In nature, certain animals are covered in venomous spines, and just brushing against them can prove deadly.

feats.name: Poisoned Sticks and Stones
feats.description: You prepare your sling stones with small, edged grooves to enable them to deliver poison, and you have learned other techniques for poisoning your weapons.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Poisoned Sticks and Stones

feats.name: Polearm Tricks
feats.description: Your connection to rune magic has revealed tricks to make polearms deadlier in your hands.

feats.name: Polished Distraction
feats.description: You take pride in the sheen of your armor, and how useful it is at distracting your enemies when you reflect light from it.

feats.name: Powerful Lash
feats.description: You've learned to swing your lash ever faster and in wider arcs.

feats.name: Practiced Opposition
feats.description: You've battled more undead than you care to remember, often with little time to prepare between foes, forcing you to rely on experience and muscle memory to guide your blade.

feats.name: Precise Finisher
feats.description: Even when your foe avoids your Confident Finisher, you can still hit a vital spot.

feats.name: Predatory Claws
feats.description: Your nails grow into sharp claws, perfect for seizing and tearing your prey.

feats.name: Predictive Purchase
feats.description: You have just the thing for the situation.

feats.name: Primal Proportions
feats.description: You can mimic the sheer mass of the largest beasts.

feats.name: Propulsive Mutation
feats.description: Your ostilli can fire its dart farther.

feats.name: Psi Development
feats.description: You’ve found a new mental form

feats.name: Pure Legion Enforcer Dedication
feats.description: You are sworn to uphold the Laws of Mortality within the borders of Rahadoum.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pure Legion Enforcer Dedication U

feats.name: Quick Snares
feats.description: You can rig a snare in only moments.

feats.name: Rain-Scribe Sustenance
feats.description: You use the power of your Rain-Scribe magic to draw on a stream of primal power for sustenance.

feats.name: Rallying Charge
feats.description: Your fearless charge into battle reinvigorates your allies to carry on the fight.

feats.name: Rapid Manifestation
feats.description: Your unwavering soul brings up your defenses as soon as you're in danger.

feats.name: Reactive Strike
feats.description: You lash out at a foe that leaves an opening.

feats.name: Read the Dust
feats.description: You watch the creature or hazard as it collapses, careful for any sign it may return.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Read the Dust U

feats.name: Red Mantis School Spell
feats.description: You gain the Red Mantis magic school’s initial school spell.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Red Mantis School Spell

feats.name: Reflexive Shield
feats.description: You can use your shield to fend off explosions and the like.

feats.name: Relentless Disarm
feats.description: You have been trained to disarm foes.

feats.name: Reloading Trick
feats.description: You can fire off a single shot even when it seems like you are unprepared.

feats.name: Remote Trigger
feats.description: You've learned how to trigger snares from afar, creating ranged hazards to assail your opponents and allowing you to disarm enemies' snares harmlessly.

feats.name: Repeat Lesson
feats.description: Upon seeing your student falter, you demonstrate the proper technique.

feats.name: Repulse the Wicken
feats.description: You use your foe's failure as an opening to push them away.

feats.name: Resourceful Ritualist
feats.description: You can cast difficult rituals that might otherwise be just beyond your skill.

feats.name: Retaliating Rescue
feats.description: When an ally is in danger, you can hustle to reach them and punish the foe threatening them.

feats.name: Return Fire
feats.description: Snatching an arrow out of the air, you instantly put it to your bow and return fire.

feats.name: Revealing Stab
feats.description: You drive your piercing weapon into an imperceptible foe, revealing its location to your allies.

feats.name: Ricochet Stance (Fighter)
feats.description: You adopt a stance to rebound your thrown weapons toward you.

feats.name: Riddle the Sphinx
feats.description: You’ve learned the secrets of the sphinx’s riddles and empowered your ikon with them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Riddle the Sphinx U

feats.name: Ring their Bell
feats.description: Using your armor, you pummel a foe that isn't focused on you in the head or face to stagger them.

feats.name: Rising Hurricane
feats.description: A hurricane lifts your enemies into the air before bringing them crashing down in a bloody rain.

feats.name: Roaring Heart
feats.description: You surge forward inexorably.

feats.name: Rod of Rule
feats.description: Your personal rune is connected more closely to your arcane bond.

feats.name: Roiling Mudslide
feats.description: You form water and earth into a mudslide that smashes your opponents and coats them in mud.

feats.name: Rough Terrain Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance that makes it difficult to move around you.

feats.name: Rushing Boar
feats.description: You embrace the pain of the triggering attack, allowing it to drive you into a violent rush.

feats.name: Sacred Armaments
feats.description: Through the power of your faith or the blessing of a priest, your weapons are fully effective against incorporeal creatures.

feats.name: Safeguard Spell
feats.description: You are inured to the effects of your own spells.

feats.name: Sand Snatcher
feats.description: A figure of sand with grasping arms arises in an unoccupied square within 30 feet.

feats.name: Say that Again!
feats.description: The world is full of obnoxious weasels who think they can pull one over on you—put them in their place! When an adjacent creature attempts to Lie to you or to Demoralize you and gets a critical failure on the roll, you can use your reaction to make a Shove attempt against that opponent.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Say that Again! R

feats.name: Scatter Blast
feats.description: You pack your weapon with additional shot and powder, creating a risky but devastating wave of destruction.

feats.name: Scholarly Defense
feats.description: Your knowledge of strange creatures and their bizarre anatomy allows you to anticipate their physical attacks and reduce the damage you take from them.

feats.name: Scouring Rage
feats.description: You emit a powerful surge of instinctual energy when you unleash your anger.

feats.name: Scout's Speed
feats.description: You move faster, especially when traveling, allowing you to scout out ahead and report back without slowing your allies.

feats.name: Scrap Barricade
feats.description: Ragged pieces of metal weld together into a ramshackle structure.

feats.name: Scroll Esoterica
feats.description: Your esoterica includes scraps of scriptures, magic tomes, druidic markings, and the like, which you can use to create temporary scrolls.

feats.name: Scrollmaster Dedication
feats.description: Your experience chronicling adventures and discoveries grants you heightened discernment and memory.

feats.name: Second Shield
feats.description: You're used to your shield breaking in the middle of battle, and you're prepared to use a backup or any convenient nearby object to defend yourself.

feats.name: Selective Energy
feats.description: As you call down divine power, you can prevent some enemies from benefiting or some allies from being hurt.

feats.name: Share Burden
feats.description: You draw the misfortune or curse into yourself, potentially enabling you to enter your curse maelstrom state.

feats.name: Shatter Defenses
feats.description: Your offense exploits your enemy’s fear.

feats.name: Shield Wall
feats.description: You use your shield in tandem with an ally's, forming a barricade.

feats.name: Shield Warden
feats.description: When you have a shield raised, you can use your Shield Block reaction when an attack is made against an ally adjacent to you.

feats.name: Shield of Stone
feats.description: You stole a gorgon’s gaze and trapped it in your ikon.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Shield of Stone U

feats.name: Shielded Tome
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can magically fuse a shield into your favorite book, where it appears as an elaborate bookmark.

feats.name: Shove Down
feats.description: You leverage your weight to topple foes that you move.

feats.name: Siege Celerity
feats.description: You push yourself and your light mortar beyond your limits.

feats.name: Silk Bracelet
feats.description: Taking inspiration from Desna’s image as a giant silk moth in Tian Xia, you’ve attached a bracelet to your innovation that generates ultra-strong silk strands mixed with venom.

feats.name: Simple Crystal Magic
feats.description: You are capable of seeing magic as flowing runes and can scribe a personal rune that represents you.

feats.name: Sinbladed Spell
feats.description: You punctuate your spellcasting with a flourish of your weapon, imparting physical force to your magic.

feats.name: Siphon Magic
feats.description: You gorge upon the magical energies of your foe’s blood.

feats.name: Sixth Sense
feats.description: Your psychic abilities also allow you to detect the lingering thoughts of spirits and similar entities.

feats.name: Skirmish Strike
feats.description: Your feet and weapon move in tandem.

feats.name: Sky and Heaven Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance perfected by past champions of the Challenge of Sky and Heaven, allowing you to make jagged strikes like flashes of lightning through the sky.

feats.name: Sky and Heaven Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance allowing you to make jagged strikes like flashes of lightning through the sky.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Sky and Heaven Stance

feats.name: Slice and Swipe
feats.description: Steal from your target when you successfully strike them.

feats.name: Slinger's Readiness
feats.description: You've learned a gunslinger's tricks for staking out your territory in a fight.

feats.name: Slippery as an Eel
feats.description: You mimic the serpentine movements of an eel.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Slippery as an Eel

feats.name: Sly Disarm
feats.description: You can Disarm a creature through sleight of hand rather than brute force.

feats.name: Smite
feats.description: You single out one enemy to destroy in your deity's name.

feats.name: Snap Falling Fruit
feats.description: Your lash whips around to intercept projectiles.

feats.name: Snap Shot
feats.description: You can react with ranged weapons when a creature is in close quarters.

feats.name: Sniper's Aim
feats.description: You take an extra moment to carefully sync your aim and breathing, then fire a shot with great accuracy.

feats.name: Snowstep
feats.description: Snow and ice are no hindrance to you.

feats.name: Song of Marching
feats.description: You learn the song of marching composition cantrip, which enables you and your allies to cross vast distances without strain.

feats.name: Soul Arsenal
feats.description: Choose an additional soulforged armament of a different type than the type you already chose, and choose one essence power for it.

feats.name: Soul Bleed
feats.description: Your blade can rupture an enemy’s very soul, draining away its essence to empower you.

feats.name: Sound Mirror
feats.description: You twist not just the visual, but the auditory as well, allowing you to pass without a sound and create minor noises as distractions—perfect for misdirection and infiltration.

feats.name: Spear Dancer
feats.description: You favor weapons that allow you to lash out viciously while keeping enemies at bay, giving you an opportunity to strike without fear of reprisal.

feats.name: Spell Relay
feats.description: You open the power in your blood to your ally's spellcasting, using your magic to boost their range.

feats.name: Spellmaster Dedication
feats.description: As a Spellmaster, you are adept at identifying magic.

feats.name: Spinning Stand
feats.description: You flare your legs around, using the momentum to both lash out and return to a standing position.

feats.name: Spiral Sworn
feats.description: You trace a spiral in the air while intoning prayers to Pharasma, gaining her blessing for a time.

feats.name: Spirit of the Blade
feats.description: You charge your blade with spiritual energy, allowing it to cut through spirits and fiends with fearsome efficiency.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Spirit of the Blade

feats.name: Spirit's Absolution
feats.description: You purify a spirit by absolving it of its sins and regrets.

feats.name: Spirits' Interference
feats.description: You call forth protective spirits to ward off ranged attacks.

feats.name: Spiritual Secret
feats.description: You gain deeper insights into your patron’s abandoned power, allowing you to draw on that power more directly.

feats.name: Spiritual Sense
feats.description: You have a vague connection to the Ethereal Plane that enables you to notice spirits.

feats.name: Spiritual Strike
feats.description: Your spirit guide enhances your attacks with occult power.

feats.name: Split Slot
feats.description: You can prepare two spells in one slot, giving you the freedom to choose the spell when you cast it.

feats.name: Staff Sweep
feats.description: You sweep your foes away with your staff.

feats.name: Staggering Fire
feats.description: You've learned how to fire at enemies to slow them down, allowing innocents and fellow knights alike time to escape.

feats.name: Startling Appearance
feats.description: You can startle foes who are unaware of your presence.

feats.name: Steady Spellcasting
feats.description: You don’t lose spells easily. If a reaction would disrupt your spellcasting action, attempt a DC 15 flat check. If you succeed, your action isn’t disrupted.

feats.name: Stealthy as an Octopus
feats.description: You're an expert at using the dark of the ocean to conceal yourself.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Stealthy as an Octopus

feats.name: Steam Knight
feats.description: You shape your kinetic aura into swirling armor of steam that scalds your enemies and propels you on super-heated jet streams.

feats.name: Stella's Stab and Snag
feats.description: You dart towards your opponent, seeking to stab them and slice their purse-strings with a single movement.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Stella's Stab and Snag U

feats.name: Sticky Poison
feats.description: A combination of additional viscosity and careful application keeps your weapons poisoned even when suffering significant wear and tear.

feats.name: Stomp Ground
feats.description: You bring your booted foot down on the ground with enough force to rattle your foes.

feats.name: Stone Blood
feats.description: Your blood clots quickly.

feats.name: Stone Blood
feats.description: Your blood becomes thick and sluggish, but no less effective at oxygenating your cells.

feats.name: Stonebound Magic
feats.description: You've learned to manifest your connection to stone by conjuring it to your side.

feats.name: Stoney Deflection
feats.description: You gather the resiliency of stone to block attacks against you.

feats.name: Storm Retribution
feats.description: You lash out, directing a burst of storming fury toward a creature that has harmed you.

feats.name: Storming Breath
feats.description: You spit out a freezing breath or sonic scream. You deal 4d6 damage, plus 1d6 damage for every level you have beyond 6th, to all creatures in a 30-foot cone, with a basic Reflex save.

feats.name: Strain Mind
feats.description: You strain your body beyond its limits to use an amp even when your mental power is depleted.

feats.name: Stumbling Feint
feats.description: You lash out confusingly, with what seems to be a weak move, but instead allows you to unleash a dangerous flurry of blows upon your unsuspecting foe.

feats.name: Sun's Fury
feats.description: The Old Sun Gods have granted you a gift in your fight against Walkena.

feats.name: Sunbird Glare
feats.description: By keeping your feathers clean and sleek, you can catch the light across your wings to create a startling glare in the eyes of a creature within 20 feet.

feats.name: Sundown Street Posturing
feats.description: Whether in the salon or on the street, you've captured the attention of everyone around you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Sundown Street Posturing U

feats.name: Superior Propulsion
feats.description: By experimenting with the effects of momentum gained from your signature vehicle's movement, you have learned to get more from propulsion than just speed when the pilot pushes the vehicle to its limit.

feats.name: Surface Tension
feats.description: You encase the pieces of your broken weapon together with water you pull from the surrounding environment.

feats.name: Surprise Strike
feats.description: Whenever you make a Strike with an improvised weapon against a creature that hasn't observed you making a Strike using an improvised weapon or that is otherwise ignorant of your skill with improvised weapons, the creature is off-guard against you for that Strike.

feats.name: Swashbuckler's Riposte
feats.description: You’ve learned to riposte against ill-conceived attacks.

feats.name: Sweeping Fan Block
feats.description: You leap up on one leg, snapping your fans open alongside your head before sweeping them across your body.

feats.name: Swift Guardian
feats.description: When danger appears, you quickly send away your active companion and call in a different animal ally.

feats.name: Swift Intervention
feats.description: You're burdened with noticing potential threats at all times.

feats.name: Swift Support
feats.description: Nidalese horses are known as some of the fastest across all Golarion, and your mount has trained to ride quickly into battle.

feats.name: Swift Tracker
feats.description: Your keen eyes catch signs of passage even when you’re moving.

feats.name: Sword-light Wave
feats.description: You channel spiritual energy through your weapon, unleashing it as a torrent of devastating power.

feats.name: Swordmaster Dedication
feats.description: Your Swords training taught you to never lose hold of your weapon.

feats.name: Sympathetic Vulnerabilities
feats.description: When you apply your will to invoke a vulnerability, the result is more powerful, and the vulnerability ripples out in a web from your main target to affect a broader range of creatures.

feats.name: Syu Tak-Nwa's Deadly Hair
feats.description: Your hair deals increased damage and can grapple.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Syu Tak-Nwa's Deadly Hair U

feats.name: Tactical Guidance
feats.description: You can provide tactical guidance to help your follower act more efficiently.

feats.name: Talon's Mark
feats.description: On the rare occasions that Twilight Talons need to identify themselves as members of the organization, many rely on an easily concealed tattoo to reveal their allegiance.

feats.name: Tandem Strike
feats.description: You and your eidolon each attack, seamlessly targeting the same foe without interfering with each other's movements.

feats.name: Tap Vitality
feats.description: You tap into the entity's life force to heal your wounds, though at the cost of the entity's personality bleeding into your own.

feats.name: Targeted Redirection
feats.description: You aim a shot at your spotter, intending for your spotter to redirect that shot off their own weapon or shield to hit your foe from a better angle, and avoid your foe's cover.

feats.name: Tempest Cloud's Speed
feats.description: You and your familiar coordinate to channel elemental air.

feats.name: Tempest-Sun Redirection
