feats.description: If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell from your spell slots that damages other creatures, you can bend some of that spell’s offensive energy, protecting allies in the area and boosting your own defenses against certain foes.

feats.name: Tenacious Endurance
feats.description: You encourage your companion to refuse to yield, against even the mightiest of foes.

feats.name: Thorough Research
feats.description: You have comprehensive knowledge in your fields of interest.

feats.name: Three Clear Breaths
feats.description: Through your disciplined condensations and circulations of qi, you’ve caught a fleeting glimpse of cultivation’s promise, and your health has handsomely profited along the way.

feats.name: Thunder Clap
feats.description: You slam your hands together to unleash a deafening blast.

feats.name: Tiger Slash
feats.description: You make a fierce swipe with both hands.

feats.name: Time Mage Dedication
feats.description: You might be a novice in the temporal arts now, but in the future, you'll hold time in the palm of your hand.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Time Mage Dedication U

feats.name: Toppling Transformation
feats.description: You use your body's expansion as leverage to displace a nearby creature.

feats.name: Torrent in the Blood
feats.description: A healing wave splashes across creatures in a 30-foot cone, its cleansing water driving afflictions from the body.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Torrent in the Blood H

feats.name: Tree of Duality
feats.description: An ephemeral tree bursts forth, floating on air in an unoccupied square of your choice within 60 feet.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Tree of Duality H

feats.name: Triggerbrand Salvo
feats.description: You slice, stab, or batter your opponent with the melee portion of your combination weapon before pulling the trigger at point-blank range.

feats.name: Triple Shot
feats.description: You can quickly fire multiple shots with greater control.

feats.name: Twist The Knife
feats.description: After stabbing your opponent in a weak spot, you tear the wound open.

feats.name: Two-Element Infusion
feats.description: Slamming one element into another, you combine their strengths.

feats.name: Unbalancing Appearance
feats.description: When you attack from the shadows, your foes are thrown off balance.

feats.name: Uneasy Rest
feats.description: When you cast sleep, you can modify the spell to make subjects of your spell experience troubled dreams.

feats.name: Unfettering Strike
feats.description: With a damaging blow, you cause a foe to loosen their grip on an ally they're holding down.

feats.name: Unnerving Prowess
feats.description: Your incredible skill with your blade unnerves your foes.

feats.name: Unstable Gearshift
feats.description: You shift your body into a higher gear, your speed compounding further and further.

feats.name: Upset Balance
feats.description: You lean into your foe's attack, using the weight of your body and armor to send them reeling.

feats.name: Urgent Upwelling
feats.description: Defeat lets you to tap into your wellspring.

feats.name: Uzunjati Storytelling
feats.description: You tell a quick story or begin telling a longer tale.

feats.name: Vacate Vision
feats.description: You cause your eyes to liquefy and run out of your eye sockets, leaving them empty.

feats.name: Vaulting Gallop
feats.description: You've trained your mount to vault over obstacles at high speeds.

feats.name: Vengeance Strike
feats.description: You lash out at the foe who dared to attack you.

feats.name: Vengeful Spirit Deck
feats.description: You manifest a ghostly deck of harrow cards.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Vengeful Spirit Deck U

feats.name: Verbose Distraction
feats.description: You talk so much it can be distracting to your enemies and you’re often quick to remind your enemies that you’re just a little guy!

feats.name: Verduran Ambush
feats.description: You prepare to ambush a foe.

feats.name: Vexing Tumble
feats.description: You tumble around your foes, expertly avoiding their reactions.

feats.name: Vision of Foresight
feats.description: You use your daydreams to predict the success of actions, rapidly envisioning the possibilities.

feats.name: Visual Fidelity
feats.description: You've found a way to use a hodgepodge combination of devices to enhance your visual abilities in every situation.

feats.name: Volatile Grease
feats.description: When you cast grease, you can modify it to cover a creature in flammable grease.

feats.name: Volcanic Escape
feats.description: Lava reflexively explodes underneath you and the creature that hurt you.

feats.name: Voluminous Vials
feats.description: Your number of versatile vials per day increases to 5.

feats.name: War Rider Stance
feats.description: Your dragon’s constant breath threatens your foes.

feats.name: Warding Rune
feats.description: Your runes provide a warding effect that protects you against a specific school of magic.

feats.name: Watch This!
feats.description: A common saying among Firebrands is, “There's always a fool who thinks they can do it better—and they're often right.” You verbally commit to using an action on your next turn to make a melee Strike against the same enemy your ally has missed.

feats.name: Watch Your Back
feats.description: You menace the target, stoking their fears and drawing their attention.

feats.name: Water Step
feats.description: You can Stride across liquid and surfaces that don't support your weight.

feats.name: Weight of Stone
feats.description: A packed cloud of thundering boulders descends from the sky, beating down everyone in its path.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Weight of Stone H

feats.name: Westyr's Wayfinder Repository
feats.description: You can use your wayfinder to store a little extra magic for when you need it most.

feats.name: Wheeling Grab
feats.description: You cartwheel on your claws, dancing over your foes.

feats.name: Whirling Throw
feats.description: You propel your enemy away.

feats.name: Wild Speech
feats.description: Your connection to the denizens of the wilds grows ever stronger, and you find yourself able to speak with animals like you would in your native tongue.

feats.name: Wild Witch's Armaments
feats.description: Your patron's power continues to enhance your natural offensive capabilities.

feats.name: Wisteria-and-Peony Reunion
feats.description: Your roots of qi stand firm, shaking off pains and aches like the returning flowers and leaves shed during winter’s snow.

feats.name: Witch's Charge
feats.description: You forge a magical link with another creature, granting you awareness of that creature’s condition and creating a conduit for spellcasting.

feats.name: Wolf Drag
feats.description: You rip your enemy off their feet.

feats.name: Wombat Bastion
feats.description: You make a quick attack before retreating to safety.

feats.name: Wooden Palisade
feats.description: Planks of wood, embellished with carvings, spring forth to form a wall.

feats.name: Worm's Feast
feats.description: You call forth a brood of infantile cave worms to feast on your enemy's flesh.

feats.name: Wounded Party
feats.description: Harm to either you or your allies awakens your fury.

feats.name: Xidao Sea Mine Drop
feats.description: You’ve rigged your armor innovation with a gizmo that can safely synthesize two sea mines a day, holding them in a protected compartment.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Xidao Sea Mine Drop U

feats.name: Zealous Inevitability
feats.description: You channel your zeal through a sacred weapon, bringing a foe closer to their demise.

feats.name: Advanced First Aid
feats.description: Use First Aid to reduce frightened and sickened condition values

feats.name: Aerobatics Mastery
feats.description: You move with grace in flight and can perform amazing aerial stunts.

feats.name: Ashen Veil
feats.description: By smearing ash or tainted earth over your skin and armor, you shroud yourself from the dead.

feats.name: Battle Cry
feats.description: Demoralizes foes when you roll for initiative

feats.name: Battle Prayer
feats.description: Calling out to your deity, you recite scripture to harm a foe

feats.name: Beautiful Knifework
feats.description: You perform surgical adjustments to disguise a willing ally or your construct companion.

feats.name: Biographical Eye
feats.description: In even a brief conversation or social interaction, you pick up on subtle social and visual cues to learn a great deal about a person's origin and history.

feats.name: Bizarre Magic
feats.description: Your magic becomes more difficult to identify

feats.name: Bless Tonic
feats.description: You channel positive energy into restoratives that ward against harm

feats.name: Bless Toxin
feats.description: You pour negative energy into toxins you create to further debilitate your targets

feats.name: Bloodsense
feats.description: You’re extraordinarily sensitive to the presence of blood.

feats.name: Break Curse
feats.description: Use your knowledge to break curses

feats.name: Chronocognizance
feats.description: The flows and ebbs of time are obvious to you, as are the tangles that form when it's distorted.

feats.name: Consult the Spirits
feats.description: You have learned rites or meditations that enable you to perceive minor, invisible spirits within a place.

feats.name: Disturbing Knowledge
feats.description: You utter a litany of dreadful names, prophecies, and descriptions of realms beyond mortal comprehension, drawn from your study of forbidden tomes and scrolls.

feats.name: Doublespeak
feats.description: You're skilled at saying one thing and meaning something different.

feats.name: Efficient Controls
feats.description: By reducing redundant systems and streamlining essential functions, you have made it easier for the vehicle to operate with fewer crew.

feats.name: Entourage
feats.description: You have a small group of admirers who tend to follow you around while you’re in civilized settlements.

feats.name: Environmental Grace
feats.description: You rapidly adapt to environments through a combination of skill, meditation, and divine grace

feats.name: Environmental Guide
feats.description: You can rapidly adapt to climates and help others do the same.

feats.name: Evangelize
feats.description: You point out a detail that incontrovertibly supports your faith, causing a listener's mind to whirl.

feats.name: Expeditious Search
feats.description: Search areas in half the time

feats.name: Expert Disassembly
feats.description: You can apply the same techniques you use to reverse engineer objects to disable dangerous traps and break apart locks.

feats.name: Explosive Entry
feats.description: You know exactly how to make a memorable entrance.

feats.name: Fabricated Connections
feats.description: You can lie about having taken an action so convincingly that you acquire all the tangible benefits of having successfully completed it.

feats.name: Fabricated Credentials
feats.description: You're so familiar with the paperwork necessary to maintain your cover that you can easily whip up documents that support your fabrications.

feats.name: Foil Senses
feats.description: Take precautions against special senses

feats.name: Free and Fair
feats.description: Use New Leadership and other activities more efficiently

feats.name: Go With the Flow
feats.description: You have an occult connection to the world that helps you blend in with the cacophony of life around you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Go With the Flow U

feats.name: Graceful Leaper
feats.description: Mass and muscle are meaningless when you propel yourself through the air; only grace and balance matter.

feats.name: Grudging Compliment
feats.description: Every Firebrand can recognize the skill of others, but you've turned it into an art you can wield in combat.

feats.name: Impeccable Crafting
feats.description: Craft items more efficiently

feats.name: Inflame Crowd
feats.description: Your performances are a call to action for the crowds who listen to you.

feats.name: Influence Nature
feats.description: With patience and time, you can make bird calls, leave game trails, and ultimately influence the behavior of a certain type of animals in the region to favor and even aid you in the days to come.

feats.name: Kip Up
feats.description: Stand up for free without triggering reactions

feats.name: Master of Apprentice
feats.description: Teaching is a difficult art form, but you've gotten a pretty good handle on it.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Master of Apprentice U

feats.name: Monster Crafting
feats.description: Craft items using monster parts

feats.name: Morphic Manipulation
feats.description: You've attuned your natural aura to that of plant life, coaxing it to grow faster than normal.

feats.name: Muscle Mimicry
feats.description: Your study of another allows you to mirror their movements subtly, even in the heat of combat.

feats.name: Numb to Death
feats.description: Your past has left you numb to death's call.

feats.name: Paragon Battle Medicine
feats.description: You've learned the modern uses of Battle Medicine originated by Kassi Aziril.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Paragon Battle Medicine U

feats.name: Party Crasher
feats.description: You attend all the fashionable society parties, no matter how exclusive they might be.

feats.name: Petal District Socialite
feats.description: Through your experience with the many parties held nightly in clubs and estates within the Petal District, you understand the way rumors and gossip circulate during social events.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Petal District Socialite U

feats.name: Planar Survival
feats.description: Use Survival to Subsist on different planes

feats.name: Prepare Papers
feats.description: You're practiced at creating forgeries that establish your outlaw credentials or augment your legal authority.

feats.name: Prescient Consumable
feats.description: Procure consumable items with Prescient Planner

feats.name: Propeller Attachment
feats.description: You've mastered attaching clockwork propellers to your daily quick-deploy snares that use gears.

feats.name: Push it
feats.description: You can push your vehicle's performance beyond the limits envisioned by its makers.

feats.name: Quality of Life
feats.description: Cost of living expenses are reduced

feats.name: Quick Change
feats.description: You can shift between your identities with ease.

feats.name: Quick Climb
feats.description: Climb swiftly

feats.name: Quick Recognition
feats.description: Identify spells as a free action

feats.name: Quick Setup
feats.description: You have learned to setup simple crafting jobs with ease.

feats.name: Quick Swim
feats.description: Swim quickly

feats.name: Quick Unlock
feats.description: Pick a Lock with 1 action

feats.name: Rapid Affixture
feats.description: You take only 1 minute to Affix a Talisman.

feats.name: Read Shibboleths
feats.description: All communication is filled with slight tells and signals.

feats.name: Sacred Defense
feats.description: You call upon your deity to grant you their protective blessing

feats.name: Scholastic Identification
feats.description: You have the knowledge needed to understand ancient texts and cultural artifacts.

feats.name: Shameless Request
feats.description: Make Requests of others with lesser consequences

feats.name: Signature Crafting
feats.description: Magic items you create bear a stamp specific to your handiwork.

feats.name: Skeptic's Defense
feats.description: You don't believe in any mental twaddle, and you're certainly not afraid of it.

feats.name: Slippery Secrets
feats.description: Evade attempts to uncover your true nature

feats.name: Speech of the Mammoth Lords
feats.description: You've learned the ancient tongue spoken by the creatures of the far north.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Speech of the Mammoth Lords

feats.name: Subjective Truth
feats.description: Your disparate identities allow you to defeat magic that detects lies.

feats.name: Supertaster
feats.description: You have refined your palate and have a discerning sense of taste that can detect abnormalities in the flavor and texture of food and beverages.

feats.name: Swift Sneak
feats.description: Move your full Speed while you Sneak

feats.name: Talent Envy
feats.description: You give off a bedazzling glow with every performance, sparking feelings of severe envy and inadequacy in those who compare their talent to yours.

feats.name: Temperature Adjustment
feats.description: You learn Hwan temperature classifications for the elements—wood and water are cold elements, while fire, earth, and metal are hot elements.

feats.name: Terrified Retreat
feats.description: Cause foes you Demoralize to flee

feats.name: That was a Close One, Huh?
feats.description: You laugh innocently about the inexplicable luck of your last shot hitting its mark or how close the attack that just missed you came to taking your head off, causing your foes to second guess whether it's a good idea to oppose you in battle.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard That was a Close One, Huh?

feats.name: Tumbling Theft
feats.description: You reach for an opponent's item as you move past a foe.

feats.name: Vanish into The Land
feats.description: You’re adept at using the land’s natural features to find places to hide.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Vanish into The Land U

feats.name: Voice Cold as Death
feats.description: Channeling the energy of the Crimson Oath into your voice, you pronounce a threat in a tone so icy it freezes the blood.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Voice Cold as Death

feats.name: Wall Jump
feats.description: Jump off walls

feats.name: Water Sprint
feats.description: Experience and training have taught you that water has just enough surface tension for a master sprinter to traverse the surface.

feats.name: A Little Bird Told Me...
feats.description: You transform into a small bird, such as a finch or a sparrow, allowing you to eavesdrop on others and gain information you wouldn’t otherwise be able to acquire.

feats.name: A Tale to Believe In
feats.description: You recite a tale of prowess that rewrites the combat unfolding around you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard A Tale to Believe In

feats.name: Able Ritualist
feats.description: Your readings on rituals make you a skilled participant.

feats.name: Accompany
feats.description: You use your performance to supplement an ally’s spellcasting, providing magical energy for their spell in their stead.

feats.name: Accurate Swing
feats.description: You strike cleanly with wide, sweeping attacks to inflict maximum damage

feats.name: Accursed Magic
feats.description: When the curse within you spills out, you can lay curses on others and claim them for yourself with ease.

feats.name: Accursed Touch
feats.description: You've learned to harness the supernatural curse that animates you, imbuing your most powerful attacks with a terrible curse.

feats.name: Achaekek's Grip
feats.description: You sense if a creature you have slain in the last year has been restored to life

feats.name: Acquired Tolerance
feats.description: A small amount of poison taken at nonlethal doses, can help the body build up resistance against a more deadly dosage.

feats.name: Adamantine Body
feats.description: With your strong will and even stronger body, you shrug off an otherwise devastating blow.

feats.name: Additional Ikon
feats.description: Your story has grown rich enough that three ikons can’t contain its full complexity.

feats.name: Advanced Deific Power
feats.description: Like a muscle, the more you flex your divine power, the stronger it gets.

feats.name: Advanced Deity's Domain
feats.description: Through your conviction, you have glimpsed the deeper secrets of your deity's domain.

feats.name: Advanced Domain
feats.description: Your prayers have unlocked deeper secrets of your deity’s domain.

feats.name: Advanced Hallowed Spell
feats.description: You dig deeper into the magical tools found in wizard schools and divine domains.

feats.name: Advanced School Spell
feats.description: You gain access to the advanced teachings of your arcane institution, learning a powerful new school spell.

feats.name: Alter Admixture
feats.description: Sometimes, you need to adapt your alchemical mixtures to new situations.

feats.name: Ambushing Knockdown
feats.description: You emerge from hiding and deliver a blow that can knock an enemy sprawling to the ground.

feats.name: Animal Rage
feats.description: You transform into your animal.

feats.name: Animalistic Brutality
feats.description: You deepen the connection into your animal instincts.

feats.name: Anthemic Performance
feats.description: Your music, speech, or other performance inspires your allies to dive into battle.

feats.name: Apparition Magic
feats.description: You can cast more divine spells each day.

feats.name: Apparition's Reflection
feats.description: Your apparition infuses your body with additional power.

feats.name: Arcane Breadth
feats.description: Your thorough studies allow you to cast more arcane spells each day.

feats.name: Archaeologist's Luck
feats.description: You are more than just skillful; your drive to find the secrets of the past manifests as a strange kind of luck.

feats.name: Archer's Aim
feats.description: You slow down, focus, and take a careful shot.

feats.name: Armed and Armored
feats.description: You're used to juggling defensive equipment and your firearms.

feats.name: Armiger's Mobility
feats.description: You’ve learned how best to move in heavy armor.

feats.name: Armored Rebuff
feats.description: You rebuff puny attacks with your armor, knocking back your foe.

feats.name: Armored Resistance
feats.description: While you are wearing medium or heavy armor, you gain resistance to physical damage equal to half your character level when you use the Intercept Attack reaction to take damage instead of your ally.

feats.name: Aroden's Innovation
feats.description: As befits the god of humanity and innovation, Aroden left teachings that continue to inspire.

feats.name: As a Thousand Soldiers
feats.description: Though you may have stolen from the hive, you’ve nothing but respect for the armies guarding it, and you borrow their strength to overwhelm your foes.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited As a Thousand Soldiers U

feats.name: Attuned Stride
feats.description: You can move freely through terrain you're attuned to.

feats.name: Back to Back
feats.description: You excel at watching your allies’ backs and helping them watch yours.

feats.name: Basic Beast Gunner Spellcasting
feats.description: You've unlocked the first secrets of beast guns, granting you the power of their synergistic magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Basic Beast Gunner Spellcasting

feats.name: Basic Eldritch Archer Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Basic Eldritch Archer Spellcasting

feats.name: Basic Modification
feats.description: You've learned to modify your innovation in order to enhance its capabilities beyond what an ordinary piece of equipment can accomplish.

feats.name: Battle Hymn to the Lost
feats.description: Your movements in combat are an artistic dirge to those spirits who could not fight to see another day.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Battle Hymn to the Lost

feats.name: Beacon Mark
feats.description: When you cast sigil, you can modify the spell to allow you to determine the target's location.

feats.name: Behold My Creation!
feats.description: You have rebuilt your creation once more.

feats.name: Benefactor's Wings
feats.description: Calling on your draconic gift, spectral wings carry you to your destination.

feats.name: Black Powder Blaze
feats.description: You learn to take advantage of every shot, flying across the battlefield with the help of your weapon's recoil.

feats.name: Bleeding Finisher
feats.description: Your blow inflicts profuse bleeding.

feats.name: Blessed Spell
feats.description: When you focus your magic on an ally, you can remove harmful conditions.

feats.name: Blind-Fight
feats.description: Your battle instincts make you more aware of concealed and invisible opponents.

feats.name: Bloodline Breadth
feats.description: Your repertoire expands, and you can cast more spells of your bloodline’s tradition each day.

feats.name: Bloodline Resistance
feats.description: Your magical blood makes you more resistant to magic.

feats.name: Boarding Party
feats.description: You're practiced at scaling ships, and even a wet and slippery exterior won't stand in your way.

feats.name: Bolster Ally
feats.description: You shout encouragement to your embattled ally.

feats.name: Bond Conservation
feats.description: By efficiently and carefully manipulating the arcane energies unleashed by your bonded item, you can conserve just enough power to cast another spell, though this second spell is slightly weaker.

feats.name: Bonds of Death
feats.description: You sway with the motions of your spells that animate the dead, channeling your power to sustain two at the same time.

feats.name: Boost Summons
feats.description: Augmenting your eidolon extends to creatures you summon.

feats.name: Brain Drain
feats.description: With a wresting of will, you siphon off a creature's mental energy to replenish your own.

feats.name: Bravo's Determination
feats.description: Your confidence borders on self-delusion, but it keeps you going against overwhelming odds.

feats.name: Breath of the Dragon
feats.description: You can use a powerful breath weapon, much like the dragon you emulate.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Breath of the Dragon

feats.name: Bullet Split
feats.description: You carefully align your weapon with the edge of your blade, splitting the projectile in two as you fire to attack two different targets.

feats.name: Bullseye
feats.description: You carefully take aim to avoid your foe’s concealment and cover.

feats.name: Call Gun
feats.description: You build a powerful magical connection with a chosen gun or crossbow, gaining the ability to conjure it directly to your hand from any distant location.

feats.name: Call Ursine Ally
feats.description: You can cast a 3rd-rank summon animal as an innate spell, but only to summon a black bear.

feats.name: Call Your Shot
feats.description: When you successfully Play to the Crowd, add the following to the list of benefits you can choose from: A creature you can see within 30 feet becomes frightened 2.

feats.name: Call and Response
feats.description: Your composition takes the form of a call-and-response chant that lets your allies continue the effect without you.

feats.name: Call the Hurricane
feats.description: Massive waves spiral around you, with you as the eye of the hurricane.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Call the Hurricane H

feats.name: Calm and Centered
feats.description: Your occult connection to the world helps you deal with being frightened or stupefied.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Calm and Centered U

feats.name: Can't You See?
feats.description: The eye rebels, the mind recoils—no matter how much those who can see you try to explain what's there, their friends' gazes just skitter over you, like a bird afraid to land.

feats.name: Capture Magic
feats.description: When you resist a spell, you capture some of its magic for your own use.

feats.name: Carried with the Swarm
feats.description: When your swarm is sharing your space and Strides, you can choose to have your swarm carry you with it.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Carried with the Swarm

feats.name: Chaining Mutation
feats.description: The dart fired by your ostilli can ricochet to strike another creature.

feats.name: Challenge Insight
feats.description: Your deep grasp of the mystical lets you know exactly what to say to make others doubt how well they understand the source of their own power.

feats.name: Chaotic Spell
feats.description: Your foe can hardly predict and counter your moves if you yourself have no idea what will happen.

feats.name: Chronomancer's Secrets
feats.description: The secrets of time peel back, revealing deeper truths.

feats.name: Clinging Shadows Initiate
feats.description: You learn a mystical stance that transforms your qi into sticky smoke that shrouds your limbs.

feats.name: Clue Them All In
feats.description: You can clue in all your allies at once.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Clue Them All In

feats.name: Commitment to Valor
feats.description: While fear might distract you from your duty, it'll never cause you to abandon it.

feats.name: Conductive Sphere
feats.description: A floating metal ball forms in a space within 30 feet, flashing with electricity.

feats.name: Constricting Hold
feats.description: Your eidolon constricts the creature, dealing bludgeoning damage equal to your eidolon's level plus its Strength modifier, with a basic Fortitude save against your spell DC.

feats.name: Controlled Blast
feats.description: You maximize the effectiveness of your explosives by controlling every possible parameter of the blast meticulously.

feats.name: Cornered Animal
feats.description: You become more dangerous when surrounded by enemies.

feats.name: Counter Curse
feats.description: You gather the energy of your maelstrom and fling its unleashed power into the enemy's curse, attempting to neutralize it.

feats.name: Countercharm
feats.description: Your enchantments and illusions are so dominant that you can use them to counteract similar magic cast by others.

feats.name: Creed Magic
feats.description: You’ve expanded your divine capabilities, granting you magic that better supports your combat focus.

feats.name: Cremate Undead
feats.description: Your overwhelming vitality sets undead alight.

feats.name: Crossblooded Evolution
feats.description: Odd interactions in your bloodline provide you with unexpected effects.

feats.name: Crosscurrent Counter
feats.description: You counter the creature with the power of elemental water, a tendril of it encasing your limb or weapon.

feats.name: Crude Communication
feats.description: Even if you don’t speak a creature’s language, you can rely on inflection, root words, and body language to infer rudimentary meaning.

feats.name: Cruel Piercing
feats.description: You learn to impale your targets.

feats.name: Cultivator's Keen Eye
feats.description: Attuned to all arrangements of qi, you gain lifesense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet.

feats.name: Cursed Effigy
feats.description: After your attack, you grab a bit of blood, cut hair, or other piece of the creature's body.

feats.name: Cyclonic Ascent
feats.description: Whorls of wind surround your lower body, forming a cyclone that lifts you into the air.

feats.name: Dark Persona's Presence
feats.description: When you Unleash your Psyche, all your rage and pain—the portion of your psyche dedicated to cruel retribution—come along with it.

feats.name: Deadly Aim
feats.description: You aim for your prey’s weak spots, making your shot more challenging but dealing more damage if you hit.

feats.name: Deadly Butterfly
feats.description: You gain access to the butterfly sword's critical specialization effect.

feats.name: Deadly Mutation
feats.description: The dart fired by your ostilli is more dangerous.

feats.name: Death from Above
feats.description: You leap down on your target, using their body to cushion your fall and your momentum to empower your attack.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Death from Above U

feats.name: Debilitating Dichotomy
feats.description: You reveal a glimpse of the impossible conflicts between the divine anathema behind your curse, forcing you to reckon with another's conflicts as well.

feats.name: Deceptive Deduction
feats.description: You've had to take on many roles while working undercover, so you're practiced at following the example of those around you to pretend expertise in a variety of fields.

feats.name: Deeper Dabbler
feats.description: With some streamlining to your process and a deeper collection of <%CONSUMABLES%19%> talisman <%END> materials, you make a greater number of talismans every day.

feats.name: Defensive Stratagem
feats.description: By scrutinizing a foe, you learn how to better avoid its attacks.

feats.name: Defiant Banner
feats.description: You vigorously wave your banner to remind yourself and your allies that you can and must endure.

feats.name: Deimatic Display
feats.description: Imitating animal threat displays, you make yourself appear larger and more imposing.

feats.name: Delay Trap
feats.description: You try to jam the workings of a trap to delay its effects.

feats.name: Disarming Assault
feats.description: You attack with enough force to knock the weapon out of your foe's hands.

feats.name: Dismal Harvest
feats.description: The expiring breaths of your enemies fuel your power.

feats.name: Dismounting Strike
feats.description: You leap from your horse, using the momentum of its movement to deal a devastating blow with your melee weapon.

feats.name: Disorienting Opening
feats.description: You use your foes’ openings to expose even greater weaknesses.

feats.name: Distracting Toss
feats.description: You toss one weapon into the air as a distraction as you throw another.

feats.name: Diverse Recognition
feats.description: Your Pathfinder training allows you to quickly size up numerous threats.

feats.name: Divine Breadth
feats.description: As your understanding increases, your god grants you more divine spells each day.

feats.name: Divine Healing
feats.description: Although you aren't a proper champion of your faith, your deity still recognizes your efforts and provides you with a small divine ability to help others.

feats.name: Dream Magic
feats.description: You learn dream-related magic to aid your studies.

feats.name: Drifting Pollen
feats.description: A haze of pollen floats around you.

feats.name: Drive Back
feats.description: You push the enemy back and attempt to intercede between the foe and your ally.

feats.name: Dual Finisher
feats.description: You split your attacks.

feats.name: Dualistic Synergy
feats.description: If your next action is to Cast a Spell from your spell slots, you gain a benefit.

feats.name: Dueling Riposte
feats.description: You elegantly counterattack against your flailing enemy.

feats.name: Duo's Aim
feats.description: With assistance from your spotter, you aim for an especially accurate attack.

feats.name: Ears of the Forest
feats.description: Beyond relying on your own senses, you keep an ear open for nearby creatures for help in exploring your surroundings.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ears of the Forest

feats.name: Eclectic Skill
feats.description: Your broad experiences translate to a range of skills.

feats.name: Edict of Mortality
feats.description: You recite an excerpt of the Laws of Mortality, often the first law: “Let no mortal be beholden to a god.” Attempt an Intimidation check against all enemies within 60 feet that worship a deity, comparing your result against each target's Will DC.

feats.name: Eerie Environs
feats.description: The natural world can be scary to those not used to it—and you make it scarier still.

feats.name: Eerie Traces
feats.description: The tracks you leave behind are strange, somehow disconcerting and unnerving—they might travel backward, or through places no one would think to pass through.

feats.name: Efficient Rituals
feats.description: You can perform particularly extensive rituals in less time.

feats.name: Elaborate Talisman Esoterica
feats.description: As you continue to collect talismanic esoterica, you improve your ability to create temporary talismans.

feats.name: Elemental Overlap
feats.description: Though you've dedicated yourself to one element, you learn to mix that element with another.

feats.name: Elude the Divine
feats.description: You are able to escape inquisitions involving divine magic, allowing you to blend in well in Mzali but also to avoid unwanted attention in other oppressive theocracies.

feats.name: Emblazon Energy
feats.description: With elemental forces, you make your emblazoned symbols more potent.

feats.name: Enchanting Shot
feats.description: With a single whisper carried on the wind, you enchant your ammunition to make a foe more vulnerable to your attacks.

feats.name: Energy Resistance
feats.description: Your eidolon has stronger resistance.

feats.name: Enhanced Psychopomp Familiar
feats.description: Your psychopomp's continued service in Pharasma's name brings it favor from the goddess.

feats.name: Environmental Adaptability
feats.description: Having experienced the harshest environs that nature has to offer, your body is able to adapt to intense heat and cold.

feats.name: Equitable Defense
feats.description: Gritting your teeth through the pain, you position yourself to counterattack.

feats.name: Explosion of Power
feats.description: Your magic explodes.

feats.name: Exude Demonic Corruption
feats.description: Most of the changes from the demon within you have harmed you so far, but you've found a way to expel some of the corruption within you to poison others.

feats.name: Faithful Stride
feats.description: Confident in your faith, you Command an Animal to order your mount to Stride up to twice its Speed (or up to three times its Speed if you used 3 actions for Faithful Stride).

feats.name: Familiar Form
feats.description: You can use your magic to transform into a small creature of a type that commonly serves as a spellcaster's familiar, potentially allowing you to safely scout for your party while retaining a degree of spellcasting ability.

feats.name: Familiar Ritualist
feats.description: Your familiar’s magical presence can serve as an aspect of a ritual.

feats.name: Feathered Flechettes
feats.description: Unfurling your wings in a quick snap, you send feathers scattering in all directions.

feats.name: Feline Dance
feats.description: You fluidly move between stances in the process of dodging.

feats.name: Felling Strike
feats.description: Your attack can ground an airborne foe.

feats.name: Feral Mending
feats.description: You can heal your wounds while reshaping your flesh.

feats.name: Ferocious Shape
feats.description: You’ve mastered the shape of dinosaurs.

feats.name: Fey Caller
feats.description: You have learned some of the tricks the fey use to bend primal magic toward illusions and trickery.

feats.name: Fey's Trickery
feats.description: You connect with the fey trickster within yourself to momentarily vanish from sight.

feats.name: Fiery Retort
feats.description: Ignoring your pain, you sear your attacker with a wave of flame.

feats.name: Flamboyant Cruelty
feats.description: You love to kick your enemies when they're down, and you look fabulous when you do.

feats.name: Flashing Shield
feats.description: Your shield flares with holy light as you block the attack, searing the undead with the power of your faith.

feats.name: Flashy Roll
feats.description: You can use Flashy Dodge before attempting a Reflex save, in addition to its original trigger.

feats.name: Flensing Slice
feats.description: When you hit with both attacks with Double Slice, you flense the target, making it bleed and creating a weak spot.

feats.name: Flickering Stories
feats.description: Stories, like fires, can create shadows as much as they illuminate.

feats.name: Floral Restoration
feats.description: You request that nearby plants share their vitality with you to replenish your body and magic.

feats.name: Follow-up Assault
feats.description: Even in the face of failure you press the attack, determined to succeed.

feats.name: Foolproof Instructions
feats.description: You feel confident that you can explain your scrolls so well that even your allies can use them.

feats.name: Forgotten Presence
feats.description: The world conspires to keep you forgotten and unnoticed— memories cloud, ink stains out your name in ledgers, and portraits of you crack and warp over your face.

feats.name: Form Retention
feats.description: You have trained your mind and body to tolerate polymorph magic for longer periods of time, so long as you prepare for the change appropriately.

feats.name: Fortified Flesh
feats.description: Your flesh is resistent to physical damage.

feats.name: Fortissimo Composition
feats.description: Your anthems grow louder and more potent, bolstered by your muse’s power.

feats.name: Forward Gaze into Life
feats.description: Despite the constant cold of death at your back, you keep your gaze forward into the realm of life.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Forward Gaze into Life U

feats.name: Friendly Toss
feats.description: You toss your friends around the battlefield.

feats.name: Frozen Breadth
feats.description: Your attunement to arcane cold enhances the depths of your growing power.

feats.name: Furious Bully
feats.description: You bully foes across the battlefield.

feats.name: Fused Staff
feats.description: When you prepare a staff, you can hold it up to a weapon to merge the two items.

feats.name: Future Spell Learning
feats.description: More future memories of time magic percolate back to the present, teaching you spells you've yet to learn.

feats.name: Garden Path
feats.description: You can guide your crop to move without notice.

feats.name: Gardener's Resolve
feats.description: The Gray Gardeners are known for having nerves of steel and an unbreakable resolve.

feats.name: Ghost Flight
feats.description: You can suppress your tether to the ground, overcoming your resistance to fly free.

feats.name: Gigaton Strike
feats.description: When you use a full-power Megaton Strike, you can knock your foe back.

feats.name: Glitter Crystals
feats.description: You can mix a blend of crushed flowers and alchemical salt into an alchemical elixir with the healing trait or alchemical food.

feats.name: Glyph Expert
feats.description: You've learned to recognize the telltale writings and other signs that indicate the presence of magical traps.

feats.name: Gods' Palm
feats.description: You control your spirit energy when you attack, using it to reinforce yourself or to thrust past your enemy’s physical defenses.

feats.name: Golden Dragon's Bounty
feats.description: Your familiar alters the material of a spell into that of a precious metal.

feats.name: Golden League Xun Dedication
feats.description: You are a xun for the Golden League, aiding the organization.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Golden League Xun Dedication U

feats.name: Golem Grafter Dedication
feats.description: Your flesh has been specially treated with the same arcane and alchemical processes used to toughen the skin of flesh golems.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Golem Grafter Dedication U

feats.name: Grand Dance
feats.description: You can summon the full magic of Bhopan's grand dance.

feats.name: Grasping Corpses
feats.description: Your foes are left reeling from the attacks made by the zombies or skeletons of your horde.

feats.name: Great Boaster
feats.description: Your bragging is particularly effective.

feats.name: Greater Cruelty
feats.description: The extent of your corruption devastates your foes' minds and reflexes.

feats.name: Greater Mercy
feats.description: Your faith enhances your ability to remove conditions.

feats.name: Greater Security
feats.description: Shield in hand, you offer your ally its full protection you do yourself.

feats.name: Greenwatch Veteran
feats.description: Your time spent tracking your target allows you to quickly identify its weaknesses and relay them to your allies.

feats.name: Grievous Blow
feats.description: You know how to deliver focused, powerful blows that bypass your enemies’ resistances.

feats.name: Grit and Tenacity
feats.description: You call upon deep reserves of toughness and mental fortitude to power through an otherwise debilitating effect.

feats.name: Group Taunt
feats.description: Your taunts draw the attention of multiple enemies at once.

feats.name: Guardian Ghosts
feats.description: You magically divert some of the harm from an incoming attack away from yourself, forcing your undead companion to take it in your stead.

feats.name: Guardian Lion Roar
feats.description: Your innovation is augmented with plates shaped to resemble the gaping maws of guardian lions, which you can energize to expel a stream of sonic energy reminiscent of a lion’s powerful roar.

feats.name: Guardian's Embrace
feats.description: Your spirit guide discorporates to surround you in an invisible protective shroud.

feats.name: Hamstringing Strike
feats.description: You slow your foes with a well-aimed attack.

feats.name: Harbinger's Armament
feats.description: Your deity grants you extra power that you have learned to channel into your weapons.

feats.name: Haunting Memories
feats.description: Your soul bears metaphysical impressions of the innumerable other spirits imprisoned with you in the final blade from which you escaped, allowing you to draw upon their memories.

feats.name: Hazard Finder
feats.description: You have an intuitive ability to sense hazards.

feats.name: Heal Mount
feats.description: Your devotion to your mount manifests as a surge of vital energy.

feats.name: Heightened Captivation
feats.description: You can infuse your enchantments and illusions with more power.

feats.name: Hell's Bane
feats.description: Your in-depth knowledge of your foes grants you insight into their weaknesses, granting you an advantage when fighting against them.

feats.name: Hellknight Mobility
feats.description: You've learned how best to move in your heavy armor.

feats.name: Helt's Spelldance
feats.description: Ranik Helt knows a special technique to hide his spells as part of a performance, and you've learned this technique.

feats.name: Hot Foot
feats.description: Using a carefully aimed shot, you make a creature “dance.”

feats.name: Hulking Size
feats.description: Your eidolon grows substantially.

feats.name: Ilverani Purist
feats.description: All twilight speakers are trained to resist the alluring customs of younger peoples, but you have made it your mandate to keep the Ilverani way unchanged.

feats.name: Impassable Wall Stance
feats.description: You refuse to let foes past your guard.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Impassable Wall Stance U

feats.name: Impenetrable Fog
feats.description: Fog condenses in a chaotic, swirling pattern, thick enough that it seems to push back against you.

feats.name: Impervious Vehicle
feats.description: From armor plating and flexible components, to reinforced materials and backup redundant functionality, you have built safeguards to protect your vehicle from the rigors of combat.

feats.name: Improved Command Corpse
feats.description: When you use Command Undead on a mindless undead, if the undead succeeds at its save but doesn't critically succeed, it becomes your minion for 1 round.

feats.name: Improved Elemental Blast
feats.description: The power of your elemental blast improves.

feats.name: Improved Invigorating Elixir
feats.description: Choose physical invigoration or mental invigoration, and add the listed conditions to those you can choose for an invigorating elixir.

feats.name: Improved Poison Weapon
feats.description: You deliver poisons in ways that maximize their harmful effects.

feats.name: Improvised Crafting
feats.description: You've learned to repair your equipment even in challenging circumstances, making use of what you have available.

feats.name: Improvised Critical
feats.description: You can apply critical specialization effects to improvised weapons you wield.

feats.name: Incredible Aim
feats.description: By spending a moment to focus, you can ensure your attack strikes true.

feats.name: Incredible Beastmaster Companion
feats.description: Your mature animal companions continue to grow and develop.

feats.name: Incredible Companion (Druid)
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to grow and develop.

feats.name: Incredible Construct Companion
feats.description: Thanks to your continual tinkering, your construct companion has advanced to an astounding new stage of engineering, enhancing all its attributes.

feats.name: Incredible Dragon Companion
feats.description: Your mature dragon companion develops further, becoming more robust and formidable.

feats.name: Incredible Familiar
feats.description: Your familiar is imbued with even more magic than other familiars.

feats.name: Incredible Megafauna Companion
feats.description: Under your care and training, your megafauna companion has realized its innate potential.

feats.name: Incredible Mount
feats.description: Under your care and training, your mount has realized its innate potential.

feats.name: Incredible Reanimated Companion
feats.description: You imbue the necrotized flesh of your reanimated construct companion with strange chemicals and fine-tune the clockwork within, enhancing all its capabilities.

feats.name: Innate Magic Intuition
feats.description: You've spent countless hours learning to recognize and predict a creature's innate magical abilities.

feats.name: Insistent Command
feats.description: When you roll a success to Command an Animal, you get a critical success.

feats.name: Inspired Stratagem
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can review stratagems for the day’s adventures with up to five allies.

feats.name: Instinctive Maneuvers
feats.description: When you allow an apparition control over your body, it might vent its fury against your foes.

feats.name: Instinctive Strike
feats.description: You trust your instincts and your sense of smell, using all your senses to pinpoint your opponent's location.

feats.name: Interposing Crowd
feats.description: Your enemies can’t stop you when there’s a host of people between you.

feats.name: Interrupt Charge
feats.description: You attempt to snag the foe before they run away.

feats.name: Into the Fray
feats.description: You charge into battle with shield-splintering fury.

feats.name: Invoke Defense
feats.description: You manifest a defensive quality of spirits all around, such as the thick hide of an animal spirit or the sturdy bark of a nature spirit.

feats.name: Invoke the Crimson Oath
feats.description: You can invoke the Crimson Oath to unleash blasts of ruby energy from your weapon.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Invoke the Crimson Oath

feats.name: Invulnerable Rager
feats.description: Even the heaviest armors serve only to enhance your unbridled fury.

feats.name: Ironblood Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of impenetrable iron, refusing to yield to any blow.

feats.name: Jellyfish Stance
feats.description: You relax your posture and loosen your joints, allowing yourself to move with incredible fluidity.

feats.name: Juggernaut Charge
feats.description: As you move forward in a rush, you put the weight of your armor behind an attack that can drag a foe with you.

feats.name: Jumping Jenny Display
feats.description: This multi-sequence rocket blasts confetti at a series of altitudes.

feats.name: Kaiju Stance
feats.description: Your encounter with one of the rare forces of nature known as kaiju has imbued you with knowledge of a martial art that allows you to emulate a fraction of their power.

feats.name: Kaleidoscopic Entreaty
feats.description: If your next action is to cast entreat spirit, you can cause that spirit to unleash a brilliant display of color, light, and sound in a 10-foot emanation centered on you.

feats.name: Kindle Inner Flames
feats.description: As a candle can light another, you awaken the latent potential to channel fire in other creatures.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Kindle Inner Flames H

feats.name: Knight's Retaliation
feats.description: You knock the enemy's blow aside and twist, unbalancing your foe.

feats.name: Know Your Enemy
feats.description: You aim to turn knowledge into power against your foes.

feats.name: Know-It-All
feats.description: When you Recall Knowledge, you gain additional information or context.

feats.name: Knowledge is Power
feats.description: Your academic knowledge about a creature allows you to subtly alter your magic to defeat them.

feats.name: Larcenous Hand
feats.description: When you cast mage hand, you can modify it to steal an object from the target.

feats.name: Lead by Example
feats.description: You telegraph your next attack to let your allies in on your strategy.

feats.name: Leap and Fire
feats.description: You're quick enough to line up a shot even while diving to the ground.

feats.name: Lesson of Mutual Gambits
feats.description: You create an opening for your student, setting them up for their own attack.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lesson of Mutual Gambits

feats.name: Lesson of Sympathetic Vulnerability
feats.description: You temporarily borrow the essence of your student's attack to infuse yourself.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lesson of Sympathetic Vulnerability

feats.name: Lethargy Poisoner
feats.description: You've learned more than the use of hand crossbows.

feats.name: Levered Swing
feats.description: You can wrap your lash around a tree branch or railing, then pull yourself where you need to go.

feats.name: Levering Strike
feats.description: Strike your foe and make them unbalanced

feats.name: Liberated Mind
feats.description: Your mind won't be held hostage by those who would seek to control you.

feats.name: Lightning Rings' Intervention
feats.description: Your familiar learns to empower spells with an electrical discharge.

feats.name: Lingering Flames
feats.description: When you cast fireball, you can modify its effects to set creatures in its area aflame.

feats.name: Lion's Fury
feats.description: You gain access to the lion scythe's and sun sling's critical specialization effects.

feats.name: Lion's Magic
feats.description: Many Lion Blades enhance their words with a bit of magic.

feats.name: Live Ammunition
feats.description: There are generally few things as ill-advised as being shot out of a cannon or launched by a trebuchet, but people use the tactic every so often in a desperate situation.

feats.name: Living for the Applause
feats.description: Nothing can stop you as long as you have an audience cheering you on.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Living for the Applause U

feats.name: Loaner Spell
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can gain the assistance of an allied prepared spellcaster to prepare one spell for the day.

feats.name: Lobbed Attack
feats.description: Make an unexpected ranged attack with a Juggled item.

feats.name: Lore Seeker
feats.description: You see what others don’t, and you’ve developed magical tricks to find hidden truth.

feats.name: Lorefinder
feats.description: You know that fate sometimes conspires to keep dangerous knowledge or items from the eyes of those most able to understand them.

feats.name: Magic Ammunition
feats.description: You imbue your ammunition with raw and potent magic, transforming it to suit your needs in any situation.

feats.name: Magic Finder
feats.description: You've learned a few tricks to ensure you find every last magic item and interesting magical effect during your missions.

feats.name: Magical Adept
feats.description: Your eidolon gains more magic.

feats.name: Magical Knowledge
feats.description: Increase your proficiency rank in one of Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion.

feats.name: Magpie Manor Recovery
feats.description: Though you're hardly ready to retire from the social life, you appreciate the luxury the older wealthy elite enjoy within the private social club of Magpie Manor in Absalom's Petal District.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Magpie Manor Recovery U

feats.name: Majestic Proclamation
feats.description: You announce your name to your enemies, bringing your constellation to bear in a blinding display.

feats.name: Makeshift Strike
feats.description: You quickly snatch up whatever is nearby and then attack with it as an improvised weapon.

feats.name: Malleable Mental Forge
feats.description: You open your mind to further weapon customization.

feats.name: Manifold Modifications
feats.description: You've modified your innovation using clever workarounds, so you can include another initial modification without compromising its structure.

feats.name: Mantis Form
feats.description: You gain the mantis form focus spell

feats.name: Many Guises
feats.description: You can take on any number of mundane guises.

feats.name: Martyr
feats.description: You go to extreme lengths to support your allies, even when it means bringing harm to yourself.

feats.name: Martyr's Parry
feats.description: You intercede to absorb the triggering attack.

feats.name: Masked Casting
feats.description: You harness the magical energy flowing through your eyeless mask to effortlessly protect you from visual effects.

feats.name: Masked Casting
feats.description: You harness the magical energy flowing through your eyeless mask to effortlessly protect you from visual effects.

feats.name: Mental Static
feats.description: Your thoughts sting back when a lesser mind tries to invade your own.

feats.name: Metabolize Element
feats.description: Your rapidly metabolize the elemental particles in your opponent's spell to gain a boost of energy.

feats.name: Mighty Bulwark
feats.description: Thanks to the incredible connection you have forged with your armor, you can use it to shrug off an extensive array of dangers.

feats.name: Mind Projectiles
feats.description: You've learned to stretch your mind's influence further, releasing projectiles with a swing of your mind weapon.

feats.name: Miniaturize
feats.description: Your eidolon can shrink even further.

feats.name: Minor Omen
feats.description: The stars warn you of danger in the nick of time.

feats.name: Mixed Maneuver
feats.description: You leverage your knowledge of martial arts to mix different maneuvers together into a single flowing combination.

feats.name: Mobile Shot Stance
feats.description: Your shots become nimble and deadly.

feats.name: Monk Moves
feats.description: You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed when you’re not wearing armor.

feats.name: Monumental Maestro
feats.description: You’ve studied the moving compositions of Andreas Romung, a legendary maestro whose Shining Crusade anthems live on in the music for the play Echoes of Glory.

feats.name: Murksight
feats.description: Your vision pierces through non-magical fog, mist, rain, and snow.

feats.name: Mutable Familiar
feats.description: Your familiar's supernatural spirit has outgrown its corporeal body.

feats.name: Mutant Physique
feats.description: Basic mutagens that affect your physical form can bring out the beast within you, turn you nigh invincible, or make your body more elastic.

feats.name: Mysterious Breadth
feats.description: Increase the spell slots you gain from oracle archetype feats

feats.name: Necromantic Bulwark
feats.description: Regular exposure to necromantic effects left you better able to defend against them.

feats.name: Necromantic Tenacity
feats.description: Reduce the power that necromantic effects hold over you.

feats.name: Nimble Roll
feats.description: You throw yourself into a roll to escape imminent danger.

feats.name: Nothing Personal
feats.description: When you’re on a job, you can’t allow anyone to stop you.

feats.name: Occult Breadth
feats.description: Your repertoire expands, and you can cast more occult spells each day.

feats.name: Officer's Education
feats.description: You know that a broad knowledge base is critical for a competent commander.

feats.name: Ooze Empathy
feats.description: You can connect with oozes (and other amorphous aberrations, at the GM's discretion) on a rudimentary level.

feats.name: Opportune Backstab
feats.description: When your enemy is hit by your ally, you capitalize upon the distraction.

feats.name: Opportunistic Grapple
feats.description: You use an opening to capture your prey.

feats.name: Orator's Fillibuster
feats.description: When you seek to convince others of the worth of your cause, you are capable of unleashing such an entrancing torrent of rhetoric and metaphor that it is all but impossible to look away from you.

feats.name: Order Training
feats.description: You gain the lesser order benefit for the Hellknight order to which you belong.

feats.name: Order Training
feats.description: You gain the lesser order benefit for the Hellknight order to which you belong.

feats.name: Ore Fists
feats.description: When you enter the Stonestrike Stance, your fists appear to be covered with veins of unrefined ore.

feats.name: Ouroboric Pact
feats.description: You’ve studied pacts at Cobyslarni, or learned under someone who has, and understand them to not only create a bargain between individuals, but a separate entity altogether: the pact itself.

feats.name: Out of Hand
feats.description: Even when your limbs are severed, they remain a part of you.

feats.name: Overdrive Ally
feats.description: You quickly fling some of your powered-up mechanisms to an ally, sharing your benefits with them briefly.

feats.name: Pack Movement
feats.description: You and your companion move to take down a common enemy.

feats.name: Pact of Infernal Prowess
feats.description: You've sworn a pact with devils, granting you success in life in exchange for your soul in the afterlife.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of Infernal Prowess U

feats.name: Palatine Strike
feats.description: Your strikes are particularly deadly against supernatural creatures.

feats.name: Paralyzing Slash
feats.description: Your enzymes can paralyze your foes rather than merely making it harder for them to heal their wounds.

feats.name: Patron's Breadth
feats.description: You can cast more spells each day.

feats.name: Peer Beyond
feats.description: You have uncanny insight into the way ghosts and haunts manifest, manipulate the mind, and rejuvenate.

feats.name: Perfect Resistance
feats.description: You gain resistance equal to half your level to all damage from effects with the appropriate trait for your School of Perfection: fire for Unblinking Flame, water for Unbreaking Waves, air for Unfolding Wind, and earth for Untwisting Iron.

feats.name: Perpetual Breadth
feats.description: You have expanded your supply of near-infinite items.

feats.name: Persistent Creation
feats.description: You can cast creation as an innate spell at will, choosing whether it is arcane or primal each time.

feats.name: Phalanx Formation (Knight Vigilant)
feats.description: You know how to clear a line of fire for your allies.

feats.name: Physical Training
feats.description: You spend a lot of time focusing on your physical fitness.

feats.name: Piercing Doom
feats.description: You have grown accustomed to the curse that comes with your blessing, able to channel its effects through your attacks and forestall your own demise.

feats.name: Pinning Fire
feats.description: You target your opponent's clothing, equipment, or loose flesh with a series of piercing projectiles to pin them to the ground or a nearby surface.

feats.name: Pinpoint Poisoner
feats.description: Unsuspecting targets are especially vulnerable to your poisons.

feats.name: Pluck From the Sky
feats.description: The skies are your rightful place, and you will not suffer another to occupy them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pluck From the Sky U

feats.name: Positioning Assault
feats.description: With punishing blows, you force your opponent into position.

feats.name: Positive Luminance
feats.description: You learn how to create a luminous reservoir of positive energy that you can use to punish undead who dare attack you.

feats.name: Powerful Snares
feats.description: Your snares are particularly dif cult for enemies to avoid.

feats.name: Practiced Guidance
feats.description: You can better Aid your crop.

feats.name: Precious Ammunition
feats.description: You have learned to mimic the power that lies between magic and material.

feats.name: Predictive Purchase (Rogue)
feats.description: You somehow manage to have just the thing for the situation.

feats.name: Preventative Treatment
feats.description: You provide preventative remedies and care to help your patient fight off future maladies.

feats.name: Primal Breadth
feats.description: Increase the spell slots you gain from druid archetype feats by 1 for each spell rank other than your two highest druid spell slots.

feats.name: Primal Guardian
feats.description: You grow in power as a guardian of nature.

feats.name: Projectile Snatching
feats.description: You pluck missiles from the air and hurl them back at their source.

feats.name: Prolific Prophet Spellcasting
feats.description: Increase the number of spells in your repertoire and the number of spell slots you gain from prophet of Kalistrade archetype feats by 1 for each spell rank other than your two highest prophet of Kalistrade spell slots.

feats.name: Protect Ally
feats.description: You place your body between your friends and your enemies, protecting your allies against oncoming attacks.

feats.name: Protective Pose
feats.description: Many physical poses can fortify one’s health, but some poses need more than one body to accomplish.

feats.name: Public Execution
feats.description: Some rebel Firebrand cells make a practice of publicly declaring the main target of a given operation.

feats.name: Purify Element
feats.description: You turn an element into its purest form.

feats.name: Pushing Wind
feats.description: As you spin and glide your fans alongside your allies, you kick up a mild wind that gently carries you all forward.

feats.name: Quick Positioning
feats.description: You're always ready to get the jump on your target.

feats.name: Quick Shield Block
feats.description: You can bring your shield into place with hardly a thought.

feats.name: Quick Stow (Swordmaster)
feats.description: You know that situations can change rapidly and might leave you needing to change equipment in the middle of combat.

feats.name: Raise Island
feats.description: You churn the sea and fish up stone so your enemies together can receive their punishment.

feats.name: Raise Menhir
feats.description: You raise a druidic monument, such as a standing stone or warding tree, from the ground, creating a powerful primal ward that blocks other types of magic.

feats.name: Rally Support
feats.description: You often rely on the local populace for supplies and shelter.

feats.name: Rallying Banner
feats.description: Your banner waves high, reminding your allies that the fight can still be won.

feats.name: Reactive Resilience
feats.description: Your power blunts blades and weakens spells like the hardiest of dragon scales.

feats.name: Read Disaster
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes and open yourself to the divine mysteries of the world, peering into the most sinister portents of the future.

feats.name: Reading the Signs
feats.description: You have a knack for drawing the right card, be it from a harrow deck, in a game of cards, or even when drawing from a Deck of Many Things.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Reading the Signs U

feats.name: Recognize Threat
feats.description: You quickly assess the threat so you can relay the information to your team.

feats.name: Recoiling Relocation
feats.description: Your innovation contains a chamber to store a small amount of compressed exhaust gas from your Launches.

feats.name: Recycled Cogwheel
feats.description: You're able to scavenge the cogwheels from your daily quick-deploy snares that use gears.

feats.name: Reflexive Courage
feats.description: You bellow a ferocious call to arms, inspiring yourself to lash out at a foe.

feats.name: Reflexive Grip
feats.description: You keep hold of your weapons even when knocked out.

feats.name: Rejoice in Solstice Storm
feats.description: You hold your arms out, and the fury of the seasons comes to your jubilant embrace.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rejoice in Solstice Storm

feats.name: Reminder of the Greater Fear
feats.description: You give a target a stern glower to remind them that it is you, and no one else, they should truly fear.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Reminder of the Greater Fear

feats.name: Remote Detonation
feats.description: Brastlewark snarecrafters know that sometimes it's more advantageous to magically destroy a snare before it's triggered.

feats.name: Remove Presence
feats.description: Your spell reaches into the mind of a creature and removes you from it.

feats.name: Rend Armor
feats.description: Your enemies' defenses are no match for you as you wrench your weapon to compromise their armor.

feats.name: Renewed Vigor
feats.description: Through the haze of battle, you quickly recover your raging vigor.

feats.name: Repositioning Block
feats.description: As you absorb a blow from an enemy, you can use their attack's momentum against them.

feats.name: Resounding Bravery
feats.description: Even your fears serve as fuel for your fighting spirit.

feats.name: Restorative Channel
feats.description: You can remove conditions with divine grace.

feats.name: Retaliatory Cleansing
feats.description: You twist your hand in front of the blow, ensuring the enemy's attack shatters the required holy water or bomb.

feats.name: Retch Rust
feats.description: You exhale tendrils formed from flakes of rusted metal.

feats.name: Reversing Charge
feats.description: You dive into the fray before rewinding yourself to safety. Stride up to your Speed.

feats.name: Ricochet Stance (Rogue)
feats.description: You adopt a stance to rebound your thrown weapons toward you.

feats.name: Rippling Spin
feats.description: After the triggering attack is done, Step

feats.name: Riptide
feats.description: You swirl water around you to make a current that pulls creatures closer.

feats.name: Rivethun Devotion
feats.description: Through study, dedication, and introspection, you’ve learned to wield magic that affects the spirit.

feats.name: Rule of Three
feats.description: Heroes learn from their previous failures, often succeeding on the third attempt.

feats.name: Runic Impression
feats.description: You can temporarily replicate the effects of a property rune for your weapon or unarmed attacks.

feats.name: Running Tackle
feats.description: You charge, throwing your body at your foe in a vicious tackle.

feats.name: Rupture Stomp
feats.description: Every dwarf knows that the rock they walk upon can be either a best friend or a treacherous path.

feats.name: Sacrifice Armor
feats.description: With divine awareness, you twist your body to lessen the impact of an attack.

feats.name: Safeguard Soul
feats.description: You've girded your soul against outside interference.

feats.name: Salt Kissed
feats.description: You have a supernatural ability to survive at sea and keep your companions from drowning.

feats.name: Sanctify Armament
feats.description: You touch a weapon and bring it into concordance with your deity.

feats.name: Sanguivolent Roots
feats.description: Blood-drinking vines grow from the ground in a 15-foot burst within 120 feet.

feats.name: Scarecrow
feats.description: You fight fiercely to protect your crop.

feats.name: Scattered Fire
feats.description: When you cast fireball, you can modify its area to be two non-overlapping 10-foot bursts.

feats.name: Scattering in Spring
feats.description: You evade an incoming attack by twisting your enemy’s tactics in your favor.

feats.name: Scholar's Hunch
feats.description: Scholarly debates have taught you to think on your feet.

feats.name: Second Blessing
feats.description: Your continued service grants you another boon.

feats.name: Selfless Parry
feats.description: You protect those near to you with a flash of steel and a stroke of good luck.

feats.name: Sense Holiness
feats.description: The presence of goodness sickens you with its saccharine self-righteousness.

feats.name: Sense Iniquity
feats.description: Your Hellknight training gives you the ability to focus your senses and root out those who would attempt to deceive or hide from you.

feats.name: Sense Unholiness
feats.description: You sense the truly wicked as a queasy or foreboding feeling.

feats.name: Shadow Spell
feats.description: You attach a piece of your shadow to a spell to cloud the senses and cause mischief.

feats.name: Shadowdancer Dedication
feats.description: You dedicate yourself to the shadows.

feats.name: Shamble
feats.description: You may be slower than you were in life, but your pace is unfaltering.

feats.name: Shambling March
feats.description: Your horde is swifter, marching in time to your command.

feats.name: Share Rage
feats.description: You stoke an ally's fury.

feats.name: Sheltering Pulse
feats.description: You thrust your hand or weapon into the ground and release a pulse that creates a sheltering nexus of energy for you and your allies.

feats.name: Shield Wallop
feats.description: Attacks with your shield knock the sense out of your foes.

feats.name: Shield from Arrows
feats.description: You place your shield in the path of an oncoming projectile.

feats.name: Shielding Formation
feats.description: You have mastered unique magical techniques designed to protect your allies from harm.

feats.name: Shoving Sweep
feats.description: You swing your weapon at your foe, rebuffing them back.

feats.name: Show-Off
feats.description: As is the tradition with many Firebrands, you call your shot and look to impress with an extra bit of panache or a greater stunt.

feats.name: Sickening Bite
feats.description: Your saliva causes severe nausea and mild fever in the living, weakening them so that you can more easily finish them off.

feats.name: Sidestep
feats.description: You deftly step out of the way of an attack, letting the blow continue.

feats.name: Silence the Profane (Avenger)
feats.description: Your training included instruction on how to prevent enemy priests from using their magic against you, a technique you have now mastered and adapted.

feats.name: Silence the Profane (Vindicator)
feats.description: Your training included instruction on how to prevent enemy spellcasters from using their prayers against you.

feats.name: Sin Reservoir
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can indulge in your associated sin or meditate on its values (and risks).

feats.name: Siphoning Touch
feats.description: When you cast vampiric touch, you can modify its standard effects as follows: Instead of gaining the temporary Hit Points yourself, you can grant the temporary Hit Points to an ally within 30 feet.

feats.name: Skill Mastery
feats.description: Increase your proficiency rank in one of your skills from expert to master and in another of your skills from trained to expert.

feats.name: Skill Mastery (Rogue)
feats.description: Increase your proficiency rank in one of your skills from expert to master and in another of your skills from trained to expert.

feats.name: Skim Scroll
feats.description: You can activate the magic of a scroll with a cursory read as you draw it from your belt.

feats.name: Skyseeker
feats.description: You Leap toward an opponent.

feats.name: Skyseeker
feats.description: You Leap toward an opponent.

feats.name: Slayer's Blessing
feats.description: You carry scraps of materials dangerous to undead and can apply them to your weapon.

feats.name: Slurp Up
feats.description: Your tongue darts out in search of refreshment.

feats.name: Sly Striker
feats.description: Your attacks deal more damage, even against creatures that aren’t off-guard.

feats.name: Smoke Curtain
feats.description: You load an extra dose of powder into your shot, causing it to belch a cloud of smoke.

feats.name: Smoldering Explosion
feats.description: When you cast fireball, you can modify the spell to leave behind a brief cloud of smoke in its area.

feats.name: Snakebird's Shadow
feats.description: Ganhil developed this technique through observing the sharp-beaked darters fishing Prada Hanam’s waters, seeking to match their speed and suppleness with the elemental flash of his blade.

feats.name: Snap Out of It! (Pathfinder Agent)
feats.description: Pathfinders are trained to help each other be safe and successful, and you know how to jolt your allies back to their senses.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Snap Out of It! (Pathfinder Agent)

feats.name: Soaring Shape
feats.description: Wings free you from the shackles of the ground below.

feats.name: Solar Detonation
feats.description: Blinding flames explode in a swirling sphere! The detonation fills a 20-foot burst within 60 feet of you.

feats.name: Songbird's Call
feats.description: You call to the wilds with the voice of a songbird, thereby summoning a cloud of its kin.

feats.name: Soul Well
feats.description: Your brush your fingers across your splinter of finality, momentarily creating a metaphysical vortex from which mortal spirits struggle to escape.

feats.name: Soulsight
feats.description: Your muse has opened your senses to the world beyond.

feats.name: Spell Swipe
feats.description: You attack in an arc and enact your spell against everyone you hit.

feats.name: Spelldrinker
feats.description: You temporarily add a 3rd-rank spell to your spell repertoire, as determined by the type of creature whose blood you just drank.

feats.name: Spellshield
feats.description: Your shield becomes a bonded item capable of storing your spells.

feats.name: Spike Skin
feats.description: You touch a willing creature, causing its skin to harden and form spiky protrusions.

feats.name: Spirit Familiar (Witch)
feats.description: Your familiar can subsume its body to become pure spirit.

feats.name: Spirit Walk
feats.description: Your allied apparitions ward you against the predations of their restless peers.

feats.name: Spirit's Anguish
feats.description: You purify a spirit by coaxing it to release its anguish in a final cathartic howl.

feats.name: Sportlebore Choke
feats.description: Like nefarious sportlebores, a species of insect that plague adventurers by hiding in their rations as counterfeit food, your swarm can crawl down throats.

feats.name: Stab and Blast
feats.description: You slice or smash your opponent with the melee portion of your weapon before pulling the trigger at point-blank range.

feats.name: Stalwart Chant
feats.description: You know story after story of unyielding, valiant dwarven heroes whose minds were bulwarks against fear and confusion.

feats.name: Stalwart Mind
feats.description: When necessary to avoid a magical compulsion or curse, you can be as stubborn as your megafauna companion.

feats.name: Standby Spell
feats.description: You've honed one spell as your favored combat technique, and you've practiced it enough that you no longer need to prepare it to cast it.

feats.name: Stasian Charge
feats.description: Charging a living body with electricity may seem like a bad idea, but you know better.

feats.name: Stasian Smash
feats.description: You've modified your dynamo with Stasian coils, allowing you to make a powerful attack that crackles with electricity.

feats.name: Statement Strut
feats.description: You have an eye for fashion and know how to sell attitude and confidence with your walk.

feats.name: Statue
feats.description: Your body and equipment appear to be made of stone as you hold perfectly still.

feats.name: Steal Vitality
feats.description: When you cast vampiric touch, you can modify it to remove your enfeebled or clumsy condition.

feats.name: Sticky Bomb
feats.description: You can mix in a sticky additive to an alchemical bomb to make its contents adhere and continue to deal damage.

feats.name: Stitched Familiar
feats.description: Your familiar can shed its material form, becoming a mass of animated magic.

feats.name: Storm Shroud
