feats.description: You become surrounded by a swirling storm of rain, sand, snow, or clouds, whichever of those suits your bound terrain.

feats.name: Storm Spiral
feats.description: Dark thunderclouds swirl in a miniature storm, crisscrossed with lightning bolts; a tremendous thunderclap fills the air.

feats.name: Strangle
feats.description: You squeeze the breath out of your foe.

feats.name: Stunning Finisher
feats.description: You attempt a dizzying blow.

feats.name: Submission Hold
feats.description: Your iron grip saps your opponent’s strength.

feats.name: Subtle Shank
feats.description: You draw a concealed weapon, attack with it, and then hide it away again in one smooth motion.

feats.name: Sudden Leap
feats.description: You make an impressive leap and swing while you soar.

feats.name: Superimpose Time Duplicates
feats.description: You call alternate versions of yourself, either from a different timeline or perhaps yourself from a different point in your current timeline, to aid you in combat.

feats.name: Supreme Psychic Center
feats.description: With the merest thought, you realign your mental defenses to your duel's circumstances.

feats.name: Surging Focus
feats.description: When an ally you can see falls in battle, your surge of righteous indignation allows you to draw upon untapped reserves of divine power.

feats.name: Surging Might
feats.description: You focus the power of your spell to overcome enemies' resistances.

feats.name: Surreptitious Spellcaster
feats.description: You’ve learned that it pays for a Pathfinder to be able to cast spells without being noticed.

feats.name: Survivor of Desolation
feats.description: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against unnatural weather events or environmental hazards occurring in blighted or otherwise unnaturally marred regions.

feats.name: Swallow Pain
feats.description: You're capable of absorbing pain with less difficulty than others, and your bond with your horse helps it similarly ignore such suffering.

feats.name: Swap Reflections
feats.description: You've learned how to use even your reflection to your advantage.

feats.name: Swashbuckler's Speed
feats.description: You move with a swashbuckler’s speed and grace.

feats.name: Swim Through Earth
feats.description: The earth parts before you, letting you swim through it.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Swim Through Earth H

feats.name: Swipe Souvenir
feats.description: When you wriggle free from an enemy’s grasp, you take something of theirs with you.

feats.name: Syu Tak-Nwa's Hexed Locks
feats.description: Your hair attacks gain the reach trait and you can deliver hexes through it.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Syu Tak-Nwa's Hexed Locks U

feats.name: Tactical Entry
feats.description: You Stride.

feats.name: Tail Guard
feats.description: Enemies who attempt to stab you in the back will be unhappy to find your lashing tail on guard.

feats.name: Tangled Forest Stance
feats.description: You extend your arms like gnarled branches to interfere with your foes' movements.

feats.name: Tear Tendons
feats.description: You rake into your opponent with two claws, cutting into their muscle and depriving them of needed strength.

feats.name: Terrain Master
feats.description: You are able to adapt to your surroundings in any natural terrain.

feats.name: Terrifying Transformation
feats.description: Your flesh tears and warps as you transform.

feats.name: The Harder They Fall (Ranger)
feats.description: You know how to make a larger creature hurt when it falls to the ground.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited The Harder They Fall (Ranger) R

feats.name: Thoughtsense
feats.description: You can detect the flickers of mental activity let off by all thinking creatures.

feats.name: Thrash
feats.description: You thrash your foe around.

feats.name: Tight Follower
feats.description: You keep up as a protector.

feats.name: To Battle!
feats.description: With a resounding cry, you rally your ally to take the offensive.

feats.name: Topple Giants
feats.description: When you observe an ally try and fail to execute a strategic maneuver against your enemies, you coordinate with your other allies to finish the job.

feats.name: Transcribe Moment
feats.description: You gain the transcribe moment focus spell.

feats.name: Transfusion
feats.description: You bring forth the regenerative properties of blood on behalf of an ally or yourself.

feats.name: Tumbling Strike
feats.description: You deftly dive through a gap left by a foe to deliver an advantageous blow.

feats.name: Twirling Strike
feats.description: Your fans, one raised up alongside your head and the other alongside your hip, become a blur as you twirl across the battlefield.

feats.name: Ubiquitous Gadgets
feats.description: They thought you had used up all your devices, but they thought wrong! You have a few more gadgets up your sleeve than others expect.

feats.name: Unassailable Enforcer
feats.description: Your faith in the Pure Legion protects you from spiritual harm.

feats.name: Unbelievable Luck
feats.description: While no one, not even you, might appear to understand why, you demonstrate a greater ability to hit your targets regardless of the obstacles in your way.

feats.name: Uncanny Prediction
feats.description: You have an eerie ability to guess the next move of creatures you've Sized Up.

feats.name: Unfazed Assessment
feats.description: You have witnessed hundreds of fighting styles and quickly adapt to defend against complicated maneuvers.

feats.name: Unkillable
feats.description: You're relentless and nigh unkillable, shrugging off blows that should destroy you, though they might make your body start to fall apart.

feats.name: Unravel Mysteries
feats.description: You can understand the true meaning of texts quickly, and even when you get lost or hit a dead end, you aren’t discouraged from making further attempts to get to the bottom of things.

feats.name: Unrivaled Analysis
feats.description: Your experience allows you to derive even more information about your opponents from a mere glance.

feats.name: Unseen Passage
feats.description: You have mastered a magical technique for moving through dangerous woodlands unseen.

feats.name: Unshakable Idealism
feats.description: Your faith and hope can’t be shaken, and you won’t flee when lives are at stake.

feats.name: Unshaken in Iron
feats.description: You know the precise limits of your armor, and trust it to save you from harm.

feats.name: Vantage Shot
feats.description: You and your spotter take advantage of each other's attacks to momentarily hide and throw your foes off-balance against your follow-up attack.

feats.name: Venomous Weapons
feats.description: Your skill with poisons is such that your preferred weapons also contain trace amounts of it, even when you don't actively apply a dose.

feats.name: Veteran Follower
feats.description: Your followers' training has made them veterans of battle.

feats.name: Vicious Fangs
feats.description: You aim for your victim's prominent arteries.

feats.name: Viking Vindicator
feats.description: You are one of the raiders eagerly planning to launch an assault by sea on the Whispering Tyrant's Isle of Terror.

feats.name: Vivacious Bravado
feats.description: Your ego swells, granting you a temporary reprieve from your pain.

feats.name: Void Siphon
feats.description: The raw energy of the Void saps the essence of the living.

feats.name: Wake to Strife
feats.description: You summon the explosive power of a geyser beneath a foe.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Wake to Strife U

feats.name: Waking Dream
feats.description: While in your trance, you can blur the line between dreams and reality for others.

feats.name: Walk the Plank
feats.description: You frighten a foe into moving where you want them, traditionally demanding they walk the plank.

feats.name: Wall Run
feats.description: You defy gravity, traversing vertical planes as easily as the ground.

feats.name: Wall of Roses
feats.description: Roses are the symbol of Milani, and you can call forth a wall of them to stymie those who don't follow her teachings.

feats.name: Warden's Boon
feats.description: You point out vulnerabilities present in your hunted prey, granting the benefits listed in Hunt Prey and your hunter’s edge to an ally until the end of their next turn.

feats.name: Warped Constriction
feats.description: The entity inhabiting your body is an aberrant being with unfathomable motivations, and when you hold a foe close, tendrils and tentacles unfurl from your body to crush your foe and pollute it with alien wrongness.

feats.name: Watcher on the Wall
feats.description: You claim a patron’s symbol that you can etch onto any surface.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Watcher on the Wall

feats.name: Water Walker
feats.description: When in the throes of your curse, your steps take on a supernatural buoyancy.

feats.name: Wayfinder Resonance Infiltrator
feats.description: You are adept at using the unusual resonance of your wayfinder to aid in any deceptions you might employ.

feats.name: What Could Have Been
feats.description: Rather than conjuring creatures from elsewhere in the world or the planes, you can temporarily pull a much different version of yourself from an alternate timeline.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard What Could Have Been

feats.name: Whirlpool's Pull
feats.description: You briefly conjure a tendril of water that allows you to grab an improvised weapon and then subsume that water to power your magic.

feats.name: Whispering Steps
feats.description: Your spell leaves a lingering connection between you and a creature—one through which you can nudge the creature's mind this way or that.

feats.name: Whodunnit?
feats.description: You carefully consider your case and narrow down some of the details.

feats.name: Wild Winds Initiate
feats.description: You learn a stance that lets you attack from a distance.

feats.name: Wind Caller
feats.description: You bid the winds to aid you, carrying you through the air and allowing you passage through the strongest headwinds.

feats.name: Wind Seeker
feats.description: Wings free you from the shackles of the ground below.

feats.name: Wing Shove
feats.description: You spread your wings wide, pushing foes away from you.

feats.name: Witch’s Bottle
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes and 1 Focus Point brewing a special potion containing the power of one of your hexes that targets a creature.

feats.name: Work Yourself Up
feats.description: You concentrate on your mental state, tapping into that raw emotional energy.

feats.name: World-Wise Vigilance
feats.description: Your keen study of other cultures gives you insights into the ways those cultures fight.

feats.name: Worm Empathy
feats.description: You can connect with cave worms (and other worm-related creatures, at the GM's discretion) on a rudimentary level.

feats.name: Wrath of the Hold
feats.description: Your tattoos carry the strength of an innumerable horde, and you can expend one use of your storied skin’s Living History ability to animate your tattoos as ghostly assailants that swarm your foes.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Wrath of the Hold U

feats.name: You Don't Smell Right
feats.description: You can sniff out fellow werecreatures and master impersonators alike.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard You Don't Smell Right

feats.name: Zealous Rush
feats.description: You bless yourself on the move.

feats.name: Abjure the False Kin
feats.description: Your vow reminds you that there can be brackish vinegar hiding within honeyed words, helping you detect attempts to influence your mind.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Abjure the False Kin

feats.name: Aboleth Transmutation
feats.description: You have tapped into the ancient magic used by alghollthu masters to mold the flesh of your ancestors.

feats.name: Absorb Toxin
feats.description: Your skin readily absorbs poison and can consciously draw toxins into your body to spare others.

feats.name: Accursed Claws
feats.description: Your claws carry your mother’s hag magic.

feats.name: Agathion Magic
feats.description: The harmonious magic of Nirvana flows through you.

feats.name: Aggravating Scratch
feats.description: Your claws carry an irritant that is harmless to you but can be damaging to others.

feats.name: Alluring Performance
feats.description: You command the attention of those around you with an elegant display.

feats.name: Ambush Hunter
feats.description: You are always searching for the perfect opportunity to ambush your enemies.

feats.name: Analyze Information
feats.description: You can stoke your mind into a burst of analytical prowess.

feats.name: Anarchic Arcana
feats.description: The magic in your blood is unpredictable.

feats.name: Ancestral Form
feats.description: Casting your memory back deep into the past, you take the form of an ancestral guardian.

feats.name: Ancestral Healer
feats.description: Following the traditions of those who came before you, you’ve learned how to banish effects that cloud the mind, body, and spirit.

feats.name: Ancillary Motes
feats.description: You can use Crystalline Dust one more time per day.

feats.name: Animal Magic
feats.description: Your shapeshifting grants you a magical connection to the animal world.

feats.name: Animal Summoner
feats.description: The connection between you and primal magic deepens.

feats.name: Arcane Camouflage
feats.description: You have developed magical techniques to aid you with stalking your prey.

feats.name: Arcane Propulsion
feats.description: You redirect energy from your core to ports on your back or feet, allowing you to fly for a short time.

feats.name: Arcane Slam
feats.description: You channel magical power from your core into your arm, empowering your attack as you attempt to slam your foe into the ground.

feats.name: Asura Magic
feats.description: You can cast blood vendetta and death knell once per day each as 2nd-level divine innate spells.

feats.name: Azarketi Purification
feats.description: You can cast purify food and drink as a primal innate spell, but only on liquids.

feats.name: Azata Magic
feats.description: Your lineage traces back to the realm of Elysium, and you can harness its magic using this connection.

feats.name: Bark and Tendril
feats.description: You wield primal magic.

feats.name: Battleforger
feats.description: You can sharpen weapons, polish armor, and apply special techniques to temporarily gain better effects from your armaments.

feats.name: Between the Scales
feats.description: You've learned to take advantage of slips in your foes' defenses.

feats.name: Big Mouth
feats.description: Instead of storing up to four items of Light Bulk in your cheek pouches, you can store up to 1 Bulk worth of items.

feats.name: Blood Must Have Blood
feats.description: You tap into a bottomless hunger for carnage.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Blood Must Have Blood

feats.name: Bloodletting Fangs
feats.description: You emulate your vampiric parent's techniques for drawing blood from a victim.

feats.name: Bond Companion
feats.description: You form a close bond with a companion, similar to that of a master and familiar, that lets you gift them with a touch of your inherent magic.

feats.name: Bone Caller
feats.description: Using a mixture of dinosaur bones and the bones of your ancestors to focus your magic, you animate lizards and dinosaurs to carry messages or serve as mounts.

feats.name: Bone Missile
feats.description: You can remove your ribs to use them as arrows or bolts.

feats.name: Breath Like Honey
feats.description: You smell of honey and savory things.

feats.name: Breath Unleashed
feats.description: You’re able to channel more of your draconic benefactor’s power and focus it into your Kobold Breath, increasing its effectiveness but requiring more time to recover.

feats.name: Briar Battler
feats.description: When you're in difficult terrain from an environmental feature, you can Take Cover, even if the feature wouldn't ordinarily be large enough for you to Take Cover.

feats.name: Brightness Seeker
feats.description: Once per day, you can spend 10 minutes studying your surroundings in search of omens related to a particular course of action to cast augury as an innate divine spell.

feats.name: Brilliant Vision
feats.description: You ignore concealment from clouds, dust, fog, mist, smoke, and similarly loose matter.

feats.name: Build the First Walls
feats.description: The powers of creation that run through you allow you to conjure a temporary wall.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Build the First Walls

feats.name: Call of Elysium
feats.description: The wild wonder of Elysium harmonizes within you, and in dire straits, you can share its benefits with your allies.

feats.name: Cantorian Rejuvenation
feats.description: The life-giving energy that flows in your blood revitalizes you.

feats.name: Captivating Curiosity
feats.description: You can snare the attentions of onlookers with your unique appearance.

feats.name: Catrina's Presence
feats.description: You've adopted the calming presence of catrinas, the festive dead..

feats.name: Cautious Curiosity
feats.description: You've learned a few magical techniques for getting yourself both into and out of trouble unnoticed.

feats.name: Cave Climber
feats.description: After years of clambering through caverns, you can climb easily anywhere you go.

feats.name: Celestial Magic
feats.description: You possess celestial magic.

feats.name: Ceremony of Aeon's Guidance
feats.description: Your patron aeon has allowed you to call upon their gifts to serve their ends.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ceremony of Aeon's Guidance

feats.name: Ceremony of Aeon's Shield
feats.description: Your patron aeon graced you with powers of protection.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ceremony of Aeon's Shield

feats.name: Ceremony of Fortification
feats.description: Your exoskeleton arranges itself into an optimal defensive shape.

feats.name: Ceremony of the Strengthened Hand
feats.description: Your exoskeleton's weapons are even more potent.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ceremony of the Strengthened Hand

feats.name: Charred Remains
feats.description: Your next fire spell leaves embers in its wake.

feats.name: Cling
feats.description: You hang onto a foe to harry them into submission.

feats.name: Close Quarters
feats.description: If you're Small or smaller, you can end your movement in the same square as a Small or smaller ally.

feats.name: Coating of Slime
feats.description: An acidic ooze coats your limbs.

feats.name: Constant Gaze
feats.description: Your eyes keep a continual watch for dangers from all sides.

feats.name: Consume Magic
feats.description: You consume the magic of an incoming spell or effect to protect your allies, though you might give yourself indigestion.

feats.name: Cooperative Soul
feats.description: You have developed a soul-deep bond with your comrades and maintain an even greater degree of cooperation with them.

feats.name: Coral Detoxification
feats.description: The coral colony that you've tended has merged with your kidneys to add an additional layer of filtration.

feats.name: Core Attunement
feats.description: Your core allows you to draw more power from it.

feats.name: Cunning Climber
feats.description: Whether you are climbing a ship’s rigging, a jungle tree, or a clock tower, you have an uncanny knack for finding footholds and handholds where larger creatures can’t.

feats.name: Dance Underfoot
feats.description: You dart under the legs of your enemies in combat.

feats.name: Dance of the Tiger
feats.description: Tales tell of the Tiger stalking the Mousedeer for days, hidden and instilling dread upon its prey.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Dance of the Tiger

feats.name: Dangle
feats.description: You can hang by your tail from any suitable anchor point, such as a tree branch, balcony, or rocky outcropping (subject to the GM's discretion), typically while climbing.

feats.name: Dangle (Vanara)
feats.description: You can hang by your tail from any suitable anchor point, such as a tree branch, balcony, or rocky outcropping (subject to the GM's discretion), typically while climbing.

feats.name: Death's Drums
feats.description: Your life has been spent challenging death itself, and proximity to that implacable foe only makes your heart beat harder.

feats.name: Defensive Instincts
feats.description: Your body tenses up when surrounded, putting you on edge just enough to anticipate an attack.

feats.name: Demolitionist
feats.description: You know how to destroy objects with a well-placed explosion.

feats.name: Demon Hunter
feats.description: The demons of Tanglebriar have long haunted your dreams, just as they have long threatened Kyonin.

feats.name: Dig Up Secrets
feats.description: You are an endless well of knowledge and can remember several vital pieces of information at once.

feats.name: Disorienting Venom
feats.description: The venom injected by your fangs disorients your foes.

feats.name: Dissolution's Sight
feats.description: Accepting your inner darkness means that no outer darkness can obscure your sight.

feats.name: Divine Countermeasures
feats.description: You’ve studied your extraplanar heritage with the intent of better defending yourself, whether against creatures aligned with or opposed to your extraplanar lineage, and you’ve found that your techniques are equally powerful against celestials, fiends, and other divine entities.

feats.name: Divine Wings
feats.description: With effort, you can call forth magical wings from your back, similar in appearance to those of your extraplanar forebear, whether they be elegantly feathered wings or ominous bat wings.

feats.name: Djinni Magic
feats.description: The magic of djinn runs through your blood.

feats.name: Dracomancer
feats.description: The power infused into you by your draconic benefactor’s presence allows you to manifest their most iconic spells.

feats.name: Draconic Paragon
feats.description: Your connection to your draconic benefactor becomes especially pronounced.

feats.name: Dragon Grip
feats.description: Your hold has a unique draconic connection.

feats.name: Dragon Prince
feats.description: The blood of the Dragon Kings runs strong in your veins.

feats.name: Drain Emotion
feats.description: You touch an adjacent creature and attempt to draw out its excess emotion.

feats.name: Duskwalker Magic
feats.description: Your connection to psychopomps gives you the power to glimpse the near future and protect corpses from the ravages of undeath.

feats.name: Earthsense
feats.description: Your connection to earth and stone allows you to feel the slightest displacement that disturbs them, down to the shift of a pebble.

feats.name: Echoes in Stone
feats.description: You pause a moment to attune your senses to the stone around you.

feats.name: Eerie Compression
feats.description: Your limbs and even your torso can collapse in on themselves, allowing you to fit through tight spaces as though you were a Small creature.

feats.name: Efreeti Magic
feats.description: The magic of your efreeti ancestors flows through you.

feats.name: Elf Step
feats.description: You move in a graceful dance, and even your steps are broad.

feats.name: Embodied Dragoon Subjectivity
feats.description: When your allies call for swift reinforcements or lightning raids, you're ready to answer.

feats.name: Emissary Assistance
feats.description: As an emissary, you have assisted land-bound creatures in journeying underwater to visit your settlements.

feats.name: Endless Memories
feats.description: You've lived a thousand lives and done a hundred-thousand things.

feats.name: Energize Bite
feats.description: The deadly energy of your breath remains in your jaws to empower your attacks.

feats.name: Energy Blessed
feats.description: Energy runs through your blood more powerfully.

feats.name: Envenom Strike
feats.description: You spit venom onto a weapon you're holding or a weapon held by a willing creature within 30 feet; you can also use this ability to envenom your nagaji fangs unarmed attack.

feats.name: Evade Doom
feats.description: You can elude supernatural disaster.

feats.name: Evolved Spellhorn
feats.description: Your inborn arcane power grows.

feats.name: Expert Longevity
feats.description: You've continued to refine the knowledge and skills you've gained through your life.

feats.name: Extraplanar Cloud
feats.description: When you use Extraplanar Haze, you can spend 1 additional action to disperse the particles as a 10-foot-radius cloud centered on you instead of as a haze; the activity gains the concentrate trait.

feats.name: Fade Away
feats.description: Your ability to blend into the background allows you to fade away entirely or appear innocuous even to magical effects.

feats.name: Fell Rider
feats.description: You have trained with your animal companion to become a terrifying juggernaut on the battlefield.

feats.name: Ferocious Gust
feats.description: With heavy wing beats, you whip up a furious gust and direct it at your opponents.

feats.name: Ferocious Will
feats.description: You send a blast of magical feedback at the effect's source, dealing 5d6 mental damage with a basic Will save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

feats.name: Fey Ascension
feats.description: The fey influence on your form and features grows even more powerful and notable.

feats.name: Fey Magic
feats.description: You can use faerie magic to hide yourself and expose hidden foes.

feats.name: Fiend-trampling Stature
feats.description: Fiends unfortunate enough to be trampled beneath your feet or rent within your grasp are swiftly granulated into bone kindling and blood powder, and the pain of your strikes prevents them from action.

feats.name: Fiendish Magic
feats.description: You possess fiendish magic.

feats.name: Fierce Competitor
feats.description: You challenge a single ally to a physical competition.

feats.name: First World Adept
feats.description: Over time your fey magic has grown stronger.

feats.name: Fleeing Shriek
feats.description: You let out an ear-piercing screech.

feats.name: Flower Magic
feats.description: Certain magics in the world flow easily through your sap.

feats.name: Flowering Path
feats.description: Vitality and elemental wood flows out from your body and into the earth, infusing it with a stream of new life.

feats.name: Forever Among Humanity
feats.description: Passing unseen within society is second nature to you now.

feats.name: Formidable Breath
feats.description: Thanks to rigorous breathing exercises and a diet similar to that of your lineage, your magical breath is more powerful.

feats.name: Fortified Mind
feats.description: Your mind is unusually resilient and resistant to influence.

feats.name: Fortuitous Shift
feats.description: You have grown more comfortable with your penchant for supernatural disappearance.

feats.name: Four-armed Aspect
feats.description: You intone vows to shoulder others’ pains; in response, your torso sprouts an additional pair of arms to help you bear those burdens.

feats.name: Fox Arson
feats.description: When you critically hit with a foxfire Strike, the target takes an additional 1d4 persistent damage of the same type as the foxfire.

feats.name: Fox Trick
feats.description: You always have time for a joke or prank.

feats.name: Freeze It!
feats.description: You are no rime hag or Jadwiga, but the magic of the north has still left a mark on you.

feats.name: Friendly Fling
feats.description: You can scoop up your friends with your horns to hurl them across the battlefield.

feats.name: Full Flight
feats.description: Your flight is unbound, as natural as it was before you were awakened.

feats.name: Fully Flighted
feats.description: You gain the effects of Juvenile Flight at all times, rather than just once per day for 10 minutes.

feats.name: Garuda Magic
feats.description: You are descended from the wondrous garudas, and their keen senses manifest in your magical prowess.

feats.name: Glory and Valor!
feats.description: You call upon your ascendant blood with a mighty cry that fills you with a revitalizing energy for 1 minute or until you critically fail a Strike, whichever comes first.

feats.name: Goblin Club
feats.description: You can summon a mass of magic energy in your hand that, naturally, you use to smack those who offend you.

feats.name: Goring Charge
feats.description: Driven by the momentum of your thundering steps and powerful mass, your horns can pierce your foes.

feats.name: Grand Metamorphosis
feats.description: One of your nodes has adapted into a new magic-emitting organ.

feats.name: Grandmother's Wisdom
feats.description: You carry the bones of your ancestors with you, and you can ask them for counsel.

feats.name: Greater Transformation
feats.description: You can assume your oni form more easily, and with greater benefits.

feats.name: Green Dash
feats.description: The spirits of vegetation send you on your way, letting you move in a burst of speed.

feats.name: Gripping Limbs
feats.description: Nodules, hooks, or claws on your limbs allow you to cling to surfaces with ease.

feats.name: Group Aid
feats.description: Your upbringing emphasized teamwork, and helping your allies comes naturally to you.

feats.name: Grow Tool
feats.description: You grow a simple tool from your own body, coaxing flowers, vines, roots, and wood to grow and sprout from your flesh into the desired shape.

feats.name: Guarded Thoughts
feats.description: Your mind, like a dark naga's, foils attempts to read your thoughts.

feats.name: Guiding Luck
feats.description: Your luck guides you to look the right way and aim your blows unerringly.

feats.name: Hardy Traveler
feats.description: There’s no journey too far or burden too heavy when you have friends at your side or hope within your heart.

feats.name: Hefting Shadow
feats.description: Your shadow can contain objects.

feats.name: Heir of the Saoc
feats.description: In the past, you would have been a proud initiate of the Saoc Brethren.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Heir of the Saoc

feats.name: Helpful Halfling
feats.description: When you aid a friend with a task, you find many ways to help and avoid interfering.

feats.name: Herbal Forager
feats.description: Your skill with herbs has improved.

feats.name: Hero's Wings
feats.description: You have begun the final steps to reaching your full potential.

feats.name: Heroes' Call
feats.description: The songs of ancient heroes echo through your mind and quicken your pulse, especially in dire straits.

feats.name: Home in the Deep
feats.description: You cut through the water, and dwell beneath the surface with ease.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Home in the Deep

feats.name: Hone Claws
feats.description: You grind or gnaw a particularly wicked edge onto your claws.

feats.name: Horn and Bone Incantation
feats.description: You invoke mantras of tellurian rebirth.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Horn and Bone Incantation

feats.name: Hungry Goblin
feats.description: You’ll eat anything and anyone.

feats.name: Hypnotic Gaze
feats.description: You can widen your field of vision, allowing you to affect more creatures with your Hypnotic Lure.

feats.name: I Will Return
feats.description: Your special connection to death and rebirth allows you to sense when it’s your time to enter the Great Beyond, and now isn’t the time.

feats.name: Iivlar's Deflection
feats.description: You’re able to use the silk woven into your skin to deflect attacks, reducing the deadliness of grievous blows.

feats.name: Ill Tide
feats.description: Some land dwellers say that merfolk are bad luck.

feats.name: Improvisational Warrior
feats.description: You have increased skill with improvised weapons.

feats.name: Incredible Improvisation
feats.description: A stroke of brilliance gives you a major advantage with a skill despite your inexperience.

feats.name: Inner Breath
feats.description: Your body is capable of recycling its own air.

feats.name: Internal Respirator
feats.description: Your body can internally synthesize oxygen for limited periods of time.

feats.name: Into the Sky
feats.description: You fly as naturally as any dragonet.

feats.name: Invoke the Elements
feats.description: You summon an aura of shimmering heat, flurrying snow, crashing waves, or swirling wind and lightning.

feats.name: Irrepressible
feats.description: You are easily able to ward off attempts to play on your fears and emotions.

feats.name: Jalmeri Rakshasa Magic
feats.description: You can cast dispel magic and reaper's lantern once per day each as 2nd-level divine innate spells.

feats.name: Janni Hospitality
feats.description: You can use magic to show others desert hospitality.

feats.name: Janni Magic
feats.description: The magic of jann runs through your blood.

feats.name: Jotun's Boost
feats.description: Your giant might allows you to pick up your allies and hurl them across the battlefield.

feats.name: Kizidhar Magic
feats.description: You can wield the arcane magic of a kizidhar

feats.name: Kneel for No God
feats.description: Your ancestors’ defiance of magic and your people’s strictly egalitarian mindset mean that certain forms of magic have little effect on you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Kneel for No God

feats.name: Kodama Call
feats.description: The small spirits known as kodama pride themselves in taking care of trees and other vegetation, and they’ll happily come to your aid as well.

feats.name: Larcenous Tail
feats.description: You can perform minor mischief with your tail.

feats.name: Laughing Kholo
feats.description: Your sinister giggle is a sound of warning and threat.

feats.name: Legendary Size
feats.description: The vanaras of old were tricksters able to step across wide rivers or slip into impossibly small spaces.

feats.name: Lesser Augmentation
feats.description: You've focused on enhancing yourself and have received an improvement to one of your existing abilities.

feats.name: Life Leap
feats.description: You phase through a space that a living creature occupies in a flash, spontaneously appearing on the opposite side of it in a vibrant display of colorful light.

feats.name: Life's Blood
feats.description: Your journey to enlightenment has made your blood possess nigh-immortal properties, allowing you to heal others.

feats.name: Lingering Echoes
feats.description: Not everyone is reincarnated, and you feel a strong connection with the spiritual echoes of those who didn’t receive the same opportunity as you.

feats.name: Luck of the Clowder
feats.description: When you use Cat's Luck to reroll, any creatures you choose within 10 feet who also just failed against the same effect (such as a single spell) can also reroll their saving throws and use the better result.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Luck of the Clowder

feats.name: Lucky Keepsake
feats.description: You have a keepsake that grants you luck.

feats.name: Many Faces
feats.description: Putting on a new face offers a great way to get a fresh perspective on life.

feats.name: Many Guises
feats.description: You can use Shifting Faces three times per day instead of once per day.

feats.name: Marid Magic
feats.description: You channel the magic of marids.

feats.name: Mask of Pain
feats.description: Your mask has grown into a manifestation of your pain, which you can release.

feats.name: Memory of Skill
feats.description: Your years of training in a previous life didn’t go to waste with your death, and you can call upon this training when you most need it.

feats.name: Mentor of Legends
feats.description: You're an extraordinary teacher, capable of inspiring your students to amazing feats of athletics and ingenuity.

feats.name: Methodical Magic
feats.description: You can reorder the world with your magic.

feats.name: Mineral Deposits
feats.description: Precious metals from your bloodstream line your claws, jaws, or the tip of your tail, and you’re able call upon your blood to surge and empower your attacks.

feats.name: Miraculous Repair
feats.description: Geniekin can't grant magical wishes, but some echo of power lingers within you.

feats.name: Mirror Refuge
feats.description: Your origin in the space behind mirrors enables you to use a mirror as a hideaway, like the spell one with stone.

feats.name: Moderate Enhance Venom
feats.description: You upgrade the vishkanyan venom you can apply with Envenom to moderate vishkanyan venom.

feats.name: Moisture Bath
feats.description: Your moist skin is especially resistant to damage from temperature-altering effects.

feats.name: Moray Eel Mount
feats.description: You have either trained a giant moray eel since its hatching or have tamed one in the wild.

feats.name: Morrigna's Spider Affinity
feats.description: Much like morrignas, you feel an affinity for spiders.

feats.name: Mother's Mindfulness
feats.description: You have the protective instinct your own mother lacks and will gladly suffer in another's place.

feats.name: Mountain's Stoutness
feats.description: Your hardiness lets you withstand more punishment than most.

feats.name: Mud Boat's Passage
feats.description: You instinctively create magical boats that keep your feet dry (mostly).

feats.name: Multitalented
feats.description: You’ve learned to split your focus between multiple classes with ease.

feats.name: Natural Magnetism
feats.description: Your connection with elemental iron grants you a natural field of weak magnetic attraction.

feats.name: Night Magic
feats.description: You can tap into the magic that runs through your blood.

feats.name: No Evidence
feats.description: You leave little sign when attempting to remain unseen.

feats.name: Nodal Healing
feats.description: You can induce wound repair by circulating magic throughout your body.

feats.name: Occult Resistance
feats.description: Your study of occult practices has shown you how to best defend against them.

feats.name: Offensive Subroutine
feats.description: Nanites augment your attacks.

feats.name: Otherworldly Acumen
feats.description: The arcane magic you possess grows in power and complexity.

feats.name: Overcrowd
feats.description: As long as you are Small, you can end your movement in the same square as a Small ally.

feats.name: Pack Tactics
feats.description: You have mastered how to hunt with your pack.

feats.name: Paralyzing Jewel
feats.description: Your dedication to the ideals of art and beauty allows your head gem to access the power of the waning moon.

feats.name: Perfume Cloud
feats.description: You issue a cloud of your fragrance like a full-body sneeze—but one that might save your life as the powerful perfume makes your attackers' eyes sting and water.

feats.name: Peri Magic
feats.description: The shimmering embers of the righteous peris crackle at your fingertips.

feats.name: Persistent Odor
feats.description: Your pheromones now linger on creatures.

feats.name: Pervasive Superstition
feats.description: You steep yourself in superstition and practice ancient orc mental exercises for shrugging off the effects of magic.

feats.name: Phantom Orchestra
feats.description: An easy way to trick others is to throw your voice into a nearby forest or thicket to make strange noises.

feats.name: Piercing Quills
feats.description: Your quills can dig particularly deep into the flesh of your opponents.

feats.name: Pinch Time
feats.description: One of your parents has a human life span and another an elven life span, with your own somewhere between.

feats.name: Plane Step
feats.description: You temporarily move just beyond the threshold of the current plane, granting you concealment until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Plant Soul Siblings
feats.description: You’re now able to connect with the spirits present in the greenery of the natural world.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Plant Soul Siblings R

feats.name: Political Virtuoso
feats.description: Your mastery of the politics of your home nation is profound.

feats.name: Pollinate
feats.description: As you’re hit, you emit a dense cloud of pollen, obscuring you from sight.

feats.name: Predator's Growl
feats.description: You give a throaty growl to attempt to Demoralize a creature you just found.

feats.name: Preemptive Reconfiguration
feats.description: Your body anticipates the blow.

feats.name: Pride in Arms
feats.description: With a shout of triumph, you grant inspiration to an ally fight on.

feats.name: Qlippoth Magic
feats.description: You've deeply studied the secrets of your blood and can force reality to act against its own wishes.

feats.name: Quick Recovery (Yaoguai)
feats.description: You use your command over your form to repair lifethreatening wounds.

feats.name: Quietus Strikes
feats.description: Your connection to the Boneyard empowers you to bring death to all forms of life and unlife, exploiting their weaknesses.

feats.name: Quill Spray
feats.description: You can launch a mass of quills at opponents.

feats.name: Ragdya's Dance
feats.description: Even when faced with deadly danger, you fight with the rapturous laughter of Ragdya in your heart and can play impossible tricks.

feats.name: Rain of Bolts
feats.description: Throughout the day, your body produces powerful projectiles within your chassis.

feats.name: Rakshasa Magic
feats.description: You remember the secrets of your rakshasa forebears and know how to apply those memories to get results.

feats.name: Rakshasa Ravaged
feats.description: You and your family know well the ravages of rakshasa predations, and you know how to best defend yourself against their growing corruption in the world.

feats.name: Rapid Retraining
feats.description: Some feel trapped by their choices and have a tough time reinventing themselves.

feats.name: Rat Form
feats.description: You can transform into an innocuous-looking rat.

feats.name: Read the Stars
feats.description: You're incredibly skilled in iruxi astrology, and you can gain useful (if cryptic) hints from the stars' alignment.

feats.name: Rejuvenation Token
feats.description: You tie yourself to the Material Plane by implanting a piece of your consciousness into a weapon, piece of armor, or other item that's precious to you.

feats.name: Repair Module
feats.description: You trigger your body's repair programming, causing your body's nanites to heal your wounds.

feats.name: Replenishing Hydration
feats.description: You draw life from the water around you.

feats.name: Returning Throw
feats.description: You have mastered the technique of arcing a projectile so that it returns to your hand after being thrown, though this requires a moment to precisely calculate the trajectory and possible ricochets.

feats.name: Ricocheting Leap
feats.description: You quickly use your momentum to topple and spring off of foes.

feats.name: Ride On
feats.description: Even when tired, you refuse to give up, pushing yourself to extreme feats of endurance.

feats.name: Riptide
feats.description: Drag a grabbed creature into nearby water

feats.name: River Adaptation
feats.description: Webbing sprouts on your legs and tail as you shift to a more aquatic form.

feats.name: Rivethun Spiritual Attunement
feats.description: Your time spent among the Rivethun has heightened your awareness of animate spirits around you, giving you the ability to sense them briefly.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rivethun Spiritual Attunement U

feats.name: Rokoan Arts
feats.description: Ancestral spirits have begun to bond themselves to you, granting you powers characteristic of a rokoa.

feats.name: Roll with It (Goblin)
feats.description: When you take a big hit, your foe bounces you around like a rubber ball, but you escape the worst of the blow.

feats.name: Rolling White Bottle Form
feats.description: As you fall to the ground, you transform into a white bottle, gourd, or sake jar, then roll away before anyone can pick you up.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rolling White Bottle Form

feats.name: Rouse the Dreaming Relic
feats.description: The spirit within your pusaka resonates with other magical items in your possession.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rouse the Dreaming Relic

feats.name: Sash of the Wind
feats.description: At your request, the nature spirits of the air and wind spin themselves into an iridescent sash loosely draped around your shoulders that buoys you through the sky.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Sash of the Wind U

feats.name: Scalding Spit
feats.description: Your bodily fluids burn with surprising volatility, as if you ran on oil instead of blood.

feats.name: Scaling Poppet
feats.description: Your construction integrates ropes, hooks, or other tools to help you move across steep surfaces.

feats.name: Scarlet Strands
feats.description: The innate magic in your blood turns your signature crimson tresses into more than just a stylish coiffure.

feats.name: Scorching Disarm
feats.description: You make a weapon unbearable to hold.

feats.name: Sculpt Shadows
feats.description: You coax nearby shadows into the shape of a simple weapon or a simple tool or item, using a tiny piece of your shadow to make it solid; in doing so, you lose 1 Hit Point.

feats.name: Secrets of the Past
feats.description: You’ve established a stronger connection with your past selves and can play out the memories of your lifetimes in an instant, helping you draw on knowledge that lives deep within your mind.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Secrets of the Past

feats.name: Sense Thoughts
feats.description: You have an even stranger knack for knowing what other people are thinking.

feats.name: Sense for Trouble
feats.description: You can tell when something's off.

feats.name: Serpentcoil Slam
feats.description: Your people's ancient and storied rivalry with garudas led you to develop special techniques against flying foes.

feats.name: Serpentine Swimmer
feats.description: You undulate your body in a series of sinuous serpentine motions as you swim, drastically improving the speed at which you move through the water.

feats.name: Shadow Sight
feats.description: You draw on your connection with the Shadow Plane to see through all but the deepest darkness.

feats.name: Shadow Tempo
feats.description: As your ally moves past you, you match your movements to their rhythm, following them across the battlefield.

feats.name: Shaitan Magic
feats.description: The magic of shaitans runs through your blood.

feats.name: Sheltering Wing
feats.description: You raise your fledgling wings to protect you from attack, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and to saving throws against spells that target you until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Shore Gift
feats.description: Using old magic, you slip off your tail like an item of clothing and walk on two feet, resembling a humanoid ancestry, usually human but possibly elf, half-elf, or something stranger.

feats.name: Shory Aeromancer
feats.description: Your ancestors hailed from the flying cities of the Shory, and a few simple tricks have come down through the ages to you.

feats.name: Silent Step
feats.description: You Step, then Hide or Sneak.

feats.name: Siphon Torment
feats.description: Your progenitors suffered greatly at the hands of a curse, a fate you willingly take upon yourself rather than let fall upon others.

feats.name: Siren Song
feats.description: You can beguile and bewitch with your song.

feats.name: Skeletal Resistance
feats.description: Your body becomes resistant, your hardened bones deflecting weapons and other forms of damage.

feats.name: Skittering Scuttle
feats.description: You can scuttle farther and faster when maneuvering alongside allies.

feats.name: Slip into Shadow
feats.description: Your shadow magic bleeds into the space around you.

feats.name: Slip the Grasp
feats.description: You have some feature that allows you to quickly evade effects that restrain you.

feats.name: Smoke Sight
feats.description: You're used to fighting and hiding in a haze of smoke and flame.

feats.name: Snare Commando
feats.description: Your snares are so befuddling that your victims rarely notice you slipping out of sight.

feats.name: Soaring Form
feats.description: You have a fly Speed of 20 feet at all times.

feats.name: Sodbuster
feats.description: Years toiling in soil have made you an expert digger.

feats.name: Solar Rejuvenation
feats.description: If you rest outdoors for 10 minutes during the day, you regain Hit Points equal to your Constitution modifier × half your level.

feats.name: Solar Rejuvenation (Ghoran)
feats.description: The warmth and light of the sun gives you life.

feats.name: Solidarity
feats.description: You bestow some of your own life energies to mend damage.

feats.name: Speaker's Defense
feats.description: As a Speaker, you've forged a deep bond with powerful spirits who you can urge to rise up to defend you and your people.

feats.name: Spiritual Echo
feats.description: You possess the head gem of a deceased ancestor or loved one, which has begun to resonate with your own.

feats.name: Spore Cloud
feats.description: You unleash a cloud of pollen or similar spores.

feats.name: Squad Tactics
feats.description: You are adept at working with your allies to surround an enemy.

feats.name: Stone Bones
feats.description: Your intractable nature can help you shrug off even the most grievous injuries.

feats.name: Stone Passage
feats.description: Calling upon your knowledge of stonework and inherent magic, you momentarily make a section of stone insubstantial, allowing you to pass through.

feats.name: Stonewalker
feats.description: You have a deep reverence for and connection to stone.

feats.name: Strand Strider
feats.description: Your eight legs serve you well when climbing walls and webs alike.

feats.name: Strong Swimmer
feats.description: Your swim Speed increases to match your land Speed.

feats.name: Stubborn Defiance
feats.description: You're brave and stubborn and refuse to back down or bow to the wishes of another.

feats.name: Studious Adept
feats.description: You achieve a breakthrough in your exploration of magic.

feats.name: Swift Application
feats.description: You expertly combine the motions of attacking and coating your weapon with venom.

feats.name: Tears of Pearl
feats.description: You weep, and your tears become gleaming pearls as they fall to the ground, so beautiful others can't help but grab at them.

feats.name: Telekinetic Slip
feats.description: A thin shell of telekinetic energy pushes from your skin, widening your enemy's grasp enough for you to slip free.

feats.name: Terrain Advantage
feats.description: Non-lizardfolk creatures in difficult terrain are off-guard to you.

feats.name: Tetraelemental Assault
feats.description: Your Elemental Assault cycles through all four elements.

feats.name: Thorned Seedpod
feats.description: When your seedpods strike a felling blow, they burst into viciously thorny vines.

feats.name: Tongue Tether
feats.description: Your tongue can momentarily latch on as readily as your hands.

feats.name: Towering Growth
feats.description: You're capable of growing as tall as a pine tree for a short time.

feats.name: Transcendent Realization
feats.description: You've unleashed even more of your mind's limitless potential.

feats.name: Tree Climber
feats.description: You've spent much of your life among the treetops and have become an expert at quickly and safely climbing them.

feats.name: True Dragon's Flight
feats.description: Your wings have grown more powerful, capable of keeping you aloft longer.

feats.name: Two-Truths
feats.description: Your ability to imitate your progenitor is so strong, you can even convince yourself.

feats.name: Uncanny Cheeks
feats.description: You gain the Prescient Consumable and Prescient Planner feats, except that you always withdraw the objects from your cheek pouches.

feats.name: Undying Ferocity
feats.description: You resist death’s clutches with supernatural vigor, daring death to claim you while promising that any such attempt will surely fail.

feats.name: Unhampered Passage
feats.description: You won't allow others to restrain you.

feats.name: Unleash Yaoguai Might
feats.description: As you enter your yaoguai form, you draw upon your internal magic to assume an even greater form.

feats.name: Unyielding Disguise
feats.description: When you cast humanoid form or illusory disguise to alter your appearance, the spell's duration is 2 hours

feats.name: Velstrac Magic
feats.description: You know there's so much more to sensation than whips and chains—but whips and chains also have their place.

feats.name: Viper Strike
feats.description: You move and attack with a swiftness that most can't follow.

feats.name: Virtue-Forged Tattoos
feats.description: Your tattoos are a work of eldritch genius, a masterpiece of art, magic, and skin.

feats.name: Vivacious Conduit
feats.description: Your connection to the First World has grown, and its vital energy flows into you rapidly.

feats.name: Wary Skulker
feats.description: You can perform the Scout exploration activity at the same time as the Avoid Notice exploration activity.

feats.name: Water Dancer
feats.description: You glide through the water with graceful ease.

feats.name: Water Strider
feats.description: Water cradles your every step, allowing you to walk on its surface.

feats.name: Web Hunter
feats.description: Through the careful cultivation of highly sensitive hairs, you've developed the ability to sense creatures without seeing them.

feats.name: Wheedle and Jig
feats.description: You make capering motions and silly sounds to captivate onlookers.

feats.name: Whispers in the Night
feats.description: You weave your illusions with greater ability, allowing you to play tricks and slip through the night.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Whispers in the Night

feats.name: Wind God's Fan
feats.description: Your fan can stir up even more powerful winds.

feats.name: Wing Buffet
feats.description: You have a pair of draconic wings strong enough to batter your foes away and shove them away.

feats.name: Wing Step
feats.description: With a sharp flap of your wings, you stay light on your feet as you move.

feats.name: Winglet Flight
feats.description: Intense use and exercise have made your winglets more powerful.

feats.name: Wings of Air
feats.description: You can strain to call forth feathered or cloudy wings from your back.

feats.name: Witness of Earth
feats.description: The primal magic in your soul offers the patient earth’s timeless counsel.
feats.raw_header: PFS Restricted Witness of Earth U

feats.name: World-protector's Hospitality
feats.description: Through your spiritual power, you impede starvation and restore pantries.

feats.name: You Seem Somewhat Familiar
feats.description: You fought hundreds of foes in your various past lives, and now and then, something about a new opponent tugs at your memory, almost as if you defeated their grandparent long ago.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited You Seem Somewhat Familiar R

feats.name: Accursed Clay Fist
feats.description: You have replaced one of your forearms with one made of clay and infused with cursed arcane magic.

feats.name: Add Element
feats.description: Choose a second kinetic element to add to the one you already have.

feats.name: Advanced Domain Spirit
feats.description: Your connection with your domain spirit has deepened.

feats.name: Advanced Efficient Alchemy
feats.description: You make an even-larger batch of alchemical items each morning.

feats.name: Aerial Piledriver
feats.description: Heaving both yourself and your opponent into the air, you bring them crashing to the ground.

feats.name: Agile Grace
feats.description: Your graceful moves with agile weapons are beyond compare.

feats.name: Ancestral Mage
feats.description: The magic of your ancestry and bloodline are one and the same.

feats.name: Angel of Death
feats.description: All your Strikes against a creature you have Marked for Death have the death trait, causing the mark to be instantly killed when reduced to 0 Hit Points.

feats.name: Annotate Composition
feats.description: By putting composition to paper, you can create a source of stirring words or song that others can read and understand.

feats.name: Apparition's Quickening
feats.description: If your next action is to cast a cantrip or a spell that is at least 2 ranks lower than the highest-rank spell slot you have, you can draw power from one of your attuned apparitions to reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

feats.name: Armor Rune Shifter
feats.description: You learn the secrets of armor runes by viewing them through gems and can alter them at your discretion.

feats.name: Armored Rest
feats.description: You've slept many nights in your armor and gotten used to it.

feats.name: Assured Ritualist
feats.description: You can cover for a secondary caster's error.

feats.name: Attunement to Stone
feats.description: You can feel vibrations through the ground.

feats.name: Aura Shaping
feats.description: You control the size of your kinetic aura.

feats.name: Azure Fins
feats.description: When submerged in water or another liquid, you form small fin-like arms along your body, granting you far greater maneuverability while swimming.

feats.name: Bat Form
feats.description: You can transform into a bat.

feats.name: Battle Scars
feats.description: You've faced enough opponents that your experience is written across your skin, toughening you against your fiendish foes.

feats.name: Battle-Hardened Companion
feats.description: Accompanying you across countless battlefields has allowed your companion to unleash its full potential.

feats.name: Battlefront Sabotage
feats.description: You know methods of sabotaging your enemy's war machines and weaponry.

feats.name: Bear Empathy
feats.description: You have a magical affinity for bears and can speak to them through sounds and body language.

feats.name: Beast Dynamo Howl
feats.description: You've incorporated beast tech from Arcadia into your dynamo, adding in components from various terrifying creatures to enhance your prosthesis's capabilities.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Beast Dynamo Howl U

feats.name: Beastmaster Bond
feats.description: You can communicate telepathically with your animal companions within 100 feet.

feats.name: Belly Flop
feats.description: You crush an enemy under the enormous weight of your armor.

feats.name: Beneath Notice
feats.description: You are skilled at hiding from your foes and targets among the common populace.

feats.name: Bestiary Scholar
feats.description: You learn how to apply your extensive knowledge of certain creatures using the lore you know.

feats.name: Big Debut
feats.description: Now's your chance! You're a Firebrand, and the world must know it.

feats.name: Black Powder Flash
feats.description: You ignite a pinch of black powder in a foe's face.

feats.name: Blade of Law
feats.description: You call upon the power of law against a foe who would dare stand against you.

feats.name: Blade of the Heart
feats.description: The bonds of the heart are stronger than any steel, more powerful than any magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Blade of the Heart

feats.name: Blazing Streak
feats.description: Stride twice, making Strikes against up to four different creatures within reach at any point during your movement.

feats.name: Bloom Cabaret Entrance
feats.description: In socially exclusive venues like the Ivy District's Bloom Cabaret, you've learned how to make an entrance.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Bloom Cabaret Entrance U

feats.name: Borrow Time
feats.description: You reach ahead and make use of time that's yet to be.

feats.name: Breath of Vital Ash
feats.description: Reddish ash stains your ikon, impossible to clean off.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Breath of Vital Ash

feats.name: Broad Snare
feats.description: You can create longer snares for quick deployment, creating lines on the battlefield.

feats.name: Buckler Dance
feats.description: You spin your buckler defensively toward every attack.

feats.name: Bullet Dancer Reload
feats.description: You've learned to reload your simple firearms with uncanny grace, the ammunition simply falling into place as though part of a well-practiced kata.

feats.name: Burrowing Form
feats.description: Your eidolon can burrow through loose dirt.

feats.name: Burrowing Shot
feats.description: You tune light mortar to maximize penetration into hard surfaces.

feats.name: Call Worm Spirit
feats.description: You call forth a ghostly manifestation of the worm spirit.

feats.name: Called Shot
feats.description: You target a specific area of your foe's anatomy to debilitating effect.

feats.name: Camouflage
feats.description: You alter your appearance to blend in to the wilderness.

feats.name: Cascade Bearer's Spellcasting
feats.description: Your Cascade Bearer training allows you to broaden the horizons of your halcyon spells further than most Magaambyans, weaving in spiritual magic.

feats.name: Cascading Ray
feats.description: Magical energy spills out to extend beyond the creature you struck.

feats.name: Castigating Weapon
feats.description: The force of your deity’s castigation strengthens your body so you can strike down the enemy and its allies.

feats.name: Cautious Delver
feats.description: You've studied the many ways that ancient architects and spellcasters protected their possessions, such as by implementing deadly traps and curses, and learned some magic to counteract them.

feats.name: Certain Strike
feats.description: Even when you don’t hit squarely, you can still score a glancing blow.

feats.name: Chain Infusion
feats.description: The elemental matter in your blast keeps reconstituting itself to travel onward, no matter how many bodies it collides with.

feats.name: Channel Rot
feats.description: You've learned to channel your curse through weapons you wield instead of solely through your flesh.

feats.name: Close Contract
feats.description: You’re bolstered when a plan comes together.

feats.name: Close Formation
feats.description: You practiced fan dance as a member of a large group, coordinating your moves together to create living art and heightening your sense of spatial awareness.

feats.name: Cloud Walk
feats.description: Your growing link to cloud dragons has granted you the ability to walk on clouds.

feats.name: Cobra Envenom
feats.description: You slightly dislocate your joints to lash out with devious intent and the power to envenom your foe.

feats.name: Come and Get Me
feats.description: You open yourself to attacks so you can respond in turn.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Come and Get Me

feats.name: Comforting Presence
feats.description: Your occult connection to your allies lets you take on fear and confusion they feel.

feats.name: Command Attention
feats.description: You command the attention of all around you with style, ensuring their gaze falls only upon you until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Communal Tale
feats.description: Stories are an experience meant to be shared as a group.

feats.name: Consecrate Spell
feats.description: You infuse a spell with the power of your faith, consecrating it.

feats.name: Corpse-Killer's Defiance
feats.description: You defy Tar-Baphon with every undead you destroy, using your victory to rally your allies.

feats.name: Counterclockwork Focus
feats.description: You understand the need for law enforcement doctrine to adapt to the ever-changing innovations in technology and arcana.

feats.name: Courageous Assault
feats.description: With a mighty shout, you can stir an ally to attack.

feats.name: Crack Retort
feats.description: You can use Reactive Strike with a loaded firearm you're wielding.

feats.name: Crashing Slam
feats.description: You can dash your foe to the ground with a single blow.

feats.name: Cursebreaker
feats.description: Using various implements and esoteric methods, you can attempt to remove a curse from an unfortunate victim.

feats.name: Cut from the Air
feats.description: You can knock aside ranged attacks.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Cut from the Air

feats.name: Daring Flourish
feats.description: You make quick use of an opening from your daring stunts.

feats.name: Dazzling Block
feats.description: When you use Shield Block, you can create a flash of brilliant, multicolored light in a 15-foot cone.

feats.name: Dazzling Display
feats.description: You perform a bewildering show of prowess, such as by whirling and flashing a weapon, that unnerves foes.

feats.name: Deathguard
feats.description: The twisting rotted limbs, clattering bones, or swirling ectoplasm of your horde can hide you from others' vision.

feats.name: Debilitating Shot
feats.description: Aiming for a weak point, you impede your foe with a precise shot.

feats.name: Deepening Devotion
feats.description: Your investment in your draconic gift has unlocked greater power.

feats.name: Define "Report"
feats.description: Look, getting caught in a lie is a normal part of venture-gossip life.

feats.name: Deflecting Shot
feats.description: You're always ready to take a quick shot to deflect a weapon or distract a foe enough to render them off target.

feats.name: Defy Hell
feats.description: Your devotion to your cause gives you endless strength and courage to withstand the enemy's attacks.

feats.name: Defy Sorrow
feats.description: You draw on this spiritual pain to push your body to greater heights.

feats.name: Demanding Challenge
feats.description: If your skill check to challenge a foe is a success, the target of your challenge takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls (or –2 if you critically succeed) until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Deny Support
feats.description: Keep opponents from flanking when you Feint them.

feats.name: Deny the Songs of War
feats.description: To keep the peace, you disrupt those who seek to break it.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Deny the Songs of War

feats.name: Derring-do
feats.description: When you compound panache with even more derring-do, it somehow tends to work out.

feats.name: Destructive Block
feats.description: You can protect yourself more effectively, at the expense of your shield.

feats.name: Determined Dash
feats.description: Nothing can keep you from your enemy.

feats.name: Dimensional Disappearance
feats.description: You take advantage of teleportation to better hide your position.

feats.name: Dire Growth
feats.description: You transform into a primal reflection of your animal shape.

feats.name: Disarming Twist
feats.description: After your initial attack redirects your foe’s defenses, your follow-up wrests their weapon from their grasp.

feats.name: Disperse into Petals
feats.description: You merge with the blossoms sprouting from you and disperse, becoming a visible cloud of blossoms and petals.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Disperse into Petals R

feats.name: Disruptive Stance
feats.description: The slightest distraction can provoke your wrath, and you’re prepared to foil enemies’ actions.

feats.name: Distant Wandering
feats.description: Your body falls unconscious and your spirit projects out of it.

feats.name: Distracting Explosion
feats.description: Your enemies think they can concentrate on something else while you're nearby? Oh, you'll give them a distraction, all right!

feats.name: Dizzying Spin Dance
feats.description: You’re practiced in using your fans to spin with dizzying speed.

feats.name: Double, Double
feats.description: For each temporary oil or potion you brew during your daily preparations, you brew two copies of it.

feats.name: Drain Vitality
feats.description: You draw out the bestial magic energy within your bonded beast gun to fortify yourself, purge ongoing harm, and bolster your life force with a sheath of swirling life essence.

feats.name: Draw from the Land
feats.description: You pull strength from the surrounding terrain.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Draw from the Land

feats.name: Dream Guise
feats.description: You Stride into a willing ally's space, at which point both of your appearances shift into a shared third appearance, usually one that looks like a mix of the two of you.

feats.name: Drilled Reflexes
feats.description: You leave a lasting impression on your squadmates that makes them particularly adept at following your commands.

feats.name: Dual-Weapon Blitz
feats.description: You attack as you weave your way around the battlefield.

feats.name: Eerie Proclamation
feats.description: You know there are places in the world that are just wrong— places where the birds don't sing and where you always feel like you're being watched.

feats.name: Eidetic Memorization
feats.description: Pathfinders are often asked to study the intricacies of ancient history under less than ideal conditions, and you've trained your brain to make the most of your limited time.

feats.name: Eldritch Debilitations
feats.description: You know how to apply debilitations that are particularly troublesome for spellcasters.

feats.name: Eldritch Reload
feats.description: You integrate your talent for magic into your use of reloading weapons.

feats.name: Electrify Armor
feats.description: You electrify your armor to punish foes who dare to attack you.

feats.name: Elemental Shape
feats.description: You understand the fundamental elements of nature such that you can imbue them into your body and manifest as a living embodiment of those elements.

feats.name: Elemental Transformation
feats.description: You open your kinetic gate, but rather than activating your kinetic aura, you instead become overwhelmed with transformative elemental energy.

feats.name: Elucidating Mercy
feats.description: Your mercy grants clarity to those around you just when they need it most.

feats.name: Emerald Boughs Hideaway
feats.description: You use Emerald Bough techniques to create a small extradimensional space called a hideaway that lasts as long as you are conscious.

feats.name: Emissary of Peace
feats.description: Even when bloodshed is inevitable, you would rather see your foes surrender.

feats.name: Emotional Surge
feats.description: Your heart soars, increasing your power for a moment.

feats.name: Emphatic Emissary
feats.description: You can tell when diplomacy has failed and a meeting is close to unraveling or falling to blows.

feats.name: Endure Death's Touch
feats.description: Your conviction redirects the undead’s attack through your armor and then harmlessly away.

feats.name: Energy Fusion
feats.description: You fuse two spells together, combining their energy types.

feats.name: Ensnaring Wrappings
feats.description: Some of your wrappings come loose to ensnare a creature you recently damaged.

feats.name: Entwined Energy Ki
feats.description: You can transform your inner power into a type of energy to empower your ki abilities.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Entwined Energy Ki U

feats.name: Everyone Duck!
feats.description: You intentionally set off the trap, but you take special precautions to protect yourself and your allies from the trap’s effects.

feats.name: Exemplar Expertise
feats.description: Your soul has been further tempered in divine power.

feats.name: Expand Spiral
feats.description: Your prayers encompass your companions, granting you the ability to share Pharasma's blessings.

feats.name: Expanded Splash
feats.description: You can throw bombs at just the right trajectory to create especially large and powerful explosions.

feats.name: Expert Captivator Spellcasting
feats.description: You learn more powerful spells to enchant and deceive.

feats.name: Expert Skysage Divination
feats.description: Your studies of the stars have taught you about the mysteries of the cosmos.

feats.name: Exult in Violence
feats.description: You let out a war cry as your blow lands true, and judgment descends on an enemy.

feats.name: Eye for Smugglers
feats.description: Your time checking seemingly innocent cargo ships for illicit goods has made you as canny as you are suspicious.

feats.name: Fading
feats.description: You partially fade from reality.

feats.name: Falcon Swoop
feats.description: Like the fastest of predatory birds, you soar toward your prey at great speeds.

feats.name: Fearsome Brute
feats.description: Fear makes your foes weak and more vulnerable to your attacks.

feats.name: Feast Planner
feats.description: You learn the fortifying brew ritual, but you instead prepare dishes for a lavish meal that have the same effect as the drinks from the normal version of the ritual.

feats.name: Feed the Void
feats.description: The void within you manages to manifest itself temporarily, a black hole opening over your heart and threatening to draw everything in.

feats.name: Feral Lunge
feats.description: You spring on an unsuspecting opponent, tearing at them with your teeth.

feats.name: Feral Scramble
feats.description: Sinking your claws in, you propel yourself at shocking speed.

feats.name: Feral Toss
feats.description: You hurl foes away with a shake of your head.

feats.name: Ferocious Charge
feats.description: You've taught your companions to charge directly at an enemy.

feats.name: Fish from the Falls' Edge
feats.description: Seeing your ally fall, you let out a cry, sending your divine spark to them temporarily to keep them from tumbling down the River of Souls.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Fish from the Falls' Edge

feats.name: Flailtongue
feats.description: Your tongue has mutated into a lashing weapon reminiscent of Kabriri's bone-laden flail.

feats.name: Flash your Badge
feats.description: You make a fearsome show of your authority.

feats.name: Flinging Charge
feats.description: You throw a weapon to distract your opponent as you close the gap to begin your assault.

feats.name: Fluttering Distraction
feats.description: You’re trained in snapping and fluttering your fans to draw the eyes of observers around you.

feats.name: Fly on Shadowed Wings
feats.description: Your apparition embraces you, feeding on your magic to become a pair of protective wings.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Fly on Shadowed Wings

feats.name: Font of Knowledge
feats.description: Experience or focused study have granted you mastery of a number of topics.

feats.name: Form Up!
feats.description: You’ve trained in battle formations for a plethora of situations.

feats.name: Furious Sprint
feats.description: You rush forward.

feats.name: Fused Polearm
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can magically fuse your arcane bonded weapon and a magical staff together into one item, with the staff making up the haft of the weapon.

feats.name: Gather Disciples
feats.description: Gods need followers, and you know that its best to gather a flock in the present to support you in your endeavor.

feats.name: Gathering Moss
feats.description: By rooting yourself in place, you are able to focus your body's natural healing to work faster.

feats.name: Gaze of Veracity
feats.description: You can channel your mask's power to pierce through lies and see the truth in any situation.

feats.name: Gaze of Veracity
feats.description: You can channel your mask’s power to pierce through lies and see the truth in any situation.

feats.name: Geobukseon Retaliation
feats.description: Your armor has a retractable spike-covered shell reminiscent of Hwanggot’s heavily armored geobukseon, or “turtle ships.” The shell unfolds across your body, giving you a +4 circumstance bonus to AC and resistance 2 to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Get Behind Me!
feats.description: When saving your allies from harm, you push them behind you to better protect them.

feats.name: Ghost-path Epiphany
feats.description: Deviating from the orthodox path, you tread an inauspicious descent littered with flowers of death; this heretical choice will, in time, earn you the enmity and fear of more traditional cultivators.

feats.name: Ghostsong
feats.description: You have come to understand the pain and fury of spirits and can raise them to do your ghastly work.

feats.name: Giant Snare
feats.description: You can create bigger snares for quick deployment, making it more likely for a creature to walk into your snares.

feats.name: Gift of the Hoard
feats.description: In pleasing the cravings of a mighty dragon, they have deigned to impart some of their magical essence into your body.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Gift of the Hoard R

feats.name: Glass Skin
feats.description: Even if vitrumancy is a mystery to you, your blood and flesh know the secrets of the art of arcane glass.

feats.name: Glutton for Flesh
feats.description: You have developed a capacity to store more flesh within your gaunt body to leave yourself satiated longer.

feats.name: Goblin Jubilee Display
feats.description: Flames and explosions sear the air in a riot of color and devastation that rivals that wrought by even the wildest goblin party.

feats.name: Grave Sight
feats.description: Your ability to sense undead has improved.

feats.name: Great Cleave
feats.description: Your fury carries your weapon through multiple foes.

feats.name: Greater Awakened Power
feats.description: Your power undergoes yet another awakening

feats.name: Greater Bloodline
feats.description: You uncover the greater secrets of your bloodline.

feats.name: Greater Deathly Secrets
feats.description: Your undead secrets grow stronger still.

feats.name: Greater Debilitating Bomb
feats.description: You have learned enhanced techniques and alchemical secrets that allow you to expand the range of effects you can impose with your bombs.

feats.name: Greater Magical Edification
feats.description: You've continued to expand your compendium of tools to compile knowledge.

feats.name: Greater Magical Scholastics
feats.description: You broaden the scope of your magical understanding, allowing you to find the right path, detect hidden objects, and conceal those objects from unscrupulous rivals.

feats.name: Greater Spell Runes
feats.description: You gain more powerful spell runes.

feats.name: Greenwatcher
feats.description: Your experience fighting against and alongside fey creatures is nearly unrivaled.

feats.name: Grief's Fury
feats.description: A lost love. A broken spear. Rage burning through a hero-god.

feats.name: Growth Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental wood, causing your magic to expand and grow beyond its original limitations.

feats.name: Haft Beatdown
feats.description: The momentum of each of your attacks feeds into the next blow in the routine, creating a brutal rhythm that enables you to give your target one continuous beatdown.

feats.name: Halcyon Spellcasting Initiate
feats.description: Your knowledge of halcyon magic increases.

feats.name: Harden Flesh
feats.description: You fortify your skin with minerals drawn from earth and stone.

feats.name: Harrying Strike
feats.description: Your attack prevents a foe from pursuing your allies.

feats.name: Healing Transformation
feats.description: You can take advantage of shapechanging magic to close wounds and patch injuries.

feats.name: Hell-Lancer Shot
feats.description: Make a ranged Strike with a firearm against a fiend, ignoring the fiend's concealed condition and any lesser cover.

feats.name: Helpful Tinkering
feats.description: You don't just tinker with your own innovation, you fiddle with your allies' weapons as well (for their benefit, of course).

feats.name: Hematocritical
feats.description: You bathe in the arterial fluids of your enemy, drinking deep of their freed essence to empower your magic and increase your spellcasting efficacy.

feats.name: Heroic Recovery
