feats.description: The restorative power of your healing invigorates the recipient.

feats.name: Hidden Intentions
feats.description: You layer meanings in your words, and only those you've taken into your confidence can divine your true plans.

feats.name: Hilt Hammer
feats.description: You know how to turn any weapon into a bone-crushing implement of skeletal destruction.

feats.name: Holy Flower
feats.description: Milani's grace empowers you further.

feats.name: Holy Light
feats.description: You raise your arms to the sky and pray fervently, surrounding yourself in a beacon of holy light.

feats.name: Hook 'Em
feats.description: The Salt Breakers learned to use whatever they could during the Vidric Revolution, and they quickly mastered the art of making a rope into a useful tool in combat.

feats.name: Horselord's Bond
feats.description: Your bond with your horse becomes supernaturally strong as the two of you continue your crusade against Zon-Kuthon's dominion.

feats.name: House of Imaginary Walls
feats.description: You erect an imaginary barrier others believe to be real.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard House of Imaginary Walls

feats.name: Hunting Snag
feats.description: Learning from nature's predators has taught you how to keep your prey close.

feats.name: I Meant to Do That
feats.description: Somehow your stray bullet causes an unintended reaction that creates a problem for your enemy: perhaps a ricochet knocks your foe's weapon away or they stumble over stray debris in an attempt to dodge your bullets.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard I Meant to Do That

feats.name: Impose Order (Psychic)
feats.description: You bring discipline to your mind and magic, ensuring that you don't under-perform.

feats.name: Imposing Destrier
feats.description: Under your care, your mount has realized its innate potential.

feats.name: Impressive Landing
feats.description: You slam into the ground, shattering it around you.

feats.name: Improved Command Undead
feats.description: Undead creatures find it all but impossible to resist your commands.

feats.name: Incredible Companion (Ranger)
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to grow and develop.

feats.name: Incredible Familiar (Familiar Master)
feats.description: Your familiar is infused with even more magic than other familiars.

feats.name: Infiltration Assassination
feats.description: With a high-priority target in reach, you quickly move to eliminate them.

feats.name: Inked Cache
feats.description: You've learned to use your Twilight Talon's mark to secret away contraband.

feats.name: Instant Armor
feats.description: A knight is nothing without their armor, and you know how to keep yours ready.

feats.name: Into the Future
feats.description: You know your spell will be needed not now but in a few moments, so you cast your magic into the future.

feats.name: Invigorating Breath
feats.description: Your spirit guide exhales its sweet-smelling breath on you, granting you the strength to push through your pain.

feats.name: Journey Of the Sky Chariot
feats.description: Small wings, flaming wheels, or another signifier of flight sprout from your ikon as it gains the power to lift you from the ground.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Journey Of the Sky Chariot

feats.name: Just One More Thing
feats.description: After your attempt to influence someone goes poorly, you add another bit of information or ask a pointed question, possibly salvaging your previous attempt.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Just One More Thing

feats.name: Klingegeist
feats.description: Your imprisonment inside a final blade used to perform countless executions has instilled in you an aptitude for entering and possessing similar sharp implements of murder.

feats.name: Knockback
feats.description: The weight of your swing drives your enemy back.

feats.name: Knockback Strike
feats.description: You focus your strength into a blow powerful enough to push an enemy away from you.

feats.name: Know it All
feats.description: Your knowledge of abstruse topics is unparalleled.

feats.name: Lasting Protection
feats.description: When you use Commitment to Protection, the effects on your ally apply to all attacks the creature or hazard makes.

feats.name: Lastwall Warden
feats.description: Use your shield to protect your allies.

feats.name: Lead the Way
feats.description: You move forward, creating an opening for others to follow.

feats.name: Lesson of the Splintered Aegis
feats.description: With your attack, you demonstrate to your student a hole in your enemy's defenses.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lesson of the Splintered Aegis

feats.name: Lessons of Flux
feats.description: You apply the persistence and permutation taught by faydhaans to your failures.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lessons of Flux U

feats.name: Lethal Edge
feats.description: When the terrified are struck by your spectral weapon, they feel the anguish of every life taken by Silent Lenore.

feats.name: Lightspeed Assault
feats.description: You zoom from enemy to enemy, striking each in an instant.

feats.name: Litany Against Sloth
feats.description: You rail against the sin of sloth, turning a foe’s laziness against it.

feats.name: Litany of Self-Interest
feats.description: You compel a creature to act toward its own ends rather than consider others.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Litany of Self-Interest U

feats.name: Lock On
feats.description: Aha! You lock on to your enemy's weak point to assist your construct companion in destroying it.

feats.name: Lunging Spellstrike
feats.description: Your spell unwinds the structure of your staff to make it exceptionally long, or even separate it into shards held together by magical power.

feats.name: Maelstrom Flow
feats.description: You pour energy into an improvised weapon, speeding its destruction to grant it power.

feats.name: Magical Adaptation
feats.description: When an obstacle bars your path, you pull a trick from your sleeve to overcome it.

feats.name: Major Lesson
feats.description: Your patron grants you even greater secrets.

feats.name: Martial Exercise
feats.description: You've become comfortable in using weapons that you might not have picked up before training with the Swords.

feats.name: Mask of The 12th Step
feats.description: You have reached the 12th Step and been instructed in greater secrets of Razmir’s doctrine.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Mask of The 12th Step

feats.name: Master Monster Hunter
feats.description: You have a nearly encyclopedic knowledge of all creatures of the world.

feats.name: Masterful Obfuscation
feats.description: You've mastered the art of deceiving others about your area of study.

feats.name: Mated Birds in Paired Flight
feats.description: Your ikons bond like a pair of one-winged birds.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Mated Birds in Paired Flight

feats.name: Menacing Prowess
feats.description: Scaring off multiple people at once is your specialty.

feats.name: Merciful Elixir
feats.description: You mix a special additive into your elixir that calms the drinker’s body and mind.

feats.name: Merciless Rend
feats.description: Your eidolon rends its foes.

feats.name: Meteoric Spellstrike
feats.description: A trail of energy flows from your target back to you.

feats.name: Methodical Debilitations
feats.description: You strategically craft your debilitations to lessen or negate an enemy’s tactical advantages.

feats.name: Mirror Shield
feats.description: You reflect the spell back against its caster.

feats.name: Mockingbird's Disarm
feats.description: The Mockingbird is a master at running into foes and coming away with their weapons.

feats.name: Momentum Strike
feats.description: Putting your weight behind your weapon's swing, you can push one enemy into another.

feats.name: Monk's Flurry
feats.description: You gain the Flurry of Blows action.

feats.name: Nimble Strike
feats.description: You’re cunning enough to find an opening in an opponent’s attack.

feats.name: No Gods, Only Mortals!
feats.description: You order the caster to stop their spellcasting.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard No Gods, Only Mortals!

feats.name: Ode to Ouroboros
feats.description: You learn the ode to ouroboros composition spell (page 371), which enables you to temporarily spare your allies from death.

feats.name: On Borrowed Time
feats.description: You accelerate a foe's personal timestream, which causes them to experience time at a faster rate, putting a terrible strain on their mind and body.

feats.name: Ongoing Strategy
feats.description: You're constantly studying small aspects of everyone's movements, even if you don't have a stratagem in place ahead of time.

feats.name: Open the Blazing Eye
feats.description: Thanks to your diligence in the study of divine and occult mysteries, you can focus to temporarily attain a perception beyond the ordinary.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Open the Blazing Eye

feats.name: Opportune Opening
feats.description: Your combat training taught you to capitalize on any moment of weakness from your foe.

feats.name: Overpowering Charge
feats.description: You trample foes as you charge past.

feats.name: Overwhelming Energy
feats.description: With a complex gesture, you call upon the primal power of your spell to overcome enemies’ resistances.

feats.name: Pact of the Nightblossom
feats.description: You’ve sworn a pact with Jenway Nightblossom of the Synod of Truth in Dreams, a talented oneiromancer and pactbinder.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of the Nightblossom R

feats.name: Pass Through
feats.description: Filtering your form through the substance of an object, you can pass through walls, doors, and more.

feats.name: Patron's Whisper
feats.description: You gain the ability to speak to your charge over great distances.

feats.name: Peafowl Strut
feats.description: You slowly move across the battlefield with dangerous grace.

feats.name: Peerless Warden
feats.description: Your mastery of primal magic has given you access to the greatest secrets of warden magic.

feats.name: Penetrating Fire
feats.description: You blast a bullet through one foe and into another.

feats.name: Penetrating Shot
feats.description: You shoot clear through an intervening creature to hit your prey.

feats.name: Perfect Ki Expert
feats.description: You gain an appropriate ki spell for your School of Perfection: unblinking flame aura for Unblinking Flame, unbreaking wave vapor for Unbreaking Waves, unfolding wind buffet for Unfolding Wind, or untwisting iron roots for Untwisting Iron.

feats.name: Petrifying Gaze Mimicry
feats.description: Either by witnessing or surviving the petrifying stare of a medusa or similar creature, you have learned to petrify those you lock eyes with.

feats.name: Phenom's Verve
feats.description: You're possessed with an incredibly vivacious spark that separates you not only from ordinary gun users and gunslingers, but even from other phenoms.

feats.name: Plant Shape
feats.description: You can take the shape of a plant creature.

feats.name: Potent Poisoner
feats.description: By concentrating your poisons’ toxic components, you make them harder for victims to resist.

feats.name: Practiced Defender
feats.description: After extensive practice with the Swords, you're comfortable enough with your shield to move at a normal pace with it raised.

feats.name: Practiced Reloads
feats.description: You've mastered the reloading techniques and methods usually practiced by only the most dedicated firearm professionals.

feats.name: Precious Munitions
feats.description: You mix flecks of precious materials you've gathered on your journeys into your custom bullets to bring out those properties in your temporary ammunition.

feats.name: Precise Debilitations
feats.description: You attack with great precision.

feats.name: Preserve the Horde
feats.description: The act of summoning additional undead minions doesn't make you lose the focus required to maintain the animation of your horde.

feats.name: Prevailing Position
feats.description: Your flexibility with stances lets you sacrifice their benefits to better protect yourself.

feats.name: Primal Howl
feats.description: Your companion can let out a howl laced with your primal magic.

feats.name: Pristine Weapon
feats.description: Your verdant weapon can cut through the resistances of magical creatures.

feats.name: Promise of Pain
feats.description: You call out to an enemy in distress, promising them a future of unending pain.

feats.name: Prophet's Lockbox
feats.description: You’ve learned secret methods that allow you to store your valuables where no one else can reach them.

feats.name: Propulsive Leap
feats.description: By expelling flames from your feet or levitating through electrical repulsion, you propel yourself through the air.

feats.name: Protective Bond
feats.description: The power of your bond can protect you and your eidolon from harm.

feats.name: Protective Strike
feats.description: You keep harm at bay.

feats.name: Provocator Dedication
feats.description: For you, fighting is as much about style as skill.

feats.name: Pushing Attack
feats.description: Your eidolon has an attack that pushes away enemies.

feats.name: Quicken Heartbeat
feats.description: You’ve replaced your heart with one made of animated quicksilver and living adamantine.

feats.name: Quickened Casting
feats.description: If your next action is to cast a cantrip or a spell that is at least 2 ranks lower than the highest-rank spell slot you have, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

feats.name: Radiant Armament
feats.description: Your blessed armament radiates power, further enhancing your chosen weapon.

feats.name: Rain-Scribe Mobility
feats.description: You surround yourself in a mantle of Rain-Scribe magic and Stride twice; difficult terrain does not reduce your Speed, even if the difficult terrain has been manipulated by magic.

feats.name: Rapid Recharge
feats.description: You tap into an arcane trick to recover your ability to meld spells and attacks.

feats.name: Reactive Charm
feats.description: You're so charming and distracting that when pressed, you can cast a simple enchantment in time to foil an attacker.

feats.name: Rebounding Assault
feats.description: You hurl your melee weapon at an opponent, then fire a bullet into the weapon's hilt, making it deal additional damage and bounce back to your grasp.

feats.name: Recover Spell
feats.description: You recover the energy of a recently disrupted spell, allowing you to cast it again as long as you do so immediately before the energy dissipates.

feats.name: Redirecting Draft
feats.description: You flap your wings to blow arrows off course.

feats.name: Redirecting Shot
feats.description: Seeing your ally's attack about to go astray, you fire your weapon to right its course.

feats.name: Reflexive Devotion
feats.description: The power of dragons flows through you at the merest thought.

feats.name: Reflexive Riposte
feats.description: You can riposte almost without a thought.

feats.name: Renewing Cycle
feats.description: The first time each round that you Cycle Elemental Stance, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to half your level that last until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Replenishment of War
feats.description: Striking out against your enemies draws praise and protection from your deity.

feats.name: Repurposed Parts
feats.description: You are familiar with the fittings and cogwheels of your snares and can repurpose parts from prepared quick-deploy snares to assemble a new creation on the fly.

feats.name: Resilient Touch
feats.description: Your healing energies create an aura of protection that defends your allies against more than just blades and arrows.

feats.name: Resounding Blow
feats.description: You strike your enemy in the head with such force that its ears ring.

feats.name: Reverberating Spell
feats.description: Your spell disorients your targets with a metallic clangor.

feats.name: Roadkill
feats.description: In your hands, any vehicle is a weapon.

feats.name: Rockslide Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental earth, causing chunks of stone to litter the ground.

feats.name: Rocky Flesh
feats.description: Your flesh takes on the hardness of stone.

feats.name: Roll the Bones of Fate
feats.description: You roll a handful of bones to learn (or perhaps influence) the future course of events.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Roll the Bones of Fate

feats.name: Rope Mastery
feats.description: Ropes are your tool of choice, and you deploy them in versatile ways.

feats.name: Rubbery Skin
feats.description: Your skin develops a malleable, rubbery quality.

feats.name: Runic Mind Smithing
feats.description: You focus your mind on thoughtforms of fundamental magical forces, shaping them into a property rune that you mentally etch onto your mind weapon.

feats.name: Running Kick
feats.description: Your companion weaves in and out of combat, swiftly attacking before getting to a better position.

feats.name: Saving Slash
feats.description: You quickly whirl your blade, trying to deflect enough momentum to avoid the worst of the attack.

feats.name: Scour the Library
feats.description: Seeing an enemy's attack, you quickly consult multiple scraps of lore in your mind, synthesizing them into the perfect plan.

feats.name: Scout's Pounce
feats.description: You leap from the shadows to strike at your foes.

feats.name: Scroll Adept
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can create two temporary scrolls containing arcane spells from your spellbook.

feats.name: Seal of the Golden Dragon
feats.description: Your familiar coils around you, protecting you with its magical resistance.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Seal of the Golden Dragon

feats.name: Secrets of Steel
feats.description: As your prowess with weapons increases, so does the ferocity of magic you channel through those weapons.

feats.name: Seize Advantage
feats.description: You take the openings granted by your student's success to reposition yourself.

feats.name: Sense the Strike
feats.description: You sense how an incoming attack moves through ambient primal energy, predicting how best to dodge.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Sense the Strike U

feats.name: Shadow Magic
feats.description: You gain the ability to fuse and play with shadows by using focus spells specific to shadowdancers.

feats.name: Shadow Reservoir
feats.description: Your own shadow speaks to you, providing knowledge of spells and a reservoir of magical power.

feats.name: Shadow Sneak Attack
feats.description: You gain the sneak attack class feature, except you deal 1d6 precision damage regardless of your level.

feats.name: Shadow of Death
feats.description: Strikes you make with your deity’s favored weapon against a creature with the doomed condition have the death trait, causing the target to be instantly killed when reduced to 0 Hit Points.

feats.name: Shall Not Falter, Shall Not Rout
feats.description: You gain the shall not falter, shall not rout focus spell.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Shall Not Falter, Shall Not Rout R

feats.name: Share Weakness
feats.description: You select an object from your esoterica that has great personal value to you, such as a locket or treasured ring, and you grant it to an adjacent ally, establishing a personal link that allows your ally to affect an enemy as if they were you.

feats.name: Shared Avoidance
feats.description: You can project your premonitions of danger to your allies.

feats.name: Shared Synergy
feats.description: You can grant the benefit from Dualistic Synergy to an ally within 30 feet instead of yourself, either allowing that ally to Recall Knowledge, granting that ally temporary Hit Points, or both, depending on the spell’s tradition.

feats.name: Shattering Strike (Weapon Improviser)
feats.description: The improvised weapon shatters, destroying it completely but dealing an additional 3d6 piercing damage to the creature you hit with the Improvised Pummel.

feats.name: Shield Salvation
feats.description: You can save your shield from total destruction, even after a devastating attack.

feats.name: Shield of Faith
feats.description: Residual energy from your domain spells bolsters your defenses.

feats.name: Shield of Reckoning
feats.description: When you shield your ally against an attack, you call upon your power to protect your ally further.

feats.name: Ship's Shadow
feats.description: After extensive training around and on board ships, you've learned how to use their size and contours to conceal yourself.

feats.name: Side by Side (Druid)
feats.description: You and your animal companion fight in tandem, distracting your foes and keeping them off balance.

feats.name: Signature Spell Expansion
feats.description: Your innate connection to magic lets you cast more spells with greater freedom.

feats.name: Signifer's Sight
feats.description: The magic flowing through your signifer's mask allows you to see in the dark, and the mask dampens the distraction caused by sudden flashes of bright light.

feats.name: Signifer's Sight
feats.description: The magic flowing through your signifer’s mask allows you to see in the dark, and the mask dampens the distraction caused by sudden flashes of bright light.

feats.name: Silencing Strike
feats.description: A quick strike to the face or mouth silences your opponent.

feats.name: Silent Sting
feats.description: You quickly hide your weapon to make it difficult to pin the attack on you.

feats.name: Sin Counterspell
feats.description: Your deep connection to a specific sin allows you to easily negate spells that sin opposes.

feats.name: Sinking Jaws
feats.description: Like how a constrictor wraps itself around its next meal, your companion tightens its teeth around its constrained prey to squeeze the life out of it.

feats.name: Siphon Life
feats.description: Experiences with necromantic energy have left a permanent mark on you.

feats.name: Sixth Pillar Dedication
feats.description: You use your physical discipline to channel your magic.

feats.name: Slayer's Presence
feats.description: Your very presence strikes fear into the undead.

feats.name: Sleeper Hold
feats.description: You pinch crucial points of your target's nervous system, impeding its ability to function.

feats.name: Slingshot Maneuver
feats.description: You spin your lash out for your ally to grab on to, giving them a boost to their movement.

feats.name: Sneak Adept
feats.description: It’s almost impossible to spot you.

feats.name: Sour Bomb
feats.description: You can mix ingredients with a powerful sour smell into an alchemical bomb to make its explosion an overpowering stench.

feats.name: Spear of Doom
feats.description: The conditions for your doom have been met, and you brace yourself for a battle that will see you either live to fight another day or die a legend.

feats.name: Spectral Advance
feats.description: You gain the spectral advance devotion spell

feats.name: Spell Swallow
feats.description: Your ostilli has grown strong enough to completely consume a spell cast at you, granting you the Devour Ambient Magic action. Devour Ambient Magic [reaction] (concentrate) Frequency once per day; Trigger A creature Casts a Spell with you as the only target; Effect Your ostilli radiates cyan light as its tentacle-like filters attempt to consume the magical effect.

feats.name: Spellmaster's Ward
feats.description: You can create a number of powerful shielding runes that bolster your defenses against damaging spells by absorbing the worst of the energy to keep you safe.

feats.name: Spinebreaker
feats.description: You squeeze your opponent in a vicious bear hug, putting intense pressure on their nerves, joints, or other pain points.

feats.name: Spiritual Flurry
feats.description: When you use Spiritual Strike, hit targets become off-guard until the end of your current turn.

feats.name: Spraying Mutation
feats.description: Your ostilli can launch a multitude of darts at once over a short distance.

feats.name: Springboard
feats.description: You use the power of your leg lashing out to spring off your foe and leap toward another, your talon descending in a crescent.

feats.name: Spy's Countermeasures
feats.description: You’ve learned how to analyze and fake your responses to the most common magic used against spies.

feats.name: Staggering Blow
feats.description: You've trained your megafauna companion to stagger its enemies, impeding their ability to fight back.

feats.name: Stalwart Standard
feats.description: Your banner makes it harder for your foes to push your allies around and encourages your allies to protect the innocent.

feats.name: Standard-Bearer's Sacrifice
feats.description: Seeing an enemy take aim at your ally, you bravely flourish your banner to redirect their attention to you.

feats.name: Starlit Spells
feats.description: The stars reveal and punish your enemies.

feats.name: Steal Time
feats.description: You reach into another creature's timeline and attempt to alter their flow of time.

feats.name: Steal the Sky
feats.description: You can take away the air that keeps a flying foe aloft.

feats.name: Steal the Sky
feats.description: You can take away the air that keeps a flying foe aloft.

feats.name: Stir Allies
feats.description: You shout a command for your allies to scramble.

feats.name: Stonebane
feats.description: Your stonestrike attacks deal 1d6 additional damage against constructs, creatures with the earth trait, and earthen objects, such as a stone door.

feats.name: Strident Command
feats.description: The common folk heed your demands, and though your true foes rarely bend to your commands, when they do the hesitation can cost them the battle.

feats.name: Stumbling Finisher
feats.description: Your excellent display of fighting prowess leaves your opponent stumbling back.

feats.name: Stunt Performer Stance
feats.description: You clear your mind, regulate your breathing, and prepare your muscles in a stance inspired by Kemen Kayton, a graduate of Zimar’s Monastery of the Seven Forms.

feats.name: Sure-Footed
feats.description: Even if you're knocked off balance, your armor continues to protect you.

feats.name: Surrounding Flames
feats.description: When you cast wall of fire, you can modify it to create a 10-foot-radius hemisphere of fire.

feats.name: Suspect of Opportunity
feats.description: Sometimes something intrudes upon your case unexpectedly, such as an ambush sent to bring your investigation to a close.

feats.name: Sustaining Steel
feats.description: You pull magic into your weapon, using its substance to transform the magic into restorative energy.

feats.name: Sweeping Fan Redirection
feats.description: You can redirect ammunition back at the creature that fired it with sweeping gusts of wind.

feats.name: Sweeping Tail
feats.description: Your companion swings its tail powerfully.

feats.name: Switcheroo
feats.description: You attempt to deftly swap places with an adjacent enemy to avoid the attack.

feats.name: Symphony of the Unfettered Heart
feats.description: You learn the symphony of the unfettered heart composition spell (page 371), which enables you to protect an ally against incapacitating conditions.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Symphony of the Unfettered Heart

feats.name: Tactical Debilitations
feats.description: You learn new debilitations that grant you tactical advantages against your foes.

feats.name: Tactical Reflexes
feats.description: You are particularly swift at punishing foes who leave you openings.

feats.name: Tag Team
feats.description: Your skilled teamwork with your spotter enables you both to assist one another when you falter, using either other's failures as opportunities to strike.

feats.name: Tales of the Road
feats.description: The blessings of Isthralei connect you to the thrum of the stories that underlie all settlements.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Tales of the Road

feats.name: Tangle of Battle
feats.description: Your vicious strike pulls your foe closer, giving you the opportunity to grab them.

feats.name: Targeting Finisher
feats.description: Your attack harms and hinders your foe.

feats.name: Targeting Strike
feats.description: Your attack creates an opening in your target's defenses for your allies to capitalize on.

feats.name: Tectonic Stomp
feats.description: You cause minor tremors that topple your enemies.

feats.name: Tempest-Sun Shielding
feats.description: You transform unrealized spell energy into a protective shield.

feats.name: Terrain Form
feats.description: You crumble to pieces, becoming composed of the very terrain to which you're bound, with the effects of the gaseous form spell, or you reconstitute into your normal form.

feats.name: Terrifying Howl
feats.description: You unleash a terrifying howl.

feats.name: Thaumaturge's Investiture
feats.description: Magical equipment and gear are the tools of your trade, and you know you need as many as possible to help you against the supernatural.

feats.name: The Dead Walk
feats.description: You beseech warrior spirits to come forth and aid you.

feats.name: The Truth as I See it
feats.description: Your knack for spinning a believable reality from threads of story is so practiced that sometimes even you begin to believe what you're saying.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard The Truth as I See it

feats.name: Three Pecks of Dew
feats.description: At this stage of cultivation, your body is as much spirit as flesh.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Three Pecks of Dew

feats.name: Through Spell
feats.description: Spells you cast can transform briefly into vital essence, traveling harmlessly through living and undead creatures between you and your target, blocked only by solid objects.

feats.name: Thunderclap Spell
feats.description: Your lightning splits the air, generating a booming shock wave.

feats.name: Tiller's Aid
feats.description: You can quickly Aid your crop.

feats.name: Tiller's Drive
feats.description: Increase your Speed and that of your crop.

feats.name: Topple Foe
feats.description: You take advantage of the opening created by your ally to tip your foe off their feet.

feats.name: Toppling Tentacles
feats.description: When you cast black tentacles, you can modify it to trip the targets.

feats.name: Torrential Backlash
feats.description: Calling upon forbidden practices, you release the curse from within yourself, allowing it free rein to destroy everything around you.

feats.name: Touch of Lunacy
feats.description: In moments of viciousness, your curse can partially infect your prey.

feats.name: Tough Cookie
feats.description: Though you've taken a lot of punishment, you aren't easily brought down.

feats.name: Traces of the Divine
feats.description: You can detect those who use divine magic like an additional sense.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Traces of the Divine

feats.name: Trample Mimicry
feats.description: You Stride up to double your speed and can move through the spaces of creatures at least one size smaller, trampling each creature whose space you enter.

feats.name: Trampling Charge
feats.description: You urge your mount to charge into the fray, trampling all enemies who stand in your path.

feats.name: Transcendent Deflection
feats.description: You charge your weapon with spiritual energy and intercept the attack.

feats.name: Transpose
feats.description: You switch places with your eidolon.

feats.name: Trial by Skyfire
feats.description: Your lips murmur as you portend a great disaster, one you hope you survive.

feats.name: Trick Shot
feats.description: You shoot not at your foe but at an object nearby.

feats.name: Tumbling Opportunist
feats.description: You use a burst of stamina to perform a breathtaking feat of Acrobatics as you speed through a foe's space, leaving your foe lying flat on their back.

feats.name: Tunnel
feats.description: You gain a burrow speed of 10 feet.

feats.name: Turn to Mist
feats.description: You turn into vapor, gaining the effects of gaseous form.

feats.name: Twin Riposte
feats.description: A clever parry with one weapon leaves your opponent open to an attack with the other weapon.

feats.name: Twin Shot Knockdown
feats.description: You fire at an enemy while targeting a part of its anatomy that will disrupt its balance.

feats.name: Twin Weakness
feats.description: As you make an attack augmented by your esoterica, you also press your implement against the creature, applying its weakness as your implement's energies sear the creature's flesh.

feats.name: Unbelievable Escape
feats.description: Your ability to narrowly evade danger defies all logic.

feats.name: Unbreakable Bond
feats.description: You and your megafauna companion are bound together; as long as you live, it's much harder for your companion to die.

feats.name: Uncanny Dodge
feats.description: You gain the deny advantage class feature.

feats.name: Unleash the Blight
feats.description: You unleash the rot infecting you, spreading the blight to those nearby.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Unleash the Blight R

feats.name: Unobstructed Shot
feats.description: With a quick use of brute force, you remove an obstacle and take a calculated shot as part of the same motion.

feats.name: Unseat
feats.description: With a mighty blow from atop your companion, you attempt to knock an opponent off their mount.

feats.name: Unsheathing the Sword-Light
feats.description: Honed through 10,000 battles, your sword’s mere light can shatter ambitions and break armies.

feats.name: Unstable Concoction
feats.description: You can mix a wondrous yet volatile liquid into an alchemical consumable if it has an initial effect that uses dice.

feats.name: Unusual Composition
feats.description: You can translate the emotion and power of a composition to other mediums.

feats.name: Uzunjati Recollection
feats.description: You tell a story spontaneously from nearly forgotten facts, delving into your memory and entertaining your audience in the process.

feats.name: Veil of Bugs
feats.description: Your swarm is dense, blotting out vision.

feats.name: Venipuncture
feats.description: A shell made up of hundreds of razor-thin needles of blood forms around you before exploding outward.

feats.name: Vermilion Threads
feats.description: Your Arcane Cascade sends threads to the four directions, creating a web of strings dyed by your skill and your enemies’ blood.

feats.name: Vicious Debilitations
feats.description: The debilitations you dish out seriously impair your foes.

feats.name: Vicious Rend
feats.description: Your companion sinks its claws and rips.

feats.name: Vigil's Walls Rise Anew!
feats.description: You can train your allies to Raise a Shield on your order
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Vigil's Walls Rise Anew! R

feats.name: Vindicator's Judgement
feats.description: You can pronounce judgment on your foes, making them magically susceptible to your attacks.

feats.name: Ward Casting
feats.description: You carefully ward your spell by drawing from a mantle of magical energy you prepared to protect your casting, increasing your chance of retaining the spell.

feats.name: Warden's Step
feats.description: You can guide your allies to move quietly through the wilderness.

feats.name: Waters of Creation
feats.description: Water is the source of life, and you draw upon this primordial force to heal your allies' wounds.

feats.name: Wave Dashes Rocks
feats.description: You slam an unlucky foe with the tremendous power of a plunging wave.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Wave Dashes Rocks U

feats.name: Weapon-Rune Shifter
feats.description: You learn how to alter the magic of weapon runes by using a crystal as a focusing component.

feats.name: Weighty Impact
feats.description: Your eidolon knocks enemies down.

feats.name: Whirlwind Stance
feats.description: You use your staff as a defensive implement as well as an offensive one.

feats.name: Wide Overwatch
feats.description: Through a variety of perceptive techniques, careful routines, and upgrades to your enhanced visual gear, you have become able to observe and maintain your overwatch at a much greater distance.

feats.name: Widen the Gap
feats.description: Once you have penetrated a foe’s defenses, you can home in on the same spot to exploit your opponent’s wound and deal some serious damage.

feats.name: Wind Jump
feats.description: You gather the wind beneath you, allowing you to soar as you jump.

feats.name: Winding Flow
feats.description: Any journey consists of more than simply reaching your destination.

feats.name: Wing Rider
feats.description: Your bond with your dragon has been honed so fine that it can carry you aloft with its full capability.

feats.name: Winter's Embrace
feats.description: Your eyes are accustomed to the harsh glare of the sun on snow and ice.

feats.name: Witch's Communion
feats.description: You can keep watch over multiple charges.

feats.name: Wombat Burrow
feats.description: While in Wombat Stance, you gain a Burrow speed equal to the Speed bonus granted by your Incredible Movement ability.

feats.name: Wronged Monk's Wrath
feats.description: You gain the wronged monk's wrath ki spell.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Wronged Monk's Wrath U

feats.name: A Home in Every Port
feats.description: You have a reputation in towns and villages you've visited, and residents are always willing to open their doors to you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard A Home in Every Port

feats.name: Axuma's Awakening
feats.description: Exposure of the well of Axuma has given you some arcane magic.

feats.name: Axuma's Vigor
feats.description: Your vigor makes it easier for others to heal you.

feats.name: Caravan Leader
feats.description: You know how to get the most effort out of your allies on the road.

feats.name: Fame and Fortune
feats.description: Gain RP when you critically succeed at Kingdom skills

feats.name: Flower Street Infamy
feats.description: Your history of coquetries, flirtations, dalliances, and liaisons is so lengthy that, even in a city as large as Absalom, you're bound to run into your past at inopportune moments.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Flower Street Infamy U

feats.name: Incredible Investiture
feats.description: Invest up to 12 magic items

feats.name: Incredible Scout
feats.description: When you scout, you are particularly alert for danger, granting your allies precious moments to prepare to fight.

feats.name: Sanguine Tenacity
feats.description: Your blood carries permanent regenerative properties.

feats.name: Acknowledge Fan
feats.description: Your reputation as a Firebrand precedes you, and you need only make a simple gesture or give a look of recognition to amaze those around you.

feats.name: Additional Shadow Magic
feats.description: Choose an additional shadowdancer focus spell you haven't already selected from Shadow Magic.

feats.name: Adept Storyteller
feats.description: Your ability to tell stories rivals those of the finest bards.

feats.name: Advanced Firearm Familiarity
feats.description: You have familiarity with advanced firearms, treating them as martial weapons for the purposes of proficiency.

feats.name: Advanced Order Training
feats.description: You gain the greater order benefit for the Hellknight order to which you belong.

feats.name: Advanced Order Training
feats.description: You gain the greater order benefit for the Hellknight order to which you belong.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Advanced Order Training U

feats.name: Advanced Seeker of Truths
feats.description: You have unlocked deeper secrets to uncovering and hoarding lore.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Advanced Seeker of Truths

feats.name: Aegis of Arnisant
feats.description: Inspired by the tale of Arnisant, you transform your shield into a magic ward.

feats.name: Affliction Mercy
feats.description: The divine grace that flows through you grants reprieve from an affliction.

feats.name: Alchemical Power
feats.description: You become an expert in the alchemist class DC.

feats.name: Amp Focus
feats.description: You've glimpsed the furthest recesses of your mind.

feats.name: Amplifying Touch
feats.description: Your healing energies empower attacks.

feats.name: Apparition Cloud
feats.description: With a mere thought, you discorporate your familiar into a thousand shards of spiritual magic, protecting both it and yourself from physical harm while making it difficult for enemies to move near you.

feats.name: Architect of Flame
feats.description: Flames rise and shape to your will, forming a wall or dome of your design.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Architect of Flame H

feats.name: Armor Break
feats.description: You flex your muscles to crack your damaged armor, blasting jagged shards into nearby enemies.

feats.name: Armored Counterattack
feats.description: With the might of your armor behind you, you hit back at a foe who would dare try to hurt your allies.

feats.name: Assassinate
feats.description: You strike with one swift movement, trying to instantly slay your mark.

feats.name: Aura of Confidence
feats.description: Your will and your faith in your nation is unassailable, and the feeling is contagious.

feats.name: Aura of Faith
feats.description: You radiate an aura of belief that imbues your attacks and those of nearby allies with divine power.

feats.name: Banshee Cry Display
feats.description: You’ve learned how to unleash a sudden and disruptive noisemaker at just the right moment in your display, a technique that can cause a spellcaster to fumble the phrasing of their magic

feats.name: Battlefield Arcana
feats.description: You have learned to safely cast spells even in the heat of battle.

feats.name: Beastmaster's Call
feats.description: You quickly call in a primal projection of a non-active companion to provide the companion’s support benefit.

feats.name: Billowing Wings
feats.description: You've trained your winged companions to gather air in their wings, whipping up a concentrated gust of wind at opponents, potentially staggering them.

feats.name: Blade of Justice
feats.description: You call upon divine power and make a weapon or unarmed Strike against a foe you have witnessed harming an ally or innocent.

feats.name: Blade of Law
feats.description: You call upon the power of law and make a weapon or unarmed Strike against a foe you have witnessed breaking or disrespecting the law or otherwise acting disorderly.

feats.name: Blade of the Crimson Oath
feats.description: You call upon the Crimson Oath to smite undead and then make a weapon or unarmed Strike against an undead foe.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Blade of the Crimson Oath

feats.name: Bleak Humorist
feats.description: You’ve watched dozens of morbid comedies depicting Beldam I, Taldor’s prankster emperor whose wife accidentally killed him when she struck him with a marble bust after he jumped out from behind curtains to frighten her.

feats.name: Blessed Counterstrike
feats.description: You call upon divine power and make a weapon or unarmed Strike against the enemy who triggered your champion's reaction.

feats.name: Blessed Denial
feats.description: You exude peace and protection, lessening a harmful condition as it falls upon an ally.

feats.name: Blood Component Substitution
feats.description: You can bypass the need for incantations and gestures by drawing energy directly from your blood, causing you to visibly glow the color of your blood and crackle with magical energy.

feats.name: Blood Sovereignty
feats.description: You wield blood magic masterfully.

feats.name: Blood in the Air
feats.description: Once you've locked on to a target, little can obscure your aim.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Blood in the Air

feats.name: Bloodline Focus
feats.description: By listening to the beating of your heart, your focus recovers faster.

feats.name: Bloody Debilitation
feats.description: Your attacks slice arteries and veins.

feats.name: Boost Modulation
feats.description: You aren't satisfied with keeping to just one kind of boost from your constant tinkering, so you've learned to modulate between several possibilities at once.

feats.name: Brutal Finish
feats.description: Your final blow can make an impact even if it rebounds off a foe’s defenses.

feats.name: Buzzing Death Cicadas
feats.description: Your swarm takes on characteristics of the death cicadas of the Mana Wastes, whose distinctive buzz is said to be a herald of imminent demise.

feats.name: Call The Hunt
feats.description: You instruct your allies on how best to defeat your prey.

feats.name: Cartwheel Dodge
feats.description: You can dodge away from damaging effects.

feats.name: Catch and Kill
feats.description: When you’ve decided to quash a story, no one can escape from you with any incriminating information.

feats.name: Cautious Word
feats.description: You let your words defend you, just as your allies in the Vellumis Scholars defend through knowledge.

feats.name: Celestial Cacophony
feats.description: Your weapon contains a detonation chamber that launches fireworks, sparklers, and black powder pellets that sizzle, twist, and scatter on the ground in a cacophonous manner liable to annoy the entire Celestial Court.

feats.name: Cellular Reconstruction
feats.description: Your ostilli takes control of your nervous system and kicks your cellular functions into overdrive when you're about to die.

feats.name: Chain Reaction
feats.description: You fire your gun once, creating a devastating and unpredictable chain of events; perhaps your bullet strikes exactly the right spot on a water tower, causing it to flood and incite a stampede of horses which knock over a lantern that sets a city on fire.

feats.name: Champion's Sacrifice
feats.description: You can suffer so that others might live.

feats.name: Charged Creation
feats.description: Your magic is drawn to your persistent creations.

feats.name: Cheat Death
feats.description: Somehow you always escape the reaper by a hair's breadth.

feats.name: Choking Smoke
feats.description: When you cast fireball, you can modify it to create a cloud of smoking smoke.

feats.name: Chorus Companion
feats.description: Animals can be musical partners as much as the subjects or audience.

feats.name: Claw and Talon Flow
feats.description: You fluidly shift between your two stances.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Claw and Talon Flow

feats.name: Clever Counterspell
feats.description: You creatively apply your prepared spells to Counterspell a much wider variety of your opponents’ magic.

feats.name: Coffin Bound
feats.description: You bind your spirit to a coffin filled with soil of your homeland, making it a place of recovery.

feats.name: Collapse Wall
feats.description: You detonate the required bombs in order to bring a wall down on a creature.

feats.name: Combat Premonition
feats.description: By narrowing your sense of the future, you can improve that of your allies.

feats.name: Communal Sustain
feats.description: Choose one spell with a sustained duration that one of your allies has in effect.

feats.name: Competitive Eater
feats.description: Gorging on flesh after your stomach is full fortifies you, making you hardy enough to withstand more punishment.

feats.name: Compliant Gold
feats.description: You can command your weapon to shrink or grow, for convenience or power.

feats.name: Conflux Focus
feats.description: You imagine how you'll weave magic and combat into future battles, improving your focus.

feats.name: Conjure Hell
feats.description: Though you might not worship Asmodeus or other devils, you've studied enough of Hell to call forth a brief burst of its fire.

feats.name: Consult the Spirits (Rivethun Emissary)
feats.description: You spend 1 hour communing with powerful spirits of the world to gain insight, information, or advice.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Consult the Spirits (Rivethun Emissary)

feats.name: Contingency Gadgets
feats.description: You are too brilliant to be caught off guard, and you always have just the right gadget for the situation.

feats.name: Coordinated Charge
feats.description: You heroically dash into the fray, inspiring your allies to follow.

feats.name: Coordinated Distraction
feats.description: You distract an opponent from the fact that one of your allies is about to attack them.

feats.name: Coordinated Tactics
feats.description: You and your follower fight in tandem.

feats.name: Corpse Stench
feats.description: Your body exudes an overwhelming scent of decay in a 10-foot emanation, so putrid that it nauseates creates within that range.

feats.name: Coven Spell
feats.description: You rhyme with your ally’s incantations or echo their movements, linking your magic to empower their spell in one of two ways.

feats.name: Cracked Mountain
feats.description: You fight on, staying on your feet and lashing out at a foe.

feats.name: Crimson Breath
feats.description: You gain a fire breath weapon similar to that of a crimson worm.

feats.name: Critical Debilitation
feats.description: Your debilitations are especially effective on your most powerful attacks.

feats.name: Cut the Bonds
feats.description: You can counteract a magical effect that impedes movement.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Cut the Bonds U

feats.name: Danse Macabre
feats.description: Your horde can drag unwilling victims along with it as it shambles forward.

feats.name: Daredevil's Gambit
feats.description: If you critically succeed at your Daring Act, you can enter the target’s space and remain there until the beginning of your next turn or until the target moves, whichever comes first.

feats.name: Dashing Strike
feats.description: Springing away from one foe, you Strike at another.

feats.name: Deadeye
feats.description: You relax your eyes, taking in the presence of hidden things, granting you the ability to locate invisible creatures.

feats.name: Deadly Poison Weapon
feats.description: Your poisons are devastatingly potent.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Deadly Poison Weapon U

feats.name: Death Dive
feats.description: You guide your mount into a plummet, diving headlong at a single foe.

feats.name: Deep Freeze
feats.description: You vent a jet of supercooled fluid from your innovation, damaging a foe and slowing it down.

feats.name: Defensive Dismissal
feats.description: You change your form as a means of evading a potentially fatal blow.

feats.name: Defensive Recovery
feats.description: Your faith provides temporary protection in addition to healing.

feats.name: Desiccating Inhalation
feats.description: You draw in the moisture from nearby creatures, draining them dry to heal your wounds.

feats.name: Desperate Wish
feats.description: You call out a desperate wish to the stars to save a friend.

feats.name: Determined Lore Seeker
feats.description: You've mastered useful spells that let you find hidden truths others might miss.

feats.name: Devastating Shield Wallop
feats.description: The impact of your shield sends foes tumbling to the ground.

feats.name: Devoted Focus
feats.description: Your devotion is strong enough to increase your focus to incredible heights.

feats.name: Diamond Soul
feats.description: You have fortified your body and mind against eldritch effects.

feats.name: Directed Poison
feats.description: When you cast cloudkill, you can modify it to be under your control.

feats.name: Disrupt Qi
feats.description: You carefully target a creature's pressure points to block its inner life force.

feats.name: Distracting Shot
feats.description: The sheer power of your attacks, or the overwhelming number of them, leaves an enemy flustered.

feats.name: Diverse Weapon Expert
feats.description: Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons and martial weapons increase to expert, and your proficiency rank for advanced weapons increases to trained.

feats.name: Divine Wall
feats.description: You use your shield to harry your enemies, preventing them from stepping away from or around you.

feats.name: Do You Know Who I Am?
feats.description: Your reputation casts a long shadow, allowing you to throw your cultural weight around, especially in larger settlements.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Do You Know Who I Am? U

feats.name: Dodging Roll
feats.description: You dodge a blow at the last possible moment.

feats.name: Domain Fluency
feats.description: You command a deep understanding of the domains related to your mystery.

feats.name: Domain Focus
feats.description: Your devotion to your deity’s domains grows greater, and so does the power granted to you.

feats.name: Double Prey
feats.description: You can focus on two foes at once, hunting both of them down.

feats.name: Dragon Shape
feats.description: You can take on the shape of some of the world’s most fearsome creatures.

feats.name: Dragon's Rage Wings
feats.description: You sprout dragon wings from your back of the same color as your chosen dragon.

feats.name: Drive-By Attack
feats.description: You can smoothly line up an attack without disrupting your control.

feats.name: Dueling Dance (Fighter)
feats.description: Using a free hand as pivot and balance, you both attack and defend with your weapon.

feats.name: Eagle Eye
feats.description: Your practice with crossbows and firearms has sharpened your attention to detail.

feats.name: Eagle Eyes
feats.description: You and your spotter are adept at watching out for one another.

feats.name: Eclectic Polymath
feats.description: Your flexible mind can quickly shift from one spell to another.

feats.name: Educated Assessment
feats.description: You attempt to Recall Knowledge about a creature, and the GM uses the same secret roll result against the creature’s Deception or Stealth DC, giving you the information from a Battle Assessment.

feats.name: Effortless Impulse
feats.description: A steady ripple from your kinetic gate maintains one of your impulses.

feats.name: Elaborate Scroll Esoterica
feats.description: You've picked up more scraps of magic texts, improving your makeshift scrolls.

feats.name: Emblazon Antimagic
feats.description: Your deity’s symbol protects against offensive magic.

feats.name: Embrace the Pain
feats.description: Ignoring your pain, you reach out and grab the creature or weapon that caused you harm.

feats.name: Emergency Medical Assistance
feats.description: You've learned a variety of methods for helping allies who are bleeding, burning, or otherwise suffering persistent damage, from brushing off acid to patting down fires.

feats.name: Empiricist's Eye
feats.description: Sharp and piercing, your eyes see all and convey more.

feats.name: Empowered Onslaught
feats.description: When your body and mind are perfectly in sync and pushed to the limit, it can produce even greater results.

feats.name: Enforce Oath
feats.description: You call on your oath to embolden you in combat.

feats.name: Enigma's Knowledge
feats.description: Your muse whispers knowledge to you at all the right times.

feats.name: Enticing Dwelling
feats.description: Your spirit dwelling is particularly inviting to spirit wisps.

feats.name: Epiphany at the Crossroads
feats.description: The crossroads between life and death is a place that can reveal many secrets.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Epiphany at the Crossroads

feats.name: Escape Timeline
feats.description: You step outside of the flow of time momentarily, allowing you to avoid dangers.

feats.name: Evasiveness
feats.description: Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master.

feats.name: Evasiveness (Rogue)
feats.description: Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master.

feats.name: Expert Animist Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster.

feats.name: Expert Bard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Beast Gunner Spellcasting
feats.description: You've learned the deeper secrets of beast guns, making you an expert in the magic they grant you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Expert Beast Gunner Spellcasting

feats.name: Expert Cathartic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Cleric Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Combat Eidolon
feats.description: Your eidolon advances its capabilities in combat.

feats.name: Expert Druid Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Eldritch Archer Spellcasting
feats.description: You learn additional eldritch archer magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Expert Eldritch Archer Spellcasting

feats.name: Expert Kinetic Control
feats.description: You become an expert in kineticist class DC and impulse attack rolls.

feats.name: Expert Magus Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert bounded spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Oracle Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Prophet Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Psychic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Red Mantis Magic
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Expert Red Mantis Magic

feats.name: Expert Rivethun Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Scroll Cache
feats.description: Your scroll collection has vastly grown, both in size and potency.

feats.name: Expert Snowcasting
feats.description: You draw ever more magical cold into your being, learning how to manipulate it to your whims.

feats.name: Expert Sorcerer Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting archetype benefits.

feats.name: Expert Summoner Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert bounded spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Witch Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Wizard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Explosive Metamorphosis
feats.description: You use additional primal energy to transform, creating a burst of elemental energy to complement your transformation.

feats.name: Extend Elixir
feats.description: Integrating your own personal energy into the elixirs you create causes them to affect you for longer.

feats.name: Extract Vow of Nonviolence
feats.description: You entice or threaten a weapon, making it swear not to harm you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Extract Vow of Nonviolence

feats.name: Familiar's Eyes
feats.description: You use your familiar's senses as easily as your own.

feats.name: Fantastic Leap
feats.description: You launch yourself through the air at a foe.

feats.name: Feign Innocence
feats.description: You convince a creature that, despite appearances, you're on its side.

feats.name: Felling Shot
feats.description: Your ranged attacks can shoot an unprepared foe right out of the air.

feats.name: Festering Wound
feats.description: Wounds you inflict with your unarmed attacks fester and rot, becoming infected and difficult to heal.

feats.name: Finessed Features
feats.description: You've learned how to build snares that trigger based on visual stimuli.

feats.name: Five-gods Ram
feats.description: You attack in an unceasing flurry of charging headbutts.

feats.name: Flesh Wound
feats.description: You fire to ensure that even if your shot doesn't land cleanly, it still lands close enough to deal some damage.

feats.name: Flexible Halcyon Spellcasting
feats.description: You broaden your ability to channel your power into halcyon magic.

feats.name: Flexible Transmogrification
feats.description: You've learned how to transmogrify your eidolon to suit the circumstances of the day.

feats.name: Flickering Twirl
feats.description: You use your movements and disguises to make yourself a flickering blur.

feats.name: Flinging Shove
feats.description: Whether you’re shoving opponents with a shield or a large weapon, you’ve learned to push them even further.

feats.name: Flourishing Finish
feats.description: Your martial prowess demoralizes all who can see you.

feats.name: Focused Shot
feats.description: You achieve a state of perfect calm before unleashing your attack, opening your mind to the minute movements of the world around you to increase your accuracy.

feats.name: For Love, For Lightning
feats.description: Rumors suggest this technique was pioneered by knights who undertook missions for Clarethe Iomedar at the half-moon, but many Crimson Reclaimers have since mastered it.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard For Love, For Lightning R

feats.name: Forcible Energy
feats.description: You perform complex manipulations to make the energy from your spells so powerful that your enemies remain vulnerable to it afterward.

feats.name: Foresee Danger
feats.description: You perceive every possible way your foe's attack could land and attempt to avoid them all.

feats.name: Foreseen Failure
feats.description: You see your spell fail to take hold to disastrous end, then snap back to reality—it was all a precognition, and you know to try a different spell.

feats.name: Forewarn
feats.description: Your foresight and planning are more valuable than armor as you direct your ally away from danger, but there's a limit to how often you can guide your allies away from a foe's relentless assaults.

feats.name: Fortunate Blow
feats.description: You set an enemy up for a devastating follow-through from your allies.

feats.name: Fortunate Relief
feats.description: Your god favors your attempts to remove afflictions and conditions.

feats.name: Frightening Appearance
feats.description: Your dramatic appearances can frighten bystanders.

feats.name: Frightening Power
feats.description: Draconic essence coruscates around you, sapping the resilience of your foes.

feats.name: Frightful Attrition
feats.description: Your diminishment of your foes' ranks damages their morale.

feats.name: Frostbite Runes
feats.description: Thick tattoos, each one a rune fragment from the saumen kar's long-lost language spelling out their pact with their equally lost deity, cover your body and stretch across your limbs, torso, and face.

feats.name: Furious Grab
feats.description: You grab your foe while it's distracted by your attack.

feats.name: Furnace Form
feats.description: Opening your kinetic gate, you allow flames to consume your form and leave you a living flame.

feats.name: Garland Spell
feats.description: If your next action is to Cast a Spell with the fungus or plant trait, a garland of plants grows in a 10-foot burst in the spell’s range.

feats.name: General's Gambit
feats.description: You move strategically forward to draw the enemy’s attention away from your allies.

feats.name: Get Used to Disappointment
feats.description: You capitalize on an opponent's failure with smug attitude and swagger, reminding them of the gap in skill between you and your opponent.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Get Used to Disappointment

feats.name: Ghostly Condemnation
feats.description: You shriek a death sentence upon a single target within 120 feet, forcing it to experience the final moments of your mortal life as you were dragged through a howling mob and forced to kneel before the final blade that took your life and head.

feats.name: Ghosts in the Storm
feats.description: Clouds, like eager pets, are drawn to you and to those in your good graces.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ghosts in the Storm

feats.name: Gigantic Megafauna Companion
feats.description: The mammoths and other megafauna ridden by your people are larger than any ordinary beast.

feats.name: Gigavolt
feats.description: When you unleash electricity from your innovation, you can bounce it off obstacles, creating a field of electric death.

feats.name: Glacial Prison
feats.description: Intense cold swirls around your foe, covering it in frost that slows it down and turns its body to ice.

feats.name: Gladiator's Roar
feats.description: You can project your voice into a high-pitched screech that damages your foes.

feats.name: Golem Dynamo
feats.description: You've learned the secrets of Jistkan golem prostheses, allowing you to incorporate golem components into your dynamo and gain a portion of their magic.

feats.name: Grasping Limbs
feats.description: Your eidolon grabs enemies.

feats.name: Great Bear
feats.description: When you transform, you can take on a bear's bulk and size.

feats.name: Greater Deific Power
feats.description: Divine power continues to fill you.

feats.name: Greater Despair
feats.description: You increase the frequency of Mummy's Despair to once per 10 minutes instead of once per hour.

feats.name: Greater Esoteric Spellcasting
feats.description: Your understanding of magic has evolved, and so has your spellcasting.

feats.name: Greater Physical Evolution
feats.description: You change form readily.

feats.name: Greater Revelation
feats.description: You unlock deeper revelations hidden within your mystery.

feats.name: Greater Spiritual Evolution
feats.description: Your magical blood allows your spells to be fully effective against incorporeal creatures.

feats.name: Greater Sun Blessing
feats.description: Your connection to the Old Sun Gods grows stronger.

feats.name: Green Tongue
feats.description: You share a special kinship with all things green and living.

feats.name: Gruesome Strike
feats.description: Make a Strike against the creature that triggered your champion's reaction.

feats.name: Guarded Advance (Knight Vigilant)
feats.description: You slowly advance on the battlefield, taking utmost caution.

feats.name: Hedge Maze
feats.description: You sculpt a manicured maze of hedges.

feats.name: Hell's Armaments
feats.description: You've trained relentlessly with your order's weapon to maximize their deadliness.

feats.name: Hell's Armaments
feats.description: You’ve trained with your order’s weapon and your Hellknight plate long enough to apply your expertise from other weapons and armor.

feats.name: Hellknight Order Cross-Training
feats.description: You gain the lesser order benefit of a Hellknight order other than the one to which you belong.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Hellknight Order Cross-Training U

feats.name: Hex Focus
feats.description: Your patron’s teachings have allowed you to achieve a deeper focus.

feats.name: Hungry Blade
feats.description: Once your spectral dagger has tasted an enemy’s soul, your splinter of finality becomes increasingly relentless in its attempts to claim the soul.

feats.name: Illusory Identity
feats.description: There are times when skills or looks are not enough to convince someone of your identity, and you instead require adequate documentation.

feats.name: Imbue Mindlessness
feats.description: You grasp the mind of an undead creature and temporarily wipe it as empty as a zombie's brain.

feats.name: Improved Dueling Riposte
feats.description: Your weapon whirls and darts, striking foes whenever the slightest opening or moment of weakness presents itself.

feats.name: Improved Knockback
feats.description: When you successfully Shove a creature, increase both the distance you can push the creature and the distance you can move to follow along with the target by 5 feet on a success or 10 feet on a critical success.

feats.name: Incredible Ricochet
feats.description: After your first shot singles out your opponent’s position, you direct another that ricochets around obstacles and strikes unerringly.

feats.name: Inescapable Grasp
feats.description: Your grasp has a supernatural quality to it, preventing your foes from easily escaping—with or without magical assistance.

feats.name: Infectious Emotions
feats.description: When you use Catharsis, one ally within 30 feet gains the catharsis activation benefits in addition to you.

feats.name: Inspirational Focus
feats.description: Your connection to your muse has granted you unusual focus.

feats.name: Instigate Psychic Duel
feats.description: You attempt to enter a psychic duel with a creature.

feats.name: Intensify Investiture
feats.description: Your bond to your invested items enables you to put more of yourself into them.

feats.name: Intercepting Hand
feats.description: Your particular martial art includes various defensive actions designed to remove your opponent’s ability to cause harm.

feats.name: Interfering Surge
feats.description: You overcharge the triggering spell with magic.

feats.name: Invoke Movement
feats.description: You manifest a form of locomotion of the spirits all around, such as the wings of an animal spirit or the watery flow of a nature spirit.

feats.name: Ironclad Fortitude
feats.description: Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to master.

feats.name: Janatimo's Lessons
feats.description: Thanks to Janatimo's secret techniques, you can weave your knowledge and words into powerful tools to assist your allies in life-threatening situations.

feats.name: Judgment of the Monolith
feats.description: You can use your ka stone to compel the truth.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Judgment of the Monolith

feats.name: Juggernaut's Fortitude
feats.description: Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to master.

feats.name: Just As Planned
feats.description: In the blink of an eye, you calculate your enemy's movements and know exactly where to aim your next blow.

feats.name: Keen Magical Detection
feats.description: You sense magical dangers.

feats.name: Knight in Shining Armor
feats.description: As a knight in shining armor, you train daily in the heaviest armor, expanding your expertise to heavy armor.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Knight in Shining Armor

feats.name: Know thy Doom
feats.description: As your legend grows, details of your demise become clearer.

feats.name: Lasting Doubt
feats.description: When you cast doubt upon your foes, the effect lasts longer than usual.

feats.name: Legs of Stone
feats.description: You gain a +2 status bonus to your Fortitude and Reflex DCs against attempts to Shove or Trip you.

feats.name: Lesson of Unified Elusion
feats.description: You and your student react as one to common threats.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lesson of Unified Elusion

feats.name: Liberating Stride
feats.description: Your allies can move farther when you release them from harm.

feats.name: Liberty's Devotion
feats.description: You've deepened your connection with the ideals of Andoran.

feats.name: Lich Dedication
feats.description: After years of study and careful planning, you finally completed a soul cage to house your soul and successfully performed a ritual to transform yourself into a lich.

feats.name: Lightning Rings' Overcharge
feats.description: Your familiar can adopt an electrical form to empower weapon strikes.

feats.name: Lightning Snares
feats.description: You can rig a trap with incredible speed.

feats.name: Link Focus
feats.description: Your focus recovers faster.

feats.name: Living Stone
feats.description: Your body becomes living stone.

feats.name: Lunging Stance
feats.description: Your body coiled to strike, you can lash out at distant enemies.

feats.name: Magic Sense
feats.description: You have a literal sixth sense for ambient magic in your vicinity.

feats.name: Make 'em Sweat
feats.description: Your line of questioning lets a suspect know you can see right through them, shaking them to the core.

feats.name: Maneuvering Spell
feats.description: You instantly tap into the magical power of a spell you're casting to quickly pounce around the battlefield.

feats.name: Manifold Conduit
feats.description: You can manifest multiple spirits at once in a cyclone around you.

feats.name: Mass Delusion
feats.description: You wave around fabricated evidence that contradicts what your enemies know to be true.

feats.name: Master Spotter
feats.description: Your proficiency rank in Perception increases to master.

feats.name: Master Spotter
feats.description: Your incredible perception and trusty enhanced visual gear allow you to see things others miss.

feats.name: Master Spotter (Ranger)
feats.description: Your proficiency rank in Perception increases to master.

feats.name: Master of the Dead
feats.description: You have reached the pinnacle of the reanimator's craft: the ability to raise nearly any corpse or skeleton as a gruesome mockery of the creature it once was.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Master of the Dead U

feats.name: Meditative Focus
feats.description: Your meditation is so effective that you can achieve a deep focus with the world around you.

feats.name: Metallic Envisionment
feats.description: You always account for every weakness, allowing your mind to imagine just the right physical form to take advantage of your opponents.

feats.name: Miraculous Intervention
feats.description: Through divine intervention or whispered prayers, you foil an enemy's response.

feats.name: Mobile Finisher
feats.description: You attack in motion.

feats.name: Mortal Herald Dedication
feats.description: You become a mortal herald of your deity, gaining power in return for your service.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Mortal Herald Dedication R

feats.name: Necromancer's Visage
feats.description: Necromantic energy demonstrates your power over undead, creating a demeanor that commands their fear and respect.

feats.name: Necromantic Deflection
feats.description: You imbue your shield with life-giving energy to deflect harmful necromantic magic.

feats.name: Night's Shine
feats.description: Your power from the moon and stars becomes strong enough to illuminate the night sky.

feats.name: No Stranger to Death
feats.description: Your regular exposure to the insidious putrescence of undeath inured you to its effects.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard No Stranger to Death

feats.name: No!!!
feats.description: The shock of seeing your ally near death breaks whatever limits exist in your mind, sending your power spilling forth.

feats.name: Obscured Emergence
feats.description: You are, by nature, a thing of gloomy woods and barren wilds, and when you choose show yourself, a bit of this gloom clings to you, obscuring your form with strange distortions or mist.

feats.name: Officer's Expertise
feats.description: Your proficiency in commander class DC increases to expert, and you become an expert in Warfare Lore.

feats.name: One-on-One
feats.description: Your true skill can be seen in a one-on-one fight where you have room to dance around your opponent.

feats.name: Oneiric Influence
feats.description: While Infiltrating a Dream, you can also implant a suggestion in the target's mind.

feats.name: Operatic Adventurer
feats.description: Your training has focused you for the opera, and it certainly shows.

feats.name: Order Cross-Training
feats.description: You gain the lesser order benefit of a Hellknight order other than the one to which you belong.

feats.name: Overwhelming Breath
feats.description: You control your breathing and align it with your qi, exhaling with controlled force in order to overcome your opponent's resistance.

feats.name: Overwhelming Spellstrike
feats.description: You pierce through your foe's resistance.

feats.name: Packed with Flavor
feats.description: Edible morsels you create are particularly potent and bursting with flavor.

feats.name: Pact of the Crossroads
feats.description: You’ve sworn a pact with Ng the Hooded, the Eldest known as the Lord of the Crossroads, though your only sign of Ng’s acknowledgment is the benefits you receive.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of the Crossroads U

feats.name: Pact of the Final Breath
feats.description: You've sworn a pact with a powerful psychopomp—typically an olethros advocate or yamaraj judge—granting you a reprieve before your soul will be collected in exchange for respect for the dead and assistance against the undead.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of the Final Breath U

feats.name: Pale Horse
feats.description: Your mount becomes a grotesque creature of foreboding when you ride it.

feats.name: Paragon's Guard
feats.description: Once you’ve had a moment to set your stance, you always have your shield ready without a thought.

feats.name: Perfect Pitch
feats.description: Your ear for harmony has enhanced your ability with musical magic.

feats.name: Perfected Evaluations
feats.description: You instantly assess the strengths and weaknesses of the enemy forces.

feats.name: Perfection's Path
feats.description: Choose one saving throw (Fortitude, Reflex, or Will) in which you’re an expert.

feats.name: Pesh Skin
feats.description: Your plant form sprouts hundreds of spines, and your blood causes mild hallucinations in creatures exposed to it.

feats.name: Petrified Skin
feats.description: You were the target of some petrifying effect, and an element of that stony gaze has remained with you.

feats.name: Play to the Crowd
feats.description: You have a knack for knowing just how to manipulate groups by saying exactly what needs to be said.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Play to the Crowd U

feats.name: Plentiful Snares
feats.description: You can prepare incredible numbers of snares each day out of simple ingredients.

feats.name: Pouncing Transformation
feats.description: By transforming as you move, you attack from odd angles.

feats.name: Predator's Pounce
feats.description: You close the distance to your prey in a blur, pouncing on the creature before it can react.

feats.name: Preparation
feats.description: You survey the battlefield, calculating the possibilities.

feats.name: Primadonna
feats.description: The spotlight should always be on you and you alone.

feats.name: Primal Focus
feats.description: Your connection to nature is particularly strong, and the spirits of nature flock around you, helping you replenish your focus.

feats.name: Primal Summons
feats.description: Whenever you summon an ally, you can empower it with the elemental power of air, earth, fire, or water.

feats.name: Propelled Leap
feats.description: Like a flying fish, you can build up momentum and launch yourself into the air.

feats.name: Psi Catastrophe
feats.description: You stop holding your power back, unleashing it all in a catastrophic blast.

feats.name: Pupil's Guard
feats.description: You're intimately familiar with your student's motions and are ready to step in at a moment's notice should anything threaten to disrupt them.

feats.name: Purifying Spell
feats.description: You purify the water within a creature's body to cleanse them of illness.

feats.name: Rain of Razors
feats.description: Razor-sharp slivers of metal fall from the sky.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rain of Razors H

feats.name: Rapid Spark
feats.description: Your spark shifts to where it needs to be.

feats.name: Rattle The Earth
feats.description: Striking the ground with the gravity of the deepest rocks, you cause an earthquake.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rattle The Earth H

feats.name: Reach for the Sky
feats.description: You command the room, firing a gun into the air and ordering everyone to surrender and put their hands in the air.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Reach for the Sky

feats.name: Reactive Interference
feats.description: Grabbing a sleeve, swiping with your weapon, or creating another obstruction, you reflexively foil an enemy’s response.

feats.name: Read the Land
feats.description: You've learned how to commune with the land to learn information.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Read the Land U

feats.name: Reaper of Repose
