feats.description: Your skill and fervor allow you to pierce undead defenses and exploit their weaknesses.

feats.name: Rearing Display
feats.description: You've trained your mount to make an impressive attack and can leverage its presence to terrify your enemies.

feats.name: Reason Rapidly
feats.description: Your mind works through clues at an unbelievable speed.

feats.name: Reclaimant Plea
feats.description: You call on the power of the Crimson Oath to gain magical aid.

feats.name: Recollect Studies
feats.description: You paid attention during your studies and remember the right way to attack various creatures.

feats.name: Redirect Elements
feats.description: You seize the elemental essence of an incoming spell and redirect the spell to a creature of your choice within the spell's area.

feats.name: Reflexive Grapple
feats.description: You've honed your reflexes so well that your lash can begin closing around a target as soon as it makes contact.

feats.name: Reflexive Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance without a thought.

feats.name: Rejuvenation
feats.description: The call of your unfinished business recreates you after destruction.

feats.name: Resolute
feats.description: You've tempered your mind and become resolute against effects that strain your willpower.

feats.name: Return to the Pit!
feats.description: You can send the fiends who have vexed you back to their home plane where they belong.

feats.name: Reverberate
feats.description: You can manipulate the acoustics around you to deflect sonic damage back at its source.

feats.name: Reverse Curse
feats.description: When you counter a curse or misfortune effect, you send it back to destroy its originator.

feats.name: Ricochet Feint
feats.description: While in Ricochet Stance, you can bounce a thrown weapon off a foe to distract them.

feats.name: Ricochet Shot
feats.description: You bounce your shot off a nearby surface to strike your opponent from an unexpected angle.

feats.name: Right Where you Want Them
feats.description: Whether with a weapon or your bare hands, you keep your opponents in their place.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Right Where you Want Them

feats.name: Rise Up!
feats.description: Sometimes, you must even slip the chains of gravity to rebel.

feats.name: Roar Mimicry
feats.description: You unleash a roar so loud that it's felt as deeply as it's heard.

feats.name: Rock Rampart
feats.description: Drawing on your connection to the Plane of Earth, you form a wall of rock and earth.

feats.name: Roll with It (Ranger)
feats.description: You can dodge attacks from giants.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Roll with It (Ranger) R

feats.name: Rugged Survivalist
feats.description: You've studied survival skills with the School of Swords experts and are comfortable spending long periods of time in the wilderness.

feats.name: Sapping Symbol
feats.description: Your religious symbol glows with sacred energy, turning the attacker’s strength to weakness.

feats.name: Scattering Charge
feats.description: You charge into a group of enemies to send them flying.

feats.name: School Counterspell
feats.description: Your intricate knowledge of your school lets you easily negate spells from that school.

feats.name: Sea Glass Guardians
feats.description: Eerily beautiful elemental water beings race around you, eager to protect and heal you and your allies.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Sea Glass Guardians H

feats.name: Second Ikon
feats.description: You gain an additional ikon, selected from those listed here.

feats.name: Second Sting
feats.description: You read your prey’s movements and transform them into openings, so failures with one weapon set up glancing blows with the other.

feats.name: Secret Eater
feats.description: You have discovered and found favor with the cult within the church of Kabriri known as the Secret Eaters.

feats.name: Secrets of Shadow
feats.description: Your shadow's voice grows ever clearer; it whispers secrets of true power to you and shields your flesh from harm.

feats.name: Self-Destruct
feats.description: You've installed a self-destruct device within your construct companion, which you can trigger with a special device from up to 60 feet away.

feats.name: Sense Ki
feats.description: You can read the presence of ki in your area.

feats.name: Shadow Illusion
feats.description: With an artful eye, you shape shadows into illusory forms.

feats.name: Shadowpiercing Charge
feats.description: You charge into the fray on horseback, and those that lurk in the shadows will feel your wrath.

feats.name: Shadows Within Shadows
feats.description: Your apparition possesses a furtive and elusive nature that can influence and blend with your spiritual energy to form a protective and nearly impenetrable shroud of nondetection around you.

feats.name: Shake Off the Gods
feats.description: Your trust in the Pure Legion rushes forth as you fight off the influence of a god.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Shake Off the Gods

feats.name: Shaped Contaminant
feats.description: Through a combination of careful manipulation and precise breath control, you can deploy inhaled toxins precisely.

feats.name: Share Tincture
feats.description: You use Quick Tincture, and the item you create remains potent until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Shared Assault
feats.description: In the triumph of battle, you can share the glory with another ally.

feats.name: Shared Overdrive
feats.description: You've experimented enough on your teammates to transfer a substantial number of powered-up gizmos to them, enabling one of your allies to benefit from the full effects and duration of your Overdrive.

feats.name: Shared Replenishment
feats.description: When your deity blesses your warlike acts, you can extend that favor to your allies.

feats.name: Shared Sight
feats.description: You bestow the mystical vision granted to you by your muse upon your allies.

feats.name: Shared Tide
feats.description: You Swim up to twice the normal distance.

feats.name: Shared Warding
feats.description: You ward your allies from the attacks of your foes whenever you apply those protections to yourself.

feats.name: Shattering Shot
feats.description: You fling a bomb into the air and then shoot it with your gun before it falls, raining destruction down over a wide area.

feats.name: Shattershields
feats.description: Four plates of pitted metal float around you to intercept attacks.

feats.name: Shepherd of Desolation
feats.description: You know how to keep others alive in the Gravelands' murkiest shadows.

feats.name: Shift Horde
feats.description: With a wave of your hand, your risen undead horde collapses and another one rises to take its place.

feats.name: Shooter's Camouflage
feats.description: You specialize in blending into a particular type of environment, able to disappear after taking your shot.

feats.name: Shoulder Catastrophe
feats.description: You’ve trained to protect your allies by diverting the worst attacks to yourself.

feats.name: Shroud of the Seas
feats.description: You've learned to camouflage yourself among the shadows and currents of the ocean so you're hard to see from above.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Shroud of the Seas

feats.name: Side by Side (Ranger)
feats.description: You and your animal companion fight in tandem.

feats.name: Signifer Armor Expertise
feats.description: You’ve spent enough time helping your comrades equip medium and heavy armor that you spread your own expertise to those armors as well.

feats.name: Silver's Refrain
feats.description: Learn the silver's refrain composition cantrip.

feats.name: Sing to the Steel
feats.description: You strike magical tones that can turn the tide of combat.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Sing to the Steel

feats.name: Six Pillars Stance
feats.description: You stand firm, steeling your mind and body, allowing you to use your magic unperturbed.

feats.name: Slay
feats.description: You finish your target with a vicious attack.

feats.name: Slowing Strike
feats.description: You wound your enemy so they can’t move nimbly.

feats.name: Smooth Hover
feats.description: You remain airborne through sheer effort.

feats.name: Space-Time Shift
feats.description: You travel just a few moments into the future to immediately arrive at your destination.

feats.name: Speaking Sky
feats.description: You can hear air movement like soft whispers.

feats.name: Speaking Sky
feats.description: You can hear air movement like soft whispers.

feats.name: Spell Acceleration
feats.description: Special time-weaving techniques let you compress your spellcasting gestures and incantations into a short burst so you can cast with incredible speed—though it causes temporal strain.

feats.name: Spellmaster's Resilience
feats.description: Your experience with a specific type of harmful magic makes you more resistant to it.

feats.name: Spirit's Wrath
feats.description: You call forth an ephemeral spirit, typically the apparition of an ancestor or a nature spirit, which takes the form of a wisp.

feats.name: Spiritual Aid
feats.description: When you call your spirit guide for aid, its presence bolsters your will and agility.

feats.name: Splendid Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to develop.

feats.name: Spring from the Shadows
feats.description: You leap from hiding and assail your target.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Spring from the Shadows

feats.name: Stand Back, I'm a Doctor!
feats.description: You have mastered techniques to aid those at the brink of death, even if they use dangerous Stasian technology.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Stand Back, I'm a Doctor!

feats.name: Steed's Toppling Strike
feats.description: Those who defy your cause feel the powerful attacks of your mount.

feats.name: Strafing Breath
feats.description: You urge your dragon mount forward, wreathed in magical power.

feats.name: Student of the Dueling Arts
feats.description: Dueling is your art, and your weapon is your instrument.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Student of the Dueling Arts

feats.name: Summoner's Call
feats.description: In a moment of danger, you call your eidolon to your side.

feats.name: Sunder Spell
feats.description: You draw upon your superstitious fury to destroy a spell.

feats.name: Supreme Invigorating Elixir
feats.description: For the purposes of counteracting effects with invigorating elixirs, treat your level as though it were 2 higher.

feats.name: Surgical Shock
feats.description: With a few well-placed jabs with your fist or weapon, you render your opponent disoriented or ungainly.

feats.name: Surging Blood Magic
feats.description: Your blood courses with magic.

feats.name: Swap Investment
feats.description: Your time as a Pathfinder has taught you how to improvise, and you've learned to make use of the resources you find in the field.

feats.name: Sword of Sealing
feats.description: Your spiritual power pierces both body and soul, pinning your foe in place.

feats.name: Sympathetic Portrayal
feats.description: You portrayed Grand Prince Stavian III in Fall of the Troubled King, a production dedicated to the life and times of the paranoid Taldan ruler whose violent resistance to new policies on succession kicked off the War for the Crown.

feats.name: Talmandor's Shout
feats.description: After seeing an enemy harm one of your allies, you deliver a righteous shout in the name of the celestial Talmandor.

feats.name: Tandem Auras
feats.description: You’ve learned how to maintain multiple auras at once, reinforcing them simultaneously.

feats.name: Tense Negotiator
feats.description: You often find that the best way to win a conflict means avoiding a fight in the first place.

feats.name: Terraforming Trickery
feats.description: You know how to channel the transformative aspects of your blood magic to alter your surroundings.

feats.name: Thaumaturge's Demesne
feats.description: You have claimed an area or location as your demesne, granting you the ability to ward and protect it.

feats.name: The Bigger They Are
feats.description: With reckless speed, you dash, jump and swing around a creature to find a more vulnerable spot.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard The Bigger They Are

feats.name: Their Master's Call
feats.description: In a pinch, you pull one of your inactive companions from their rest to provide a companion's support benefit.

feats.name: Thorn in Hell's Side
feats.description: Your devotion to the ideals of justice, freedom, and revolution allow you to truly punish those who stand in your way.

feats.name: Thunderous Landing
feats.description: You hurl away enemies with the force of your landing.

feats.name: Titan's Stature
feats.description: You grow to even greater size.

feats.name: Too Angry to Die
feats.description: You refuse to yield the battle, even after you've been knocked off your feet and nearly killed.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Too Angry to Die R

feats.name: Towering Size
feats.description: Your eidolon becomes even bigger.

feats.name: Tunneling Claws
feats.description: You have elongated claws and enhanced senses, making you uncanny at digging the underground passageways needed to construct ghoul warrens and rob graves without arousing suspicion.

feats.name: Unbalancing Sweep
feats.description: You make a great sweep with your weapon or fists about yourself, knocking creatures off their feet and away from you.

feats.name: Uncanny Bombs
feats.description: You lob bombs unerringly, despite obstructions or distance.

feats.name: Uncanny Suction
feats.description: Your limbs produce strange, sucker-like growths that allow you to adhere to walls, objects, and most other surfaces.

feats.name: Undying Beast
feats.description: You can be injured by non-silver sources but recover with staggering speed.

feats.name: Unshakable Grit
feats.description: You've become hardened by conflict after everything you've faced, and you possess a certain intractable stubbornness.

feats.name: Venomous Touch
feats.description: You've learned to channel the sting of the worm.

feats.name: Vernai Training
feats.description: To resurrect a creature you’ve slain, a spellcaster must counteract your influence on its death.

feats.name: Vexing Tempest
feats.description: Your familiar channels elemental air around it to unleash a disruptive gust that sends creatures flying.

feats.name: Vigilant Benediction
feats.description: Unwilling to be outdone by the Crimson Reclaimers and their oath, you've petitioned the gods of good for a sliver of divine magic.

feats.name: Virtuosic Dancer
feats.description: You’re so fond of using your Acrobatic feats on the stage that you’ve begun adding your own flair to these dances on the big stage.

feats.name: Wailing Dead
feats.description: The voices of the spirits you command spark fear in the hearts of your enemies.

feats.name: Wandering Oasis
feats.description: You’re surrounded by soothing energy.

feats.name: Ward Slumber
feats.description: Just before going to sleep, you can perform a 10-minute ward to protect the slumber of up to eight creatures within 30 feet of you.

feats.name: Warden's Focus
feats.description: Your connection with your surroundings deepens and expands, allowing you to draw in more of nature’s primal power as you focus.

feats.name: Warped by Rage
feats.description: Rage courses through your body, transforming you into a beast of battle.

feats.name: Wave Spiral
feats.description: You dip and spin, unleashing a wide whirlpool of water.

feats.name: Weakening Assault
feats.description: With a barrage of blows, you diminish an enemy's strength.

feats.name: Whirling in the Summer Storm
feats.description: Your hands move in a hypnotic and distracting flurry that throws your foes off-balance before you cast them away with a violent pirouette.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Whirling in the Summer Storm

feats.name: Whisper of Warning
feats.description: Your protective apparitions alert you to an incoming attack.

feats.name: Wild Dance
feats.description: The combination of your passion for both life and the battle against evil makes you graceful and unpredictable.

feats.name: Wild Strider
feats.description: Natural obstacles pose no obstacle to you.

feats.name: Wiles on the Wind
feats.description: Speaking lies, you set them loose upon a drifting wind.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Wiles on the Wind

feats.name: Wings of the Dragon
feats.description: You can manifest draconic wings to soar through the air at great speed.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Wings of the Dragon

feats.name: Wings of the Moon
feats.description: You can fly long distances without breaks.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Wings of the Moon

feats.name: Witchwood Seed
feats.description: You touch a creature to implant a malignant seed in its body.

feats.name: Witch’s Broom
feats.description: A broom is the only steed you need to fly through the night sky.

feats.name: Words of Unraveling
feats.description: You have unlocked abstruse methods to tangle with reality itself, altering the fate of a single individual.

feats.name: Wrathful Presence
feats.description: You channel the unending wrath of the erinyes all around you.

feats.name: Adamantine Mantra
feats.description: You attain your true potential as a tutelary spirit.

feats.name: Advanced General Training
feats.description: Over the long course of your adventuring life, your adaptability has let you pick up numerous useful abilities.

feats.name: Airy Step
feats.description: You create a blanket of fog in a 5–foot burst centered on one corner of your space.

feats.name: Alter Resistance
feats.description: You focus on your protean forebears to change your energy resistance.

feats.name: Ancestor's Rage
feats.description: You transform into an enormous, otherworldly hyena.

feats.name: Ancestor's Transformation
feats.description: You can commune with ancestor spirits to assume the form of an enormous primeval strix.

feats.name: Anchoring Arrow
feats.description: You can prevent demonic foes from fleeing your wrath via teleportation.

feats.name: Aquatic Adaptation
feats.description: If you and up to four other creatures are in contact with a body of water deep enough for you to fully submerge, you can spend 10 minutes adapting the creatures to that specific body of water.

feats.name: Aquatic Camouflage
feats.description: You blend into the waves.

feats.name: Arboreal Conversationalist
feats.description: With your close connection to primal energies and the First World, you can communicate with trees.

feats.name: Arcane Locomotion
feats.description: You've modified your body to allow you to augment your movement.

feats.name: Arcane Sight
feats.description: You've trained yourself to constantly be on the lookout for magical effects, even when focusing on looking out for other things.

feats.name: Arise, ye Worthy!
feats.description: A touch of valkyrie magic in your blood lets you hold back death’s grasp.

feats.name: Astral Blink
feats.description: You've attuned your core to allow you to phase in and out of the Astral Plane, allowing you to teleport periodically.

feats.name: Attuned Electroreceptors
feats.description: You grow specialized organs that allow you to detect even the faintest of heartbeats.

feats.name: Augment Senses
feats.description: You open vestigial eyes, unfurl tympanic flaps of skin, or otherwise enhance your senses.

feats.name: Avenge Ally
feats.description: Though you know that you will eventually outlive your companions, seeing them at death's door brings clarity to your attacks.

feats.name: Awaken Others
feats.description: You can awaken others just through contact and communication.

feats.name: Awaken the Obake
feats.description: Not every tool is well cared for, and those that are treated badly might awaken as malevolent spirits.

feats.name: Azarketi Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Your mastery with weapons both above and below water is unmatched.

feats.name: Black Cat Curse
feats.description: You hiss a spiteful curse.

feats.name: Bone Investiture
feats.description: You encase yourself in spiritual dinosaur bones to become a Huge dinosaur.

feats.name: Bonekeeper's Bane
feats.description: Whenever an enemy starts its turn adjacent to you, it must attempt a Will saving throw against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is highest.

feats.name: Bounce Back
feats.description: You recover from near-death experiences with astounding resilience.

feats.name: Calaca's Showstopper
feats.description: You've spent many an evening learning songs and tales featuring calacas, death's wandering minstrels.

feats.name: Call of the Green Man
feats.description: You can call forth nearby nature spirits to augment your body.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Call of the Green Man

feats.name: Camoflage Coat
feats.description: You've learned to use your natural camouflage to your advantage, enhancing your ability to blend with your surroundings through careful movements and additional markings or attire.

feats.name: Can't Fall Here
feats.description: You physically help an ally remain standing and encourage them to push through their pain against dire odds.

feats.name: Cannibalize Magic
feats.description: The fey magic inside of you is a vital part of your body, and you can steal other sources of magic to replenish yours.

feats.name: Caterwaul
feats.description: You give a daring yowl, calling your companion back from the brink of unconsciousness.

feats.name: Ceaseless Shadows
feats.description: You excel at going unnoticed, especially among a crowd.

feats.name: Celestial Mercy
feats.description: Your celestial powers allow you to remove lesser afflictions with ease.

feats.name: Celestial Strikes
feats.description: Your connection to good arms all your attacks against forces of evil.

feats.name: Ceremony of Growth
feats.description: You can alter your exoskeleton's size.

feats.name: Clinging to Life
feats.description: This life still holds much for you, and you aren’t ready to fall back into the River of Souls just yet.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Clinging to Life R

feats.name: Cloak of Poison
feats.description: You secrete a cloak of concentrated poison that harms any who dare attack you.

feats.name: Cobble Dancer
feats.description: You know how to take advantage of foes thrown off-balance by unstable flooring, loose cobblestones, or similar impediments.

feats.name: Cold Iron Stomach
feats.description: You have steeled yourself against potent odors.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Cold Iron Stomach U

feats.name: Combined Form
feats.description: Cooperation and coordination are the secrets to getting by in tanuki society.

feats.name: Conrasu Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency for conrasu weapons.

feats.name: Consistent Surge
feats.description: Your nanites are incredibly effective, capable of improving your body's efficiency regularly.

feats.name: Continuous Assault
feats.description: You can use Elemental Assault once per hour instead of once per day.

feats.name: Coral Reserve
feats.description: Your coral symbiotes provide a store of energy that you can call upon when needed.

feats.name: Core Rejuvenation
feats.description: Your soul taps into your core's power to push against the grasp of death and allow you to recover consciousness.

feats.name: Crafter's Instinct
feats.description: You sense a minor flaw in the weapon as you fire it, and quickly adjust your aim on the fly to avoid the flaw.

feats.name: Dalang's Ally
feats.description: You move your shadow as a master puppeteer, allowing it to dance around your enemies and serve you in combat.

feats.name: Dance of the Jester
feats.description: Through your incredible dance skill, you can embody the character of the Jester, able to take control of the shadows of other players on stage (much to your amusement).
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Dance of the Jester

feats.name: Daywalker
feats.description: Whether through painstaking exposure, devoted prayer, or simple luck, you've found a greater affinity for life through the sun's light.

feats.name: Debilitating Breath
feats.description: Your breath causes lasting hindrance to those it harms.

feats.name: Delver
feats.description: Subterranean life taught you to swim through the ground like water.

feats.name: Digger
feats.description: You are used to building homes and defenses underground.

feats.name: Dire Form
feats.description: Your hybrid shape is a hulking beast.

feats.name: Disruptive Stare
feats.description: Your frigid gaze can turn a foe's blood to ice.

feats.name: Draconic Veil
feats.description: Like some dragons, your forebear had the supernatural ability to change their shape to walk among humanoids.

feats.name: Eclectic Sword Mastery
feats.description: You instinctively learn how to use a sword with just a few practice swings.

feats.name: Eldritch Calm
feats.description: Your fey heritage has altered your mindset to more resemble the uncanny perspective of the fey.

feats.name: Elite Dracomancer
feats.description: Your draconic power equals that of a lesser dragon.

feats.name: Elucidation
feats.description: You can cut through illusions with such precision that all those around you find their senses sharpened as well.

feats.name: Enforced Order
feats.description: You never fail to strike down the ever-expanding reaches of chaos.

feats.name: Enlarged Chassis
feats.description: You've empowered your core to support a larger body, granting you size and additional reach.

feats.name: Envenomed Edge
feats.description: With a combination of your poison glands and herbal concoctions, you can consistently deliver venomous attacks when you hit an enemy's weak points.

feats.name: Eternal Memories
feats.description: You have lived longer than most realize, and due to your many lifetimes of practice you remember almost everything from your previous incarnations now.

feats.name: Explosive Expert
feats.description: You have continued training in volatile weapons and gained a deeper understanding.

feats.name: Ferocious Beasts
feats.description: Since ancient times, the mightiest orc beast tamers would draw out the true fighting spirit of their companion beasts by feeding the creatures a draft incorporating the orc’s own blood.

feats.name: Ferry Through Waves
feats.description: The waters around you permit you passage, a privilege you can share with a willing ally.

feats.name: Fey Skin
feats.description: While you are more susceptible to cold iron than most of the Wingless, you also have an incredible resilience and a deeper connection to the healing energies of the First World.

feats.name: Fiendish Strikes
feats.description: Your festering connection to the forces of evil infuses your weapons with debilitating malevolence, tearing down creatures of good with every attack.

feats.name: Finest Trick
feats.description: Many fiends—rakshasa rajas and demonic succubi most famously—can take on the forms of others.

feats.name: Flame Jump
feats.description: Your peri lineage has opened your mind to fire's raw, purging essence.

feats.name: Flames of Vision
feats.description: Dokkaebi were among the first goblins to pioneer gazing through flames, spectral or physical, to cast their senses far and wide.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Flames of Vision U

feats.name: Flower Chimera
feats.description: You call on a guardian of the wild to burst forth from the land to aid you.

feats.name: Form a Flock
feats.description: You call nearby wild dragonets to swarm to your side.

feats.name: Form of the Bat
feats.description: You can transform into a harmless bat.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Form of the Bat

feats.name: Formation Master
feats.description: You can assemble a formation even with members of ancestries that lack the hobgoblins’ military discipline, and you can extend these benefits to your hobgoblin allies.

feats.name: Generation Digger
feats.description: You're so adept at burrowing through the earth that you don't even need tools; in fact, you just might be trusted to lead the latest generation dig.

feats.name: Genie Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in falchions, ranseurs, scimitars, tridents, and all geniekin weapons in which you are trained.

feats.name: Germination of Resolve
feats.description: Vitality floods your trammeled soul, offering you rejuvenation, if not quite rest.

feats.name: Ghoran Weapon Expertise
feats.description: It's as if you've been training for a thousand years.

feats.name: Gift of the Moon
feats.description: You can share your power with others, but they can't escape the werecreature's curse as easily as you can.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Gift of the Moon

feats.name: Glamour
feats.description: You unlock a new level of fey power and can manipulate the perceptions of others using a font of First World magic.

feats.name: Hag Magic
feats.description: Through your heritage, you can replicate a hag’s magic.

feats.name: Harbinger's Claw
feats.description: You caw ominously, cursing the creature with misfortune.

feats.name: Heart of Earth
feats.description: The earth parts to allow you passage.

feats.name: Hop Up
feats.description: Your frog-like agility awakens as soon as you do.

feats.name: Hydraulic Maneuvers
feats.description: You batter your foes with a torrent of water siphoned from your surroundings.

feats.name: I Sense Malevolence
feats.description: Your time in the River of Souls has given you deep insight into the machinations of those who refuse to move on.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited I Sense Malevolence R

feats.name: Idol Threat
feats.description: You brandish the precious object you're holding menacingly, at once mocking it and threatening its safety.

feats.name: Iivlar's Boundary Break
feats.description: You can bend the boundary between planes with the natural skill of an iivlar.

feats.name: Imperial Dragon Potion
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can spend 10 minutes to create a variant energy breath potion, which has the kobold trait in addition to its normal traits.

feats.name: Impose Order
feats.description: You shift the underlying fabric of reality to impose a baseline of order.

feats.name: Impossible Gossip
feats.description: You can speak to inanimate objects, finding a magical spark within them similar to the one that animated you.

feats.name: Improved Elemental Bulwark
feats.description: You gain resistance 10 from Elemental Bulwark instead of 5.

feats.name: Improved Signature Weapon
feats.description: Your signature weapon takes on the properties of mystical materials renowned for defeating undead, spirits, and other such creatures.

feats.name: Incredible Ferocity
feats.description: Given time to collect yourself after a near-death scrape, you can rebuild your ferocity and withstand additional finishing blows.

feats.name: Incredible Luck (Halfling)
feats.description: Even other halflings consider you to be particularly lucky.

feats.name: Incredible Sprint
feats.description: You push yourself, unleashing a burst of sudden speed.

feats.name: Inspirit Hazard
feats.description: You awaken a spirit of creation within the hazard.

feats.name: Instinctive Obfuscation
feats.description: The magic within you manifests as a natural reaction to threats.

feats.name: Invisible Trickster
feats.description: You have learned how to become invisible and remain so.

feats.name: Irriseni Ice-Witch
feats.description: You can trace your direct descent from one of the Queens of Irrisen and thus from Baba Yaga herself.

feats.name: Iruxi Spirit Strike
feats.description: Your iruxi unarmed attacks channel the spiritual energy of your ancestors.

feats.name: Jinx Glutton
feats.description: You can Eat Fortune once per hour, rather than once per day.

feats.name: Jotun's Restoration
feats.description: You’ve mastered how to tap into your restorative powers at a higher frequency.

feats.name: Kaiju's Footfalls
feats.description: You channel the might and mass of a kaiju.

feats.name: Kashrishi Revivification
feats.description: The well of psychic energy held within your mind can exceed the limitations of your physical body.

feats.name: Kijimuna Whistle
feats.description: Your connection to nature—and trees, in particular—has become so strong that you can summon the plants you befriended in the forests of your youth.

feats.name: Killing Stone
feats.description: Your star orb hides a deadly miasma.

feats.name: Kitsune Spell Expertise
feats.description: Your tails show your magical mastery.

feats.name: Larger than Life (Kitsune)
feats.description: When you Change Shape, you can assume the form of a creature that’s Large or Huge in size.

feats.name: Lifeblood's Call
feats.description: The impulse to survive and continue fighting resonates deep within you.

feats.name: Light-bending Jewel
feats.description: Your ability to walk unseen through the world has given you the new moon’s blessing.

feats.name: Linguistic Revival
feats.description: You achieved fluency in different languages with each reincarnation, and your brain remembers much of the grammar, idioms, and obscenities that you spouted in old lives.

feats.name: Look but Don't Touch
feats.description: Many flowers are beautiful to look upon but deadly to touch—and you're one of them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Look but Don't Touch

feats.name: Lurching Chomp
feats.description: Through your wiles, charm, or a little bit of magic, you lure in a foe for a closer look—and a quick bite!

feats.name: Magitaxis
feats.description: You move reflexively toward the source of magic you most consumed as a larva.

feats.name: Majestic Presence
feats.description: By taking an impressive stance, the full force of your personality cows lesser beings.

feats.name: Malleable Form
feats.description: You adroitly shift your form, taking on another appearance.

feats.name: March the Mines
feats.description: You march through the earth and lead an ally along.

feats.name: Mask of Fear
feats.description: Your warmask burns off of your face, releasing your apprehension.

feats.name: Memory of Mastery
feats.description: Flashes of past selves surface in an instant, especially when you’re under duress.

feats.name: Metal-Veined Strikes
feats.description: Metallic veins grow throughout your body, giving your unarmed attacks a metallic sheen.

feats.name: Miraculous Medic
feats.description: Your ability to heal others is miraculous enough to bring people back from near-death.

feats.name: Mischievous Tail
feats.description: Your tail can bedevil your foes.

feats.name: Mist Strider
feats.description: You condense the moisture in the air, solidifying it so it can hold your weight.

feats.name: Monkey Spirits
feats.description: Vanaras generally consider the spirits of departed monkeys to be less informative or interesting than their own ancestors traveling the cycles of existence, yet these monkey spirits can prove useful when the situation is dire.

feats.name: Nagaji Spell Expertise
feats.description: Your magical skill rivals that of accomplished naga spellcasters.

feats.name: None Shall Know
feats.description: Even magical means have a hard time prying information from you.

feats.name: One with Earth
feats.description: You've learned to harness your connection to the earth to travel through it.

feats.name: One with the Wild
feats.description: You naturally blend in with the wilderness, becoming camouflaged.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited One with the Wild U

feats.name: Oni Rampage
feats.description: Nothing invigorates you more than your own freshly spilled blood.

feats.name: Pain is Temporary
feats.description: Sangpotshi practitioners know that suffering is a fleeting sensation that ultimately strengthens the soul and prepares it for a new reincarnation.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Pain is Temporary R

feats.name: Palm-leaf Silhouette
feats.description: You can make yourself as flat as a paper doll or shadow.

feats.name: Phantom Charm
feats.description: You can harness the spiritual connection in your blood, allowing you to shift the negative threads of fate.

feats.name: Pit of Snakes
feats.description: Mundane serpents obey your summons.

feats.name: Planar Sidestep
feats.description: You shift your body briefly between planes, reducing the damage from your foe's attack.

feats.name: Plane Hop
feats.description: The spaces between planes are obvious to you, and you can use them to move in unexpected ways.

feats.name: Ponpoko-pon!
feats.description: Whether it’s because you play especially vigorously or are simply off-key, the music of your belly drum can physically wound your foes.

feats.name: Primal Rampage
feats.description: You gain unfettered movement and mountain resilience as 4th-rank primal innate spells that you can cast once per day.

feats.name: Pummeling Whirlpool
feats.description: You draw water from the environs, swirling it into a rough torrent around you to punish your foes.

feats.name: Purge Sins
feats.description: You call on your celestial forebears to rid your body of all toxins and impurities.

feats.name: Quick Spring
feats.description: Ishii Bunji is a skilled tumbler, and learning his technique allows you to propel yourself across the battlefield faster than your enemies can react.

feats.name: Radiant Burst
feats.description: Your skin glows with intensity.

feats.name: Rapid Pheromone Recovery
feats.description: Your supply of pheromones replenish very quickly.

feats.name: Reanimating Spark
feats.description: The magic that animates you strains to keep you alive.

feats.name: Redirect Attention
feats.description: Through your strong connection with your progenitor, you're able to redirect those attempting to spy on you.

feats.name: Rehydration
feats.description: You surround your body with a thin layer of water drawn from the moisture in the air.

feats.name: Reimagine
feats.description: You can cast dreaming potential as an innate occult spell.

feats.name: Rejuvenating Embrace
feats.description: You rejuvenate your spirit by taking your rest where Mother Earth embraces Father Moon.

feats.name: Resist Ruin
feats.description: Your duskwalker heritage allows you to extend protection against void energy.

feats.name: Resplendent Spellhorn
feats.description: Your magic continues to flourish.

feats.name: Revivification Protocol
feats.description: Your nanites are programmed to automatically revive you.

feats.name: Scrutinizing Gaze
feats.description: Your family's traditions of defending against Geb's undead have granted you a sixth sense for detecting spirits, haunts, and other restless dead, no matter their form or the strength of their presence.

feats.name: Sea Witch
feats.description: You've studied the waves, and they obey your will as extensions of your own fin.

feats.name: Secret Eyes
feats.description: You can call forth an invisible eye to let you peek on secrets.

feats.name: See the Unseen
feats.description: You notice things that others can't see at all.

feats.name: Shadow Pact
feats.description: Thousands of years ago, your ancestors made a pact with Zon-Kuthon.

feats.name: Shadow's Assault
feats.description: Your shadow assaults your foes.

feats.name: Shaitan Skin
feats.description: When in danger, you can harden the stone in your skin into armor, much like a shaitan.

feats.name: Sharpened Senses
feats.description: Your senses have become so sharp that you notice changes subconsciously.

feats.name: Sheltering Jewel
feats.description: Your head gem has accessed the power of the full moon through your determination to heal and protect your loved ones.

feats.name: Shift the Little Ones
feats.description: With your large size, you need to be careful around your smaller friends.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Shift the Little Ones

feats.name: Shinstabber
feats.description: As long as you're Small or smaller, you can end your movement in the same square as an ally of any size.

feats.name: Shory Aerialist
feats.description: Unique in Golarion’s history, the Shory people developed fighting styles dedicated to combat in the air.

feats.name: Skeletal Transformation
feats.description: You rearrange your bones into a bestial shape.

feats.name: Skeleton Commander
feats.description: You gain the ability to summon your own skeletal minions.

feats.name: Skirt the Light
feats.description: You can travel the border between the Material and Shadow Planes and even bring others along.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Skirt the Light U

feats.name: Skittering Sneak
feats.description: You squish, slink, and skitter from cover to cover with great speed and stealth.

feats.name: Slay Giants Unseen
feats.description: In the darkness, your attacks can bring any red-faced giant to their knees.

feats.name: Slip Sideways
feats.description: Like many fiends, you have the supernatural ability to teleport yourself to safety.

feats.name: Smoothing Stomp
feats.description: You stomp and unleash a wave of the magic of creation in a 30-foot emanation that transforms non-magical difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain into normal terrain.

feats.name: Spell Devourer
feats.description: You don’t just resist magic; you devour it.

feats.name: Spew Tentacles
feats.description: You can open your mouth to an immense size and spew forth an impossibly large field of tentacles.

feats.name: Spiritual Headhunter
feats.description: Your spirit coffin can temporarily detain the spirits of those you kill, allowing you to ask them one last question before they pass on.

feats.name: Spiteful Rake
feats.description: Your instincts sing of spite and malice, and you've learned a devastating trick: go for the eyes.

feats.name: Splendid Illusion
feats.description: You cover your surroundings in outlandish fantasy.

feats.name: Squirm Free
feats.description: You're used to slipping out of a bigger creature's grasp or escaping a child's overly enthusiastic hug.

feats.name: Steadfast Ally
feats.description: Your presence alone is enough to provide your allies with emotional support.

feats.name: Stone Soul Siblings
feats.description: Your connection with nature’s spirits has progressed to the point where you can even have casual conversation with pebbles and boulders.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Stone Soul Siblings R

feats.name: Stronger Debilitating Venom
feats.description: Add one of the following to the debilitations from which you can choose when you Envenom.

feats.name: Stubborn Persistence
feats.description: Humans are renowned for their ability to persist through the most grueling of trials that would leave others ready to drop.

feats.name: Suli Amir
feats.description: You have power connected to the powerful jann amirs.

feats.name: Summon Air Elemental
feats.description: You have a connection to the Inner Spheres, allowing you to summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Earth Elemental
feats.description: You have a connection to the Inner Sphere, allowing you to summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Fire Elemental
feats.description: You can summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Metal Elemental
feats.description: You can summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Nephilim Kin
feats.description: You have a connection to the Outer Planes, allowing you to summon a divine ally.

feats.name: Summon Water Elemental
feats.description: You can summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Wood Elemental
feats.description: Your connection to the Plane of Wood allows you to summon elemental allies.

feats.name: Swift Eel Mount
feats.description: Your rapport with your eel lets you guide it to avoid dangers as it swims.

feats.name: Synchronous Slither
feats.description: You’ve learned to travel at your ally’s rhythm and use their movement to adjust your own position.

feats.name: Telluric Power
feats.description: You channel strength from the earth beneath your feet to pummel your enemies.

feats.name: Tempest Gaze
feats.description: Your third eye grows stronger and more powerful.

feats.name: Threatening Pursuit
feats.description: You emit a terrifying growl and snort, stamping your hooves for all to hear so that they know that you hunt them.

feats.name: Thunder God's Fan
feats.description: Your fan unleashes the fury of the storm.

feats.name: Toppling Dance
feats.description: While sharing a creature's space using Dance Underfoot, your melee weapons and unarmed attacks gain the trip trait, but only against the creature whose space you share.

feats.name: Trample (Centaur)
feats.description: You've trained to stampede right over smaller foes without causing yourself any harm.

feats.name: Translucent Skin
feats.description: Your body is translucent while underwater.

feats.name: Treehealer
feats.description: You can undo the effect of demonic corruption in plants.

feats.name: Truespeech
feats.description: It is paramount that you are understood and you understand others; language need not impede your message.

feats.name: Tumbling Diversion
feats.description: Attempt to Tumble Through an opponent's space.

feats.name: Unbound Freedom
feats.description: Your future is no other person's to control, and the cycles of your fate sometimes step in to protect you when that control would be taken from you.

feats.name: Unbreakable Resolve
feats.description: The experience of coming back after death has granted you a strong sense of resolve; devilish words, slick spells, and conniving trickery can’t easily catch you unprepared.

feats.name: Unbreakable-er Goblin
feats.description: As hard as most unbreakable goblins are to break, you are that much harder to break.

feats.name: Unfettered Growth
feats.description: By tapping into the limitless power of the Plane of Wood, you can experience sudden, dramatic growth for a short time.

feats.name: Universal Longevity
feats.description: You’ve perfected your ability to keep up with all the skills you’ve learned over your long life, so you’re almost never truly untrained at a skill.

feats.name: Unnerving Terror
feats.description: You let out a mighty howl, chant of death, or speak with eerie repetition that plants fear in others.

feats.name: Unrivaled Builder
feats.description: Building things is like solving a puzzle, and you know how to use anything at your disposal to get the job done.

feats.name: Vanara Battle Clarity
feats.description: Your focus in combat is practically unshakable.

feats.name: Vanara Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Thanks to numerous joyous practice exercises, you've become an expert in vanara weapons.

feats.name: Venom Purge
feats.description: You produce a specialized venom that burns out other toxins and impurities in your body.

feats.name: Very, Very Sneaky
feats.description: You can move up to your Speed when you use the Sneak action, and you no longer need to have cover or greater cover or be concealed to Hide or Sneak.

feats.name: Vicious Snares
feats.description: You deal an additional 1d6 precision damage with damage snares you craft.

feats.name: Violent Vines
feats.description: When angered, you can imbue nearby vines with your wrath, provoking them into a murderous rampage.

feats.name: Vishkanya Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Extensive training has granted you an elegant control in the use of vishkanyan weapons.

feats.name: Wandering Heart
feats.description: While all elves adapt to their environments over time, you have traveled so widely and become attuned to so many environs that your body now changes more rapidly than other elves.

feats.name: War Conditioning
feats.description: You have extensive training in remote environments, allowing you to move through these areas easily.

feats.name: Warren Digger
feats.description: You've learned to put your sturdy claws to work digging through the earth.

feats.name: Water to Water
feats.description: You allow your body to collapse into water, then reconstitute your corporeal form elsewhere.

feats.name: We March On
feats.description: You make sure that your allies push themselves while traveling.

feats.name: Webslinger
feats.description: Your natural ability to create silken webs blends with your magical powers, allowing you to create impossibly large webs with great frequency.

feats.name: Wild-haired Fury
feats.description: Your broken bones jut at odd angles, yet this pain only adds to your anger and prowess.

feats.name: Wooden Mantle
feats.description: Your connection to the magic of the Plane of Wood allows you to call upon the power of plants and trees to protect yourself.

feats.name: A Miracle of Science!
feats.description: Once, you dreamed of creating life. Now you know that merely creating life lacks ambition.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard A Miracle of Science!

feats.name: Absorb Spell
feats.description: You absorb a spell and store it in your body.

feats.name: Airborne Form
feats.description: Your eidolon can fly.

feats.name: Aldori's Retort
feats.description: You can flow through combat reactions with graceful ease.

feats.name: Allegro
feats.description: You can quicken your allies with a fast-paced performance.

feats.name: Alloy Flesh and Steel
feats.description: Elemental energy replaces every cell of your body with raw metal.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Alloy Flesh and Steel H

feats.name: Arcane Shroud
feats.description: Your magic has a powerful aftereffect, briefly granting you a certain spell.

feats.name: Armored Exercise
feats.description: You've spent time training in your armor alongside other agents from the Swords.

feats.name: Assume Earth's Mantle
feats.description: Enormous pieces of rock cluster around your body.

feats.name: Aura of Determination
feats.description: Your aura protects against powers that would twist the mind and body.

feats.name: Aura of Life
feats.description: Your aura protects against the power of the Void.

feats.name: Aura of Preservation
feats.description: Your aura protects against the twisting powers of aberrations.

feats.name: Aura of Righteousness
feats.description: Your righteous aura dampens evil's might and prevents the unholy from escaping you.

feats.name: Aura of Vengeance
feats.description: When you call upon others to take retribution, you also guide their aim.

feats.name: Awesome Blow
feats.description: Your attacks are so powerful, they can flatten your opponents.

feats.name: Banish Falsehoods of Flesh
feats.description: Your ability to manipulate supernatural energy allows you to deploy divine magic directly against a disguised enemy to reveal them as they truly are, or to cleanse an ally from an unwilling transformation.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Banish Falsehoods of Flesh

feats.name: Barrier of Boreal Frost
feats.description: You form an intricate structure of ice, such as a wall of bricks made of packed snow or a screen of enormous icicles.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Barrier of Boreal Frost

feats.name: Bizarre Transformation
feats.description: The forms you take on defy belief—chimerical sights of twisted antlers or acidic drool.

feats.name: Blanket Defense
feats.description: You become a bulwark against foes' attacks that target you and your allies.

feats.name: Blast Tackle
feats.description: You throw yourself at an enemy, bracing your weapon against it and pulling it close before releasing a destructive shot.

feats.name: Blood Ascendancy
feats.description: When you would benefit from a blood magic effect through Blood Rising, you can choose to benefit from two different blood magic effects you know.

feats.name: Bloody Denial
feats.description: You strike a foe with force to prevent them from reacting.

feats.name: Body of Air
feats.description: Your gathered air consumes your body, leaving only a cloud of living vapor.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Body of Air H

feats.name: Bodysnatcher
feats.description: Your secret-stealing maggots reveal how to devour more than just the flesh and secrets of a victim; you can ingest and assume their whole physical appearance.

feats.name: Bombing Run
feats.description: Using your elevation and speed to your advantage, you deliver aerial payloads with greater force.

feats.name: Bonded Focus
feats.description: Your connection to your bonded item increases your focus pool.

feats.name: Borrow Memories
feats.description: Knowing how someone thinks makes it much easier to know where they'll be, or even replace them altogether.

feats.name: Call Draconic Ally
feats.description: Either by beseeching a dragon or bending it to your will, you conjure a mighty creature to assist you.

feats.name: Cardinal Guardians
feats.description: You focus your divine magic to allow your apparitions to work in concert using the magic from one to weaken an enemy against the power of the next.

feats.name: Channeling Block
feats.description: You pour divine energy into a desperate block.

feats.name: Cleansing Transformation
feats.description: You learn to cleanse bodily toxins alongside the transformations of your shape-changing magic.

feats.name: Come at Me!
feats.description: You're a legendary duelist, welcoming all challengers, enabling you to challenge many foes even while other challenges are active.

feats.name: Commitment to Vigilance
feats.description: Your foes find it difficult to maneuver around you without attracting your attention.

feats.name: Complete the Hero's Journey
feats.description: As your divine spark travels through each of your ikons in turn, it gains power, culminating its journey when it enters your third ikon.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Complete the Hero's Journey

feats.name: Concentrated Assault
feats.description: You and your spotter combine your efforts to bring down your target.

feats.name: Conscious Spell Specialization
feats.description: You become more adept with the spells that are always in your mind.

feats.name: Consecrated Aura
feats.description: Your body radiates positive energy, making your very presence disorienting to undead and encouraging them to move away from you.

feats.name: Contact with the Enemy
feats.description: You know that even the best-laid plans rarely survive contact with the enemy, and you have prepared your allies to adapt with a wide array of contingencies.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Contact with the Enemy

feats.name: Control Tower
feats.description: Your keen senses and ability to process battlefield information have dramatically improved, allowing you to drastically reduce the advantage of unseen foes.

feats.name: Cosmic Cocktail
feats.description: Using the liquors, vinegars, and fruits or herbs at your disposal, you spend 1 minute to create a cocktail with colors reminiscent of space and its stars.

feats.name: Costume Change
feats.description: Enough of your life has been spent performing that you’ve mastered the art of the quick change—especially when it comes to armor or invested items.

feats.name: Cratering Drop
feats.description: You follow up your enemy's fall, driving you both to the earth in a meteoric descent.

feats.name: Crimson Oath Devotion
feats.description: You've made the Crimson Oath a part of yourself; you mumble it in your sleep and recite it under your breath as you march.

feats.name: Crusader's Masquerade
feats.description: Your mask can hide you from the undead.

feats.name: Curse of the Saumen Kar
feats.description: You activate the runes on your body to create an icy prison around a Huge or smaller creature you can see within 60 feet.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Curse of the Saumen Kar

feats.name: Dance of Thunder
feats.description: Your steps echo with the thunderous retort of exploding black powder as you dance a dance of death.

feats.name: Death Rattle
feats.description: When the time comes for your horde to be returned to its temporary rest, its departure carries those nearby closer to death.

feats.name: Death's Door
feats.description: You continue to fight when others would fall.

feats.name: Deep Roots
feats.description: Your mind-control spells send burrowing mental roots that tear at your target's mind when they're removed or run their course.

feats.name: Defensive Roll
feats.description: Dropping into a roll to disperse the force of the blow, you can partially evade a lethal attack and stay conscious.

feats.name: Defy Chains
feats.description: You turn to face a fiend that attacked you, looking them squarely in the eyes (if it has them) and showing no fear.

feats.name: Deity's Protection
feats.description: When you call upon your deity’s power to fulfill the promise of their domain, you gain divine protection.

feats.name: Desperate Finisher
feats.description: You throw everything you have into one last, reckless press.

feats.name: Desperate Resuscitation
feats.description: You can use your training in combat medicine to revive the recently deceased.

feats.name: Destined Victory
feats.description: You demand a battle against your chosen enemy.

feats.name: Determination
feats.description: Your training allows you to shrug off your foes’ spells and conditions when the need is dire.

feats.name: Disruptive Blur
feats.description: You use cacophonous blasts from your gun or distracting shots from your crossbow to cause momentary diversions, letting you move about the battlefield with impunity.

feats.name: Divine Reflexes
feats.description: You gain an additional reaction that you can use only for your champion's reaction.

feats.name: Domain Embodiment
feats.description: Your deity contains multitudes, and you can express any aspect of them you desire.

feats.name: Domino Effect
feats.description: You've learned to pull the invisible strings of magic to affect targets that wouldn't normally be.

feats.name: Dormant Eruption
feats.description: A sweltering heat and sparks of flame that take the form of tiny copies of you surround your body.

feats.name: Double Poison
feats.description: You can apply two different infused injury poisons to the same weapon, though not to a piece of ammunition.

feats.name: Dragon's Journey
feats.description: Your movements are like that of a dragon weaving a serpentine path between your enemies and allies.

feats.name: Drain Soul Cage
feats.description: You make your soul cage into your bonded item, allowing you to harness its abundant magical energy.

feats.name: Dream Logic
feats.description: You can transmit a sense of dreamy nonchalance.

feats.name: Dual Onslaught
feats.description: When you lash out with both weapons, you leave no room for the target to escape your attack.

feats.name: Earworm
feats.description: By endlessly repeating a motif, you implant a memorable song that repeats over and over again in your allies’ heads, preparing them to respond to it later.

feats.name: Ebb and Flow
feats.description: You can pull forth both vitality and the void simultaneously to harm your enemies and heal your allies.

feats.name: Effortless Captivation
feats.description: You maintain your innate enchantments and illusions with hardly a thought.

feats.name: Enshroud Soul Cage
feats.description: You wreathe your soul cage in an ever-growing collection of obfuscating illusions and protective abjurations to hide it from your enemies.

feats.name: Enterprising Ritualist
feats.description: Elegant and expensive components are no replacement for your skill and practice atritual casting.

feats.name: Entities from Afar
feats.description: You can call in aberrations to fight for you or to answer questions.

feats.name: Esoteric Reflexes
feats.description: Reacting with an implement becomes instinct.

feats.name: Even the Odds
feats.description: Even when overpowered, Eagle Knights hold out hope.

feats.name: Exalted Greatness
feats.description: You improve your exalted reaction with the benefit listed for your cause.

feats.name: Exceptional Follower
feats.description: Your followers' abilities have soared to new heights.

feats.name: Execution
feats.description: You swing wide, attempting to behead your condemned foe.

feats.name: Expanded Swarm
feats.description: Your hive has grown to the point where it is difficult to keep your swarm contained within your body.

feats.name: Explosive Death Drop
feats.description: You lift your enemy into the air before bringing them crashing down with a fiery detonation.

feats.name: Explosive Maneuver
feats.description: Thanks to a hidden experimental feature you built into your weapon, your weapon explosively deploys levers, tangling hooks, or similar mechanisms to provide significant assistance when you perform a combat maneuver.

feats.name: Fast Channel
feats.description: Divine power is always at your fingertips, swiftly responding to your call.

feats.name: Fear of God
feats.description: You embed a divine fear into the triggering foe that lasts for 10 minutes.

feats.name: Fit for the Role
feats.description: Not only are you a flamboyant performer, but you’ve mastered an occult secret that allows you to outfit yourself and your companions with magical visages.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Fit for the Role U

feats.name: Flamboyant Leap
feats.description: You stylishly leap and deliver a powerful finisher.

feats.name: Forceful Shot
feats.description: Your ranged attacks push your foes away from your allies.

feats.name: Forestall Curse
feats.description: You've learned to hold back your curse.

feats.name: Form Lock
feats.description: Your ability to control your own qi empowers you to pressure other creatures into resuming their true forms.

feats.name: Giant's Lunge
feats.description: You extend your body and prepare to attack foes outside your normal reach.

feats.name: Grand Talisman Esoterica
feats.description: You've gained the ability to place multiple talismans on an item.

feats.name: Graveshift
feats.description: The maggots inhabiting your body impart you with the knowledge to travel from grave to grave, drawing upon the mystical power of the labyrinthine network of magical warrens and tunnels that connect Everglut to the Material Plane.

feats.name: Greater Interpose
feats.description: Your divine grace empowers you to avoid hits when you otherwise could not.

feats.name: Greater Merciful Elixir
feats.description: Your additives contain panaceas that can remedy a plethora of maladies.

feats.name: Guided Hover
feats.description: You guide your draconic companion, whose outstretched wings fill with unseen thermals.

feats.name: Guiding Finish
feats.description: Using your weapon as a lever, you force your opponent to end up right where you want them.

feats.name: Guiding Riposte
feats.description: By shifting your weight and angling your weapon, you guide your opponent to a more favorable position.

feats.name: Halcyon Spellcasting Adept
feats.description: You refine your halcyon magic.

feats.name: Hammer Quake
feats.description: You smash the ground with your weapon, knocking nearby creatures to the ground.

feats.name: Hand of the Lich
feats.description: Negative energy intensifies your undead form and makes your very touch the antithesis of life.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Hand of the Lich

feats.name: Hasted Assault
feats.description: You can speed yourself up to move and attack more swiftly.

feats.name: Headshot
feats.description: You attempt to finish your target with a final, well-placed shot.

feats.name: Herald's Weapon
feats.description: Your weapon becomes a wrathful instrument of your deity’s power.

feats.name: Homing Shot
feats.description: Your shots zip around corners and fly at impossible angles to reach your target.

feats.name: Immediate Rebuke
feats.description: You can use Reactive Strike when a creature within your reach Strikes one of your allies.

feats.name: Impaling Thrust
feats.description: You impale your enemy and hold it in place with your weapon, and leave it bleeding when it gets free.

feats.name: Impossible Riposte
feats.description: Your ripostes can deflect attacks back at their source.

feats.name: Improved Hijack Undead
feats.description: Undead creatures find it all but impossible to resist your commands.

feats.name: Improved Twin Riposte (Fighter)
feats.description: Your weapons are a blur, blocking and biting at your foes.

feats.name: In the Horde's Grip
feats.description: When your skeletons and zombies attack, their skeletal claws and rotting hands clutch and tear flesh.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard In the Horde's Grip

feats.name: Incredible Recollection
feats.description: You can sift through knowledge locked within your mind at an incredible pace.

feats.name: Induce Imbalance
feats.description: Your blows can disrupt the delicate balance of elemental energies that keep a body in good health.

feats.name: Infinite Blades Celestial Arrow
feats.description: Each shot you launch multiplies itself with spiritual blades, rings, and other missiles that shower upon your foes.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Infinite Blades Celestial Arrow

feats.name: Innocent Butterfly
feats.description: You know how to alter the perceptions of others.

feats.name: Instant Credentials
feats.description: In a pinch, ink from your tattoo arranges itself into a temporary pass, writ of authority, or similar document.

feats.name: Instant Opening
feats.description: You distract your opponent with a few choice words or a rude gesture.

feats.name: Instinctual Interception
feats.description: You react to movement with hardly a thought, seeming constantly poised to spring.

feats.name: Interweave Dispel
feats.description: You weave dispelling energy into a spell.

feats.name: Iron Lung
feats.description: Your lungs are infused with the resilience of iron.

feats.name: Ironblood Surge
feats.description: You steel yourself, preparing to resist oncoming attacks and using your muscles to absorb the impact.

feats.name: It Was Me All Along!
feats.description: You discard a disguise and dramatically reveal your true identity, catching your foes off guard.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard It Was Me All Along! U

feats.name: It's Not Over
feats.description: In the world of drama, the finale of any performance doesn’t have to be the end, and for you, this now extends to life itself.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited It's Not Over U

feats.name: Keep up the Good Fight
feats.description: Your commitment to protecting others keeps you going, even against insurmountable odds.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Keep up the Good Fight

feats.name: Lasting Armament
feats.description: When you sanctify a weapon, it remains sanctified for an extended period.

feats.name: Leave An Opening
feats.description: When you hit hard enough, you leave an opening so your ally can jump in on the action.

feats.name: Lesson of the Hurricane's Might
feats.description: You and your student enact a graceful dance of battle.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lesson of the Hurricane's Might

feats.name: Lighter than Air
feats.description: Your mysterious steps become even lighter, transcending the mortal world altogether.

feats.name: Litany of Depravity
feats.description: You undercut your enemy's vain moralism, opening their heart to evil.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Litany of Depravity U

feats.name: Litany of Righteousness
feats.description: You call upon righteousness to expose an evil foe’s weakness.

feats.name: Lonely Army
feats.description: You move and attack with deadly silence, unbelievable speed, and unlimited ferocity.

feats.name: March of Law
feats.description: When faced with lawbreakers, you become almost unstoppable, and your purposeful steps instill terror.

feats.name: Mask of The 15th Step
feats.description: You have ascended to the 15th Step and stand among the greatest of Razmir’s priests.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Mask of The 15th Step

feats.name: Master Merchant
feats.description: Kalistrade teaches that setbacks are only temporary and that perseverance is a treasured virtue.

feats.name: Meditate on This!
feats.description: You meditate to alter your qi, coloring it with your resentment and anger.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Meditate on This! U

feats.name: Mist Escape
feats.description: As you fall, your body reacts to defend itself.

feats.name: Mortal Ascension
feats.description: Your power uplifts you, breaking the bonds between you and the ground.

feats.name: Mountain Quake
feats.description: You stomp, shaking the earth beneath you.

feats.name: Murderer's Circle
feats.description: Circle your foe while you beat on them.

feats.name: Musical Summons
feats.description: Your studies have given you a deeper understanding of animals and beasts, allowing you to call them to your side as you cast your spell.

feats.name: Mutant Innervation
feats.description: Basic mutagens that affect your mind and thoughts can make you communicate telepathically, protect you from being detected, or let you communicate with anyone.

feats.name: Mysterious Repertoire
feats.description: Your mystery holds unknowable depths of magic not always associated with the divine.

feats.name: Night's Warning
feats.description: Portents written in the night sky show you how to avoid an attack.

feats.name: Nourishing Gate
feats.description: You can sustain yourself on a single drop of elemental dew or the slightest spark from the Plane of Fire.

feats.name: Of Lions and Wyrms
feats.description: You starred in a war drama depicting First Emperor Taldaris’s battles against the Grogrisant, a massive six- eyed lion, and Verksaris the Kingeater, a mighty dragon.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Of Lions and Wyrms

feats.name: Only My Doom May Claim Me
feats.description: The power of your legend, fueled by your legendary deeds, resists any weapon that is not tied to your curse.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Only My Doom May Claim Me

feats.name: Opening Stance
feats.description: At the first sign of trouble, often before you consciously realize the danger, you drop into a stance with a mere thought.

feats.name: Opening Stance (Fighter)
feats.description: At the first sign of trouble, often before you consciously realize the danger, you drop into a stance with a mere thought.

feats.name: Orchard's Endurance
feats.description: Patches of bark appear on the skin of you and your nearby allies.

feats.name: Pact of Eldritch Eyes
feats.description: You've sworn a pact with an entity beyond mortal comprehension, granting you distant visions.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of Eldritch Eyes U

feats.name: Pact of the Death Hunter
feats.description: You’ve sworn a pact with a psychopomp bent on the destruction of all undeath.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of the Death Hunter U

feats.name: Pact of the Fey Paths
feats.description: You’ve sworn a pact with a powerful fey creature that longs to see the wonders of the Universe.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of the Fey Paths U

feats.name: Paragon Companion
feats.description: Your construct companion has reached the pinnacle of form and function.

feats.name: Paragon Reanimated Companion
feats.description: You have reached the pinnacle of necromantic science, creating a mechanical zombie unlike any the world has seen before.

feats.name: Path of Iron
feats.description: With a burst of effort and speed, you weave a nimble path through your many enemies, striking each in turn as you move past them.

feats.name: Patron’s Presence
feats.description: Your patron can direct its attention through your familiar, and its mere presence becomes an ominous weight on the minds of other beings to distract them and blot out their magic.

feats.name: Peculiar Anatomy
feats.description: Your circulatory system contains viscous protoplasmic fluid instead of ordinary blood.

feats.name: Peerless Form
feats.description: Your mastery over your body is perfect enough to hold back the ravages of time.

feats.name: Peony's Flourish
feats.description: As you spin around and create wide arching circles with your fans, you manifest a mosaic of peonies that confuses your enemies.

feats.name: Perfect Finisher
feats.description: You focus your panache into an impeccable assault.

feats.name: Perfect Ki Exemplar
feats.description: You gain an appropriate ki spell for your School of Perfection: unblinking flame emblem for Unblinking Flame, unbreaking wave barrier for Unbreaking Waves, unfolding wind blitz for Unfolding Wind, or untwisting iron augmentation for Untwisting Iron.

feats.name: Perplex
feats.description: You weave a confusing web of half-truths, conspiracy theories, and plausible motives to goad an enemy into lashing out wildly.

feats.name: Phase Bullet
feats.description: You can aim your bullets not just in three normal dimensions, but in additional dimensions as well, removing all obstacles between you and your target.

feats.name: Pin to the Spot
feats.description: Strike a foe and restrain them.

feats.name: Pivot Strike
feats.description: You Leap and then Strike using your staff.

feats.name: Plot the Future
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes in contemplation to uncannily predict how events will play out.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Plot the Future U

feats.name: Pounce Mimicry
feats.description: You have mastered the art of stalking your prey and striking when they are most vulnerable.

feats.name: Prayer Attack
feats.description: You’ve mastered the signature assassination style of the Red Mantis.

feats.name: Precise Hooks
feats.description: Your body is a varied and deadly weapon.

feats.name: Premonition of Clarity
feats.description: Your deity sends you a vision of faith to steel you against mental attacks.

feats.name: Preternatural Parry
feats.description: You snap your weapon or limb into place to ward off harm at the last second.

feats.name: Purifying Breeze
feats.description: You transfer the divine essence of your magic to the air around you, cleansing it of toxins.

feats.name: Quickening Banner
feats.description: The sight of your banner urges your allies to strike now.

feats.name: Ranged Disarm
feats.description: When using a simple firearm, you can shoot objects right out of your enemy's hands.

feats.name: Rapid Hybridization
feats.description: When danger threatens, your instincts kick in, and you can assume a different shape at a moment's notice.

feats.name: Rapid Reattunement
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes realigning your elemental connections in an elemental trance.

feats.name: Reactive Transformation
feats.description: You transform reflexively when in danger.

feats.name: Reflect Harm
feats.description: You can wrap your magic around you like a cloak that causes those who dare to target you with spells to suffer a similar fate.

feats.name: Reflect Spell
feats.description: When you successfully use Counterspell to counteract a spell that affects targeted creatures or an area, you can turn that spell’s effect back on its caster.

feats.name: Regional Specialty
feats.description: You can create dishes that reflect the food sources endemic to your environment and medicinal food techniques utilizing the cycle of the five elements.

feats.name: Reset the Past
feats.description: You manipulate time to recharge one of your temporal techniques—by revising your past so you never used it in the first place.

feats.name: Resilient Shell
feats.description: Your eidolon is resilient against attacks.

feats.name: Resolute Defender
feats.description: You hold your shield together with the power of your faith and conviction, refusing to let wood splinter and steel shatter until the day's battles are won.

feats.name: Revelation's Focus
feats.description: The further extents of your mystery provide an endless wellspring of magic.

feats.name: Rites of Transfiguration
feats.description: You can adapt your patron’s power to transform other creatures into forms more befitting their behavior or your whims.

feats.name: Sacral Monarch
feats.description: You have come into your full powers and are truly a monarch of your realm, by your own definition at least.

feats.name: Sailfish Strike
feats.description: You've learned how to convert your upward momentum into a powerful attack.

feats.name: Scarred Hide
feats.description: Your hide is an impenetrable mass of scars, accrued over countless bloody conflicts.

feats.name: Secondary Detonation Array
feats.description: You divert some of your spell’s energy into an unstable runic array.

feats.name: Seize
feats.description: You seize your foe and pull it close.

feats.name: Sense the Unseen
feats.description: When you look for foes, you can catch even the slightest cues, such as their minute movements or the shifting of air currents on your skin.

feats.name: Sentinel's Orbit
feats.description: Just as your constellation traverses the sky, so too can you.

feats.name: Sepulchral Sublimation
feats.description: You repurpose the negative energy that flows through your minions at a moment's notice.

feats.name: Shadow Power
feats.description: You can focus the shadows into a powerful blast.

feats.name: Shadow's Web
feats.description: You can launch a wave of shadowy qi outward from your body, damaging your opponents and potentially binding them in place.

feats.name: Shape of the Cloud Dragon
feats.description: You've discovered how to transform yourself into a cloud dragon.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Shape of the Cloud Dragon U

feats.name: Shape of the Dragon
feats.description: You've discovered how to transform yourself into a dragon.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Shape of the Dragon

feats.name: Share Eidolon Magic
feats.description: Your eidolon shares innate spells with you.

feats.name: Shared Prey
feats.description: Hunting as a duo, you and your ally both single out your prey.

feats.name: Shatter Space
feats.description: The sheer power of your magic fractures reality.

feats.name: Shattered Sacrament
feats.description: When Vigil fell to Tar-Baphon’s Radiant Fire, that lost innocence brought you a deeper understanding of what faith means in the context of your own magic.

feats.name: Shield the Faithful
feats.description: You and those closest to you are protected by your deity’s power.

feats.name: Shift Spell
feats.description: You move an active spell's area to a new location.

feats.name: Shifting Terrain
feats.description: You slam your fist into the ground or twirl your arms about to cause the terrain around you to shift and ripple, potentially throwing others off balance.

feats.name: Showstopper
feats.description: Your twirling weapons create a grand distraction that's difficult to look away from.

feats.name: Signature Synergy
feats.description: Your eidolon gains an evolution integral to its form, and it comes more easily than your other synergies.

feats.name: Simultaneous Strike
feats.description: Moving in unison, you and your student unleash an attack against a foe.

feats.name: Sink and Swim
feats.description: Your body looks like it's made of flowing water, clear and pristine, providing a natural grace to all your movements
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Sink and Swim R

feats.name: Sixth Pillar Mastery
feats.description: You align your magical and physical potential.

feats.name: Soaring Armor
feats.description: You've managed to free your innovation from the bonds of gravity!

feats.name: Soothing Ballad
feats.description: You soothe your allies’ wounds with the power of performance.

feats.name: Sow Spell
feats.description: You fold your spell into a seed.

feats.name: Speak for the Gravelands
feats.description: You have learned much of what the Gravelands need and are confident in your ability to speak for them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Speak for the Gravelands U

feats.name: Specialized Beastmaster Companion
