feats.description: Your nimble and savage animal companions become cunning enough to become specialized.

feats.name: Specialized Companion (Druid)
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to grow in power and ability.

feats.name: Specialized Megafauna Companion
feats.description: You've trained your mammoth or other megafauna companion to perform in unusual or extreme situations, granting it abilities far beyond others of its kind.

feats.name: Specialized Mount
feats.description: You’ve trained your mount to perform in unusual or even extreme circumstances, granting it abilities far beyond others of its kind.

feats.name: Specialized Spirit Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion gains a unique specialization, spirit-blessed.

feats.name: Spell Shroud
feats.description: Your spell shrouds you in a billowing cloud.

feats.name: Spell-Repelling Form
feats.description: Your eidolon evolves to protect itself from the danger posed by spells.

feats.name: Spellmaster's Tenacity
feats.description: You call upon the power of your spells to protect you from the worst of the magic headed your way.

feats.name: Spinning Release
feats.description: You wind your lash around your opponent, then spin them rapidly to discombobulate them.

feats.name: Spirit Guide Form
feats.description: You fuse with your spirit guide, becoming a hybrid being with enhanced physical and spiritual power.

feats.name: Starlight Armor
feats.description: You armor yourself in the light of distant suns, shielding yourself from harm.

feats.name: Stay Down!
feats.description: You have ways of keeping your foes down.

feats.name: Stealthy Companion
feats.description: You’ve trained your animal companion to blend in to its surroundings.

feats.name: Stone Communion
feats.description: You can speak Terran and speak with stones.

feats.name: Stories of Home
feats.description: You share the joy of every story of long-awaited homecoming you’ve offered to Isthralei.

feats.name: Strategic Bypass
feats.description: Your plans account for your foes' resistances, enabling you to strike a telling blow.

feats.name: Stunning Surprise
feats.description: You quickly move in to bring your foe down with a single blow.

feats.name: Sunder Enchantment
feats.description: You can focus your superstition to break the magic of an item, in addition to destroying freestanding spells and those active on creatures.

feats.name: Superior Bond
feats.description: When you draw upon your bonded item, you can leave a bit of energy within it for later use.

feats.name: Swift Banishment
feats.description: The force of your blow sends your victim back to its home plane.

feats.name: Tactical Cadence
feats.description: Your remarkable breath control and concise instructions allow you to coordinate your allies more effectively, even in desperate situations.

feats.name: Talismanic Sage
feats.description: Normally, affixing more than one <%CONSUMABLES%19%> talisman <%END> to an item causes the talismans to be suppressed, but when you Affix a Talisman, you can specially treat one item you're working on, allowing it to have two active talismans at once.

feats.name: Tangled Forest Rake
feats.description: You reposition foes with raking attacks.

feats.name: Target of Opportunity
feats.description: You capitalize on your ally’s attack and use the opportunity to secure a blow of your own, adding to the oncoming barrage.

feats.name: Targeting Shot
feats.description: You carefully track your prey’s position and defenses.

feats.name: Terrain Shield
feats.description: You're so attuned to the land that it rises up to protect you from a potentially fatal blow in a seeming coincidence.

feats.name: Terrible Transformation
feats.description: You let out a mighty roar as part of your transformation.

feats.name: Throttle the Divine
feats.description: You grasp the godly by their throats and damage their connection to their deities.

feats.name: Thwart Evil
feats.description: You react instinctively when you sense evil forming, thrusting your spiritual energy toward the source to snuff out evil before it fully manifests.

feats.name: Timeless Nature
feats.description: With primal magic sustaining you, you cease aging.

feats.name: Tongue of Sun and Moon
feats.description: You have transcended the barriers between words and meaning.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Tongue of Sun and Moon

feats.name: Towering Transformation
feats.description: The physical growth of your transformation is a spectacle that shakes foes to their core.

feats.name: Trespass Teleportation
feats.description: You can hunt your foe to the ends of creation.

feats.name: Triggerbrand Blitz
feats.description: You dance through your foes, stabbing and shooting.

feats.name: Triumphant Inspiration
feats.description: With a triumphant shout, you inspire your allies.

feats.name: True Debilitating Bomb
feats.description: You have discovered increasingly devastating ways for your bombs to impede your foes.

feats.name: True Hypercognition
feats.description: Your mind works at an incredible pace.

feats.name: Two-Weapon Flurry
feats.description: Using the momentum of your prior attack, you lash out with both your weapons in a sudden frenzy.

feats.name: Two-Weapon Fusillade
feats.description: You attack with both your weapons in a furious barrage.

feats.name: Unending Emptiness
feats.description: You pool the power of shadow within your eyes, gaining the ability to gather darkness into a turbulent orb of crushing emptiness within your line of sight.

feats.name: Unfetter Sight
feats.description: You release the magic within your mask in an invisible burst, allowing it to temporarily flow into your allies' minds.

feats.name: Unlimited Ghost Flight
feats.description: You put your connection to the material world farther behind you.

feats.name: Unseen Shot
feats.description: Your attacks are deadly, silent, and nearly untraceable.

feats.name: Unstable Patronage
feats.description: You can act as a magical patron for your charges.

feats.name: Unstable Redundancies
feats.description: You've built triple redundancies into your innovation and added all sorts of buffers to protect it from the harm of your unstable experiments.

feats.name: Vengeful Strike
feats.description: When struck by an enemy, you respond in turn.

feats.name: Vengful Remnant
feats.description: You wreathe yourself in the tatters of all the souls claimed by your blade.

feats.name: Verdant Metamorphosis
feats.description: You have turned into a plant version of yourself, gaining the plant trait and losing traits inappropriate for your new form (typically humanoid).

feats.name: Vigorous Anthem
feats.description: You instill magical vigor in your allies when you inspire them to attack.

feats.name: Walk Through the Conflagration
feats.description: You fall through your own kinetic gate, leaving behind an effigy of flame and reappearing majestically near another fire.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Walk Through the Conflagration H

feats.name: Warden's Guidance
feats.description: You convey your prey’s location to your allies with a series of careful words or gestures.

feats.name: Watch Your Back
feats.description: You shout a warning to an ally about encroaching foes.

feats.name: Whirling Blade Stance
feats.description: You enter a mindful stance that creates a deep connection between you and your monk weapons, allowing you to manipulate them with your qi, even at a distance.

feats.name: Whirling Knockdown
feats.description: You fire your gun while throwing off a target's balance with your melee weapon.

feats.name: Whirlwind Strike
feats.description: You lash out in a blur of motion, attacking all nearby adversaries.

feats.name: Wild Winds Gust
feats.description: You build air pressure with repeated motions, before releasing an enormous crescent of rushing wind strikes.

feats.name: Wind-Tossed Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental air, using the wind to find your target and carry your magic around cover.

feats.name: Winter's Kiss
feats.description: Whether in the heart of a volcanic passageway or the glacial tundras of the Crown of the World, the only temperature you ever personally experience is an oddly comfortable chill.

feats.name: World-breaking Footfall
feats.description: You slam the ground and unleash a fearsome roar, sending broken shards of earth flying in all directions.

feats.name: Worm Form
feats.description: You take on the form of a purple worm or transform into a humanoid-worm hybrid, retaining your own head but with a worm's body, transforming into a Huge battle form.

feats.name: Wyrmbane Aura
feats.description: Your aura protects against destructive energies and dragons’ breath.

feats.name: Cloud Jump
feats.description: Jump impossible distances

feats.name: Craft Anything
feats.description: Ignore most requirements for crafting items

feats.name: Divine Guidance
feats.description: Find guidance in the writings of your faith

feats.name: Legendary Codebreaker
feats.description: Quickly Decipher Writing using Society

feats.name: Legendary Guide
feats.description: You know the wilderness so well that you can help your party travel through it with ease.

feats.name: Legendary Leader
feats.description: Your fame has spread throughout the lands.

feats.name: Legendary Linguist
feats.description: Create pidgin languages to communicate with anyone

feats.name: Legendary Medic
feats.description: Remove disease, blinded, deafened, doomed, or drained

feats.name: Legendary Negotiation
feats.description: Quickly parley with foes

feats.name: Legendary Performer
feats.description: Gain renown for your Performance

feats.name: Legendary Professional
feats.description: Gain renown for your Lore

feats.name: Legendary Sneak
feats.description: Hide and Sneak without cover or being concealed

feats.name: Legendary Survivalist
feats.description: Survive extreme conditions

feats.name: Legendary Tattoo Artist
feats.description: Your craftsmanship at decorating flesh is unparalleled.

feats.name: Legendary Thief
feats.description: Steal what would normally be impossible to steal

feats.name: Reveal Machinations
feats.description: You convince a creature that you played a minor but recurring role in its life.

feats.name: Scare to Death
feats.description: Scare a target so much, they might die

feats.name: Unified Theory
feats.description: Use Arcana for checks for all magical traditions

feats.name: Adamantine Fists
feats.description: You imbue your unarmed strikes with one of the strongest metals.

feats.name: Advanced Runic Mind-Smithing
feats.description: Your mind can hold onto more complicated patterns than ever before.

feats.name: Aura Expertise
feats.description: You’ve become so accustomed to maintaining your battle auras that it’s become second nature to you.

feats.name: Auspicious Mount
feats.description: Guided by your ongoing care, your steed has developed incredible intelligence and skill.

feats.name: Avalanche Strike
feats.description: You attack all nearby adversaries.

feats.name: Blank Slate
feats.description: Your deceptions confound even the most powerful magic that could spy on you.

feats.name: Bolster Soul Cage
feats.description: Your constant efforts to augment and perfect your soul cage have bolstered its efficiency.

feats.name: Bound in Ice
feats.description: You become a hybrid of your ancestry and a saumen kar.

feats.name: Branding Spell
feats.description: The flames of your magic mark a target as an enemy of order.

feats.name: Breath of Hungry Death
feats.description: You have uncovered occult mysteries that allow you to unleash the devastating hunger of Kabriri upon your foes with a single exhalation, releasing a massive cloud of flesh-eating gas that glows with a sickly green light.

feats.name: Chastise
feats.description: With but a mere word from your deity, you exploit a foe’s fear to see their inner being brought low.

feats.name: Clang!
feats.description: You make a foe pay for attacking you as its blow or spell glances off your armor.

feats.name: Clobber
feats.description: With a mighty blow, you send an enemy flying backward and onto the ground.

feats.name: Cloud Step
feats.description: Using fantastic acrobatic skill, you can walk for brief stretches across insubstantial surfaces.

feats.name: Cognitive Loophole
feats.description: You can find a loophole in a mental effect to temporarily overcome it.

feats.name: Collateral Thrash
feats.description: You smack the foe you're thrashing into someone else.

feats.name: Conduit of Void and Vitality
feats.description: You use the unstable energy of your curse to manipulate the most basic of divine magic.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Conduit of Void and Vitality

feats.name: Confusing Commands
feats.description: You shout out bewildering but authoritative commands while imitating the voices, linguistic quirks, and speech patterns of your opponents.

feats.name: Constant Levitation
feats.description: Your power has unbound you from the earth below.

feats.name: Controlled Bullet
feats.description: You create a direct magical connection with your beast gun, allowing you to guide the beast gun's next shot by taking control of the projectile directly.

feats.name: Converge
feats.description: Informing your ally of an opening created by your shot, you coordinate to set them up to hit the target at the same time.

feats.name: Courageous Onslaught
feats.description: You use your performance to orchestrate an onslaught against your enemies.

feats.name: Cross the Threshold
feats.description: You can cast ethereal jaunt as an occult innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Crown of Rule
feats.description: This badge of office proclaims your sovereignty.

feats.name: Deadly Grace
feats.description: Your graceful attacks are especially powerful.

feats.name: Deathblow
feats.description: Your carefully prepared and placed shot brings instant death to your target.

feats.name: Declare Anathema
feats.description: You declare a creature you are aware of within 30 feet anathema, causing their friends and strangers to shy away from them.

feats.name: Deflecting Cloud
feats.description: You've mastered a defensive technique unique to the ancient dragons of Bloodsalt: beating your wings to create a billowing cloud of mist.

feats.name: Desperate Wrath
feats.description: Your blood boils when you take a beating, and you throw caution to the wind to finish the fight.

feats.name: Didactic Strike
feats.description: When you find a glaring weakness, you can set your allies up to annihilate your foe.

feats.name: Disciple's Breath
feats.description: You unleash your breath weapon without spending focus.

feats.name: Dispelling Slice
feats.description: Your sneak attack slices through the threads binding magic to a target.

feats.name: Dispelling Spellstrike
feats.description: The spell you deliver tries to force out magic affecting your enemy.

feats.name: Dive of the Divine
feats.description: You dive from the sky, bringing down the might of the divine with you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Dive of the Divine

feats.name: Diverse Mystery
feats.description: You have broadened your understanding of the divine and can tap into the wonders of a different mystery.

feats.name: Dominating Gaze
feats.description: You stare into your target's eyes and enthrall them, shattering their free will.

feats.name: Dragon Transformation
feats.description: You transform into a ferocious Large dragon, gaining the effects of 6th-rank dragon form except that you use your own AC and attack modifier, you apply your extra damage from Rage, and the Dragon Breath action uses your class DC.

feats.name: Duelist's Form
feats.description: Many assume that a duelist's habit of fighting with one hand behind their back or on their hip is an insult or self-restriction.

feats.name: Effortless Concentration
feats.description: You can maintain a spell with hardly a thought.

feats.name: Electric Counter
feats.description: You can charge yourself with lighting, gain resistance to electricity or shocking an attacker.

feats.name: Emergency Regeneration
feats.description: You have battled against foes whose bodies naturally regenerate, and while yours doesn't do so all the time, it can happen in a pinch.

feats.name: Enlightened Presence
feats.description: You exude an aura of resolve.

feats.name: Eternal Bane
feats.description: Your life has made you a nexus for your deity’s vile power.

feats.name: Eternal Blessing
feats.description: Your deeds have brought your deity’s grace to you for all of eternity.

feats.name: Eternal Elixir
feats.description: Your body readily accepts and retains minor changes.

feats.name: Ever-Vigilant Senses
feats.description: Your eidolon has enhanced senses.

feats.name: Exploitive Bomb
feats.description: You can mix a refractile substance into an alchemical bomb to foil resistances.

feats.name: Faith in the Fallen
feats.description: The Gravelands are full of fallen spirits seeking to move on, and you consider it your obligation to assist in that regard.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Faith in the Fallen U

feats.name: Fatal Bullet
feats.description: You're especially talented at striking your enemies in their most vulnerable areas.

feats.name: Fearsome Fangs
feats.description: Your claws and jaws are brutally powerful and efficient, even by ursine standards.

feats.name: Felicitous Riposte
feats.description: You take advantage of your foe's openings with uncanny odds.

feats.name: Fey Life
feats.description: There are some fates worse than death–and you worked to save a fey from one such fate.

feats.name: Fiend Slayer
feats.description: Your attack tears through a fiend, possibly sending it back to where it came from.

feats.name: Flinging Blow
feats.description: You take a moment to center yourself, then unleash a powerful blow that sends your target tumbling away.

feats.name: Focus Ally
feats.description: You're so focused on your allies that you can help them to recenter when something would take them out of the fight.

feats.name: Following Smite
feats.description: You call upon your deity’s power and channel it through your weapon.

feats.name: Force of Nature
feats.description: You're a nigh-unstoppable killing machine, with only silver able to quell your rampage.

feats.name: Forest's Heart
feats.description: You adopt a stance that allows your apparitions to channel spiritual energy down through you to inhabit roots, control vines, and command plant-life from the ground you stand on to fight on your behalf.

feats.name: Free from Bonds
feats.description: As a mortal herald, you cannot easily be captured, nor can your allies.

feats.name: Frightening Indignation
feats.description: Your anger at the world's many injustices boil out from you in a wave of palpable energy.

feats.name: Fulminating Synergy
feats.description: When you draw upon your spells’ synergy, you create a physical manifestation of their magical resonance and invoke it to harm a foe.

feats.name: Furious Vengeance
feats.description: Your enemy's blow fuels your rage and provokes your immediate retaliation.

feats.name: Fuse Stance
feats.description: You have combined two stances into a single stance all your own.

feats.name: Gallop Across Shadow
feats.description: Though your enemy wields shadow and darkness as weapons, they are no impediment to you when you ride your trusted horse.

feats.name: Giant Slayer
feats.description: Your well-placed blows can fell mighty giants.

feats.name: Gift of the Immortal Herb
feats.description: Your blood turns a divine gold, shining in moments its spilled and begetting new life.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Gift of the Immortal Herb

feats.name: Graceful Poise
feats.description: With the right positioning, your off-hand weapon can strike like a scorpion’s stinger.

feats.name: Grave Threat
feats.description: You use your imposing demeanor to set up the undead for defeat.

feats.name: Greater Armament
feats.description: Your weapons have greater power available to them.

feats.name: Greater Distracting Shot
feats.description: Even a single missile can throw off your enemy’s balance, and more powerful attacks leave it flustered for longer.

feats.name: Greater Mental Evolution
feats.description: Your bloodline's deep connection to mental essence greatly enhances your spell repertoire.

feats.name: Greater Snow Step
feats.description: You can't be impeded by environmental effects that rely on cold or its byproducts.

feats.name: Greater Vital Evolution
feats.description: Vital power surges through you like a font of energy.

feats.name: Hair Trigger
feats.description: No one can react faster than you can pull your trigger.

feats.name: Healing Sanctuary
feats.description: When you call upon your deity’s power, you also radiate a sense of safety that fortifies your allies.

feats.name: Heraldic Proclamation
feats.description: You proclaim your spell with the might of your god behind you.

feats.name: Hidden Hoard
feats.description: Your draconic gift is the key to a repository of treasure that only you can access.

feats.name: Impaling Briars
feats.description: You can fill an area with devastating briars.

feats.name: Imperious Aura
feats.description: Your glowing and majestic kinetic aura marks you as a true child of the elements.

feats.name: Implausible Purchase
feats.description: It seems impossible, but you've analyzed every angle and are able to just keep pulling out exactly the item you need, even in far-flung locations.

feats.name: Implement's Flight
feats.description: By weakening your relation to the ground and strengthening your relation to the sky, you've learned to soar through the air, your implement carrying you as surely as any broomstick or pestle.

feats.name: Improved Reflexive Shield
feats.description: Your shield can help save nearby allies.

feats.name: Improved Twin Riposte (Ranger)
feats.description: At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction that you can use only to perform a Twin Riposte.

feats.name: Incorporeal Shot
feats.description: You can concentrate an immense amount of magic to create a piece of ammunition that phases through everything but your target.

feats.name: Infernal Interference
feats.description: Your attacks force a foe to glimpse the iron, soul-wrenching landscapes of Hell.

feats.name: Infiltrator's Blitz
feats.description: Though your training is meant to ensure you don't get caught by your enemies, your missions are often high risk, and sometimes the only option you have left when things go wrong is to unleash a blistering torrent of violence while running away as fast as possible.

feats.name: Instant Return
feats.description: With a single fluid gesture, you catch a projectile out of the air, load it in your weapon, and shoot it back at the attacker.

feats.name: Instrument of Death
feats.description: Your splinter of finality has reached the apex of its death-dealing potential.

feats.name: Instrument of Slaughter
feats.description: Your blessed armament thirsts for the blood of your foes.

feats.name: Instrument of Zeal
feats.description: Divine energy fills your weapon.

feats.name: Jester's Gambol
feats.description: You adopt a stance that makes your movements carefree and sublimely unpredictable, allowing you to move past impediments with ease and resist the attacks and importunateness of natural threats.

feats.name: Just the Thing!
feats.description: Need to balance on a razor's edge, force open an iron door, or persuade a dragon to negotiate? Never fear! No matter the situation, you always have just the thing.

feats.name: Lead the Pack
feats.description: You can have up to two animal companions active at once.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Lead the Pack U

feats.name: Legendary Monster Hunter
feats.description: Your knowledge of monsters is so incredible that it reveals glaring flaws in your prey.

feats.name: Mark of The Sage
feats.description: Your ikon gains a pin, stripe, or similar marking showing you as a master of your craft.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Mark of The Sage

feats.name: Master Captivator Spellcasting
feats.description: You master the most powerful spells that enchant and deceive.

feats.name: Master Qi Spells
feats.description: You have achieved near-total mastery of your qi.

feats.name: Master Siege Engineer
feats.description: What you don't know about artillery isn't worth knowing and your mastery allows you to perform an impossible number of actions as part of a siege weapon's crew.

feats.name: Master Skysage Divination
feats.description: You unlock the most powerful secrets hidden in the stars above.

feats.name: Master of Many Styles
feats.description: You move fluidly between stances, using your mastery of combat to always adopt the best tactics.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Master of Many Styles

feats.name: Master's Counterspell
feats.description: When a foe Casts a Spell and you can see its manifestations, you can use your magic to disrupt it.

feats.name: Mobile Magical Combat
feats.description: You dart around the battlefield, casting spells while you carefully make melee attacks with your weapon.

feats.name: Monstrosity Shape
feats.description: You can transform into a powerful magical creature.

feats.name: Monstrous Inclinations
feats.description: Your apparitions share with you the monstrous nature of those creatures who dwell in deep seas or ancient woods.

feats.name: Muckraking
feats.description: It seems like your knowledge has come in handy after all and you have your enemy at your feet.

feats.name: Multishot Stance
feats.description: You lock yourself in a stable position so you can fire swiftly and accurately.

feats.name: Needle In The God's Eyes
feats.description: With sinews of bronze and thews of iron, you leap to the heavens, piercing the arrogant eyes of the gods.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Needle In The God's Eyes

feats.name: Never!
feats.description: The idea that you would hurt your companions, even when you've lost your reason, is unthinkable.

feats.name: Officer's Protection
feats.description: When you use Commitment to Protection, you can target all allies within 30 feet.

feats.name: One with the Spirits
feats.description: The spirits you’ve invoked throughout your life have left behind echoes and spiritual fragments, which you can manifest across your own flesh, temporarily transforming you into something more akin to spirit than mortal.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard One with the Spirits

feats.name: One-millimeter Punch
feats.description: Your punches have incredible force and control.

feats.name: Opportune Throw
feats.description: Make a ranged attack with a Juggled item against a vulnerable creature.

feats.name: Overwhelming Blow
feats.description: You throw your weight into a powerful attack that leaves you vulnerable.

feats.name: Pact of the Rune Dragon
feats.description: While the students of Cobyslarni are taught to make pacts with many kinds of dragons, a pact with a rune dragon is somewhat more frequent due to their interest in the accomplishments of various academies.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of the Rune Dragon U

feats.name: Peerless Mascot Companion
feats.description: As veterans of countless battles, you and your companion share an indomitable strength.

feats.name: Penetrating Projectile
feats.description: Your projectiles are unhindered by flesh and bone.

feats.name: Perfect Distraction
feats.description: You use clever tactics to mislead your foes as you sneak away.

feats.name: Performance Weapon Expert
feats.description: Your experience has made you better with a wide variety of weapons.

feats.name: Persistent Boost
feats.description: Your innovation sets foes on fire, covers them in acid, leaves barbed thorns behind, or otherwise deals persistent damage to your foes that sticks around long after you deliver your boosted attack.

feats.name: Persistent Mutagen
feats.description: You've trained your physical form to remain stable.

feats.name: Phoenix's Flight
feats.description: You and your familiar learn the secrets of elemental fire, allowing you to merge together to become a legendary creature—a phoenix.

feats.name: Portentous Spell
feats.description: Your spellcasting is rife with strange lights, mild fumes, and other captivating effects that befuddle your foes.

feats.name: Preternatural Polish
feats.description: Armor you polish shines with righteous grace.

feats.name: Protective Cycle
feats.description: You react to harm by flowing into an elemental stance with new advantages.

feats.name: Purge of Moments
feats.description: All things eventually end, a truth that you can put into practice by accelerating your passage through time to shake off harmful effects.

feats.name: Quickened Attunement
feats.description: If your next action is to cast a spell that would grant your terrain attunement bonus, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (to a minimum of 1 action).

feats.name: Rallying Charge
feats.description: When you lead your allies to the front lines, you leave no one behind.

feats.name: Rebounding Smite
feats.description: The energy from your smite persists for a moment, allowing you to pass it to a new target.

feats.name: Reconstruct The Scene
feats.description: You spend 1 minute surveying a small location (such as a single room) to get an impression of events that occurred there in the last day.

feats.name: Remediate
feats.description: If your next action is to use your divine font to cast a 3-action heal or harm spell, you can harness the residual energy to counterbalance opposing forces.

feats.name: Resounding Cascade
feats.description: When you enter your Arcane Cascade, you disperse the magical reinforcement to nearby allies.

feats.name: Resounding Finale
feats.description: You bring your performance to a sudden, dramatic finish, drowning out other sounds.

feats.name: Resurrectionist
feats.description: You can cause a creature you bring back from the brink of death to thrive and continue healing.

feats.name: Resuscitate
feats.description: You resuscitate the dead.

feats.name: Revitalizing Finisher
feats.description: Your swagger instills confidence in you and your allies.

feats.name: Ricochet Master
feats.description: You have an eye for angles and can find shots that others believe are impossible.

feats.name: Rivethun Adept
feats.description: Your ability to wield spirit magic has increased.

feats.name: Ruthless Orator
feats.description: You were once cast in the role of Daronlyr XII, one of Taldor’s most ambitious rulers who slew his cousin to seize the crown, yet somehow still managed to convince the entire Ulfen Guard to swear loyalty to him simply through his powers of oration.

feats.name: Scintillating Spell
feats.description: Your spells become a radiant display of light and color.

feats.name: Seven-Part Link
feats.description: By exchanging pieces of a seven-part set of esoterica, you create a magical web by which your allies can affect each other at a distance.

feats.name: Sever Magic
feats.description: You apply a frayed thread, a pinch of fulu ash, or a similar undone charm to your weapon, and swing to break a spell.

feats.name: Shared Dream
feats.description: You've learned to create a shared dreamscape to communicate with others.

feats.name: Shared Mind, Shared Heart
feats.description: Your thoughts and dreams are your student's thoughts and dreams, and vice versa.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Shared Mind, Shared Heart

feats.name: Shattering Blows
feats.description: Your forceful blows shatter objects with ease.

feats.name: Shattering Strike (Monk)
feats.description: The force of your considered blow shatters objects and defenses alike.

feats.name: Shield of Grace
feats.description: You protect an ally with both your shield and your body.

feats.name: Shroud of Ghosts
feats.description: Your ikon is connected to the world of the spirits, allowing you to partially fade into their realm.

feats.name: Siphon Power
feats.description: You draw upon the reservoir of your patron’s magic that resides within your familiar.

feats.name: Song of Grace and Speed
feats.description: You instill great swiftness into your allies.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Song of Grace and Speed

feats.name: Sonic Strafe
feats.description: You can now achieve such flight speeds that your passage splits the very air.

feats.name: Specialized Companion (Ranger)
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to grow in power and ability, and it is now cunning enough to become specialized.

feats.name: Spell Gem
feats.description: Inspired by the degenerate demiliches your kind sometimes devolves into, you've embedded a gem into your brow, fusing it to your necrotic flesh.

feats.name: Spell Tinker
feats.description: You’ve learned to alter choices you make when casting spells on yourself.

feats.name: Spiritual Spellshape Stance
feats.description: You feed excess magical power into your apparition, allowing it to grow ethereal limbs it can use to help shape and focus your spells.

feats.name: Steal Spell
feats.description: When you use Legendary Thief to steal the impossible, you can steal a prepared spell or spontaneous spell from a foe.

feats.name: Stone Body
feats.description: Emulating the great defenders throughout dwarven history, you close your mind to the sensation of pain, becoming as resolute as stone itself.

feats.name: Storm of Claws
feats.description: You lash out with your clawed limbs like a beast that has fallen upon its first meal in days, then back off to see your handiwork.

feats.name: Strike Rivers, Seize Winds
feats.description: Through sheer physical force, you can wrestle a river, lasso the winds, punch a hole to the molten center of the planet, or create other environmental disturbances via nothing but your own strength.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Strike Rivers, Seize Winds

feats.name: Studious Capacity
feats.description: Your continued study of occult magic has increased your magical capacity, allowing you to cast spells even when it seems impossible.

feats.name: Stunning Appearance
feats.description: Your sudden appearance leaves your foe unable to respond.

feats.name: Swift Elusion
feats.description: Attempt an Acrobatics check against the foe’s Reflex DC.

feats.name: Target of Psychic Ire
feats.description: Your magic saturates your surroundings with hateful psychic energy.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Target of Psychic Ire

feats.name: Tempo Duelist
feats.description: You move with an unpredictable tempo, shifting between unnervingly slow and rapid movements.

feats.name: Tempo Shift
feats.description: You are always ready to embrace to a change in tempo and adapt your actions to take advantage of unforeseen developments.

feats.name: Terraforming Spell
feats.description: You capture transformative fragments of magic and slam them into the ground, creating a shock wave that alters your surroundings.

feats.name: The Bitter Scholar's Promotion
feats.description: Tian Xia’s shining cities belie its empires’ long shadow of death, darkened by thousands of years of suffering and injustice.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard The Bitter Scholar's Promotion

feats.name: The Immortal Attains the Summit
feats.description: Your cultivation bearing glorious fruit, you behold Heaven’s will.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard The Immortal Attains the Summit

feats.name: Tidal Wave
feats.description: Like the ocean in a storm, you overwhelm your opponents with speed and force.

feats.name: Too Much to Swallow
feats.description: While you might be small enough to grab normally, you can change that at a moment's notice.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Too Much to Swallow

feats.name: Touch Focus
feats.description: You can redirect a spell's power through you to deliver it within striking distance.

feats.name: Trample (Summoner)
feats.description: Your eidolon Strides up to double its Speed and can move through the spaces of creatures at least one size smaller, Trampling each creature whose space it enters.

feats.name: Twinned Defense (Fighter)
feats.description: You’re always ready to use your off-hand weapon to interfere with attacks against you.

feats.name: Ubiquitous Snares
feats.description: You can prepare a seemingly impossible number of snares in advance, and you’re ready to spring them on unsuspecting foes.

feats.name: Unwind Death
feats.description: Combining necromancy with the mysterious temporal powers of clockwork, you wind a creature backward from the moment of its death.

feats.name: Uplifting Winds
feats.description: The winds are eager to keep you aloft.

feats.name: Vellumis Excision
feats.description: You seek to excise the rot from the Gravelands and have made progress to do so.

feats.name: Vessel's Form
feats.description: You symbiotically combine your form with that of the entity within you, taking a powerful hybrid form to temporarily boost your abilities in combat while maintaining control.

feats.name: Walk on the Wind
feats.description: A flighty breeze follows you wherever you go, granting a dramatic flair to everything you do.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Walk on the Wind R

feats.name: Wandering Thoughts
feats.description: When your Psyche is Unleashed, each burst of magic you cast also folds space around you, and you travel through one of those folds.

feats.name: Ward Mind
feats.description: To protect the knowledge within your mind from intrusion or erasure, you ward yourself against a mental attack.

feats.name: Warden’s Reload
feats.description: Your mastery of magic and weapons like the crossbow allow you to wield both with equal ease.

feats.name: Wave the Flag
feats.description: You wave your banner, inspiring allies to throw off the shackles of fear.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Wave the Flag U

feats.name: Whirling Clobber
feats.description: After you've grasped a creature with your lash, you swing them around like a whirling hammer, smashing them into all nearby enemies.

feats.name: Withstand Death
feats.description: Through repeated exposure, you've trained to resist the damage wrought by undead.

feats.name: Wrath Against the Divine
feats.description: You channel your commitment to removing the divine from the world as you recite the Laws of Mortality.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Wrath Against the Divine

feats.name: You Failed to Account for… This!
feats.description: When your foes try to attack you, you always seem to have some outlandish invention you can pull out at the last second to protect you from whatever attack they throw at you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard You Failed to Account for… This!

feats.name: Along the Deep River
feats.description: Once per year, when you die, you turn into an immaterial ball of light.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Along the Deep River U

feats.name: Animal Shape
feats.description: You have full control over your shape and can transform into your inherent animal.

feats.name: Animal Swiftness
feats.description: You move like an animal.

feats.name: Ascendant Blood
feats.description: Twice per week, you can cast interplanar teleport as an innate spell of the tradition corresponding to your draconic exemplar.

feats.name: Awakened Stride
feats.description: You blend your instinct and intellect to move so fast you seem to be a blur.

feats.name: Axial Recall
feats.description: You have reconfigured the magical resonance of your core to attune to the planar energies of Axis.

feats.name: Azaersi's Roads
feats.description: Azaersi has granted you limited access to the Stone Roads, attuning you to the tiniest sliver of the Onyx Key.

feats.name: Begin Stampede
feats.description: The sight of you charging forward into battle emboldens your allies to follow.

feats.name: Bend Space
feats.description: Not even space itself is a match for the unleashed power of your mind.

feats.name: Benefactor's Majesty
feats.description: You tap into the grandeur of your warren's benefactor.

feats.name: Blazing Aura
feats.description: You explode in flame.

feats.name: Bone Swarm
feats.description: You scatter your body and transform into a whirling storm of bones for up to 1 minute or until you spend a single action to return to your normal shape.

feats.name: Boneyard Acquaintance
feats.description: Before your soul returned from death, you interacted with a host of other souls on their way to the Boneyard.

feats.name: Boneyard's Call
feats.description: You have a powerful connection to the Boneyard and its courts, granting you the ability to travel to and from the Boneyard.

feats.name: Breath of Calamity
feats.description: Your roar shakes the earth and splits the heavens.

feats.name: Call the Swarm
feats.description: You give a shrill whistle and point, and a massive swarm of rats pours forth from the surrounding terrain to fill a 30-foot burst within 120 feet.

feats.name: Cantorian Restoration
feats.description: The energy that flows in your blood can save a life in the direst of times.

feats.name: Ceremony of Sun's Gift
feats.description: Your connection to the sun has become an unbreakable bond.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Ceremony of Sun's Gift

feats.name: Channel the Godmind
feats.description: You tap into the collective consciousness of the Godmind, the governing entity of axiomite society, to rapidly parse near-infinite variables to read your surroundings.

feats.name: Cleansing Light
feats.description: A burst of light from your horn cleanses your allies of ailments and sends your foes reeling.

feats.name: Convocation of Earth and Moon
feats.description: You call upon Mother Earth and Father Moon to fill you with light.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Convocation of Earth and Moon

feats.name: Coral Lifeline
feats.description: Your coral symbiotes have grown into your bloodstream and are now curled around your heart.

feats.name: Core Cannon
feats.description: Your body transforms into a powerful magical cannon.

feats.name: Crone's Cruelty
feats.description: Filled with rancor and hate, you rend the minds of those who displease you.

feats.name: Dazzling Dragonet Disappearance
feats.description: A brilliant sheen on your scales flashes when you’re hit, then you’re nowhere to be found.

feats.name: Demon Slayer
feats.description: You can deliver a melee blow to a demon that creates an explosion of holy light to try to finish the demon off.

feats.name: Dissolution's Sovereignty
feats.description: With discipline born from a lifetime in darkness, you convince the shadow of an enemy to fight by your side.

feats.name: Divine Declaration
feats.description: You can call forth a holy or unholy word from the realms beyond to punish your foes.

feats.name: Dominion Aura
feats.description: For a short time, you fully manifest the expectations of the god destroyer within you.

feats.name: Doom of Sailors
feats.description: Sailors know that the sight of an angry merfolk might well mean that they never see the shore again.

feats.name: Dragonet Immunities
feats.description: You will not fall asleep unless you choose to allow it, nor will you sit still.

feats.name: Elude Trouble
feats.description: Stride up to your Speed.

feats.name: Eternal Wings
feats.description: Your wings are now a permanent part of your body.

feats.name: Eternal Wings (Sylph)
feats.description: Your wings are now a permanent part of your body.

feats.name: Favor of Heaven
feats.description: You're one of Hei Feng's chosen people and have the authority of the Celestial Court on your side.

feats.name: Fearsome Form
feats.description: A fearsome illusion covers you, evoking the terror of the most dangerous animals.

feats.name: Fey Transcendence
feats.description: You become a powerful fey creature, gaining strengths tied to the First World but also some of the weakness against which all fey must contend.

feats.name: Final Form
feats.description: You embrace your monstrous blood and make it your own, screaming out to the heavens and hells alike in rage, pain, and defiance.

feats.name: First to Strike, First to Fall
feats.description: Whenever you successfully Strike a creature that has not acted in the first round of combat, that creature is off-guard until the end of your next turn.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard First to Strike, First to Fall

feats.name: Flourish and Ruin
feats.description: You can call upon the vital essence of your spirit to restore life to your allies and call forth vines to ensnare and bludgeon your foes.

feats.name: Forge-Blessed Shot
feats.description: You intone a prayer to the dwarven deities Torag or Angradd, willing a higher power to guide your aim in the heat of battle.

feats.name: Form of the Beloved Mother
feats.description: You channel the blessings of Nalinivati to transform into a manifestation of her will.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Form of the Beloved Mother U

feats.name: Form of the Dragon
feats.description: You can briefly transform into a paragon of your draconic ancestry.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Form of the Dragon

feats.name: Fossil Rider
feats.description: Using your ancestors' bones, you manifest their spirits around you in a fossilized form.

feats.name: Fountain of Secrets
feats.description: You constantly remember details about the world.

feats.name: Fox Possession
feats.description: You can project a spiritual form to possess another.

feats.name: Gentle Death and Rebirth
feats.description: You were once born from the energies of the land and nature, and by their power, you can return to life again.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Gentle Death and Rebirth

feats.name: Ghoran's Wrath
feats.description: You have such a strong connection to the natural world that you can inspire it to attack at those who threaten you.

feats.name: Great Tengu Form
feats.description: You take on the imposing form of a large, winged spirit.

feats.name: Greater Augmentation
feats.description: You've greatly improved your abilities and your core can support further augmentations.

feats.name: Greater Enhance Venom
feats.description: You upgrade the vishkanyan venom you can apply with Envenom to greater vishkanyan venom.

feats.name: Greater than the Sum
feats.description: You call upon the familial bonds you share with your allies and other ratfolk to become an overwhelming force in battle.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Greater than the Sum

feats.name: Heroic Presence
feats.description: The blood of heroes courses through your veins, and you inspire your allies to dig deep and find a new level of resolve.

feats.name: Homeward Bound
feats.description: The connection between you and the First World resonates within your body stronger than it does for most gnomes, allowing you to cross the threshold between the Universe and the First World.

feats.name: Hurricane Swing
feats.description: Choose either lightning bolt or gust of wind.

feats.name: Impaling Bone
feats.description: Once per day, you can cast impaling spike as a 7th-rank innate occult spell, except the spike is made of bone instead of cold iron.

feats.name: Indomitable Spirit
feats.description: Your soul has accumulated countless particles of quintessence over myriad deaths and rebirths, and for one moment, this raw material from the Great Beyond envelops you and your comrades.

feats.name: Into the Labyrinth
feats.description: Calling on your connection to minotaurs of myth, you shunt an enemy into a complex maze full of puzzles of your own devising.

feats.name: Irresistible Bloom
feats.description: You bloom, sprouting flowers and releasing a pleasant smell, becoming irresistible.

feats.name: Jotun's Heart
feats.description: You have unlocked the power of a true giant within you.

feats.name: Jotun's Transposition
feats.description: You’ve learned to fully move across planes, beginning with the Ethereal Plane.

feats.name: Kishin Rage
feats.description: Your eyes glow a deep red and your body courses with adrenaline as you obtain a fraction of the power of the kishin oni.

feats.name: Kraken's Call
feats.description: You call forth the sleeping krakens of the deep to crush your enemies.

feats.name: Landscape Form
feats.description: While walking down the road on a moonlit night, one might be puzzled to find a shop or hill that wasn’t there before.

feats.name: Legendary Laugh
feats.description: Your laugher echoes in the minds of your enemies.

feats.name: Legendary Monster
feats.description: Your yaoguai form has reached its pinnacle, allowing you to assume (or perhaps, return to) the form of a monster of legend.

feats.name: Lingering Breath
feats.description: Your draconic breath destroys the surrounding environment and leaves your enemies in pain.

feats.name: Magic Rider
feats.description: Your people used powerful magic to travel between distant worlds in the distant past, and the remnants of that magic make such transportation easier for you.

feats.name: Merge with the Source
feats.description: You're among the most powerful of Speakers and can adopt the form of the spirits you entreat with.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Merge with the Source

feats.name: Metallic Skin
feats.description: You fortify your natural resistances with elemental metal, covering your skin with thick metal.

feats.name: Mooneater
feats.description: You call on the spirit of the dragon that devoured the moon to temporarily swallow a celestial body and blind onlookers with its visage.

feats.name: Moray Ambush
feats.description: Like the moray eels athamaru communities raise and train, you know how to quickly strike from hiding.

feats.name: Necromantic Heir
feats.description: Your affinity for negative energy spills outward and grants you a refilling well of necromantic essence.

feats.name: Nodal Regeneration
feats.description: Your body processes magic so effectively that you can induce true regeneration, replacing limbs and restoring organs.

feats.name: Offensive Odor
feats.description: You've mastered your defensive pheromones and have nearly complete control over them.

feats.name: Olethros's Decree
feats.description: You have a connection to olethroses, the enigmatic psychopomps who successfully swayed the yamaraj to permit the creation of the first duskwalkers.

feats.name: Pandemonium Eruption
feats.description: You unleash the pent-up chaos within you, becoming a nexus of unbridled destruction that wreaks unfettered havoc on everyone in your vicinity.

feats.name: Perfected Gamtu
feats.description: Your hat embodies the illusory grandeur of a master dokkaebi.

feats.name: Pierce the Light
feats.description: You tear the veil between the Material Plane and its shadow.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pierce the Light U

feats.name: Planar Traveler
feats.description: You concentrate on the spaces between planes, allowing you to enhance your movement for a short period.

feats.name: Potent Nectar
feats.description: Your nectar becomes particularly dangerous.

feats.name: Prismatic Scales
feats.description: You can cause your scales to glow with scintillating, many-hued colors, protecting you from energy while dazzling foes.

feats.name: Radiate Glory
feats.description: Your inherent glory radiates into the world with all the divine power of the celestial planes for 1 minute.

feats.name: Rallying Cry
feats.description: You call out to your allies and push them to give their all in combat.

feats.name: Rampaging Ferocity
feats.description: You lash out viciously even as you fend off death.

feats.name: Rampaging Form
feats.description: Once per day, when you Change Shape into a fox, you can instead gain the effects of both the canine form of 5th-level animal form and 7th-level fiery body for 1 minute or until you shift back, whichever comes first.

feats.name: Reckless Abandon (Goblin)
feats.description: Despite a lifetime filled with questionable decisions, you've managed to survive, as though you have uncanny luck that lets you avoid the consequences of your own actions.

feats.name: Reflect Foe
feats.description: You create a copy of a foe by calling them forth from a nearby reflection.

feats.name: Regrowth
feats.description: Your command over your vital essence allows you or an ally to recover from grievous wounds.

feats.name: Release the Light
feats.description: Many people report seeing a bright light before their death.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Release the Light R

feats.name: Reliable Luck
feats.description: You survive danger with surprising regularity.

feats.name: Restitch
feats.description: You've learned how to sew even the most terrible tears and wounds together.

feats.name: Return to the Seed
feats.description: Once per month, when you die, you can instead choose to fade away.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Return to the Seed

feats.name: Scion Transformation
feats.description: You go into hibernation for twenty-four hours and perform a ritual dedicated to your ancestors, undergoing a one-time metamorphosis.

feats.name: See You in Hell
feats.description: You aren’t sure if you’ll be reincarnated again, so you might as well take this foe with you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited See You in Hell R

feats.name: Sever the Dreaming Shadow
feats.description: As you whisper to your pusaka, it attempts to cut away an enemy’s shadow, leaving them in an eternal sleep.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Sever the Dreaming Shadow

feats.name: Shadow Self
feats.description: You slip from your adversaries' notice and appear to be somewhere else.

feats.name: Soaring Poppet
feats.description: Your construction has flaps of cloth or wicker that can keep you aloft.

feats.name: Starshot Arrow
feats.description: The greatest centaurs need not wait until their stories are over to touch the stars in the sky.

feats.name: Start the Festival!
feats.description: No distance can stop tanuki from making their way to a good party.

feats.name: Stone Form
feats.description: You can transform your body into a pure primal manifestation of earth, an elemental.

feats.name: Stonegate
feats.description: Earthen barriers no longer impede your progress.

feats.name: Stonewall
feats.description: The strength of stone overcomes you so strongly that it replaces your stout body.

feats.name: Storm Form
feats.description: You can transform into an elemental.

feats.name: Stormy Heart
feats.description: The elemental power in your blood is a raging storm.

feats.name: Strength of Eight Legions
feats.description: You meditate for 24 hours in a one-time ceremony within a forest or cave; after your seclusion, your frame and limbs swell with warlike might to enact your vows.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Strength of Eight Legions

feats.name: Symphony of Blood
feats.description: You call forth the blood of your foes to grant you vigor.

feats.name: Ten Lives
feats.description: When your character would die, you can attempt a DC 17 flat check.

feats.name: The Cycle Continues
feats.description: Death is as natural as breathing to you, and you can move past it as easily as the other troubles in your life.

feats.name: This Time, Bring the Body
feats.description: Since your soul has experienced not only death but also rebirth, you can shift your physical body into the Ethereal Plane for brief intervals.
feats.raw_header: This Time, Bring the Body R

feats.name: This Too Shall Pass
feats.description: Mortal worries are such simple matters to you that you leave them behind almost as quickly as you experience them.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard This Too Shall Pass

feats.name: This is What It's Like to Die
feats.description: It’s one thing to remember your previous lives.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited This is What It's Like to Die R

feats.name: Tidal Shield
feats.description: You conjure the force of the tides to gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Trample
feats.description: You know how to leverage your size and momentum when using your horns attack, and can use your movement speed to overrun your foes.

feats.name: Transcend the Azimuth
feats.description: As the earth drinks the light of sun and moon, so does your steady vow imbibe superlunary forces, ready to be unleashed with a moment’s mantra.

feats.name: Trickster Tengu
feats.description: You can transform yourself or the bodies of others to express your displeasure.

feats.name: True Gaze
feats.description: When you focus your eyes carefully, your gaze can pierce through all obfuscations, even magical ones.

feats.name: True Senses
feats.description: Your senses are so sharp they pierce through all illusions.

feats.name: Twist Healing
feats.description: Your connection to both life and undeath lets you twist the healing power of magic items to suit your own needs and aims.

feats.name: Unbound Leaper
feats.description: Your jumping prowess is unmatched.

feats.name: Underwater Volcano
feats.description: You can cast volcanic eruption as a 7th-level primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Unfettering Prankster
feats.description: You can uplift all around you with your pranks, causing you and your allies to receive divine guidance in all your movements to effortlessly avoid environmental hindrances.

feats.name: Unlimited Pluripotency
feats.description: Within all surkis is the capacity to be whatever they need to be, and you can tap into that capacity even now.

feats.name: Vicious Venom
feats.description: The venom you produce is exceptionally potent and difficult to overcome.

feats.name: Wood Ward
feats.description: With a sweep of your hand, vines and roots burst from the ground along the edge of your space between you and the attacker, creating a natural lattice of wood that grants standard cover.

feats.name: Yamaraj's Grandeur
feats.description: You have been granted a sliver of the power of the yamaraj, the magistrates of the dead who agreed to allow duskwalkers to exist at all.

feats.name: All Shall End in Flames
feats.description: White-hot fire consumes everything in a cataclysmic sphere of death.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard All Shall End in Flames H

feats.name: All in my Head
feats.description: Using your occult connections and incredible powers of persuasion, you convince yourself that the triggering damage is a figment of your imagination.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard All in my Head

feats.name: All in your Head
feats.description: Flames scouring at your body, venom coursing through your veins—you refuse to believe they exist, and nothing can affect you if you don't believe in it.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard All in your Head

feats.name: Beasts of Slumbering Steel
feats.description: You conjure metal elemental mounts made of interlocking metal pieces.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Beasts of Slumbering Steel

feats.name: Black Powder Embodiment
feats.description: You merge your body with your ammunition, enabling you to travel the same path as your bolt or bullet.

feats.name: Blaze of Revelation
feats.description: Your mind and body can, for a short time and with great peril, surpass the final limits of your curse.

feats.name: Body Barrier
feats.description: When your allies are in danger, you don’t hesitate to take the brunt of the blow for them.

feats.name: Branched Tree Of Pain
feats.description: The blade of your ikon takes one or more notches, capable of dealing mortal pain to your foes. Immanence When you Strike with the ikon, you critically succeed if you roll a 19 on the die as long as that result would be a success.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Branched Tree Of Pain

feats.name: Brutal Critical
feats.description: Your critical hits are particularly devastating.

feats.name: Burn Identity
feats.description: You transport yourself up to 1 mile, as a 5th-rank translocate spell.

feats.name: Call the Worm
feats.description: You gain summon animal, heightened to 9th level, as an innate primal spell that you can cast once per day, but can only summon a purple worm.

feats.name: Celestial Form
feats.description: You take on a celestial countenance, gaining the features of a type of celestial who serves your deity; for example, as an angel, you gain a halo and feathery wings.

feats.name: Chemical Contagion
feats.description: Your injury poisons can spray onto creatures.

feats.name: Conflux Wellspring
feats.description: You've achieved perfect magical and physical balance, allowing magic to flow into and through you more easily.

feats.name: Cranial Detonation
feats.description: As your overwhelming psyche fells a creature, you use its flickering consciousness to detonate psychic energy from the creature's head.

feats.name: Crowned in Tempest's Fury
feats.description: You become one with a devastating thunderstorm from the Plane of Air, placing a crown of lightning upon your brow.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Crowned in Tempest's Fury

feats.name: Cut them Down, Burn them Out
feats.description: Inspired by the sixth line of the Crimson Oath, when you oppose the enemies of Lastwall, you aim to excise the rot from the land itself.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Cut them Down, Burn them Out

feats.name: Cycle of Souls
feats.description: Your spiritual allies guide your movements, allowing you to prepare for the trials before you at a speed faster than thought.

feats.name: Deep Lore
feats.description: Your repertoire is vast, containing far more spells than usual.

feats.name: Deific Font
feats.description: Your life force can fuel the stuff of miracles.

feats.name: Demand Surrender
feats.description: Confident in your victory, you command your opponent's surrender.

feats.name: Demolish Defenses
feats.description: With a powerful blow, you crack a foe's armor or tough hide, opening it up for further attacks.

feats.name: Devastating Duelist
feats.description: You pointedly note your enemy's deficiencies, filling them with fear and dismay.

feats.name: Devastating Weaponry
feats.description: You release a volley of projectiles from your weapon, or power it to fly in every direction across the battlefield and Strike multiple creatures.

feats.name: Diamond Fists
feats.description: Your body hardens as you combine your attacks, making your finishing blows more damaging.

feats.name: Discordant Voice
feats.description: Your courageous anthem lets loose a discordant shriek that imbues your allies’ attacks with powerful sonic reverberations.

feats.name: Divine Apex
feats.description: You can pour divine power into an item, letting the wearer exceed their limits.

feats.name: Divine Effusion
feats.description: The power of your mystery surges through you like a font of divine energy, even when your own magic dwindles.

feats.name: Divine Presence
feats.description: Your spirit becomes one with your deity, granting you the bearing of a god.

feats.name: Echoing Channel
feats.description: When you pull forth vitality or void energy, you also create a smaller pocket of that energy.

feats.name: Echoing Spell
feats.description: You time the components of your spell with exacting precision, setting up a resonance that duplicates the spell's effects.

feats.name: Echoing Violence
feats.description: Your powerful attack causes damage that reverberates through your opponent’s body, shaking muscle from bone.

feats.name: Effortless Reach
feats.description: Focusing the powers of your ki to augment your blows, you stretch and lengthen your body in ways that defy logic.

feats.name: Elemental Apotheosis
feats.description: You take on an elemental countenance, appearing like a type of elemental of your element.

feats.name: Embolded With Glorious Purpose
feats.description: Communing with powerful spirits of the world and other powers far greater than yourself fills your heart with purpose and inspires you to strive for greater accomplishments.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Embolded With Glorious Purpose

feats.name: Empty Body
feats.description: You transmute your body into an ethereal form.

feats.name: Engine of Destruction
feats.description: Your construct unleashes a broad swath of devastation by separating its limbs, deploying hidden armaments, or using a similar technique to wreak havoc.

feats.name: Eternal Composition
feats.description: The world is a stage upon which you are always playing.

feats.name: Eternity-Incinerating Blaze
feats.description: The blaze of your divine spark is hot enough that it burns in not just the present, but the past and future as well.

feats.name: Ever Dreaming
feats.description: You draw no distinction between the sleeping and waking worlds.

feats.name: Exultant Blood Magic
feats.description: The magic in your blood sings an exultant song of battle.

feats.name: Eyes of God
feats.description: You can see things as they truly are.

feats.name: Fatal Shot
feats.description: You modify an arrow or bolt to bring death to your target in a single potent hit.

feats.name: Fiendish Form
feats.description: Your features reshape into those of a type of fiend who serves your deity; for example, as a demon you might have putrid scales, twisted horns, and red eyes.

feats.name: Fight Choreography
feats.description: You’ve spent enough time training in stage fighting and teaching a wide range of stunts that you can prepare your companions with directions on how to avoid peril in battle.

feats.name: Final Shot
feats.description: You jam a triple charge of black powder into your weapon to unleash a devastating but risky and inaccurate attack.

feats.name: Five Breaths, One Death
feats.description: You cycle through the elements in a devastating combination attack.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Five Breaths, One Death

feats.name: Frightful Aura
feats.description: You're surrounded by a palpable sense of menace and power that's terrifying to behold.

feats.name: Glory on High
feats.description: You take to the skies to unveil the full magnificence of your deity’s power.

feats.name: Grand Scroll Esoterica
feats.description: You've completed the third and final step in your assimilation of scroll esoterica, granting you daily scrolls of incredible power.

feats.name: Grandmaster Qi Spells
feats.description: You have unlocked a qi technique achievable only by those who attain complete mastery of both their body and their spirit.

feats.name: Greater Crossblooded Evolution
feats.description: Your bloodline is extraordinarily complex.

feats.name: Guiding Words
feats.description: Your words speak divine truth, guiding blades and arrows to their mark.

feats.name: Guillotine Blade
feats.description: The echoes of the splinter of finality's original purpose resonate through the artifact.

feats.name: Halcyon Spellcasting Sage
feats.description: Your command over halcyon magic is nearly unmatched.

feats.name: Heightened Instincts
feats.description: You've worked to sharpen your companions' instincts to supernatural levels.

feats.name: Hell of 1,000,000 Needles
feats.description: The landscape fills with monumental filaments of metal.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Hell of 1,000,000 Needles H

feats.name: I knew the Heroes
feats.description: Your stories aren’t mere tales passed down from elder to youth or teacher to student.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited I knew the Heroes

feats.name: Ignite the Sun
feats.description: The fires of creation become yours to control.

feats.name: Implausible Infiltration
feats.description: You find tiny imperfections and somehow fit yourself through them, possibly moving directly through the wall or floor.

feats.name: Implausible Purchase (Rogue)
feats.description: You can use Prescient Planner even if you have already used it after purchasing goods, and you can Interact to draw the item as a single action instead of a 2-action activity.

feats.name: Implement's Assault
feats.description: Your implement supercharges your weapon to shoot an impossible volley or carve through your foes.

feats.name: Impossible Flurry
feats.description: You forgo precision to attack at an impossible speed.

feats.name: Impossible Polymath
feats.description: Your esoteric formulas are so unusual that they allow you to dabble in magic from diverse traditions that other bards don’t understand.

feats.name: Impossible Volley
feats.description: You fire a volley at all foes in an area.

feats.name: Improbable Elixirs
feats.description: Your mastery of alchemical secrets enables you to replicate effects most believe can be achieved only via magic.

feats.name: Improved Swift Banishment
feats.description: You easily banish creatures with your weapon.

feats.name: Incredible Luck
feats.description: You always seem to bounce back from the worst.

feats.name: Infinite Expanse of Bluest Heaven
feats.description: An illusion of a limitless expanse with an impossibly blue sky makes all within feel the sensation of falling...
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Infinite Expanse of Bluest Heaven

feats.name: Infinite Possibilities
feats.description: You can prepare a spell slot that exists in your mind as many different possibilities at once.

feats.name: Intense Implement
feats.description: You have an exceptional link to your third implement.

feats.name: Inviolable
feats.description: Your deity punishes creatures that harm you.

feats.name: Invoke Disaster
feats.description: You can invoke nature’s fury upon your foes.

feats.name: Ki Form
feats.description: You have mastered a potent technique for using your ki to reinforce your physical form and propel yourself through the air.

feats.name: Lead Investigator
feats.description: You spend 1 minute briefing up to four allies about one of your open investigations.

feats.name: Lethal Finisher
feats.description: You stab your foe in a vital organ, possibly killing them outright.

feats.name: Link Wellspring
feats.description: Your bond replenishes your focus.

feats.name: Look Again
feats.description: If your illusions or enchantments fail to ensnare the minds of others, you can cast them again.

feats.name: Magical Master
feats.description: Your eidolon gains a bevy of lower-level spells.

feats.name: Major Deific Power
feats.description: As your apotheosis into living godhood approaches, you accrue the strongest of divine power.

feats.name: Manifold Edge
feats.description: You’ve learned to leverage every possible edge.

feats.name: Marked For Rebuke
feats.description: You declare that an enemy is fit for further punishment in the sight of your deity.

feats.name: Master Animist Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster.

feats.name: Master Bard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Beast Gunner Spellcasting
feats.description: You've learned the final truth of beast guns, making you a master in the magic they grant you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Master Beast Gunner Spellcasting

feats.name: Master Cathartic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Cleric Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Druid Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Eldritch Archer Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Master Eldritch Archer Spellcasting

feats.name: Master Magus Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master bounded spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Oracle Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Prophet Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Psychic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Red Mantis Magic
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Master Red Mantis Magic

feats.name: Master Rivethun Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Scroll Cache
feats.description: Your scroll collection is incredible, brimming with eldritch power, and you can prepare far more of them than an ordinary scroll trickster.

feats.name: Master Snowcasting
feats.description: You have unlocked the deeper magic of your gelid shard, gaining access to new levels of spells.

feats.name: Master Sorcerer Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting archetype benefits.

feats.name: Master Summoner Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master bounded spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Witch Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Wizard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Masterful Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion shares your incredible hunting skills, allowing it to take down your shared prey with ease.

feats.name: Meditative Wellspring
feats.description: When you clear your mind, your focus comes flowing back in a powerful rush.

feats.name: Mercenary Reversal
feats.description: Even though the fight seems to be surging against you and your compatriots, you know that a key ally can always turn the tide.

feats.name: Mighty Bear
feats.description: The power of the bear within you can expand your physical presence even further.

feats.name: Mighty Dragon Shape
feats.description: You've practiced and increased your draconic might, allowing you to take your draconic form more often.

feats.name: Mighty Wings
feats.description: Your dragon wings are now a permanent part of your body, giving you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

feats.name: Miracle Worker
feats.description: Your alchemical mastery can resuscitate the recently slain.

feats.name: Miraculous Flight
feats.description: With superior engineering and magical application, you have freed your signature vehicle from the bonds of gravity, allowing it to soar through the sky like a dragon.

feats.name: Miraculous Possibility
feats.description: Your deity empowers you to perform minor miracles, allowing you to readily adapt to the fluctuating needs of your duties.

feats.name: Negate Damage
feats.description: Your armor innovation activates various devices you prepared ahead of time, and you use one of them to reduce the damage you would take by 15.

feats.name: No Need to Fear
feats.description: With a simple reminder of perseverance, you bolster the bravery of yourself and your allies.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard No Need to Fear

feats.name: Officer's Mastery
feats.description: Your proficiency in commander class DC increases to master, and you become a master in Warfare Lore.

feats.name: Orichalcum Bond
feats.description: The ancient Thassilonians associated sins with different skymetals, and you’ve adapted that theory to empower your bonded weapon beyond its normal limits.

feats.name: Pack Performance
feats.description: When you and animals sing together, your words ring even brighter and bolder, cutting through disruptions.

feats.name: Pact of the Living Pact
feats.description: You’ve sworn a pact with a pact that has somehow survived long after the death of the original pactbinder.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Pact of the Living Pact U

feats.name: Parry and Riposte
feats.description: Your parries and finishers allow you to riposte with the slightest provocation.

feats.name: Patron’s Claim
feats.description: Your patron partially manifests itself through your familiar to claim a foe’s power for its own.

feats.name: Perfect Clarity
feats.description: You burn out all your rage to ensure that your attack lands and your mind remains free.

feats.name: Perfect Debilitation
feats.description: You have perfected the formulas for bombs that impede your enemies.

feats.name: Perfect Form Control
feats.description: Thanks to magic and muscle memory, you can stay in your alternate shapes indefinitely.

feats.name: Perfect Ki Grandmaster
feats.description: You gain an appropriate ki spell for your School of Perfection: unblinking flame ignition for Unblinking Flame, unbreaking wave containment for Unbreaking Waves, unfolding wind crash for Unfolding Wind, or untwisting iron pillar for Untwisting Iron.

feats.name: Perfect Protection
feats.description: Your armor protects you from the deadliest hits.

feats.name: Perfect Shot
feats.description: After watching the motions of combat with incredible intensity and precision, you fire at your prey at the perfect moment to deliver maximum pain.

feats.name: Piercing Critical
feats.description: Your attacks with your preferred weapons deal especially devastating wounds.

feats.name: Powerful Sneak
feats.description: You’ve learned to exploit your enemies’ openings.

feats.name: Practiced Reflexes
feats.description: You snap out a quick series of signals or commands that urge your allies to act with alacrity.

feats.name: Primal Aegis
feats.description: You surround yourself with a thick field of protective primal energy.

feats.name: Qi Center
feats.description: You center yourself with the universe and draw upon its vast power.

feats.name: Quick Vengeance
feats.description: Indignant at any who would strike you or your allies, you get your revenge.

feats.name: Razor's Edge
feats.description: Your curse and your power are one and the same, and you accept both equally.

feats.name: Reach for the Stars
feats.description: The sky's the limit, as long as you've got enough black powder.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Reach for the Stars

feats.name: Rebirth in Living Stone
feats.description: Rock overflows from within you to consume your form before cracking open to reveal your body transformed into living stone.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rebirth in Living Stone H

feats.name: Rejuvenating Touch
feats.description: Your healing energies linger after you cast, providing continual benefits.

feats.name: Repelling Enforcer
feats.description: Your conviction reflects damage from the divine.

feats.name: Reprepare Spell
feats.description: You’ve discovered how to reuse some of your spell slots over and over.

feats.name: Retain Absorbed Spell
feats.description: When you absorb a spell using the Absorb Spell reaction, you utilize secret, techniques that allow you to retain the power and knowledge necessary to cast the spell repeatedly—potentially for a greater period of time.

feats.name: Retributive Focus
feats.description: Your enemy’s offenses fuel your righteous power.

feats.name: Ride the Tsunami
feats.description: Booming, crashing walls of water, enough to fill a harbor, smash out ahead of you, overwhelming all in their path.

feats.name: Rouse the Forest's Fury
feats.description: Terrifying trees attack your enemies.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Rouse the Forest's Fury H

feats.name: Sacred Weapon
feats.description: You’re a living weapon honed to destroy fiends.

feats.name: Savage Critical
feats.description: The wounds you inflict are grievous.

feats.name: School Spell Redirection
feats.description: When you Counterspell a spell with a school matching your specialization, if you critically succeed at your counteract check, or if you succeed while using a spell of a higher level than the spell you countered, you can redirect the spell you countered.

feats.name: Second Thoughts
feats.description: When your target proves resilient to your magical deceptions, you can try them again on someone else.

feats.name: Seven-Colored Cosmic Bridge
feats.description: Your divine spark shines in a riot of shimmering colors, capable of carrying you through the world as fast as light itself.

feats.name: Shadow Hunter
