feats.description: You blend in to your surroundings so well that others have trouble telling you apart from the terrain.

feats.name: Shadow Master
feats.description: The shadows protect you better than any armor can, and they give you power to plunge others into darkness.

feats.name: Shared Clarity
feats.description: You can project your premonitions of clarity to your allies.

feats.name: Shield from Spells
feats.description: Your prowess with a shield allows you to block magic and more.

feats.name: Smash from the Air
feats.description: Your expertise enables you to knock away spells.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Smash from the Air

feats.name: Soaring Dynamo
feats.description: You've built clockwork wings or jets into your dynamo, allowing you to use your prosthesis to fly.

feats.name: Specialized Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion gains a specialization.

feats.name: Spirit of Vigil
feats.description: Though the city of Vigil itself has been destroyed, you will carry on its warrior spirit to the end of your days.

feats.name: Spirit's Sacrifice
feats.description: Your attuned apparition gathers all of the energy it can through your shared bond and uses that power to disperse itself while channeling the energy back into you, saving your life.

feats.name: Split Hex
feats.description: You siphon some of the power from an offensive hex you cast to direct it at a second target as well.

feats.name: Stand for the Fallen
feats.description: You protect your allies at the cost of your own blood, but your deity shields you from the worst of the harm.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Stand for the Fallen

feats.name: Stave Off Catastrophe
feats.description: You fully protect your allies from the worst blows.

feats.name: Sunwrecker
feats.description: Your weapon has the might of legends, capable of shooting or striking any light out of the sky.

feats.name: Swift Retribution
feats.description: The transgressions of your enemies fuel you to retaliate with divine speed.

feats.name: Swift River
feats.description: You flow like water, avoiding all restraints.

feats.name: Terrain Ghost
feats.description: You move through your territory like a living shadow.

feats.name: Terrifying Countenance
feats.description: You can erect a magical cowl that terrorizes your enemies.

feats.name: The Shattered Mountain Weeps
feats.description: A massive sphere of rock explodes, unleashing a cataclysm of falling debris and deadly shrapnel. PFS Limited The Thousand Lashes of the Weeping Willow H
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard The Shattered Mountain Weeps H

feats.name: U
feats.description: You conjure a massive willow tree, which lashes your foes with a thousand branches.

feats.name: Timeline-Splitting Spell
feats.description: You invest in two futures, then choose the one to make a reality.

feats.name: Tragic Lament
feats.description: You dramatically cry out in poetic verse about the tragedies that led to your doom at this very moment, instilling guilt in your attacker.

feats.name: Triangle Shot
feats.description: You string three arrows to your bow and fire them all at once.

feats.name: Trickster's Ace
feats.description: Whether from jury-rigged magic items, deduction from the study of magical interactions, or other means, you have a contingency in your back pocket for desperate situations.

feats.name: Tripartite Omen
feats.description: You invoke religious portents to ward yourself against danger without losing sight of the history that led to this point.

feats.name: True Transmogrification
feats.description: You transmogrify your eidolon each day.

feats.name: Turn the Wheel of Seasons
feats.description: The seasons shift rapidly.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Turn the Wheel of Seasons

feats.name: Twin Psyche
feats.description: You’ve segmented your psyche so it can operate in tandem.

feats.name: Ultimate Mercy
feats.description: Your mercy transcends the bounds of life and death.

feats.name: Uncanny Vitae
feats.description: Your warrior spirit is infused with a potent vital essence that imbues your gear.

feats.name: Unerring Shot
feats.description: Your senses are finely tuned to the slightest variations in the air, so much that you can place your shot exactly where you intend to aim it from any range possible with your weapon.

feats.name: Usurp the Lunar Reins
feats.description: The moon has always been connected to the tides, and now you can grasp that connection.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Usurp the Lunar Reins

feats.name: Versatile Spellstrike
feats.description: You can channel the entire realm of possibilities of your spellbook into an attack.

feats.name: Vicious Evisceration
feats.description: You make a vicious attack that maims your enemy.

feats.name: Whirlwind Toss
feats.description: You whirl a foe to smash into all nearby creatures before throwing them far away.

feats.name: True Perception
feats.description: Your perceptive abilities and ability to process sensory information are so far beyond the pale that you notice minute discrepancies in all sorts of illusions and physical transformations.

feats.name: Accurate Flurry
feats.description: You refine the precision of your unbelievable storm of blows.

feats.name: Alchemical Revivification
feats.description: If you die while under the effect of at least one elixir, the alchemical compounds in your bloodstream bring you back to life at the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Aldori Swordlord
feats.description: You are an Aldori swordlord.

feats.name: All the Time in the World
feats.description: Your firsthand experience of the subjective nature of time and space has given you new observational insights.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited All the Time in the World U

feats.name: Annihilating Swing
feats.description: You have embraced brute destructive power.

feats.name: Apex Companion
feats.description: Gain the apex companion focus spell.

feats.name: Archwizard's Might
feats.description: You have mastered the greatest secrets of arcane magic.

feats.name: Armament Paragon
feats.description: Add the following property runes to the list you can choose for your blessed armament: animated, greater fearsome, grievous, keen, and greater vitalizing.

feats.name: Astonishing Explosion
feats.description: Your bomb incorporates an explosive spark of wonder that leaves witnesses dumbfounded.

feats.name: Aura of Unbreakable Virtue
feats.description: Overwhelm evil creatures with your aura.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Aura of Unbreakable Virtue U

feats.name: Automatic Psychic Action
feats.description: Your power wants to be free.

feats.name: Avatar's Audience
feats.description: Your extensive service affords you certain divine privileges.

feats.name: Avatar's Protection
feats.description: In moments of danger, you can call upon your god’s form in an instant.

feats.name: Banishing Blow
feats.description: The erratic teleportation magic you experienced in the Kortos Mounts has taught you a few tricks.

feats.name: Become Thought
feats.description: You shed some of your material form, becoming a being of pure thought.

feats.name: Bloodline Conduit
feats.description: Your inborn magical nature lets you redirect ambient energies to fuel your spells.

feats.name: Bloodline Metamorphosis
feats.description: Swap out spells from your repertoire more easily.

feats.name: Bloodline Mutation
feats.description: You permanently mutate to become more like the creatures of your bloodline.

feats.name: Bloodline Perfection
feats.description: You command the ultimate powers of your bloodline and tradition.

feats.name: Boundless Reprisals
feats.description: With a sixth sense for the flow of combat, you can quickly react to any situation as required.

feats.name: Celestial Mount
feats.description: Your steed gains incredible celestial powers granted by your deity.

feats.name: Cenotaph Stance
feats.description: You take on a stance that marks your location as a place where none will fall.

feats.name: Contagious Rage
feats.description: You can drive your allies into a frenzy, granting them incredible benefits.

feats.name: Craft Philosopher's Stone
feats.description: Your research has paid off, culminating in the legendary philosopher's stone.

feats.name: Cross the Final Horizon
feats.description: You Stride up to your Speed and your ki enshrouds your limbs in a terrifying stormy energy, increasing the reach of your Sky and Heaven Stance unarmed attacks by 5 feet.

feats.name: Cross the Final Horizon
feats.description: You Stride up to your Speed and your ki enshrouds your limbs in a terrifying stormy energy.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Cross the Final Horizon

feats.name: Cunning Trickster Mask
feats.description: Your mask carries the legacy of Verdant Spider, the Speaker of Needs, allowing you to deceive and outwit your foes.

feats.name: Cutting Without Blade
feats.description: While tales of your divine ikons have spread far and wide, you’ve realized that, as they are all manifestations of your soul, the object itself is unnecessary.

feats.name: Dance of Intercession
feats.description: You either performed in or stood witness to the dance used to invoke the Celestial Dragon and can harness a sliver of their power.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Dance of Intercession U

feats.name: Deadly Strikes
feats.description: You have honed your body to attack with lethal focus.

feats.name: Demon's Hair
feats.description: Your hair constantly wriggles and writhes.

feats.name: Denier of Destruction
feats.description: You can manipulate the same energies that the aeon orbs use to sustain life.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Denier of Destruction U

feats.name: Ease the Burden
feats.description: You wash away a creature’s pain with a touch.

feats.name: Efficient Alchemy (Paragon)
feats.description: Prepare more alchemical items from your infused reagents.

feats.name: Emancipator's Mask
feats.description: Your mask grants you the abilities of Whistling Kite, the Vigilant Seer, who emancipated thousands.

feats.name: Emblazon Divinity
feats.description: Emblazon more equipment at the same time.

feats.name: Empyreal Aura
feats.description: As an ultimate foe of evil and protector of the innocent, your very presence is a ward against evil.

feats.name: Endurance of the Rooted Tree
feats.description: Just as the Vale of Aroden retains light and life despite inhospitable surroundings, you can sustain yourself regardless of your environment.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Endurance of the Rooted Tree U

feats.name: Enduring Debilitation
feats.description: Your debilitations last for 1 minute.

feats.name: Enduring Quickness
feats.description: You move as fast and freely as the wind.

feats.name: Enter Divine Realm
feats.description: You are granted access to your deity’s realm and can travel there quickly.

feats.name: Eternal Boost
feats.description: Your link with your eidolon is so intense that you continuously reinforce its abilities.

feats.name: Eternal Guide
feats.description: Your attuned apparitions recognize that you still have essential work to do and refuse to allow you to pass on, gathering up your essence to carry your soul back to the community you call home.

feats.name: Everdistant Defense
feats.description: You have learned that distance can foil enemies better than any armor.

feats.name: Everyone's a Suspect
feats.description: You are so suspicious of everyone you meet that you keep mental notes on how to defeat them all—even your own allies.

feats.name: Extradimensional Stash
feats.description: When you perform sleight of hand, you fold space so that objects really do disappear.

feats.name: Fatal Aria
feats.description: Your songs overwhelm the target with unbearable emotion, potentially striking them dead on the spot.

feats.name: Fiendish Mount
feats.description: Your steed ally manifests a suite of powerful and sinister gifts granted to it by your deity.

feats.name: Full Automation
feats.description: You become so entwined with your innovations that you can use them without a second thought.

feats.name: Glorious Banner
feats.description: Your banner is an awesome sight to behold.

feats.name: Godbreaker
feats.description: You have mastered an ultimate grappling technique capable of breaking even the mightiest of foes.

feats.name: Golden Body
feats.description: Strike harder and heal more rapidly.

feats.name: Grand Medic's Mask
feats.description: Your mask is infused with restorative magic associated with Ibex, the Flourishing Field, so it constantly repairs itself.

feats.name: Great Shield Mastery
feats.description: You've learned how to maximize the defensive abilities of the largest shields.

feats.name: Head of the Night Parade
feats.description: You remember the revelry of the Night Parade and call them to your aid in a riotous display.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Head of the Night Parade U

feats.name: Heart of the Kaiju
feats.description: Witnessing the might of a kaiju up close awoke a new ferocity within you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Heart of the Kaiju U

feats.name: Herald's Strike
feats.description: The power of your blows can send your victim hurling through your deity’s realm for a fragment of a second.

feats.name: Hex Master
feats.description: You embody the link to your patron so completely that you can cast your hexes in rapid succession.

feats.name: Hidden Paragon
feats.description: When you slip out of sight, you disappear.

feats.name: Hierophant's Power
feats.description: You have entwined yourself with the natural world, and its full power flows through you.

feats.name: Icy Apotheosis
feats.description: You are as much a creature of cold as whatever ancestry you were born to.

feats.name: Illimitable Finisher
feats.description: Your strikes flow endlessly.

feats.name: Immortal Bear
feats.description: Your body thrums with the primal vitality of the greatest of the ursine beasts.

feats.name: Immortal Techniques
feats.description: You flow from technique to technique, renewing yourself as you embrace each style you have mastered.

feats.name: Impossible Snares
feats.description: You can create endless shorter-lived snares, protecting your lair or using them against foes.

feats.name: Impossible Striker
feats.description: Nothing can prevent you from making a sneak attack, even if your opponent can see every blow coming.

feats.name: Impossible Technique
feats.description: You execute a maneuver that defies possibility.

feats.name: Inexhaustible Countermoves
feats.description: At the start of each enemy's turn, you gain an extra reaction

feats.name: Just the Facts
feats.description: You fundamentally understand everything to the point where your research can't possibly be wrong.

feats.name: Kinetic Pinnacle
feats.description: No one can match the pace at which elements flow from you.

feats.name: Legendary Rider
feats.description: You and your mount move like one being, effortlessly reading each other’s signals and synchronizing even in the thick of battle.

feats.name: Legendary Shot
feats.description: You focus on your hunted prey, perceiving angles, air resistance, and every variable that would affect your ranged attack.

feats.name: Legendary Summoner
feats.description: Your ability to summon extends past your other spellcasting.

feats.name: Ley Line Conduit
feats.description: You can draw magic from the ley lines of the world.

feats.name: Lightning Qi
feats.description: Qi flows freely from within you.

feats.name: Live the Creed
feats.description: You’ve become an unparalleled figure among your faith, able to align your divine abilities with unparalleled swiftness.

feats.name: Living God
feats.description: You have reached heights of power equaling Razmir’s himself.

feats.name: Maker of Miracles
feats.description: You are a conduit for truly deific power.

feats.name: May Death Itself Reconsider
feats.description: Your will is so steadfast that even death can’t stop you.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited May Death Itself Reconsider

feats.name: Mega Bomb
feats.description: You can add a highly explosive additive to an alchemical bomb to turn it into a mega bomb.

feats.name: Mimic Protections
feats.description: By adopting resonant reflections, you have learned to copy the abilities of other creatures as well.

feats.name: Mind over Matter
feats.description: Your mind’s limits are only what you imagine them to be.

feats.name: Moment of Apotheosis
feats.description: For a small moment, you can assume the form of your god.

feats.name: More Real than Real
feats.description: Your performances aren’t just well-known, they’re famous across the land and beyond.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited More Real than Real U

feats.name: Mortal Possibility
feats.description: You made yourself into a paragon of mortality and prove that deities aren't needed to achieve greatness.

feats.name: Mystery Conduit
feats.description: The power of your mystery enables you access to myriad magic.

feats.name: Omnikinesis
feats.description: You can realign your kinetic gate with a thought.

feats.name: Oracular Providence
feats.description: Your mystery grants you access to deep reserves of truly miraculous divine power.

feats.name: Pack Takedown
feats.description: The pack is strongest when it acts as one, and like a group of hungry wolves, you work together to bring down a single target.

feats.name: Panache Paragon
feats.description: You find opportunities to perform stylish feats in the moments between others' heartbeats and eye blinks.

feats.name: Paradoxical Mystery
feats.description: The truest depths of your divine mystery are fathomless and contradictory, granting you changing powers that even you can barely begin to fathom.

feats.name: Patron Reborn
feats.description: You have fully realized the ability to serve as a patron.

feats.name: Patron's Truth
feats.description: You have mastered the greatest secrets of your patron’s magic and learned a fundamental truth about your patron, even if their identity still remains a mystery.

feats.name: Peerless Captain
feats.description: When you have an active follower in an encounter, you are quickened.

feats.name: Pennant of Victory
feats.description: You wave your banner in victory, signaling to your allies that the fight is won.

feats.name: Perfect Encore
feats.description: You develop another incredible creation.

feats.name: Perfect Mutagen
feats.description: You have enhanced the formulas for your mutagens, aligning them perfectly to your physiology.

feats.name: Perfect Readiness
feats.description: You prepare to fire with an instinctive speed and muscle memory that go beyond your conscious thoughts.

feats.name: Pied Piping
feats.description: You learn the pied piping composition spell, which enables you to control the actions of weak-minded individuals.

feats.name: Plum Deluge
feats.description: You have learned to saturate an area with poison.

feats.name: Protective Spirit Mask
feats.description: Your mask carries the protective instincts of White Bull, the Horn Forger, and no one will hurt your allies while you have anything to say about it.

feats.name: Quaking Stomp
feats.description: You stomp the ground with such force that it creates a minor earthquake, with the effects of the earthquake spell.

feats.name: Reach for Immortality
feats.description: Your divine spark is now a bonfire in your soul, bringing you to the very cusp of undying immortality.

feats.name: Reactive Distraction
feats.description: You reactively switch with your decoy to foil your foe.

feats.name: Reclaim Spell
feats.description: You have learned to manipulate reflections of magic, similar to the resonant reflections.

feats.name: Reflecting Riposte
feats.description: You attempt to counteract the triggering spell using powerful magical techniques observed in the Kortos Mounts.

feats.name: Remake the World
feats.description: For the briefest of moments, you can reach into the realm of true gods, gaining the power to shape reality to your will.

feats.name: Ricochet Legend
feats.description: The more obstacles between you and your target, the deadlier your shots become, as you ricochet off multiple surfaces to hit them.

feats.name: Ringmaster's Introduction
feats.description: You announce the triggering ally with a litany of their legendary achievements, spurring them to action.

feats.name: Ruby Resurrection
feats.description: In a burst of flame, you return to health like a phoenix rising from the ashes.

feats.name: Sacred Defender
feats.description: You are a great warrior that can stand strong against the fiercest opponents to your cause.

feats.name: Scapegoat Parallel Self
feats.description: You've realized a way to manipulate the effects of your oracular curse.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Scapegoat Parallel Self U

feats.name: Sever Space
feats.description: You destroy the space between you and your targets, allowing you to strike with your melee weapons at great range.

feats.name: Shield Paragon
feats.description: Your shield is a vessel of divine protection.

feats.name: Sky Master Mask
feats.description: Your mask holds the legacy of Black Heron, the Wings of Knowledge, who united the aeromancers of the Shory Empire.

feats.name: Slinger's Reflexes
feats.description: Your ability to react to unexpected circumstances is preternaturally sharp.

feats.name: Song of the Fallen
feats.description: Gain the song of the fallen focus spell.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Song of the Fallen U

feats.name: Soul Oubliette
feats.description: Your mortal strike wrenches the soul from your victim’s body and imprisons it in your splinter of finality, with the effects of seize soul.

feats.name: Spell Combination
feats.description: You can merge spells, producing multiple effects with a single casting.

feats.name: Spell Mastery
feats.description: You have mastered a handful of spells to such a degree that you can cast them even if you haven’t prepared them in advance.

feats.name: Spellshape Channel
feats.description: Deep understanding of divine revelations into the nature of vital essence allows you to freely manipulate the energy of life and death.

feats.name: Spellshape Mastery
feats.description: Your mastery of magic ensures that you can alter your spells just as easily as you can cast them normally.

feats.name: Stalking Feline Mask
feats.description: Like Azure Leopard, the Patient Warden, your mask makes you most at home in the night and teaches you how to use the darkness to hunt.

feats.name: Steal Essence
feats.description: Being in the presence of the aeon orbs as they deteriorated has taught you how to siphon energy, and you do so with the required magic item.

feats.name: Storyteller's Mask
feats.description: Your mask remembers the stories of Shifting Frog, Storyteller of the Past and Future.

feats.name: Superior Sight
feats.description: Increase your visual acuity.

feats.name: Supreme Spellstrike
feats.description: You've made it almost effortless to combine spells and attacks.

feats.name: Swift Paragon
feats.description: The movement of you and your allies is swift and decisive as the judgment of your deity.

feats.name: Swordlord Exile
feats.description: You are a swordlord exile.

feats.name: Symphony of the Muse
feats.description: You have learned how to weave countless performances together into a solo symphony with multitudinous effects.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard Symphony of the Muse

feats.name: Synergistic Spell
feats.description: You combine your synergy and spells into a fantastic web of magic, allowing you to cast two spells at once.

feats.name: Tenacious Blood Magic
feats.description: You have learned how to invest magic more deeply by witnessing Aroden's works.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Tenacious Blood Magic U

feats.name: The Tyrant Falls!
feats.description: You've reached the apex of the Crimson Oath's power.

feats.name: Thick Hide Mask
feats.description: Your mask grants you the toughness of Elephant, the Conjured Chronicle.

feats.name: Time Dilation Cascade
feats.description: You borrow a bit of time from the future to act now.
feats.raw_header: PFS Limited Time Dilation Cascade U

feats.name: Tireless Guide's Mask
feats.description: Your mask hosts the legacy of Golden Snake, the Tireless Guide, allowing you to guide others with ease.

feats.name: To the Ends of the Earth
feats.description: Your ability to track your prey has surpassed explanation, allowing you to trace your prey’s movements and predict its location with ease.
feats.raw_header: PFS Standard To the Ends of the Earth

feats.name: Tower Shield Mastery
feats.description: You've learned how to maximize the defensive abilities of your tower shield.

feats.name: Triple Threat
feats.description: You can divide your attention three ways when hunting.

feats.name: True Channel Spell
feats.description: You are a true conduit for spiritual power, able to unleash the greatest spells.

feats.name: True Shapeshifter
feats.description: You transcend the limitations of form.

feats.name: Twin Eidolon
feats.description: You can transform to match your eidolon.

feats.name: Ubiquitous Overdrive
feats.description: You prepare a variety of incredible gizmos on each of your allies, linking them together through careful modification to enable you to power them up all at once.

feats.name: Ubiquitous Weakness
feats.description: You've nurtured your bonds with your comrades, allowing you to share the benefits of your esoterica.

feats.name: Ultimate Flexibility
feats.description: Your experience keeps you on your toes, helping you adopt complex strategies on the fly and face the most dangerous challenges.

feats.name: Ultimate Polymath
feats.description: You can flexibly cast all of your spells, granting a dizzying array of possible options.

feats.name: Ultimate Skirmisher
feats.description: You are so skilled at navigating the wild, your movement is completely unaffected by terrain.

feats.name: Unlimited Demesne
feats.description: You can move your demesne here and there, bringing it wherever your journey takes you.

feats.name: Unlimited Potential
feats.description: The laws of magic can limit your mind only if you think you need them, and you've grown past the need for such limits.

feats.name: Unstoppable Juggernaut
feats.description: You have become a brutal, unstoppable force of nature, able to shrug off mortal wounds with ease.

feats.name: Unyielding Force
feats.description: Thanks to your armor, almost nothing can stop you.

feats.name: Verdant Presence
feats.description: The life-giving properties of the aeon orbs flourish within you.

feats.name: Vigil's Palisades
feats.description: When you use Persistent Creation, you can create up to three special wooden shields that provide a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and have Hardness 15, 120 HP, and BT 60.

feats.name: Vigilant Mask
feats.description: Your mask grants the extraordinary magical senses of Carmine Jaws, the Hyena who Looks Between.

feats.name: Vitality-Manipulating Stance
feats.description: You have learned to attack meridians and pressure points.

feats.name: Vivacious Afterimage
feats.description: You move so quickly that you create a short-lived afterimage, looks exactly like you, in front of you or behind you.

feats.name: Wake of Devastation
feats.description: Like a kaiju, you leave a trail of destruction in your wake.

feats.name: Weapon Supremacy
feats.description: Your skill with weapons bends the laws of reality, allowing you to continuously attack with speed that would normally require magical assistance.

feats.name: Whirlwind Spell
feats.description: You combine the might of a multitarget spell with a whirling flurry of attacks.

feats.name: Wish Alchemy
feats.description: You have learned Artokus Kirran's most hidden secrets, granting you the ability to create alchemy infused with the power of wishes.

feats.name: Witch's Hut
feats.description: Your home is an animated structure that obeys your commands.

feats.name: Wonder Worker
feats.description: The thaumaturge's path culminates with the working of wonders.

feats.name: Worldsphere Gravity
feats.description: Though creating demiplanes usually requires lengthy rituals, you know how to establish minor planar effects.

feats.name: Wrath of the First Ghoul
feats.description: The ravenous maggots inside you become capable of exploding forth from your attacks into the wounds of an opponent, whispering telepathic words of destruction that invoke horrific flashbacks of Kabriri's transformation from elf to ghoul or psychic images of hundreds of maggots bursting from the victim's flesh all at once.
feats.raw_header: Wrath of the First Ghoul R

feats.name: Zombie Horde
feats.description: You built your reanimated construct companion of modular components from various corpses.
